_**User (2026-02-24 17:34:45Z)**_

Implement the following plan:

# Activity Log Popup for Action Execution

## Context

Currently, when users execute actions from the Actions tab (bumps, stage changes, etc.), no activity is logged. The activity timeline in the slide-over is completely manual. We need to:
1. Show an **activity log popup** when actions are executed, pre-filled with the right activity type/title, so users can add context before it's saved
2. Make the **"Book Next Meeting"** action show a popup with a meeting date/time picker (linked to `next_meeting_at`) + activity form
3. Show a **time picker** in the activity form when the type is "meeting"

## What Changes

**Single file**: `app/crm/sales-pipeline/page.tsx`

### 1. New state: `activityLogPrompt`

```typescript
const [activityLogPrompt, setActivityLogPrompt] = useState<{
  oppId: string;
  oppName: string;
  type: ActivityType;
  title: string;
  showMeetingPicker?: boolean; // true for "Book Next Meeting" actions
} | null>(null);
```

### 2. New state: `activityLogForm`

Separate from the existing `activityForm` (which lives in the slide-over). This form is for the popup dialog:

```typescript
const [activityLogForm, setActivityLogForm] = useState<{
  description: string;
  outcome: string;
  next_step: string;
  next_step_date?: string;
  meeting_date?: string;  // only for meeting type — links to next_meeting_at
  meeting_time?: string;  // hour/minute for the meeting
}>({ description: '', outcome: '', next_step: '' });
```

### 3. Modify `handleActionExecute()`

After executing bump/stage_change, instead of just finishing, open the activity log popup with pre-filled data:

| Action | Activity Type | Pre-filled Title | showMeetingPicker |
|---|---|---|---|
| `bump` (Send First DM, Bump #N) | `message` | "Bump #N sent" | no |
| stage_change to `warm` ("Replied!") | `message` | "KOL replied" | no |
| stage_change to `tg_intro` ("Got TG!") | `message` | "Got TG handle" | no |
| stage_change to `booked` ("Booked!") | `meeting` | "Meeting booked" | yes |
| stage_change to `discovery_done` | `meeting` | "Discovery call completed" | no |
| stage_change to `proposal_sent` | `proposal` | "Proposal sent" | no |
| stage_change to `v2_contract` ("To Contract") | `call` | "Moving to contract" | no |
| stage_change to `v2_closed_won` ("Signed!") | `note` | "Deal closed won!" | no |
| `open_detail` for "Book Next Meeting!" | `meeting` | "Meeting scheduled" | yes |
| `open_detail` for "Schedule Meeting" | `meeting` | "Meeting scheduled" | yes |
| Other `open_detail` actions | no popup, open slide-over as before | — | — |

For "Book Next Meeting!" and "Schedule Meeting": instead of opening the slide-over, show the activity log popup with `showMeetingPicker: true`. The meeting date/time from the popup will update `next_meeting_at` on the opportunity.

### 4. `confirmActivityLog()` handler

When user submits the popup:
1. Create the activity via `SalesPipelineService.createActivity()`
2. If `showMeetingPicker` and a meeting date was set → also call `SalesPipelineService.update(oppId, { next_meeting_at })` to link the meeting date
3. Reset form and close popup
4. Refetch data

### 5. `renderActivityLogPrompt()` — Dialog UI

A `<Dialog>` (same pattern as orbitPrompt/closedLostPrompt) with `z-[80]`:

- **Header**: "Log Activity — {oppName}"
- **Pre-filled type badge** (read-only, showing the activity type icon + label)
- **Pre-filled title** (editable Input)
- If `showMeetingPicker`:
  - **Meeting Date** — Popover + CalendarPicker (same style as edit form, z-[90])
  - **Meeting Time** — Popover + hour/minute scroll columns (same style as edit form, z-[90])
- **Description** (Textarea, optional)
- **Outcome** (Input, optional)
- **Next Step** (Input, optional)
- **Next Step Date** (Popover + CalendarPicker, optional)
- **Footer**: Cancel + "Log Activity" button

### 6. Activity form in slide-over — show time picker for "meeting" type

In the existing activity form (slide-over, ~line 2670), when `activityForm.type === 'meeting'`:
- Show an additional **Meeting Date** (Popover + CalendarPicker) and **Meeting Time** (Popover + hour/minute columns) row
- On submit, if meeting date is set, also update `next_meeting_at` on the opportunity

### 7. Render the dialog

Add `{renderActivityLogPrompt()}` alongside `{renderOrbitPrompt()}` and `{renderClosedLostPrompt()}` at the bottom of the component return.

## Key Design Decisions

- **Popup appears AFTER the action executes** (for bumps/stage changes) — the action already happened, this is to log context. The popup is skippable (Cancel still saves the action, just without an activity log).
- **"Book Next Meeting" is special** — the popup appears INSTEAD of the slide-over, with a meeting date picker that writes to `next_meeting_at`.
- **Reuses existing `SalesPipelineService.createActivity()`** — no service changes needed.
- **Separate form state** from slide-over's `activityForm` to avoid interference.

## Verification

1. `npm run build` passes
2. Bump action → popup appears with type "message", title "Bump #N sent", user can add description
3. Stage change → popup appears with appropriate type/title
4. "Book Next Meeting!" → popup shows meeting date/time pickers + activity form
5. Meeting date from popup updates `next_meeting_at` on the opportunity
6. Cancel on popup still preserves the executed action (bump/stage change already happened)
7. In slide-over activity form, selecting "meeting" type shows date/time pickers
8. Submitting meeting activity from slide-over also updates `next_meeting_at`

    77→function DroppableColumn({ id, children, className }: { id: string; children: React.ReactNode; className?: string }) {
    78→  const { setNodeRef, isOver } = useDroppable({ id });
    79→  return (
    80→    <div ref={setNodeRef} className={`${className} ${isOver ? 'ring-2 ring-blue-400 ring-offset-2' : ''}`}>
    81→      {children}
    82→    </div>
    83→  );
    84→}
    85→
    86→function SortableCard({ id, children }: { id: string; children: React.ReactNode }) {
    87→  const { attributes, listeners, setNodeRef, transform, transition, isDragging } = useSortable({ id });
    88→  const style = {
    89→    transform: CSS.Transform.toString(transform),
    90→    transition,
    91→    opacity: isDragging ? 0.5 : 1,
    92→  };
    93→  return (
    94→    <div ref={setNodeRef} style={style} {...attributes} {...listeners}>
    95→      {children}
    96→    </div>
    97→  );
    98→}
    99→
   100→function SortableTableRow({ id, children, className, onClick }: { id: string; children: React.ReactNode; className?: string; onClick?: () => void }) {
   101→  const { attributes, listeners, setNodeRef, transform, transition, isDragging } = useSortable({ id });
   102→  const style: React.CSSProperties = {
   103→    transform: CSS.Translate.toString(transform),
   104→    transition,
   105→    opacity: isDragging ? 0.5 : 1,
   106→    position: 'relative' as const,
   107→    zIndex: isDragging ? 1 : 0,
   108→  };
   109→  return (
   110→    <TableRow ref={setNodeRef} style={style} className={`${className || ''} ${isDragging ? 'bg-blue-50 shadow-lg' : ''}`} onClick={onClick}>
   111→      <TableCell className="w-10">
   112→        <div
   113→          {...attributes}
   114→          {...listeners}
   115→          className="cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing p-1 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded"
   116→          onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}
   117→        >
   118→          <GripVertical className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   119→        </div>
   120→      </TableCell>
   121→      {children}
   122→    </TableRow>
   123→  );
   124→}

   212→  // ============================================
   213→  // Dashboard Metrics (computed from opportunities)

   215→
   216→  const dashboardMetrics = useMemo(() => {
   217→    const all = opportunities;
   218→    const pipelineActive = all.filter(o => PIPELINE_STAGES.includes(o.stage as SalesPipelineStage));
   219→    const closedWon = all.filter(o => o.stage === 'v2_closed_won');
   220→    const closedLost = all.filter(o => o.stage === 'v2_closed_lost');
   221→    const inOrbit = all.filter(o => o.stage === 'orbit');
   222→
   223→    // Stages past cold_dm = responded
   224→    const pastColdDm = all.filter(o => o.stage !== 'cold_dm');
   225→    const coldDmCount = outreachTotal > 0 ? outreachTotal : all.filter(o => o.stage === 'cold_dm').length;
   226→    const totalDmsSent = all.length; // every opp started as a DM
   227→    const responseRate = totalDmsSent > 0 ? (pastColdDm.length / totalDmsSent) * 100 : 0;
   228→
   229→    // Meetings booked = in booked or any stage after it
   230→    const bookedAndBeyond = ['booked', 'discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won'];
   231→    const meetingsBooked = all.filter(o => bookedAndBeyond.includes(o.stage)).length;
   232→
   233→    // Discovery calls = in discovery_done or later
   234→    const discoveryAndBeyond = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won'];
   235→    const discoveryCalls = all.filter(o => discoveryAndBeyond.includes(o.stage)).length;
   236→
   237→    // Close rate = won / (won + lost)
   238→    const totalClosed = closedWon.length + closedLost.length;
   239→    const closeRate = totalClosed > 0 ? (closedWon.length / totalClosed) * 100 : 0;
   240→
   241→    // Avg deal size (closed won)
   242→    const wonValues = closedWon.map(o => o.deal_value || 0).filter(v => v > 0);
   243→    const avgDealSize = wonValues.length > 0 ? wonValues.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / wonValues.length : 0;
   244→
   245→    // Avg close time (days from created_at to closed_at for won deals)
   246→    const closeTimes = closedWon
   247→      .filter(o => o.created_at && o.closed_at)
   248→      .map(o => (new Date(o.closed_at!).getTime() - new Date(o.created_at).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   249→    const avgCloseTime = closeTimes.length > 0 ? closeTimes.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / closeTimes.length : 0;
   250→
   251→    // Qualified % = bucket A + B / total
   252→    const qualifiedCount = all.filter(o => o.bucket === 'A' || o.bucket === 'B').length;
   253→    const qualifiedPct = all.length > 0 ? (qualifiedCount / all.length) * 100 : 0;
   254→
   255→    // Bucket A %
   256→    const bucketAPct = all.length > 0 ? (all.filter(o => o.bucket === 'A').length / all.length) * 100 : 0;
   257→
   258→    // Pipeline value (active)
   259→    const pipelineValue = pipelineActive.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0), 0);
   260→
   261→    // Overdue follow-ups
   262→    const now = new Date().toISOString();
   263→    const overdueFollowups = pipelineActive.filter(o =>
   264→      o.next_meeting_at && o.next_meeting_at < now
   265→    ).length;
   266→
   267→    // Proposals sent
   268→    const proposalsSent = all.filter(o =>
   269→      ['proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won'].includes(o.stage)
   270→    ).length;
   271→
   272→    return {
   273→      totalDmsSent,
   274→      responseRate,
   275→      meetingsBooked,
   276→      discoveryCalls,
   277→      closeRate,
   278→      avgDealSize,
   279→      avgCloseTime,
   280→      qualifiedPct,
   281→      bucketAPct,
   282→      pipelineValue,
   283→      activeDeals: pipelineActive.length,
   284→      overdueFollowups,
   285→      bamfamViolations: metrics.bamfamViolations,
   286→      closedWon: closedWon.length,
   287→      closedLost: closedLost.length,
   288→      inOrbit: inOrbit.length,
   289→      proposalsSent,
   290→      coldDmCount,
   291→    };
   292→  }, [opportunities, metrics.bamfamViolations, outreachTotal]);

   294→  // ============================================
   295→  // Data Fetching
   296→  // ============================================
   297→
   298→  const fetchData = useCallback(async () => {
   299→    try {

   351→
   352→  useEffect(() => {
   353→    if (activeTab === 'outreach') {
   354→      fetchOutreach();
   355→    }
   356→  }, [activeTab, fetchOutreach]);
   357→
   358→  // ============================================
   359→  // Filtered Opportunities
   360→  // ============================================
   361→
   362→  const filteredOpportunities = opportunities.filter(opp => {
   363→    if (searchTerm && !opp.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase())) return false;
   364→    if (pathFilter === 'closer' && opp.dm_account !== 'closer') return false;
   365→    if (pathFilter === 'sdr' && opp.dm_account !== 'sdr') return false;
   366→    return true;
   367→  });
   368→
   369→  const getStageOpps = (stage: SalesPipelineStage) =>
   370→    filteredOpportunities.filter(o => o.stage === stage).sort((a, b) => a.position - b.position);
   371→
   372→  const visiblePipelineStages = (pathFilter === 'closer' ? PATH_A_STAGES : PIPELINE_STAGES).filter(s => s !== 'cold_dm');
   373→
   374→  const orbitOpps = filteredOpportunities.filter(o => o.stage === 'orbit');
   375→  const orbitByReason = ORBIT_REASONS.map(r => ({
   376→    ...r,
   377→    opps: orbitOpps.filter(o => o.orbit_reason === r.value),
   378→  }));
   379→
   380→  // ============================================
   381→  // CRUD Handlers
   382→  // ============================================
   383→
   384→  const handleCreate = async () => {
   385→    if (!form.name.trim()) return;
   386→    setIsSubmitting(true);
   387→    try {
   388→      await SalesPipelineService.create({ ...form, stage: form.stage || ('cold_dm' as OpportunityStage) });
   389→      setIsCreateOpen(false);
   390→      setForm({ name: '' });
   391→      await fetchData();
   392→    } catch (err: any) {
   393→      alert(err.message || 'Error creating opportunity');
   394→    } finally {
   395→      setIsSubmitting(false);
   396→    }
   397→  };
   398→
   399→  const handleUpdate = async () => {
   400→    if (!editingOpp || !form.name.trim()) return;
   401→    setIsSubmitting(true);
   402→    try {
   403→      await SalesPipelineService.update(editingOpp.id, form);
   404→      setSlideOverMode('view');
   405→      setEditingOpp(null);
   406→      setForm({ name: '' });
   407→      await fetchData();
   408→    } catch (err: any) {
   409→      alert(err.message || 'Error updating opportunity');
   410→    } finally {
   411→      setIsSubmitting(false);
   412→    }
   413→  };
   414→
   415→  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
   416→    if (!confirm('Delete this opportunity?')) return;
   417→    try {
   418→      await SalesPipelineService.delete(id);
   419→      if (slideOverOpp?.id === id) setSlideOverOpp(null);
   420→      await fetchData();
   421→      if (activeTab === 'outreach') await fetchOutreach();
   422→    } catch (err) {
   423→      console.error('Error deleting:', err);
   424→    }
   425→  };
   426→
   427→  const handleStageChange = async (oppId: string, newStage: SalesPipelineStage, currentStage: string) => {
   428→    if (newStage === 'orbit') {
   429→      setOrbitPrompt({ oppId, fromStage: currentStage });
   430→      return;
   431→    }
   432→    if (newStage === 'v2_closed_lost') {
   433→      setClosedLostPrompt({ oppId, fromStage: currentStage });
   434→      return;
   435→    }
   436→    try {
   437→      await SalesPipelineService.update(oppId, { stage: newStage as OpportunityStage });
   438→      await fetchData();
   439→      if (activeTab === 'outreach') await fetchOutreach();
   440→    } catch (err) {
   441→      console.error('Error changing stage:', err);
   442→    }
   443→  };
   444→
   445→  const confirmOrbit = async () => {
   446→    if (!orbitPrompt) return;
   447→    try {
   448→      await SalesPipelineService.update(orbitPrompt.oppId, {
   449→        stage: 'orbit' as OpportunityStage,
   450→        orbit_reason: orbitReasonValue,
   451→      });
   452→      setOrbitPrompt(null);
   453→      setOrbitReasonValue('no_response');
   454→      await fetchData();
   455→    } catch (err) {
   456→      console.error('Error moving to orbit:', err);
   457→    }
   458→  };
   459→
   460→  const confirmClosedLost = async () => {
   461→    if (!closedLostPrompt) return;
   462→    try {
   463→      await SalesPipelineService.update(closedLostPrompt.oppId, {
   464→        stage: 'v2_closed_lost' as OpportunityStage,
   465→        closed_lost_reason: closedLostReasonValue || undefined,
   466→      });
   467→      setClosedLostPrompt(null);
   468→      setClosedLostReasonValue('');
   469→      await fetchData();
   470→    } catch (err) {
   471→      console.error('Error closing lost:', err);
   472→    }
   473→  };
   474→
   475→  const handleResurrect = async (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
   476→    try {
   477→      await SalesPipelineService.update(opp.id, {
   478→        stage: 'cold_dm' as OpportunityStage,
   479→        orbit_reason: null,
   480→      });
   481→      await fetchData();
   482→    } catch (err) {
   483→      console.error('Error resurrecting:', err);
   484→    }
   485→  };
   486→
   487→  const handleRecordBump = async (oppId: string) => {
   488→    if (isBumping) return;
   489→    setIsBumping(true);
   490→    // Optimistic update — immediately reflect in UI
   491→    setOpportunities(prev => prev.map(o =>
   492→      o.id === oppId ? { ...o, bump_number: Math.min(o.bump_number + 1, 4), last_bump_date: new Date().toISOString() } : o
   493→    ));
   494→    try {
   495→      await SalesPipelineService.recordBump(oppId);
   496→      await fetchData();
   497→      if (activeTab === 'outreach') await fetchOutreach();
   498→      if (slideOverOpp?.id === oppId) {
   499→        await fetchActivities(oppId);
```

   870→    'Follow Up': { label: 'Follow Up', hint: 'Send a follow-up DM. After messaging, log it as an activity below so the team knows.' },

   876→    'Chase Signature': { label: 'Chase Signature', hint: 'Follow up on the contract. Once they sign, use the "Signed!" button to close the deal.' },
   877→    'Reschedule': { label: 'Reschedule Meeting', hint: 'Meeting needs rescheduling. Click the pencil icon (Edit) → update the Next Meeting date field.' },
   878→    'No Show': { label: 'No Show', hint: 'They didn\'t show up. Log a "No Show" activity below and decide whether to reschedule or orbit.' },
   879→    'Keep Bumping': { label: 'Keep Bumping', hint: 'Override the orbit suggestion — review notes and continue follow-up DMs.' },
   880→  };
   881→
   882→  const handleActionExecute = async (oppId: string, action: ReturnType<typeof getNextAction>, opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
   883→    setExecutingAction(oppId);
   884→    try {
   885→      if (action.actionType === 'bump') {
   886→        await handleRecordBump(oppId);
   887→      } else if (action.actionType === 'stage_change' && action.targetStage) {
   888→        await handleStageChange(oppId, action.targetStage, opp.stage);
   889→      } else {
   890→        const guidance = ACTION_GUIDANCE[action.label];
   891→        openSlideOver(opp, guidance);
   892→      }
   893→    } finally {
   894→      setExecutingAction(null);
   895→    }
   896→  };
   897→
   898→  // ============================================
   899→  // Helpers
   900→  // ============================================
   901→
   902→  const getUserName = (userId: string | null) => {
   903→    if (!userId) return '—';
   904→    const u = users.find(u => u.id === userId);
   905→    return u?.name || u?.email || '—';
   906→  };
   907→
   908→  const activityIcon = (type: ActivityType) => {
   909→    switch (type) {
   910→      case 'call': return <Phone className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
   911→      case 'message': return <MessageSquare className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
   912→      case 'meeting': return <Calendar className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
   913→      case 'proposal': return <FileText className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
   914→      case 'note': return <StickyNote className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
   915→      case 'bump': return <Zap className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
   916→    }
   917→  };
   918→
   919→  // ============================================
   920→  // RENDER: Opportunity Card (Kanban)
   921→  // ============================================
   922→
   923→  const renderCard = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity, isDragging: boolean = false) => {
   924→    const colors = STAGE_COLORS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || STAGE_COLORS.cold_dm;
   925→    const bamfam = isBAMFAM(opp);
   926→
   927→    return (
   928→      <Card
   929→        className={`group hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200 border-l-4 ${colors.border} ${isDragging ? 'shadow-lg ring-2 ring-blue-400 opacity-90' : ''} ${bamfam ? 'bg-red-50/30' : ''}`}
   930→        onClick={() => openSlideOver(opp)}
   931→      >
   932→        <CardContent className="p-4">
   933→          <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2">
   934→            <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   935→              {/* Name with drag handle */}
   936→              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   937→                <GripVertical className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-300 flex-shrink-0 cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing" />
   938→                <Building2 className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400 flex-shrink-0" />
   939→                <p className="font-medium text-gray-900 truncate">{opp.name}</p>
   940→              </div>
   941→
   942→              {/* Deal Value */}
   943→              {opp.deal_value && (
   944→                <p className="text-lg font-semibold text-emerald-600 mt-2">
   945→                  ${opp.deal_value.toLocaleString()}
   946→                </p>
   947→              )}
   948→
   949→              {/* Badges */}
   950→              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5 mt-2">
   951→                {opp.bucket && (
   952→                  <Badge className={`text-xs ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].bg} ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].text} border-0`}>
   953→                    Bucket {opp.bucket}
   954→                  </Badge>
   955→                )}
   956→                {opp.dm_account === 'closer' && (
   957→                  <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs bg-white border-blue-300 text-blue-600">Closer</Badge>
   958→                )}
   959→                {opp.dm_account === 'sdr' && (
   960→                  <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs bg-white border-green-300 text-green-600">SDR</Badge>
   961→                )}
   962→                {opp.source && (
   963→                  <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs bg-white capitalize">
   964→                    {opp.source.replace('_', ' ')}
   965→                  </Badge>
   966→                )}
   967→              </div>
   968→
   969→              {/* Details */}
   970→              <div className="mt-3 space-y-1.5 text-xs text-gray-500">
   971→                {/* Bump progress (cold_dm only) */}
   972→                {opp.stage === 'cold_dm' && (
   973→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
   974→                    <Zap className="h-3 w-3 flex-shrink-0 text-sky-500" />
   975→                    <span>Bump {opp.bump_number}/4</span>
   976→                    <div className="flex gap-0.5">
   977→                      {[1, 2, 3, 4].map(i => (
   978→                        <div key={i} className={`w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full ${i <= opp.bump_number ? 'bg-sky-500' : 'bg-gray-200'}`} />
   979→                      ))}
   980→                    </div>
   981→                  </div>
   982→                )}
   983→
   984→                {/* Warm sub-state */}
   985→                {opp.stage === 'warm' && opp.warm_sub_state && (
   986→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
   987→                    <MessageSquare className="h-3 w-3 flex-shrink-0" />
   988→                    <span className={opp.warm_sub_state === 'interested' ? 'text-green-600 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500'}>
   989→                      {opp.warm_sub_state === 'interested' ? 'Interested' : 'Silent'}
   990→                    </span>
   991→                  </div>
   992→                )}
   993→
   994→                {/* Temperature bar */}
   995→                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   996→                  <div className="flex-1 h-1.5 bg-gray-100 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
   997→                    <div
   998→                      className={`h-full rounded-full ${opp.temperature_score >= 70 ? 'bg-green-500' : opp.temperature_score >= 40 ? 'bg-amber-500' : 'bg-red-400'}`}
   999→                      style={{ width: `${opp.temperature_score}%` }}
  1000→                    />
  1001→                  </div>
  1002→                  <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-400">{opp.temperature_score}</span>
  1003→                </div>
  1004→
  1005→                {/* BAMFAM warning */}
  1006→                {bamfam && (
  1007→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-red-600">
  1008→                    <AlertTriangle className="h-3 w-3" />
  1009→                    <span className="font-medium">BAMFAM</span>
  1010→                  </div>
  1011→                )}
  1012→
  1013→                {/* Last contacted */}
  1014→                {opp.last_contacted_at && (
  1015→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
  1016→                    <Clock className="h-3 w-3 flex-shrink-0" />
  1017→                    <span>{formatDistanceToNow(new Date(opp.last_contacted_at), { addSuffix: true })}</span>
  1018→                  </div>
  1019→                )}
```

  3046→  const renderOrbitPrompt = () => (

   629→  const openSlideOver = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity, guidance?: { label: string; hint: string }) => {
   630→    setSlideOverOpp(opp);
   631→    setSlideOverMode('view');
   632→    setActionGuidance(guidance || null);
   633→    fetchActivities(opp.id);
   634→    setActivityForm({ opportunity_id: opp.id, type: 'note', title: '' });
   635→  };
   636→
   637→  const populateForm = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
   638→    setForm({
   639→      name: opp.name,
   640→      dm_account: opp.dm_account,
   641→      bucket: opp.bucket || undefined,
   642→      temperature_score: opp.temperature_score,
   643→      source: opp.source || undefined,
   644→      tg_handle: opp.tg_handle || undefined,
   645→      owner_id: opp.owner_id || undefined,
   646→      referrer: opp.referrer || undefined,
   647→      affiliate_id: opp.affiliate_id || undefined,
   648→      deal_value: opp.deal_value || undefined,
   649→      currency: opp.currency,
   650→      next_meeting_at: opp.next_meeting_at || undefined,
   651→      next_meeting_type: opp.next_meeting_type || undefined,
   652→      notes: opp.notes || undefined,
   653→    });
   654→  };
   655→
   656→  const openEditDialog = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
   657→    populateForm(opp);
   658→    if (slideOverOpp?.id === opp.id) {
   659→      // Editing from slide-over — switch to edit mode inline
   660→      setEditingOpp(opp);
   661→      setSlideOverMode('edit');
   662→    } else {
   663→      // Editing from table/kanban — open dialog
   664→      setEditingOpp(opp);
   665→    }
   666→  };
   667→
   668→  const toggleKanbanCollapse = (stage: string) => {
   669→    setCollapsedKanbanStages(prev => {
   670→      const next = new Set(prev);
   671→      next.has(stage) ? next.delete(stage) : next.add(stage);
   672→      return next;
   673→    });
   674→  };
   675→
   676→  // ============================================
   677→  // BAMFAM check
   678→  // ============================================
   679→
   680→  const isBAMFAM = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
   681→    const postDiscovery: SalesPipelineStage[] = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'];
   682→    if (!postDiscovery.includes(opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage)) return false;
   683→    if (!opp.next_meeting_at) return true;
   684→    return new Date(opp.next_meeting_at) < new Date();
   685→  };
   686→
   687→  // ============================================
   688→  // Actions Tab: getNextAction helper
```

   688→  // Actions Tab: getNextAction helper
   689→  // ============================================
   690→
   691→  type ActionPriority = 'urgent' | 'high' | 'medium' | 'low' | 'wait';
   692→  type ActionExecutionType = 'bump' | 'stage_change' | 'open_detail' | 'none';
   693→
   694→  type ActionAlternative = { label: string; actionType: ActionExecutionType; targetStage?: SalesPipelineStage; variant: 'default' | 'warn' | 'danger'; quick?: boolean };
   695→
   696→  const getNextAction = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity): {
   697→    label: string;
   698→    hint: string;
   699→    priority: ActionPriority;
   700→    actionType: ActionExecutionType;
   701→    targetStage?: SalesPipelineStage;
   702→    isActionable: boolean;
   703→    sortScore: number;
   704→    alternatives: ActionAlternative[];
   705→  } => {
   706→    const postDiscovery: SalesPipelineStage[] = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'];
   707→
   708→    // BAMFAM violation — any post-discovery stage with no future meeting
   709→    // For discovery_done without proposal, show both BAMFAM + Send Proposal context
   710→    if (postDiscovery.includes(opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage)) {
   711→      const hasFutureMeeting = opp.next_meeting_at && new Date(opp.next_meeting_at) > new Date();
   712→      if (!hasFutureMeeting) {
   713→        // Fix #4: discovery_done without proposal — show Send Proposal as primary, BAMFAM as hint
   714→        if (opp.stage === 'discovery_done' && !opp.proposal_sent_at) {
   715→          return { label: 'Send Proposal', hint: 'Draft & send proposal. Also book a follow-up meeting (BAMFAM).', priority: 'urgent', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'proposal_sent', isActionable: true, sortScore: 1, alternatives: [
   716→            { label: 'Book Meeting', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },
   717→            { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
   718→          ]};
   719→        }
   720→        return { label: 'Book Next Meeting!', hint: 'No future meeting set — DM to schedule', priority: 'urgent', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 1, alternatives: [
   721→          { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
   722→          { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
   723→        ]};
   724→      }
   725→    }
   726→
   727→    switch (opp.stage) {
   728→      // Fix #2: v2_contract — "Chase Signature" as primary (open_detail), "Signed!" as quick alt
   729→      case 'v2_contract':
   730→        return { label: 'Chase Signature', hint: 'Follow up on the contract — get it signed', priority: 'urgent', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 2, alternatives: [
   731→          { label: 'Signed!', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_won', variant: 'default', quick: true },
   732→          { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
   733→        ]};
   734→
   735→      case 'proposal_call':
   736→        return { label: 'To Contract', hint: 'Handle objections → move to contract', priority: 'urgent', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_contract', isActionable: true, sortScore: 3, alternatives: [
   737→          { label: 'Follow Up', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },
   738→          { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
   739→        ]};
   740→
   741→      case 'cold_dm': {
   742→        if (opp.bump_number >= 4) {
   743→          return { label: 'Review → Orbit', hint: '4 bumps sent, no reply — shelve or orbit', priority: 'medium', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', isActionable: true, sortScore: 50, alternatives: [
   744→            { label: 'Replied!', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'warm', variant: 'default', quick: true },
   745→            { label: 'Keep Bumping', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },
   746→          ]};
   747→        }
   748→        const bumpAlts: ActionAlternative[] = [
   749→          { label: 'Replied!', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'warm', variant: 'default', quick: true },
   750→          { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
   751→        ];
   752→        // Fix #6: bump_number=0 but has last_bump_date (was reduced) — show "Bump" not "Send First DM"
   753→        if (opp.bump_number === 0 && !opp.last_bump_date) {
   754→          return { label: 'Send First DM', hint: 'Send intro DM on IG/X', priority: 'high', actionType: 'bump', isActionable: true, sortScore: 10, alternatives: bumpAlts };
   755→        }
   756→        if (opp.last_bump_date) {
   757→          const daysSince = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(opp.last_bump_date).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   758→          if (daysSince >= 3) {
   759→            return { label: `Bump #${opp.bump_number + 1}`, hint: `Last bump ${daysSince}d ago — send follow-up DM`, priority: 'high', actionType: 'bump', isActionable: true, sortScore: 11, alternatives: bumpAlts };
   760→          }
   761→          const daysLeft = 3 - daysSince;
   762→          return { label: `Wait ${daysLeft}d`, hint: 'Too soon to bump again', priority: 'wait', actionType: 'none', isActionable: false, sortScore: 100, alternatives: [] };
   763→        }
   764→        return { label: `Bump #${opp.bump_number + 1}`, hint: 'Send follow-up DM', priority: 'high', actionType: 'bump', isActionable: true, sortScore: 11, alternatives: bumpAlts };
   765→      }
   766→
   767→      // Fix #3: warm/interested — open detail to enter TG handle first, "Got TG!" is quick alt after
   768→      case 'warm':
   769→        if (opp.warm_sub_state === 'interested') {
   770→          return { label: 'Get TG Handle', hint: 'They replied — ask for Telegram, then enter it in Edit', priority: 'high', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 15, alternatives: [

   773→          ]};
   774→        }
   775→        return { label: 'Follow Up', hint: 'No reply yet — send another message on DM', priority: 'high', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 20, alternatives: [
   776→          { label: 'Got TG!', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'tg_intro', variant: 'default' },
   777→          { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
   778→        ]};
   779→
   780→      case 'tg_intro':
   781→        return { label: 'Booked!', hint: 'Send Calendly link on TG to schedule', priority: 'high', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'booked', isActionable: true, sortScore: 18, alternatives: [

   783→          { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
   784→        ]};
   785→
   786→      // Fix #1: booked with meeting — check if meeting is future vs past

   789→          return { label: 'Schedule Meeting', hint: 'Set the meeting date & time', priority: 'high', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 16, alternatives: [
   790→            { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
   791→          ]};
   792→        }
   793→        const meetingInFuture = new Date(opp.next_meeting_at) > new Date();
   794→        if (meetingInFuture) {
   795→          return { label: 'Prep for Meeting', hint: 'Review notes & prep talking points before the call', priority: 'low', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 60, alternatives: [
   796→            { label: 'Reschedule', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },
   797→            { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
   798→          ]};

   800→        // Meeting is in the past — call should have happened

   808→      case 'discovery_done':

   812→            { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
   813→          ]};
   814→        }
   815→        return { label: 'Follow Up Proposal', hint: 'Check if they reviewed the proposal', priority: 'high', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 19, alternatives: [

   822→          { label: 'Call Set', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'proposal_call', variant: 'default', quick: true },

   824→        ]};
   825→
   826→      case 'orbit': {

   859→      });

   867→    'Book Next Meeting!': { label: 'Book Next Meeting', hint: 'Click the pencil icon (Edit) → set the Next Meeting date field. No deal should exist without a future meeting (BAMFAM).' },

   873→    'Follow Up Proposal': { label: 'Follow Up Proposal', hint: 'Message them to check if they reviewed the proposal. Log their response as an activity below.' },
   874→    'Need More Info': { label: 'Need More Info', hint: 'They need more details before a proposal. Add notes on what they need, then follow up.' },
   875→    'Resurrect': { label: 'Resurrect Check', hint: 'It\'s been 90+ days. Review their notes — DM to re-engage, or move to Lost if no longer viable.' },

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-24 17:38:25Z)**_

Build passes successfully. All changes are implemented:

1. **New `activityLogPrompt` + `activityLogForm` state** — tracks the popup dialog state, separate from the slide-over's activity form
2. **Modified `handleActionExecute()`** — after bump/stage_change actions execute, opens the activity log popup with pre-filled type and title. "Book Next Meeting!" and "Schedule Meeting" open the popup with `showMeetingPicker: true` instead of the slide-over.
3. **`confirmActivityLog()` handler** — creates the activity, optionally updates `next_meeting_at` if meeting picker was used, then refetches data
4. **`renderActivityLogPrompt()` Dialog** — full popup UI with read-only type badge, editable title, optional meeting date/time pickers (z-[90]), description, outcome, next step, next step date, and Cancel/Log Activity buttons
5. **Slide-over activity form meeting pickers** — when activity type is "meeting", shows meeting date + time pickers. On submit, also updates `next_meeting_at` on the opportunity.
6. **Dialog rendered** alongside orbit/closed-lost prompts at the bottom of the component

## Complete Code Analysis for Sales Pipeline Page

Based on my thorough review of `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/crm/sales-pipeline/page.tsx` and `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/lib/salesPipelineService.ts`, here's everything you requested:

### 1. ACTIONS TAB RENDERING CODE (`renderActionsTab`)

**Lines 1892–2158** - Complete function:

```typescript
const renderActionsTab = () => {
  const getPriorityIcon = (priority: ActionPriority) => {
    switch (priority) {
      case 'urgent': return <AlertTriangle className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-red-500" />;
      case 'high': return <Zap className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-amber-500" />;
      case 'medium': return <Clock className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-blue-500" />;
      case 'low': return <Clock className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-400" />;
      default: return null;
    }
  };

  const getButtonVariant = (priority: ActionPriority): 'destructive' | 'default' | 'outline' => {
    if (priority === 'urgent') return 'destructive';
    if (priority === 'high') return 'default';
    return 'outline';
  };

  const getTimingInfo = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity): { text: string; color: string } => {
    const daysAgo = (date: string | null) => {
      if (!date) return null;
      return Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(date).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
    };
    const daysUntil = (date: string | null) => {
      if (!date) return null;
      return Math.ceil((new Date(date).getTime() - Date.now()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
    };

    // Cold DM — show last bump timing
    if (opp.stage === 'cold_dm') {
      if (opp.bump_number === 0) return { text: 'Not bumped', color: 'text-gray-500' };
      const d = daysAgo(opp.last_bump_date);
      if (d === null) return { text: `${opp.bump_number}/4 bumps`, color: 'text-gray-500' };
      return {
        text: `Bumped ${d}d ago`,
        color: d >= 3 ? 'text-amber-500 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500',
      };
    }

    // Stages with next_meeting — show meeting timing
    if (opp.next_meeting_at) {
      const d = daysUntil(opp.next_meeting_at);
      if (d !== null) {
        if (d < 0) return { text: `Meeting ${Math.abs(d)}d ago`, color: 'text-red-500 font-medium' };
        if (d === 0) return { text: 'Meeting today', color: 'text-blue-600 font-medium' };
        return { text: `Meeting in ${d}d`, color: d <= 2 ? 'text-blue-600 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500' };
      }
    }

    // Proposal sent — show how long ago
    if (opp.stage === 'proposal_sent' || (opp.stage === 'discovery_done' && opp.proposal_sent_at)) {
      const d = daysAgo(opp.proposal_sent_at);
      if (d !== null) return {
        text: `Sent ${d}d ago`,
        color: d >= 5 ? 'text-amber-500 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500',
      };
    }

    // Orbit — show time in orbit
    if (opp.stage === 'orbit') {
      const d = daysAgo(opp.updated_at);
      if (d !== null) return { text: `${d}d in orbit`, color: d > 90 ? 'text-amber-500 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500' };
    }

    // Default — days since last contact
    const lastDate = opp.last_contacted_at || opp.last_bump_date || opp.created_at;
    const d = daysAgo(lastDate);
    if (d === null) return { text: '—', color: 'text-gray-400' };
    return {
      text: `${d}d silent`,
      color: d >= 7 ? 'text-red-500 font-medium' : d >= 3 ? 'text-amber-500' : 'text-gray-500',
    };
  };

  return (
    <div className="pb-8">
      {/* Filter sub-tabs */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mb-4">
        {([
          { key: 'all' as const, label: 'All Actions' },
          { key: 'mine' as const, label: 'My Actions' },
          { key: 'urgent' as const, label: 'Urgent Only' },
        ]).map(f => (
          <button
            key={f.key}
            onClick={() => setActionFilter(f.key)}
            className={`px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-md transition-colors ${
              actionFilter === f.key
                ? 'bg-sky-100 text-sky-700 border border-sky-200'
                : 'text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100 border border-transparent'
            }`}
          >
            {f.label}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Section Header */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 bg-violet-50 rounded-t-lg border border-violet-200 border-b-0">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <Zap className="h-4 w-4 text-violet-700" />
          <h4 className="font-semibold text-violet-700">Action Items</h4>
          <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium">{actionItems.length}</Badge>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Table */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-b-lg border border-gray-200 border-t-0">
        <Table>
          <TableHeader>
            <TableRow className="bg-gray-50/50">
              <TableHead>Name</TableHead>
              <TableHead className="w-[140px]">Stage</TableHead>
              <TableHead className="w-[70px]">Bucket</TableHead>
              <TableHead className="w-[260px]">Next Action</TableHead>
              <TableHead className="w-[120px]">Timing</TableHead>
              <TableHead className="w-[90px]">Temp</TableHead>
              <TableHead className="w-[100px]">Owner</TableHead>
              <TableHead className="w-[150px]"></TableHead>
            </TableRow>
          </TableHeader>
          <TableBody>
            {actionItems.length === 0 ? (
              <TableRow>
                <TableCell colSpan={8} className="text-center py-12">
                  <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2 text-gray-400">
                    <Zap className="h-8 w-8" />
                    <p className="text-sm font-medium">No actions needed right now</p>
                    <p className="text-xs">All caught up — check back later</p>
                  </div>
                </TableCell>
              </TableRow>
            ) : actionItems.map(({ opp, action }) => {
              const timing = getTimingInfo(opp);
              const stageColors = STAGE_COLORS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || STAGE_COLORS.cold_dm;
              return (
                <TableRow
                  key={opp.id}
                  className={`group hover:bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer ${action.priority === 'urgent' ? 'bg-red-50/40' : ''}`}
                  onClick={() => openSlideOver(opp)}
                >
                  <TableCell>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      <Building2 className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
                      <span className="font-medium">{opp.name}</span>
                    </div>
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell>
                    <span className={`inline-flex items-center whitespace-nowrap rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${stageColors.bg} ${stageColors.text} ${stageColors.border}`}>
                      {STAGE_LABELS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || opp.stage}
                    </span>
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell>
                    {opp.bucket && (
                      <span className={`inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].bg} ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].text}`}>
                        {opp.bucket}
                      </span>
                    )}
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell>
                    <div>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                        {getPriorityIcon(action.priority)}
                        <span className={`text-sm font-medium ${
                          action.priority === 'urgent' ? 'text-red-700' :
                          action.priority === 'high' ? 'text-amber-700' :
                          'text-gray-600'
                        }`}>
                          {action.label}
                        </span>
                      </div>
                      {action.hint && (
                        <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-400 mt-0.5 ml-5">{action.hint}</p>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell>
                    <span className={`text-xs ${timing.color}`}>{timing.text}</span>
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                      <div className="w-12 h-1.5 bg-gray-100 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                        <div
                          className={`h-full rounded-full ${opp.temperature_score >= 70 ? 'bg-green-500' : opp.temperature_score >= 40 ? 'bg-amber-500' : 'bg-red-400'}`}
                          style={{ width: `${opp.temperature_score}%` }}
                        />
                      </div>
                      <span className="text-xs text-gray-400">{opp.temperature_score}</span>
                    </div>
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell>{getUserName(opp.owner_id)}</TableCell>
                  <TableCell onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
                    {(() => {
                      const quickAlt = action.alternatives.find(a => a.quick);
                      const dropdownAlts = action.alternatives.filter(a => !a.quick);
                      return (
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                          <Button
                            variant={getButtonVariant(action.priority)}
                            size="sm"
                            className="h-7 text-xs"
                            disabled={executingAction === opp.id}
                            onClick={() => handleActionExecute(opp.id, action, opp)}
                            style={action.priority === 'high' ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : undefined}
                          >
                            {executingAction === opp.id ? (
                              <Loader2 className="h-3 w-3 animate-spin mr-1" />
                            ) : null}
                            {action.label}
                          </Button>
                          {quickAlt && (
                            <Button
                              variant="outline"
                              size="sm"
                              className="h-7 text-xs border-emerald-300 text-emerald-700 hover:bg-emerald-50"
                              onClick={() => {
                                if (quickAlt.actionType === 'stage_change' && quickAlt.targetStage) {
                                  handleStageChange(opp.id, quickAlt.targetStage, opp.stage);
                                } else {
                                  openSlideOver(opp, ACTION_GUIDANCE[quickAlt.label]);
                                }
                              }}
                            >
                              {quickAlt.label}
                            </Button>
                          )}
                          {dropdownAlts.length > 0 && (
                            <DropdownMenu>
                              <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
                                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-7 w-7 p-0">
                                  <ChevronDown className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                                </Button>
                              </DropdownMenuTrigger>
                              <DropdownMenuContent align="end" className="w-44 z-[80]">
                                {dropdownAlts.map(alt => (
                                  <DropdownMenuItem
                                    key={alt.label}
                                    className={alt.variant === 'danger' ? 'text-red-600' : alt.variant === 'warn' ? 'text-orange-600' : ''}
                                    onClick={() => {
                                      if (alt.actionType === 'stage_change' && alt.targetStage) {
                                        handleStageChange(opp.id, alt.targetStage, opp.stage);
                                      } else {
                                        openSlideOver(opp, ACTION_GUIDANCE[alt.label]);
                                      }
                                    }}
                                  >
                                    {alt.variant === 'danger' ? <X className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-2" /> :
                                     alt.variant === 'warn' ? <RotateCcw className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-2" /> :
                                     <ArrowRight className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-2" />}
                                    {alt.label}
                                  </DropdownMenuItem>
                                ))}
                              </DropdownMenuContent>
                            </DropdownMenu>
                          )}
                        </div>
                      );
                    })()}
                  </TableCell>
                </TableRow>
              );
            })}
          </TableBody>
        </Table>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};
```

{/* Stats Cards */}
<div className="grid grid-cols-5 gap-4">
  <Card className="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-white border-blue-100">
    <CardContent className="pt-5 pb-4">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <div>
          <p className="text-sm font-medium text-blue-600">Total Pipeline</p>
          <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">{metrics.totalCount}</p>
        </div>
        <div className="p-2.5 bg-blue-100 rounded-lg">
          <Target className="h-5 w-5 text-blue-600" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </CardContent>
  </Card>
  <Card className="bg-gradient-to-br from-emerald-50 to-white border-emerald-100 relative group/bucket">
    <CardContent className="pt-5 pb-4">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <div>
          <p className="text-sm font-medium text-emerald-600">Bucket A</p>
          <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">{metrics.bucketA}</p>
        </div>
        <div className="p-2.5 bg-emerald-100 rounded-lg">
          <TrendingUp className="h-5 w-5 text-emerald-600" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </CardContent>
    <div className="absolute bottom-full left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 mb-2 px-3 py-1.5 text-white text-xs rounded-md whitespace-nowrap opacity-0 pointer-events-none group-hover/bucket:opacity-100 transition-opacity z-50" style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692' }}>
      High-value, high-intent prospects
      <div className="absolute top-full left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 border-4 border-transparent" style={{ borderTopColor: '#3e8692' }} />
    </div>
  </Card>
  <Card className="bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-50 to-white border-amber-100 relative group/bucket">
    <CardContent className="pt-5 pb-4">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <div>
          <p className="text-sm font-medium text-amber-600">Bucket B</p>
          <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">{metrics.bucketB}</p>
        </div>
        <div className="p-2.5 bg-amber-100 rounded-lg">
          <Users className="h-5 w-5 text-amber-600" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </CardContent>
    <div className="absolute bottom-full left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 mb-2 px-3 py-1.5 text-white text-xs rounded-md whitespace-nowrap opacity-0 pointer-events-none group-hover/bucket:opacity-100 transition-opacity z-50" style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692' }}>
      Medium-value, worth standard follow-up
      <div className="absolute top-full left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 border-4 border-transparent" style={{ borderTopColor: '#3e8692' }} />
    </div>
  </Card>
  <Card className="bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-50 to-white border-gray-200 relative group/bucket">
    <CardContent className="pt-5 pb-4">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <div>
          <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-600">Bucket C</p>
          <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">{metrics.bucketC}</p>
        </div>
        <div className="p-2.5 bg-gray-100 rounded-lg">
          <Building2 className="h-5 w-5 text-gray-600" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </CardContent>
    <div className="absolute bottom-full left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 mb-2 px-3 py-1.5 text-white text-xs rounded-md whitespace-nowrap opacity-0 pointer-events-none group-hover/bucket:opacity-100 transition-opacity z-50" style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692' }}>
      Lower priority, long-shot or early-stage leads
      <div className="absolute top-full left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 border-4 border-transparent" style={{ borderTopColor: '#3e8692' }} />
    </div>
  </Card>

    <CardContent className="pt-5 pb-4">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <div>

          <DollarSign className="h-5 w-5 text-purple-600" />
        </div>

</div>

{/* Sales Dashboard */}

        <Tooltip>
          <TooltipTrigger asChild>
            <Button
              variant="ghost"
              size="sm"
              className="h-6 px-2 text-[11px] text-gray-500 hover:text-[#3e8692] gap-1"
              disabled={isRecalculating}

            >

            <p>• Meeting booked: +15</p>
            <p>• Stage: warm +5, booked/tg_intro +10, discovery+ +15</p>
            <p>• Warm interested: +10</p>
            <p>• Stale cold DM (&gt;30d): −15</p>
            <p>• Bump exhaustion (3+): −10</p>

### 4. `actionItems` USEMEMO & `actionFilter` STATE

**Lines 181, 204** (state declarations):

```typescript
// Line 181 - Dashboard state
const [showDashboard, setShowDashboard] = useState(false);
const [isRecalculating, setIsRecalculating] = useState(false);

// Line 204 - Actions tab state
const [actionFilter, setActionFilter] = useState<'all' | 'mine' | 'urgent'>('mine');
```

**Lines 880–895** (`actionItems` useMemo):

```typescript
const actionItems = useMemo(() => {
  const terminalStages = ['v2_closed_won', 'v2_closed_lost'];
  return opportunities
    .filter(opp => !terminalStages.includes(opp.stage))
    .map(opp => ({ opp, action: getNextAction(opp) }))
    .filter(({ action }) => action.isActionable)
    .filter(({ opp, action }) => {
      if (actionFilter === 'mine') return opp.owner_id === user?.id;
      if (actionFilter === 'urgent') return action.priority === 'urgent';
      return true;
    })
    .sort((a, b) => {
      if (a.action.sortScore !== b.action.sortScore) return a.action.sortScore - b.action.sortScore;
      return (b.opp.temperature_score || 0) - (a.opp.temperature_score || 0);
    });
}, [opportunities, actionFilter, user?.id]);
```

### 5. PIPELINE STAGES CONSTANTS FROM SALESPIPELINESERVICE.TS

From `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/lib/salesPipelineService.ts`:

**Lines 28–47** (All stage constants):

```typescript
export const PIPELINE_STAGES: SalesPipelineStage[] = [
  'cold_dm', 'warm', 'tg_intro', 'booked', 'discovery_done',
  'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won',
];

export const PATH_A_STAGES: SalesPipelineStage[] = [
  'cold_dm', 'warm', 'booked', 'discovery_done',
  'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won',
];

export const PATH_B_STAGES: SalesPipelineStage[] = [
  'cold_dm', 'warm', 'tg_intro', 'booked', 'discovery_done',
  'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won',
];

export const ALL_V2_STAGES: SalesPipelineStage[] = [
  'cold_dm', 'warm', 'tg_intro', 'booked', 'discovery_done',
  'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won',
  'orbit', 'v2_closed_lost', 'nurture',
];
```

**PRE-DISCOVERY vs POST-DISCOVERY Analysis:**

**Pre-Discovery stages** (before the discovery call):
- `cold_dm` - Initial DM outreach
- `warm` - Has warmed up to the prospect
- `tg_intro` - Telegram intro (PATH_B only)
- `booked` - Call booked but discovery hasn't happened yet

**Discovery breakpoint**: `discovery_done` marks the end of discovery

**Post-Discovery stages** (after discovery):
- `discovery_done` - Discovery call completed
- `proposal_sent` - Proposal has been sent
- `proposal_call` - Call to discuss proposal
- `v2_contract` - Contract stage
- `v2_closed_won` - Deal closed (won)

**Other terminal/holding stages**:
- `orbit` - Paused/holding stage (in BAMFAM check: line 395)
- `v2_closed_lost` - Deal closed (lost)
- `nurture` - Long-term nurture hold

The key distinction is that **post-discovery stages are monitored for BAMFAM violations** (lines 395–397 in salesPipelineService.ts):

```typescript
const postDiscoveryStages: SalesPipelineStage[] = [
  'discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract',
];
```

These stages require a booked next meeting, hence the BAMFAM rule enforcement.

    88→
    89→export interface SalesPipelineOpportunity extends CRMOpportunity {
    90→  bucket: Bucket | null;
    91→  temperature_score: number;
    92→  dm_account: DmAccount;
    93→  bump_number: number;

    98→  calendly_sent_date: string | null;
    99→  calendly_booked_date: string | null;
   100→  gc_opened: string;
   101→  orbit_reason: OrbitReason | null;
   102→  closed_lost_reason: string | null;
   103→  dedup_key: string | null;
   104→  next_meeting_at: string | null;
   105→  next_meeting_type: string | null;
   106→  bucket_changed_at: string | null;
   107→  discovery_call_at: string | null;
   108→  proposal_sent_at: string | null;
   109→}
   110→
   111→export interface CRMActivity {
   112→  id: string;
   113→  opportunity_id: string;
   114→  type: ActivityType;
   115→  title: string;
   116→  description: string | null;
   117→  outcome: string | null;
   118→  next_step: string | null;
   119→  next_step_date: string | null;
   120→  owner_id: string | null;
   121→  created_at: string;
   122→}
   123→
   124→export interface CreateSalesPipelineOpportunityData {
   125→  name: string;
   126→  stage?: OpportunityStage;
   127→  dm_account?: DmAccount;
   128→  bucket?: Bucket;
   129→  temperature_score?: number;
   130→  source?: string;
   131→  tg_handle?: string;
   132→  owner_id?: string;
   133→  referrer?: string;
   134→  affiliate_id?: string;
   135→  deal_value?: number;
   136→  currency?: string;
   137→  notes?: string;
   138→  position?: number;
   139→}
   140→
   141→export interface CreateActivityData {
   142→  opportunity_id: string;
   143→  type: ActivityType;
   144→  title: string;
   145→  description?: string;
   146→  outcome?: string;
   147→  next_step?: string;
   148→  next_step_date?: string;
   149→}
   150→
   151→// ============================================
   152→// Sales Pipeline Service
   153→// ============================================
   154→
   155→export class SalesPipelineService {
   156→  // ----------------------------------------
   157→  // OPPORTUNITIES
   158→  // ----------------------------------------
   159→
   160→  static async getAll(): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity[]> {
   161→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   162→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   163→      .select(`
   164→        *,
   165→        affiliate:crm_affiliates(*),
   166→        client:clients!crm_opportunities_client_id_fkey(id, name)
   167→      `)
   168→      .in('stage', ALL_V2_STAGES)
   169→      .order('position', { ascending: true })
   170→      .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
   171→
   172→    if (error) {
   173→      console.error('Error fetching sales pipeline opportunities:', error);
   174→      throw error;
   175→    }
   176→    return (data || []) as SalesPipelineOpportunity[];
   177→  }
   178→
   179→  static async create(data: CreateSalesPipelineOpportunityData): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity> {
   180→    // Dedup check: name + tg_handle
   181→    if (data.name && data.tg_handle) {
   182→      const dedupKey = `${data.name.toLowerCase().trim()}::${data.tg_handle.toLowerCase().trim()}`;
   183→      const { data: existing } = await supabase
   184→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   185→        .select('id')
   186→        .eq('dedup_key', dedupKey)
   187→        .maybeSingle();
   188→
   189→      if (existing) {
   190→        throw new Error('A deal with this name and TG handle already exists');
   191→      }
   192→
   193→      (data as any).dedup_key = dedupKey;
   194→    }
   195→
   196→    const insertData = {
   197→      ...data,
   198→      stage: data.stage || 'cold_dm',
   199→    };
   200→
   201→    const { data: created, error } = await supabase
   202→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   203→      .insert([insertData])
   204→      .select()
   205→      .single();
   206→
   207→    if (error) throw error;
   208→
   209→    // Record stage history
   210→    await CRMService.recordStageHistory('opportunity', created.id, null, insertData.stage || 'cold_dm');
   211→
   212→    // Auto-calculate temperature score
   213→    await this.recalcTemperature(created.id);
   214→
   215→    return created as SalesPipelineOpportunity;
   216→  }
   217→
   218→  static async update(
   219→    id: string,
   220→    updates: Partial<CreateSalesPipelineOpportunityData> & {
   221→      warm_sub_state?: WarmSubState | null;
   222→      orbit_reason?: OrbitReason | null;
   223→      closed_lost_reason?: string | null;
   224→      next_meeting_at?: string | null;
   225→      next_meeting_type?: string | null;
   226→      bump_number?: number;
   227→      last_bump_date?: string | null;
   228→      bucket?: Bucket | null;
   229→      calendly_sent_via?: CalendlySentVia;
   230→      calendly_sent_date?: string | null;
   231→      calendly_booked_date?: string | null;
   232→      gc_opened?: string;
   233→    }
   234→  ): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity> {
   235→    // Get current state for stage history
   236→    const { data: current } = await supabase
   237→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   238→      .select('*')
   239→      .eq('id', id)
   240→      .single();
   241→
   242→    const updateData: any = { ...updates, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() };
   243→
   244→    // Auto-set timestamps on stage transitions
   245→    if (updates.stage && current) {
   246→      if (updates.stage === 'discovery_done' && !current.discovery_call_at) {
   247→        updateData.discovery_call_at = new Date().toISOString();
   248→      }
   249→      if (updates.stage === 'proposal_sent' && !current.proposal_sent_at) {
   250→        updateData.proposal_sent_at = new Date().toISOString();
   251→      }
   252→      if ((updates.stage === 'v2_closed_won' || updates.stage === 'v2_closed_lost') && !current.closed_at) {
   253→        updateData.closed_at = new Date().toISOString();
   254→      }
   255→    }
   256→
   257→    // Auto-set bucket_changed_at
   258→    if (updates.bucket && current && updates.bucket !== current.bucket) {
   259→      updateData.bucket_changed_at = new Date().toISOString();
   260→    }
   261→
   262→    const { data: updated, error } = await supabase
   263→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   264→      .update(updateData)
   265→      .eq('id', id)
   266→      .select()
   267→      .single();
   268→
   269→    if (error) throw error;
   270→
   271→    // Record stage change
   272→    if (updates.stage && current && current.stage !== updates.stage) {
   273→      await CRMService.recordStageHistory('opportunity', id, current.stage, updates.stage);
   274→    }
   275→
   276→    // Recalculate temperature score after stage/bucket/key field changes
   277→    await this.recalcTemperature(id);
   278→
   279→    return updated as SalesPipelineOpportunity;
   280→  }
   281→
   282→  static async delete(id: string): Promise<void> {
   283→    const { error } = await supabase
   284→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   285→      .delete()
   286→      .eq('id', id);
   287→
   288→    if (error) throw error;
   289→  }
   290→
   291→  // ----------------------------------------
   292→  // BUMPS
   293→  // ----------------------------------------
   294→
   295→  static async recordBump(id: string): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity> {
   296→    const { data: current } = await supabase
   297→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   298→      .select('bump_number')
   299→      .eq('id', id)
   300→      .single();
   301→
   302→    const newBumpNumber = (current?.bump_number || 0) + 1;
   303→
   304→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   305→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   306→      .update({
   307→        bump_number: newBumpNumber,
   308→        last_bump_date: new Date().toISOString(),
   309→        last_contacted_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   310→        updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   311→      })
   312→      .eq('id', id)
   313→      .select()
   314→      .single();
   315→
   316→    if (error) throw error;
   317→
   318→    // Also create a bump activity
   319→    await this.createActivity({
   320→      opportunity_id: id,
   321→      type: 'bump',
   322→      title: `Bump #${newBumpNumber}`,
   323→    });
   324→
   325→    // Recalculate temperature score
   326→    await this.recalcTemperature(id);
   327→
   328→    return data as SalesPipelineOpportunity;
   329→  }
   330→
   331→  static async reduceBump(id: string): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity> {
   332→    const { data: current } = await supabase
   333→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   334→      .select('bump_number')
   335→      .eq('id', id)
   336→      .single();
   337→
   338→    const newBumpNumber = Math.max((current?.bump_number || 0) - 1, 0);
   339→
   340→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   341→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   342→      .update({
   343→        bump_number: newBumpNumber,
   344→        updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   345→      })
   346→      .eq('id', id)
   347→      .select()
   348→      .single();
   349→
   350→    if (error) throw error;
   351→    return data as SalesPipelineOpportunity;
   352→  }
   353→
   354→  // ----------------------------------------
   355→  // ACTIVITIES
   356→  // ----------------------------------------
   357→
   358→  static async getActivities(opportunityId: string): Promise<CRMActivity[]> {
   359→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   360→      .from('crm_activities')
   361→      .select('*')
   362→      .eq('opportunity_id', opportunityId)
   363→      .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
   364→
   365→    if (error) throw error;
   366→    return data || [];
   367→  }
   368→
   369→  static async createActivity(activityData: CreateActivityData): Promise<CRMActivity> {
   370→    const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
   371→
   372→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   373→      .from('crm_activities')
   374→      .insert([{
   375→        ...activityData,
   376→        owner_id: user?.id || null,
   377→      }])
   378→      .select()
   379→      .single();
   380→
   381→    if (error) throw error;
   382→
   383→    // Recalculate temperature score (new activity affects engagement)
   384→    await this.recalcTemperature(activityData.opportunity_id);
   385→
   386→    return data;
   387→  }
   388→
   389→  // ----------------------------------------
   390→  // BAMFAM VIOLATIONS
   391→  // ----------------------------------------
   392→
   393→  static async getBAMFAMViolations(): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity[]> {
   394→    // BAMFAM: past discovery_done with no next_meeting or overdue next_meeting
   395→    const postDiscoveryStages: SalesPipelineStage[] = [
   396→      'discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract',
   397→    ];
   398→
   399→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   400→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   401→      .select(`
   402→        *,
   403→        affiliate:crm_affiliates(*),
   404→        client:clients!crm_opportunities_client_id_fkey(id, name)
   405→      `)
   406→      .in('stage', postDiscoveryStages)
   407→      .or('next_meeting_at.is.null,next_meeting_at.lt.' + new Date().toISOString());
   408→
   409→    if (error) throw error;
   410→    return (data || []) as SalesPipelineOpportunity[];
   411→  }
   412→
   413→  // ----------------------------------------
   414→  // STAGES HELPER
   415→  // ----------------------------------------
   416→
   417→  static getAvailableStages(dmAccount: DmAccount): SalesPipelineStage[] {
   418→    if (dmAccount === 'closer') return PATH_A_STAGES;
   419→    return PATH_B_STAGES;
   420→  }
   421→
   422→  // ----------------------------------------
   423→  // METRICS
   424→  // ----------------------------------------
   425→
   426→  static async getMetrics(): Promise<{
   427→    totalCount: number;
   428→    bucketA: number;
   429→    bucketB: number;
   430→    bucketC: number;
   431→    activeValue: number;
   432→    bamfamViolations: number;
   433→  }> {
   434→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   435→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   436→      .select('stage, bucket, deal_value, next_meeting_at')
   437→      .in('stage', ALL_V2_STAGES);
   438→
   439→    if (error) throw error;
   440→
   441→    const opps = data || [];
   442→    const activeStages = PIPELINE_STAGES;
   443→    const active = opps.filter(o => activeStages.includes(o.stage as SalesPipelineStage));
   444→
   445→    const postDiscovery = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'];
   446→    const now = new Date().toISOString();
   447→    const bamfam = opps.filter(o =>
   448→      postDiscovery.includes(o.stage) &&
   449→      (!o.next_meeting_at || o.next_meeting_at < now)
   450→    );
   451→
   452→    return {
   453→      totalCount: opps.length,
   454→      bucketA: opps.filter(o => o.bucket === 'A').length,
   455→      bucketB: opps.filter(o => o.bucket === 'B').length,
   456→      bucketC: opps.filter(o => o.bucket === 'C').length,
   457→      activeValue: active.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0), 0),
   458→      bamfamViolations: bamfam.length,
   459→    };
   460→  }
   461→
   462→  // ----------------------------------------
   463→  // POSITION UPDATES
   464→  // ----------------------------------------
   465→
   466→  static async updatePositions(positions: { id: string; position: number; stage?: OpportunityStage }[]): Promise<void> {
   467→    const updates = positions.map(({ id, position, stage }) => {
   468→      const updateData: any = { position, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() };
   469→      if (stage) updateData.stage = stage;
   470→      return supabase
   471→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   472→        .update(updateData)
   473→        .eq('id', id);
   474→    });
   475→
   476→    const results = await Promise.all(updates);
   477→    const errors = results.filter(r => r.error);
   478→    if (errors.length > 0) {
   479→      console.error('Errors updating positions:', errors);
   480→      throw errors[0].error;
   481→    }
   482→  }
   483→
   484→  // ----------------------------------------
   485→  // COLD DM PAGINATED (Outreach tab)
   486→  // ----------------------------------------
   487→
   488→  static async getColdDmsPaginated(
   489→    page: number,
   490→    pageSize: number,
   491→    filters: {
   492→      dm_account?: DmAccount;
   493→      bucket?: Bucket;
   494→      bumpRange?: 'none' | '1-2' | '3+';
   495→      searchTerm?: string;
   496→      sortBy?: string;
   497→      sortAsc?: boolean;
   498→      owner_id?: string;
   499→    }
   500→  ): Promise<{ data: SalesPipelineOpportunity[]; count: number }> {
   501→    const from = (page - 1) * pageSize;
   502→    const to = from + pageSize - 1;
   503→
   504→    let query = supabase
   505→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   506→      .select(`
   507→        *,
   508→        affiliate:crm_affiliates(*),
   509→        client:clients!crm_opportunities_client_id_fkey(id, name)
   510→      `, { count: 'exact' })
   511→      .eq('stage', 'cold_dm');
   512→
   513→    // Optional filters
   514→    if (filters.dm_account) {
   515→      query = query.eq('dm_account', filters.dm_account);
   516→    }
   517→    if (filters.bucket) {
   518→      query = query.eq('bucket', filters.bucket);
   519→    }
   520→    if (filters.searchTerm) {
   521→      query = query.ilike('name', `%${filters.searchTerm}%`);
   522→    }
   523→    if (filters.owner_id) {
   524→      query = query.eq('owner_id', filters.owner_id);
   525→    }
   526→    if (filters.bumpRange === 'none') {
   527→      query = query.eq('bump_number', 0);
   528→    } else if (filters.bumpRange === '1-2') {
   529→      query = query.gte('bump_number', 1).lte('bump_number', 2);
   530→    } else if (filters.bumpRange === '3+') {
   531→      query = query.gte('bump_number', 3);
   532→    }
   533→
   534→    // Sorting
   535→    const sortField = filters.sortBy || 'created_at';
   536→    const ascending = filters.sortAsc ?? false;
   537→    query = query.order(sortField, { ascending });
   538→
   539→    // Pagination
   540→    query = query.range(from, to);
   541→
   542→    const { data, error, count } = await query;
   543→
   544→    if (error) {
   545→      console.error('Error fetching cold DMs paginated:', error);
   546→      throw error;
   547→    }
   548→
   549→    return { data: (data || []) as SalesPipelineOpportunity[], count: count || 0 };
   550→  }
   551→
   552→  // ----------------------------------------
   553→  // BULK OPERATIONS
   554→  // ----------------------------------------
   555→
   556→  // ----------------------------------------
   557→  // TEMPERATURE SCORE
   558→  // ----------------------------------------
   559→
   560→  static async recalcTemperature(id: string): Promise<number | null> {
   561→    const { data, error } = await supabase.rpc('calculate_temperature_score', { opp_id: id });
   562→    if (error) {
   563→      console.error('Error recalculating temperature:', error);
   564→      return null;
   565→    }
   566→    return data;
   567→  }
   568→
   569→  static async recalcAllTemperatures(): Promise<number | null> {
   570→    const { data, error } = await supabase.rpc('recalculate_all_temperature_scores');
   571→    if (error) {
   572→      console.error('Error recalculating all temperatures:', error);
   573→      return null;
   574→    }
   575→    return data;
   576→  }
   577→
   578→  // ----------------------------------------
   579→  // BULK OPERATIONS
   580→  // ----------------------------------------
   581→
   582→  static async bulkRecordBump(ids: string[]): Promise<void> {
   583→    await Promise.all(ids.map(id => this.recordBump(id)));
   584→  }
   585→
   586→  static async bulkUpdateStage(ids: string[], stage: SalesPipelineStage): Promise<void> {
   587→    const now = new Date().toISOString();
   588→    const updates = ids.map(id =>
   589→      supabase
   590→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   591→        .update({ stage, updated_at: now })
   592→        .eq('id', id)
   593→    );
   594→
   595→    const results = await Promise.all(updates);
   596→    const errors = results.filter(r => r.error);
   597→    if (errors.length > 0) {
   598→      console.error('Errors in bulk stage update:', errors);
   599→      throw errors[0].error;
   600→    }
   601→  }
   602→
   603→  static async bulkDelete(ids: string[]): Promise<void> {
   604→    const deletes = ids.map(id =>
   605→      supabase
   606→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   607→        .delete()
   608→        .eq('id', id)
   609→    );
   610→
   611→    const results = await Promise.all(deletes);
   612→    const errors = results.filter(r => r.error);
   613→    if (errors.length > 0) {
   614→      console.error('Errors in bulk delete:', errors);
   615→      throw errors[0].error;
   616→    }
   617→  }
   618→}
   619→
```
