```text
  1892→  const renderActionsTab = () => {
  1893→    const getPriorityIcon = (priority: ActionPriority) => {
  1894→      switch (priority) {
  1895→        case 'urgent': return <AlertTriangle className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-red-500" />;
  1896→        case 'high': return <Zap className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-amber-500" />;
  1897→        case 'medium': return <Clock className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-blue-500" />;
  1898→        case 'low': return <Clock className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-400" />;
  1899→        default: return null;
  1900→      }
  1901→    };
  1902→
  1903→    const getButtonVariant = (priority: ActionPriority): 'destructive' | 'default' | 'outline' => {
  1904→      if (priority === 'urgent') return 'destructive';
  1905→      if (priority === 'high') return 'default';
  1906→      return 'outline';
  1907→    };
  1908→
  1909→    const getTimingInfo = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity): { text: string; color: string } => {
  1910→      const daysAgo = (date: string | null) => {
  1911→        if (!date) return null;
  1912→        return Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(date).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  1913→      };
  1914→      const daysUntil = (date: string | null) => {
  1915→        if (!date) return null;
  1916→        return Math.ceil((new Date(date).getTime() - Date.now()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  1917→      };
  1918→
  1919→      // Cold DM — show last bump timing
  1920→      if (opp.stage === 'cold_dm') {
  1921→        if (opp.bump_number === 0) return { text: 'Not bumped', color: 'text-gray-500' };
  1922→        const d = daysAgo(opp.last_bump_date);
  1923→        if (d === null) return { text: `${opp.bump_number}/4 bumps`, color: 'text-gray-500' };
  1924→        return {
  1925→          text: `Bumped ${d}d ago`,
  1926→          color: d >= 3 ? 'text-amber-500 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500',
  1927→        };
  1928→      }
  1929→
  1930→      // Stages with next_meeting — show meeting timing
  1931→      if (opp.next_meeting_at) {
  1932→        const d = daysUntil(opp.next_meeting_at);
  1933→        if (d !== null) {
  1934→          if (d < 0) return { text: `Meeting ${Math.abs(d)}d ago`, color: 'text-red-500 font-medium' };
  1935→          if (d === 0) return { text: 'Meeting today', color: 'text-blue-600 font-medium' };
  1936→          return { text: `Meeting in ${d}d`, color: d <= 2 ? 'text-blue-600 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500' };
  1937→        }
  1938→      }
  1939→
  1940→      // Proposal sent — show how long ago
  1941→      if (opp.stage === 'proposal_sent' || (opp.stage === 'discovery_done' && opp.proposal_sent_at)) {
  1942→        const d = daysAgo(opp.proposal_sent_at);
  1943→        if (d !== null) return {
  1944→          text: `Sent ${d}d ago`,
  1945→          color: d >= 5 ? 'text-amber-500 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500',
  1946→        };
  1947→      }
  1948→
  1949→      // Orbit — show time in orbit
  1950→      if (opp.stage === 'orbit') {
  1951→        const d = daysAgo(opp.updated_at);
  1952→        if (d !== null) return { text: `${d}d in orbit`, color: d > 90 ? 'text-amber-500 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500' };
  1953→      }
  1954→
  1955→      // Default — days since last contact
  1956→      const lastDate = opp.last_contacted_at || opp.last_bump_date || opp.created_at;
  1957→      const d = daysAgo(lastDate);
  1958→      if (d === null) return { text: '—', color: 'text-gray-400' };
  1959→      return {
  1960→        text: `${d}d silent`,
  1961→        color: d >= 7 ? 'text-red-500 font-medium' : d >= 3 ? 'text-amber-500' : 'text-gray-500',
  1962→      };
  1963→    };
  1964→
  1965→    return (
  1966→      <div className="pb-8">
  1967→        {/* Filter sub-tabs */}
  1968→        <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mb-4">
  1969→          {([
  1970→            { key: 'all' as const, label: 'All Actions' },
  1971→            { key: 'mine' as const, label: 'My Actions' },
  1972→            { key: 'urgent' as const, label: 'Urgent Only' },
  1973→          ]).map(f => (
  1974→            <button
  1975→              key={f.key}
  1976→              onClick={() => setActionFilter(f.key)}
  1977→              className={`px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-md transition-colors ${
  1978→                actionFilter === f.key
  1979→                  ? 'bg-sky-100 text-sky-700 border border-sky-200'
  1980→                  : 'text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100 border border-transparent'
  1981→              }`}
  1982→            >
  1983→              {f.label}
  1984→            </button>
  1985→          ))}
  1986→        </div>
  1987→
  1988→        {/* Section Header */}
  1989→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 bg-violet-50 rounded-t-lg border border-violet-200 border-b-0">
  1990→          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  1991→            <Zap className="h-4 w-4 text-violet-700" />
  1992→            <h4 className="font-semibold text-violet-700">Action Items</h4>
  1993→            <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium">{actionItems.length}</Badge>
  1994→          </div>
  1995→        </div>
  1996→
  1997→        {/* Table */}
  1998→        <div className="bg-white rounded-b-lg border border-gray-200 border-t-0">
  1999→          <Table>
  2000→            <TableHeader>
  2001→              <TableRow className="bg-gray-50/50">
  2002→                <TableHead>Name</TableHead>
  2003→                <TableHead className="w-[140px]">Stage</TableHead>
  2004→                <TableHead className="w-[70px]">Bucket</TableHead>
  2005→                <TableHead className="w-[260px]">Next Action</TableHead>
  2006→                <TableHead className="w-[120px]">Timing</TableHead>
  2007→                <TableHead className="w-[90px]">Temp</TableHead>
  2008→                <TableHead className="w-[100px]">Owner</TableHead>
  2009→                <TableHead className="w-[150px]"></TableHead>
  2010→              </TableRow>
  2011→            </TableHeader>
  2012→            <TableBody>
  2013→              {actionItems.length === 0 ? (
  2014→                <TableRow>
  2015→                  <TableCell colSpan={8} className="text-center py-12">
  2016→                    <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2 text-gray-400">
  2017→                      <Zap className="h-8 w-8" />
  2018→                      <p className="text-sm font-medium">No actions needed right now</p>
  2019→                      <p className="text-xs">All caught up — check back later</p>
  2020→                    </div>
  2021→                  </TableCell>
  2022→                </TableRow>
  2023→              ) : actionItems.map(({ opp, action }) => {
  2024→                const timing = getTimingInfo(opp);
  2025→                const stageColors = STAGE_COLORS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || STAGE_COLORS.cold_dm;
  2026→                return (
  2027→                  <TableRow
  2028→                    key={opp.id}
  2029→                    className={`group hover:bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer ${action.priority === 'urgent' ? 'bg-red-50/40' : ''}`}
  2030→                    onClick={() => openSlideOver(opp)}
  2031→                  >
  2032→                    <TableCell>
  2033→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  2034→                        <Building2 className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
  2035→                        <span className="font-medium">{opp.name}</span>
  2036→                      </div>
  2037→                    </TableCell>
  2038→                    <TableCell>
  2039→                      <span className={`inline-flex items-center whitespace-nowrap rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${stageColors.bg} ${stageColors.text} ${stageColors.border}`}>
  2040→                        {STAGE_LABELS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || opp.stage}
  2041→                      </span>
  2042→                    </TableCell>
  2043→                    <TableCell>
  2044→                      {opp.bucket && (
  2045→                        <span className={`inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].bg} ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].text}`}>
  2046→                          {opp.bucket}
  2047→                        </span>
  2048→                      )}
  2049→                    </TableCell>
  2050→                    <TableCell>
  2051→                      <div>
  2052→                        <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
  2053→                          {getPriorityIcon(action.priority)}
  2054→                          <span className={`text-sm font-medium ${
  2055→                            action.priority === 'urgent' ? 'text-red-700' :
  2056→                            action.priority === 'high' ? 'text-amber-700' :
  2057→                            'text-gray-600'

  2059→                            {action.label}
  2060→                          </span>

  2062→                        {action.hint && (

  2064→                        )}
  2065→                      </div>
  2066→                    </TableCell>
  2067→                    <TableCell>
  2068→                      <span className={`text-xs ${timing.color}`}>{timing.text}</span>
  2069→                    </TableCell>

  2071→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
  2072→                        <div className="w-12 h-1.5 bg-gray-100 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
  2073→                          <div
  2074→                            className={`h-full rounded-full ${opp.temperature_score >= 70 ? 'bg-green-500' : opp.temperature_score >= 40 ? 'bg-amber-500' : 'bg-red-400'}`}
```

```text
   880→  const actionItems = useMemo(() => {
   881→    const terminalStages = ['v2_closed_won', 'v2_closed_lost'];
   882→    return opportunities
   883→      .filter(opp => !terminalStages.includes(opp.stage))
   884→      .map(opp => ({ opp, action: getNextAction(opp) }))
   885→      .filter(({ action }) => action.isActionable)
   886→      .filter(({ opp, action }) => {
   887→        if (actionFilter === 'mine') return opp.owner_id === user?.id;
   888→        if (actionFilter === 'urgent') return action.priority === 'urgent';
   889→        return true;
   890→      })
   891→      .sort((a, b) => {
   892→        if (a.action.sortScore !== b.action.sortScore) return a.action.sortScore - b.action.sortScore;
   893→        return (b.opp.temperature_score || 0) - (a.opp.temperature_score || 0);
   894→      });
   895→  }, [opportunities, actionFilter, user?.id]);
   896→
   897→  // ============================================
   898→  // Actions Tab: Execute handler
   899→  // ============================================
   900→
   901→  const ACTION_GUIDANCE: Record<string, { label: string; hint: string }> = {
   902→    'Book Next Meeting!': { label: 'Book Next Meeting', hint: 'Click the pencil icon (Edit) → set the Next Meeting date field. No deal should exist without a future meeting (BAMFAM).' },
   903→    'Book Meeting': { label: 'Book Meeting', hint: 'Click the pencil icon (Edit) → set the Next Meeting date field to stay BAMFAM-compliant.' },
   904→    'Get TG Handle': { label: 'Get TG Handle', hint: 'DM them asking for their Telegram handle, then click Edit → fill in the TG Handle field. Once entered, click "Got TG!" to advance.' },
   905→    'Follow Up': { label: 'Follow Up', hint: 'Send a follow-up DM. After messaging, log it as an activity below so the team knows.' },
   906→    'Schedule Meeting': { label: 'Schedule Meeting', hint: 'Send Calendly or propose a time. Click the pencil icon (Edit) → set the Next Meeting date field once confirmed.' },
   907→    'Prep for Meeting': { label: 'Prep for Meeting', hint: 'Review their notes, bucket, and past activity below. Update Notes with talking points before the call.' },
   908→    'Follow Up Proposal': { label: 'Follow Up Proposal', hint: 'Message them to check if they reviewed the proposal. Log their response as an activity below.' },
   909→    'Need More Info': { label: 'Need More Info', hint: 'They need more details before a proposal. Add notes on what they need, then follow up.' },
   910→    'Resurrect': { label: 'Resurrect Check', hint: 'It\'s been 90+ days. Review their notes — DM to re-engage, or move to Lost if no longer viable.' },
   911→    'Chase Signature': { label: 'Chase Signature', hint: 'Follow up on the contract. Once they sign, use the "Signed!" button to close the deal.' },
   912→    'Reschedule': { label: 'Reschedule Meeting', hint: 'Meeting needs rescheduling. Click the pencil icon (Edit) → update the Next Meeting date field.' },
   913→    'No Show': { label: 'No Show', hint: 'They didn\'t show up. Log a "No Show" activity below and decide whether to reschedule or orbit.' },
   914→    'Keep Bumping': { label: 'Keep Bumping', hint: 'Override the orbit suggestion — review notes and continue follow-up DMs.' },
   915→  };
   916→
   917→  const openActivityLogPrompt = (oppId: string, oppName: string, type: ActivityType, title: string, showMeetingPicker?: boolean) => {
   918→    setActivityLogPrompt({ oppId, oppName, type, title, showMeetingPicker });
   919→    setActivityLogForm({ title, description: '', outcome: '', next_step: '' });
   920→  };
   921→
   922→  const handleActionExecute = async (oppId: string, action: ReturnType<typeof getNextAction>, opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
   923→    setExecutingAction(oppId);
   924→    try {
   925→      if (action.actionType === 'bump') {
   926→        await handleRecordBump(oppId);
   927→        // Show activity log popup after bump
   928→        const bumpTitle = action.label === 'Send First DM' ? 'First DM sent' : `${action.label} sent`;
   929→        openActivityLogPrompt(oppId, opp.name, 'message', bumpTitle);
```

```text
  3701→                  <p>• Recency: +30 minus days since last contact</p>
  3702→                  <p>• Engagement: +4 per activity (max +20)</p>
  3703→                  <p>• Meeting booked: +15</p>
  3704→                  <p>• Stage: warm +5, booked/tg_intro +10, discovery+ +15</p>
  3705→                  <p>• Warm interested: +10</p>
  3706→                  <p>• Stale cold DM (&gt;30d): −15</p>
  3707→                  <p>• Bump exhaustion (3+): −10</p>
  3708→                  <p>• Warm silent: −5</p>
  3709→                  <p>• Orbit → 5, Closed Lost → 0</p>
  3710→                </TooltipContent>
  3711→              </Tooltip>
  3712→            </TooltipProvider>
  3713→          </div>
  3714→          {showDashboard ? <ChevronUp className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" /> : <ChevronDown className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />}
  3715→        </div>
  3716→        {showDashboard && (
  3717→          <CardContent className="pt-0 pb-5 px-5 space-y-4">

  3733→                </div>

  3760→                </div>

  3764→                </div>
  3765→                <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
  3766→                  <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-[#3e8692]">{dashboardMetrics.avgCloseTime > 0 ? `${dashboardMetrics.avgCloseTime.toFixed(0)}d` : '—'}</p>
  3767→                  <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">Avg Close Time</p>
  3768→                </div>
  3769→                <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
  3770→                  <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-[#3e8692]">{dashboardMetrics.bucketAPct.toFixed(0)}%</p>

  3774→            </div>
  3775→
  3776→            {/* Pipeline Summary */}

  3781→                  <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-emerald-600">${dashboardMetrics.pipelineValue >= 1000 ? `${(dashboardMetrics.pipelineValue / 1000).toFixed(0)}K` : dashboardMetrics.pipelineValue.toLocaleString()}</p>
```

## Complete Code Analysis for Sales Pipeline Page

Based on my thorough review of `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/crm/sales-pipeline/page.tsx` and `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/lib/salesPipelineService.ts`, here's everything you requested:

### 1. ACTIONS TAB RENDERING CODE (`renderActionsTab`)

**Lines 1892–2158** - Complete function:

```typescript
const renderActionsTab = () => {
  const getPriorityIcon = (priority: ActionPriority) => {
    switch (priority) {
      case 'urgent': return <AlertTriangle className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-red-500" />;
      case 'high': return <Zap className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-amber-500" />;
      case 'medium': return <Clock className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-blue-500" />;
      case 'low': return <Clock className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-400" />;
      default: return null;
    }
  };

  const getButtonVariant = (priority: ActionPriority): 'destructive' | 'default' | 'outline' => {
    if (priority === 'urgent') return 'destructive';
    if (priority === 'high') return 'default';
    return 'outline';
  };

  const getTimingInfo = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity): { text: string; color: string } => {
    const daysAgo = (date: string | null) => {
      if (!date) return null;
      return Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(date).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
    };
    const daysUntil = (date: string | null) => {
      if (!date) return null;
      return Math.ceil((new Date(date).getTime() - Date.now()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
    };

    // Cold DM — show last bump timing
    if (opp.stage === 'cold_dm') {
      if (opp.bump_number === 0) return { text: 'Not bumped', color: 'text-gray-500' };
      const d = daysAgo(opp.last_bump_date);
      if (d === null) return { text: `${opp.bump_number}/4 bumps`, color: 'text-gray-500' };
      return {
        text: `Bumped ${d}d ago`,
        color: d >= 3 ? 'text-amber-500 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500',
      };
    }

    // Stages with next_meeting — show meeting timing
    if (opp.next_meeting_at) {
      const d = daysUntil(opp.next_meeting_at);
      if (d !== null) {
        if (d < 0) return { text: `Meeting ${Math.abs(d)}d ago`, color: 'text-red-500 font-medium' };
        if (d === 0) return { text: 'Meeting today', color: 'text-blue-600 font-medium' };
        return { text: `Meeting in ${d}d`, color: d <= 2 ? 'text-blue-600 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500' };
      }
    }

    // Proposal sent — show how long ago
    if (opp.stage === 'proposal_sent' || (opp.stage === 'discovery_done' && opp.proposal_sent_at)) {
      const d = daysAgo(opp.proposal_sent_at);
      if (d !== null) return {
        text: `Sent ${d}d ago`,
        color: d >= 5 ? 'text-amber-500 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500',
      };
    }

    // Orbit — show time in orbit
    if (opp.stage === 'orbit') {
      const d = daysAgo(opp.updated_at);
      if (d !== null) return { text: `${d}d in orbit`, color: d > 90 ? 'text-amber-500 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500' };
    }

    // Default — days since last contact
    const lastDate = opp.last_contacted_at || opp.last_bump_date || opp.created_at;
    const d = daysAgo(lastDate);
    if (d === null) return { text: '—', color: 'text-gray-400' };
    return {
      text: `${d}d silent`,
      color: d >= 7 ? 'text-red-500 font-medium' : d >= 3 ? 'text-amber-500' : 'text-gray-500',
    };
  };

  return (
    <div className="pb-8">
      {/* Filter sub-tabs */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mb-4">
        {([
          { key: 'all' as const, label: 'All Actions' },
          { key: 'mine' as const, label: 'My Actions' },
          { key: 'urgent' as const, label: 'Urgent Only' },
        ]).map(f => (
          <button
            key={f.key}
            onClick={() => setActionFilter(f.key)}
            className={`px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-md transition-colors ${
              actionFilter === f.key
                ? 'bg-sky-100 text-sky-700 border border-sky-200'
                : 'text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100 border border-transparent'
            }`}
          >
            {f.label}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Section Header */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 bg-violet-50 rounded-t-lg border border-violet-200 border-b-0">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <Zap className="h-4 w-4 text-violet-700" />
          <h4 className="font-semibold text-violet-700">Action Items</h4>
          <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium">{actionItems.length}</Badge>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Table */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-b-lg border border-gray-200 border-t-0">
        <Table>
          <TableHeader>
            <TableRow className="bg-gray-50/50">
              <TableHead>Name</TableHead>
              <TableHead className="w-[140px]">Stage</TableHead>
              <TableHead className="w-[70px]">Bucket</TableHead>
              <TableHead className="w-[260px]">Next Action</TableHead>
              <TableHead className="w-[120px]">Timing</TableHead>
              <TableHead className="w-[90px]">Temp</TableHead>
              <TableHead className="w-[100px]">Owner</TableHead>
              <TableHead className="w-[150px]"></TableHead>
            </TableRow>
          </TableHeader>
          <TableBody>
            {actionItems.length === 0 ? (
              <TableRow>
                <TableCell colSpan={8} className="text-center py-12">
                  <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2 text-gray-400">
                    <Zap className="h-8 w-8" />
                    <p className="text-sm font-medium">No actions needed right now</p>
                    <p className="text-xs">All caught up — check back later</p>
                  </div>
                </TableCell>
              </TableRow>
            ) : actionItems.map(({ opp, action }) => {
              const timing = getTimingInfo(opp);
              const stageColors = STAGE_COLORS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || STAGE_COLORS.cold_dm;
              return (
                <TableRow
                  key={opp.id}
                  className={`group hover:bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer ${action.priority === 'urgent' ? 'bg-red-50/40' : ''}`}
                  onClick={() => openSlideOver(opp)}
                >
                  <TableCell>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      <Building2 className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
                      <span className="font-medium">{opp.name}</span>
                    </div>
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell>
                    <span className={`inline-flex items-center whitespace-nowrap rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${stageColors.bg} ${stageColors.text} ${stageColors.border}`}>
                      {STAGE_LABELS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || opp.stage}
                    </span>
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell>
                    {opp.bucket && (
                      <span className={`inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].bg} ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].text}`}>
                        {opp.bucket}
                      </span>
                    )}
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell>
                    <div>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                        {getPriorityIcon(action.priority)}
                        <span className={`text-sm font-medium ${
                          action.priority === 'urgent' ? 'text-red-700' :
                          action.priority === 'high' ? 'text-amber-700' :
                          'text-gray-600'
                        }`}>
                          {action.label}
                        </span>
                      </div>
                      {action.hint && (
                        <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-400 mt-0.5 ml-5">{action.hint}</p>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell>
                    <span className={`text-xs ${timing.color}`}>{timing.text}</span>
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                      <div className="w-12 h-1.5 bg-gray-100 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                        <div
                          className={`h-full rounded-full ${opp.temperature_score >= 70 ? 'bg-green-500' : opp.temperature_score >= 40 ? 'bg-amber-500' : 'bg-red-400'}`}
                          style={{ width: `${opp.temperature_score}%` }}
                        />
                      </div>
                      <span className="text-xs text-gray-400">{opp.temperature_score}</span>
                    </div>
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell>{getUserName(opp.owner_id)}</TableCell>
                  <TableCell onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
                    {(() => {
                      const quickAlt = action.alternatives.find(a => a.quick);
                      const dropdownAlts = action.alternatives.filter(a => !a.quick);
                      return (
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                          <Button
                            variant={getButtonVariant(action.priority)}
                            size="sm"
                            className="h-7 text-xs"
                            disabled={executingAction === opp.id}
                            onClick={() => handleActionExecute(opp.id, action, opp)}
                            style={action.priority === 'high' ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : undefined}
                          >
                            {executingAction === opp.id ? (
                              <Loader2 className="h-3 w-3 animate-spin mr-1" />
                            ) : null}
                            {action.label}
                          </Button>
                          {quickAlt && (
                            <Button
                              variant="outline"
                              size="sm"
                              className="h-7 text-xs border-emerald-300 text-emerald-700 hover:bg-emerald-50"
                              onClick={() => {
                                if (quickAlt.actionType === 'stage_change' && quickAlt.targetStage) {
                                  handleStageChange(opp.id, quickAlt.targetStage, opp.stage);
                                } else {
                                  openSlideOver(opp, ACTION_GUIDANCE[quickAlt.label]);
                                }
                              }}
                            >
                              {quickAlt.label}
                            </Button>
                          )}
                          {dropdownAlts.length > 0 && (
                            <DropdownMenu>
                              <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
                                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-7 w-7 p-0">
                                  <ChevronDown className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                                </Button>
                              </DropdownMenuTrigger>
                              <DropdownMenuContent align="end" className="w-44 z-[80]">
                                {dropdownAlts.map(alt => (
                                  <DropdownMenuItem
                                    key={alt.label}
                                    className={alt.variant === 'danger' ? 'text-red-600' : alt.variant === 'warn' ? 'text-orange-600' : ''}
                                    onClick={() => {
                                      if (alt.actionType === 'stage_change' && alt.targetStage) {
                                        handleStageChange(opp.id, alt.targetStage, opp.stage);
                                      } else {
                                        openSlideOver(opp, ACTION_GUIDANCE[alt.label]);
                                      }
                                    }}
                                  >
                                    {alt.variant === 'danger' ? <X className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-2" /> :
                                     alt.variant === 'warn' ? <RotateCcw className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-2" /> :
                                     <ArrowRight className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-2" />}
                                    {alt.label}
                                  </DropdownMenuItem>
                                ))}
                              </DropdownMenuContent>
                            </DropdownMenu>
                          )}
                        </div>
                      );
                    })()}
                  </TableCell>
                </TableRow>
              );
            })}
          </TableBody>
        </Table>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};
```

---

### 2. TOP STAT CARDS SECTION

**Lines 3593–3672** - All 5 metric cards:

```typescript
<div className="grid grid-cols-5 gap-4">
  <Card className="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-white border-blue-100">
    <CardContent className="pt-5 pb-4">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <div>
          <p className="text-sm font-medium text-blue-600">Total Pipeline</p>
          <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">{metrics.totalCount}</p>

          <Target className="h-5 w-5 text-blue-600" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </CardContent>
  </Card>
  <Card className="bg-gradient-to-br from-emerald-50 to-white border-emerald-100 relative group/bucket">
    <CardContent className="pt-5 pb-4">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <div>
          <p className="text-sm font-medium text-emerald-600">Bucket A</p>
          <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">{metrics.bucketA}</p>
        </div>
        <div className="p-2.5 bg-emerald-100 rounded-lg">
          <TrendingUp className="h-5 w-5 text-emerald-600" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </CardContent>

      High-value, high-intent prospects

    </div>

    </div>
```

### 3. SHOWDASHBOARD TOGGLE & DASHBOARD SECTION

**Lines 3675–3715** (toggle header) and **Lines 3716–3798** (dashboard content):

```typescript
{/* Sales Dashboard */}
<Card className="border-gray-200">
  <div
    className="flex items-center justify-between px-5 py-3 cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors"
    onClick={() => setShowDashboard(!showDashboard)}
  >
    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
      <BarChart3 className="h-4 w-4 text-[#3e8692]" />
      <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">Sales Dashboard</span>
      <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0">This Week</Badge>
      <TooltipProvider delayDuration={200}>
        <Tooltip>
          <TooltipTrigger asChild>
            <Button
              variant="ghost"
              size="sm"
              className="h-6 px-2 text-[11px] text-gray-500 hover:text-[#3e8692] gap-1"
              disabled={isRecalculating}
              onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); handleRecalculateAll(); }}
            >
              <RotateCcw className={`h-3 w-3 ${isRecalculating ? 'animate-spin' : ''}`} />
              {isRecalculating ? 'Recalculating...' : 'Recalc Scores'}
            </Button>
          </TooltipTrigger>
          <TooltipContent side="bottom" align="start" className="max-w-xs text-xs space-y-1 p-3">
            <p className="font-semibold">Auto-calculates temperature (0–100)</p>
            <p>• Base: Bucket A=40, B=25, C=10, none=20</p>
            <p>• Recency: +30 minus days since last contact</p>
            <p>• Engagement: +4 per activity (max +20)</p>
            <p>• Meeting booked: +15</p>
            <p>• Stage: warm +5, booked/tg_intro +10, discovery+ +15</p>
            <p>• Warm interested: +10</p>
            <p>• Stale cold DM (&gt;30d): −15</p>
            <p>• Bump exhaustion (3+): −10</p>
            <p>• Warm silent: −5</p>
            <p>• Orbit → 5, Closed Lost → 0</p>
          </TooltipContent>
        </Tooltip>
      </TooltipProvider>
    </div>
    {showDashboard ? <ChevronUp className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" /> : <ChevronDown className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />}
  </div>
  {showDashboard && (
    <CardContent className="pt-0 pb-5 px-5 space-y-4">
      {/* Outreach Metrics */}
      <div>
        <p className="text-[11px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Outreach Metrics</p>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-6 gap-3">
          <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
            <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-[#3e8692]">{dashboardMetrics.totalDmsSent}</p>
            <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">DMs Sent</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-sky-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
            <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-sky-600">{dashboardMetrics.coldDmCount}</p>
            <p className="text-[11px] text-sky-600">Cold DMs</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
            <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-[#3e8692]">{dashboardMetrics.responseRate.toFixed(1)}%</p>
            <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">Response Rate</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
            <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-[#3e8692]">{dashboardMetrics.meetingsBooked}</p>
            <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">Meetings Booked</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
            <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-[#3e8692]">{dashboardMetrics.qualifiedPct.toFixed(0)}%</p>
            <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">Qualified (A+B)</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
            <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-[#3e8692]">{dashboardMetrics.proposalsSent}</p>
            <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">Proposals Sent</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Closing Metrics */}
      <div>
        <p className="text-[11px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Closing Metrics</p>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-5 gap-3">
          <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
            <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-[#3e8692]">{dashboardMetrics.discoveryCalls}</p>
            <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">Discovery Calls</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
            <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-[#3e8692]">{dashboardMetrics.closeRate.toFixed(0)}%</p>
            <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">Close Rate</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
            <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-[#3e8692]">${dashboardMetrics.avgDealSize > 0 ? (dashboardMetrics.avgDealSize >= 1000 ? `${(dashboardMetrics.avgDealSize / 1000).toFixed(0)}K` : dashboardMetrics.avgDealSize.toFixed(0)) : '0'}</p>
            <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">Avg Deal Size</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
            <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-[#3e8692]">{dashboardMetrics.avgCloseTime > 0 ? `${dashboardMetrics.avgCloseTime.toFixed(0)}d` : '—'}</p>
            <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">Avg Close Time</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
            <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-[#3e8692]">{dashboardMetrics.bucketAPct.toFixed(0)}%</p>
            <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">Bucket A %</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Pipeline Summary */}
      <div>
        <p className="text-[11px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Pipeline Summary</p>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-3">
          <div className="bg-emerald-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
            <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-emerald-600">${dashboardMetrics.pipelineValue >= 1000 ? `${(dashboardMetrics.pipelineValue / 1000).toFixed(0)}K` : dashboardMetrics.pipelineValue.toLocaleString()}</p>
            <p className="text-[11px] text-emerald-600">Pipeline Value</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-blue-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
            <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-blue-600">{dashboardMetrics.activeDeals}</p>
            <p className="text-[11px] text-blue-600">Active Deals</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-amber-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
            <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-amber-600">{dashboardMetrics.overdueFollowups}</p>
            <p className="text-[11px] text-amber-600">Overdue Follow-ups</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-red-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
            <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-red-600">{dashboardMetrics.bamfamViolations}</p>
            <p className="text-[11px] text-red-600">BAMFAM Violations</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </CardContent>
  )}
</Card>
```

### 4. `actionItems` USEMEMO & `actionFilter` STATE

**Lines 181, 204** (state declarations):

```typescript
// Line 181 - Dashboard state
const [showDashboard, setShowDashboard] = useState(false);
const [isRecalculating, setIsRecalculating] = useState(false);

// Line 204 - Actions tab state
const [actionFilter, setActionFilter] = useState<'all' | 'mine' | 'urgent'>('mine');
```

**Lines 880–895** (`actionItems` useMemo):

```typescript
const actionItems = useMemo(() => {
  const terminalStages = ['v2_closed_won', 'v2_closed_lost'];
  return opportunities
    .filter(opp => !terminalStages.includes(opp.stage))
    .map(opp => ({ opp, action: getNextAction(opp) }))
    .filter(({ action }) => action.isActionable)
    .filter(({ opp, action }) => {
      if (actionFilter === 'mine') return opp.owner_id === user?.id;
      if (actionFilter === 'urgent') return action.priority === 'urgent';
      return true;
    })
    .sort((a, b) => {
      if (a.action.sortScore !== b.action.sortScore) return a.action.sortScore - b.action.sortScore;
      return (b.opp.temperature_score || 0) - (a.opp.temperature_score || 0);
    });
}, [opportunities, actionFilter, user?.id]);
```

### 5. PIPELINE STAGES CONSTANTS FROM SALESPIPELINESERVICE.TS

From `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/lib/salesPipelineService.ts`:

**Lines 28–47** (All stage constants):

```typescript
export const PIPELINE_STAGES: SalesPipelineStage[] = [
  'cold_dm', 'warm', 'tg_intro', 'booked', 'discovery_done',
  'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won',
];

export const PATH_A_STAGES: SalesPipelineStage[] = [
  'cold_dm', 'warm', 'booked', 'discovery_done',
  'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won',
];

export const PATH_B_STAGES: SalesPipelineStage[] = [
  'cold_dm', 'warm', 'tg_intro', 'booked', 'discovery_done',
  'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won',
];

export const ALL_V2_STAGES: SalesPipelineStage[] = [
  'cold_dm', 'warm', 'tg_intro', 'booked', 'discovery_done',
  'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won',
  'orbit', 'v2_closed_lost', 'nurture',
];
```

**PRE-DISCOVERY vs POST-DISCOVERY Analysis:**

**Pre-Discovery stages** (before the discovery call):
- `cold_dm` - Initial DM outreach
- `warm` - Has warmed up to the prospect
- `tg_intro` - Telegram intro (PATH_B only)
- `booked` - Call booked but discovery hasn't happened yet

**Discovery breakpoint**: `discovery_done` marks the end of discovery

**Post-Discovery stages** (after discovery):
- `discovery_done` - Discovery call completed
- `proposal_sent` - Proposal has been sent
- `proposal_call` - Call to discuss proposal
- `v2_contract` - Contract stage
- `v2_closed_won` - Deal closed (won)

**Other terminal/holding stages**:
- `orbit` - Paused/holding stage (in BAMFAM check: line 395)
- `v2_closed_lost` - Deal closed (lost)
- `nurture` - Long-term nurture hold

The key distinction is that **post-discovery stages are monitored for BAMFAM violations** (lines 395–397 in salesPipelineService.ts):

```typescript
const postDiscoveryStages: SalesPipelineStage[] = [
  'discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract',
];
```

These stages require a booked next meeting, hence the BAMFAM rule enforcement.

```text
  1892→  const renderActionsTab = () => {
  1893→    const getPriorityIcon = (priority: ActionPriority) => {
  1894→      switch (priority) {
  1895→        case 'urgent': return <AlertTriangle className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-red-500" />;
  1896→        case 'high': return <Zap className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-amber-500" />;
  1897→        case 'medium': return <Clock className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-blue-500" />;
  1898→        case 'low': return <Clock className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-400" />;
  1899→        default: return null;
  1900→      }
  1901→    };
  1902→
  1903→    const getButtonVariant = (priority: ActionPriority): 'destructive' | 'default' | 'outline' => {
  1904→      if (priority === 'urgent') return 'destructive';
  1905→      if (priority === 'high') return 'default';
  1906→      return 'outline';
  1907→    };
  1908→
  1909→    const getTimingInfo = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity): { text: string; color: string } => {
  1910→      const daysAgo = (date: string | null) => {
  1911→        if (!date) return null;
  1912→        return Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(date).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  1913→      };
  1914→      const daysUntil = (date: string | null) => {
  1915→        if (!date) return null;
  1916→        return Math.ceil((new Date(date).getTime() - Date.now()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  1917→      };
  1918→
  1919→      // Cold DM — show last bump timing
  1920→      if (opp.stage === 'cold_dm') {
  1921→        if (opp.bump_number === 0) return { text: 'Not bumped', color: 'text-gray-500' };
  1922→        const d = daysAgo(opp.last_bump_date);
  1923→        if (d === null) return { text: `${opp.bump_number}/4 bumps`, color: 'text-gray-500' };
  1924→        return {
  1925→          text: `Bumped ${d}d ago`,
  1926→          color: d >= 3 ? 'text-amber-500 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500',
  1927→        };
  1928→      }
  1929→
  1930→      // Stages with next_meeting — show meeting timing
  1931→      if (opp.next_meeting_at) {
  1932→        const d = daysUntil(opp.next_meeting_at);
  1933→        if (d !== null) {
  1934→          if (d < 0) return { text: `Meeting ${Math.abs(d)}d ago`, color: 'text-red-500 font-medium' };
  1935→          if (d === 0) return { text: 'Meeting today', color: 'text-blue-600 font-medium' };
  1936→          return { text: `Meeting in ${d}d`, color: d <= 2 ? 'text-blue-600 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500' };
  1937→        }
  1938→      }
  1939→
  1940→      // Proposal sent — show how long ago
  1941→      if (opp.stage === 'proposal_sent' || (opp.stage === 'discovery_done' && opp.proposal_sent_at)) {
  1942→        const d = daysAgo(opp.proposal_sent_at);
  1943→        if (d !== null) return {
  1944→          text: `Sent ${d}d ago`,
  1945→          color: d >= 5 ? 'text-amber-500 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500',
  1946→        };
  1947→      }
  1948→
  1949→      // Orbit — show time in orbit
  1950→      if (opp.stage === 'orbit') {
  1951→        const d = daysAgo(opp.updated_at);
  1952→        if (d !== null) return { text: `${d}d in orbit`, color: d > 90 ? 'text-amber-500 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500' };
  1953→      }
  1954→
  1955→      // Default — days since last contact
  1956→      const lastDate = opp.last_contacted_at || opp.last_bump_date || opp.created_at;
  1957→      const d = daysAgo(lastDate);
  1958→      if (d === null) return { text: '—', color: 'text-gray-400' };
  1959→      return {
  1960→        text: `${d}d silent`,
  1961→        color: d >= 7 ? 'text-red-500 font-medium' : d >= 3 ? 'text-amber-500' : 'text-gray-500',
  1962→      };
  1963→    };
  1964→
  1965→    return (
  1966→      <div className="pb-8">
  1967→        {/* Filter sub-tabs */}
  1968→        <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mb-4">
  1969→          {([
  1970→            { key: 'all' as const, label: 'All Actions' },
  1971→            { key: 'mine' as const, label: 'My Actions' },
  1972→            { key: 'urgent' as const, label: 'Urgent Only' },
  1973→          ]).map(f => (
  1974→            <button
  1975→              key={f.key}
  1976→              onClick={() => setActionFilter(f.key)}
  1977→              className={`px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-md transition-colors ${
  1978→                actionFilter === f.key
  1979→                  ? 'bg-sky-100 text-sky-700 border border-sky-200'
  1980→                  : 'text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100 border border-transparent'
  1981→              }`}
  1982→            >
  1983→              {f.label}
  1984→            </button>
  1985→          ))}
  1986→        </div>
  1987→
  1988→        {/* Section Header */}
  1989→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 bg-violet-50 rounded-t-lg border border-violet-200 border-b-0">
  1990→          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  1991→            <Zap className="h-4 w-4 text-violet-700" />
  1992→            <h4 className="font-semibold text-violet-700">Action Items</h4>
  1993→            <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium">{actionItems.length}</Badge>
  1994→          </div>
  1995→        </div>
  1996→
  1997→        {/* Table */}
  1998→        <div className="bg-white rounded-b-lg border border-gray-200 border-t-0">
  1999→          <Table>
  2000→            <TableHeader>
  2001→              <TableRow className="bg-gray-50/50">
  2002→                <TableHead>Name</TableHead>
  2003→                <TableHead className="w-[140px]">Stage</TableHead>
  2004→                <TableHead className="w-[70px]">Bucket</TableHead>
  2005→                <TableHead className="w-[260px]">Next Action</TableHead>
  2006→                <TableHead className="w-[120px]">Timing</TableHead>
  2007→                <TableHead className="w-[90px]">Temp</TableHead>
  2008→                <TableHead className="w-[100px]">Owner</TableHead>
  2009→                <TableHead className="w-[150px]"></TableHead>
  2010→              </TableRow>
  2011→            </TableHeader>
  2012→            <TableBody>
  2013→              {actionItems.length === 0 ? (
  2014→                <TableRow>
  2015→                  <TableCell colSpan={8} className="text-center py-12">
  2016→                    <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2 text-gray-400">
  2017→                      <Zap className="h-8 w-8" />
  2018→                      <p className="text-sm font-medium">No actions needed right now</p>
  2019→                      <p className="text-xs">All caught up — check back later</p>
  2020→                    </div>
  2021→                  </TableCell>
  2022→                </TableRow>
  2023→              ) : actionItems.map(({ opp, action }) => {
  2024→                const timing = getTimingInfo(opp);
  2025→                const stageColors = STAGE_COLORS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || STAGE_COLORS.cold_dm;
  2026→                return (
  2027→                  <TableRow
  2028→                    key={opp.id}
  2029→                    className={`group hover:bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer ${action.priority === 'urgent' ? 'bg-red-50/40' : ''}`}
  2030→                    onClick={() => openSlideOver(opp)}
  2031→                  >
  2032→                    <TableCell>
  2033→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  2034→                        <Building2 className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
  2035→                        <span className="font-medium">{opp.name}</span>
  2036→                      </div>
  2037→                    </TableCell>
  2038→                    <TableCell>
  2039→                      <span className={`inline-flex items-center whitespace-nowrap rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${stageColors.bg} ${stageColors.text} ${stageColors.border}`}>
  2040→                        {STAGE_LABELS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || opp.stage}
  2041→                      </span>
  2042→                    </TableCell>
  2043→                    <TableCell>
  2044→                      {opp.bucket && (
  2045→                        <span className={`inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].bg} ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].text}`}>
  2046→                          {opp.bucket}
  2047→                        </span>
  2048→                      )}
  2049→                    </TableCell>
  2050→                    <TableCell>
  2051→                      <div>
  2052→                        <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
  2053→                          {getPriorityIcon(action.priority)}
  2054→                          <span className={`text-sm font-medium ${
  2055→                            action.priority === 'urgent' ? 'text-red-700' :
  2056→                            action.priority === 'high' ? 'text-amber-700' :
  2057→                            'text-gray-600'
  2058→                          }`}>
  2059→                            {action.label}
  2060→                          </span>
  2061→                        </div>
  2062→                        {action.hint && (
  2063→                          <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-400 mt-0.5 ml-5">{action.hint}</p>
  2064→                        )}
  2065→                      </div>
  2066→                    </TableCell>
  2067→                    <TableCell>
  2068→                      <span className={`text-xs ${timing.color}`}>{timing.text}</span>
  2069→                    </TableCell>
  2070→                    <TableCell>
  2071→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
  2072→                        <div className="w-12 h-1.5 bg-gray-100 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
  2073→                          <div
  2074→                            className={`h-full rounded-full ${opp.temperature_score >= 70 ? 'bg-green-500' : opp.temperature_score >= 40 ? 'bg-amber-500' : 'bg-red-400'}`}
  2075→                            style={{ width: `${opp.temperature_score}%` }}
  2076→                          />
  2077→                        </div>
  2078→                        <span className="text-xs text-gray-400">{opp.temperature_score}</span>
  2079→                      </div>
  2080→                    </TableCell>
  2081→                    <TableCell>{getUserName(opp.owner_id)}</TableCell>
  2082→                    <TableCell onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
  2083→                      {(() => {
  2084→                        const quickAlt = action.alternatives.find(a => a.quick);
  2085→                        const dropdownAlts = action.alternatives.filter(a => !a.quick);
  2086→                        return (
  2087→                          <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
  2088→                            <Button
  2089→                              variant={getButtonVariant(action.priority)}
  2090→                              size="sm"
  2091→                              className="h-7 text-xs"
  2092→                              disabled={executingAction === opp.id}
  2093→                              onClick={() => handleActionExecute(opp.id, action, opp)}
  2094→                              style={action.priority === 'high' ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : undefined}
  2095→                            >

  2098→                              ) : null}
  2099→                              {action.label}
  2100→                            </Button>

  2103→                                variant="outline"

  2106→                                onClick={() => {

  2116→                            )}
  2117→                            {dropdownAlts.length > 0 && (
  2118→                              <DropdownMenu>

  2121→                                    <ChevronDown className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
  2122→                                  </Button>
  2123→                                </DropdownMenuTrigger>

  2127→                                      key={alt.label}
  2128→                                      className={alt.variant === 'danger' ? 'text-red-600' : alt.variant === 'warn' ? 'text-orange-600' : ''}
  2129→                                      onClick={() => {

  2144→                              </DropdownMenu>

  2146→                          </div>
```

```text
   880→
   881→  const actionItems = useMemo(() => {
   882→    const terminalStages = ['v2_closed_won', 'v2_closed_lost'];
   883→    return opportunities
   884→      .filter(opp => !terminalStages.includes(opp.stage))
   885→      .map(opp => ({ opp, action: getNextAction(opp) }))
   886→      .filter(({ action }) => action.isActionable)
   887→      .filter(({ opp, action }) => {
   888→        if (actionFilter === 'mine') return opp.owner_id === user?.id;
   889→        if (actionFilter === 'urgent') return action.priority === 'urgent';
   890→        return true;
   891→      })
   892→      .sort((a, b) => {
   893→        if (a.action.sortScore !== b.action.sortScore) return a.action.sortScore - b.action.sortScore;

   895→      });
```

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Even truncating at 1945 and properly closing gives the error. This is strange because lines 1940-1945 are:

```
const renderActionsTab = () => {
    const getPriorityIcon = (priority: ActionPriority) => {
      switch (priority) {
        case 'urgent': return <AlertTriangle className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-red-500" />;
        case 'high': return <Zap className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-amber-500" />;
        case 'medium': return <Clock className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-blue-500" />;


```

When I append closing braces, the switch statement ends up incomplete, which would trigger a TS1005 error. The issue isn't the `ActionPriority` type being undefined—that would be a different error. The real problem is that the switch statement needs all its cases and a default case to be properly closed.

Looking at the actual build error from SWC, it's complaining about an unexpected `div` token at line 2014, which suggests the parser is getting confused about the JSX structure. SWC might be interpreting the function differently than TypeScript does, especially with how the nested function and JSX blocks are arranged.

I think the cleanest solution is to skip the nested function approach entirely and just inline the action display logic directly in the return statement, using a variable for the empty state label instead.

```

jsx
const emptyLabel = displayedActions.length === 0 ? "No actions" : "";
return (
  <div>
    {displayedActions.map(action => (
      <div key={action.id}>{action.name}</div>
    ))}
    {emptyLabel && <div>{emptyLabel}</div>}
  </div>
);
```

This avoids the nested function complexity that might be confusing SWC's parser.
</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-25 01:56:29Z)**_

Build passes. Here's a summary of all changes:

## Changes Made

### 1. Actions Tab — Phase Sub-tabs (Outreach vs Closing)

**New state**: `actionPhaseFilter` with options `'all' | 'outreach' | 'closing'`

**New derived lists**:
- `outreachActions` — filters to pre-discovery stages: `cold_dm`, `warm`, `tg_intro`, `booked`
- `closingActions` — filters to post-discovery stages: `discovery_done`, `proposal_sent`, `proposal_call`, `v2_contract`, plus `orbit`
- `displayedActions` — resolves which list to show based on `actionPhaseFilter`

**UI**: A pill-style toggle bar on the right side of the filter row with **All**, **Outreach** (Send icon), and **Closing** (Target icon) options, each showing their count. The section header and empty state update dynamically to match the selected phase. The breadcrumb text shows the relevant stages for context.

### 2. Top Cards — Manager Attention/Urgency Cards

Replaced the old stat cards (Total Pipeline, Bucket A/B/C, Active Value) with **5 urgency alert cards** that light up when they need attention:

| Card | What it shows | Highlights when |
|---|---|---|
| **BAMFAM** | Deals with no future meeting set | Count > 0 (red) |
| **Overdue** | Deals past their meeting date | Count > 0 (orange) |
| **Stale (7d+)** | Active deals with no contact in 7+ days | Count > 0 (amber) |
| **At Risk** | Closing-stage deals with temp < 40 | Count > 0 (rose) |
| **Meetings** | Today's meetings, or this week's if none today | Meetings today (blue) |

Each card uses a colored left border and background highlight when the count is non-zero, making issues immediately visible.

### 3. Sales Dashboard — Expanded Stats

Redesigned the collapsible dashboard into 4 sections:

- **Pipeline Health** — Pipeline Value, Weighted Pipeline (stage-probability-weighted), Active Deals, Revenue (Won), Deals Won, In Orbit
- **Conversion Funnel** — Visual bar chart showing DMs Sent → Responded → Meetings → Discovery → Proposals → Won → Lost with conversion percentages
- **Key Rates & Averages** — Response Rate, Close Rate, Avg Deal Size, Avg Close Time, Qualified %, Bucket A %
- **Bucket Breakdown** — Bucket A/B/C with descriptions and counts

---

```text
   239→    const all = opportunities;

   241→    const closedWon = all.filter(o => o.stage === 'v2_closed_won');
   242→    const closedLost = all.filter(o => o.stage === 'v2_closed_lost');
   243→    const inOrbit = all.filter(o => o.stage === 'orbit');

   245→    // Stages past cold_dm = responded
   246→    const pastColdDm = all.filter(o => o.stage !== 'cold_dm');
   247→    const coldDmCount = outreachTotal > 0 ? outreachTotal : all.filter(o => o.stage === 'cold_dm').length;
   248→    const totalDmsSent = all.length; // every opp started as a DM
   249→    const responseRate = totalDmsSent > 0 ? (pastColdDm.length / totalDmsSent) * 100 : 0;
   250→
   251→    // Meetings booked = in booked or any stage after it
   252→    const bookedAndBeyond = ['booked', 'discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won'];
   253→    const meetingsBooked = all.filter(o => bookedAndBeyond.includes(o.stage)).length;
   254→
   255→    // Discovery calls = in discovery_done or later
   256→    const discoveryAndBeyond = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won'];
   257→    const discoveryCalls = all.filter(o => discoveryAndBeyond.includes(o.stage)).length;
   258→
   259→    // Close rate = won / (won + lost)
   260→    const totalClosed = closedWon.length + closedLost.length;
   261→    const closeRate = totalClosed > 0 ? (closedWon.length / totalClosed) * 100 : 0;
   262→
   263→    // Avg deal size (closed won)
   264→    const wonValues = closedWon.map(o => o.deal_value || 0).filter(v => v > 0);
   265→    const avgDealSize = wonValues.length > 0 ? wonValues.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / wonValues.length : 0;
   266→
   267→    // Avg close time (days from created_at to closed_at for won deals)
   268→    const closeTimes = closedWon
   269→      .filter(o => o.created_at && o.closed_at)
   270→      .map(o => (new Date(o.closed_at!).getTime() - new Date(o.created_at).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   271→    const avgCloseTime = closeTimes.length > 0 ? closeTimes.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / closeTimes.length : 0;
   272→
   273→    // Qualified % = bucket A + B / total
   274→    const qualifiedCount = all.filter(o => o.bucket === 'A' || o.bucket === 'B').length;
   275→    const qualifiedPct = all.length > 0 ? (qualifiedCount / all.length) * 100 : 0;
   276→
   277→    // Bucket A %

   299→      o.next_meeting_at && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) >= todayStart && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) < weekEnd
   300→    ).length;
   301→    const meetingsToday = pipelineActive.filter(o =>
   302→      o.next_meeting_at && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) >= todayStart && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) < new Date(todayStart.getTime() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000)
   303→    ).length;
   304→
   305→    // Stale deals: active pipeline deals with no contact in 7+ days
   306→    const staleDeals = pipelineActive.filter(o => {
   307→      const lastDate = o.last_contacted_at || o.last_bump_date || o.created_at;
   308→      if (!lastDate) return true;
   309→      const daysSince = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(lastDate).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   310→      return daysSince >= 7;
   311→    }).length;
   312→
   313→    // Deals at risk: closing-stage deals (post-discovery) with temp < 40
   314→    const dealsAtRisk = all.filter(o =>
   315→      ['discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'].includes(o.stage) && o.temperature_score < 40
   316→    ).length;
   317→
   318→    // Total revenue (closed won value)
   319→    const totalRevenue = closedWon.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0), 0);
   320→
   321→    // Weighted pipeline = sum of (deal_value * stage_probability)
   322→    const stageProbability: Record<string, number> = {
   323→      cold_dm: 0.05, warm: 0.1, tg_intro: 0.15, booked: 0.25,
   324→      discovery_done: 0.4, proposal_sent: 0.6, proposal_call: 0.75, v2_contract: 0.9,
   325→    };
   326→    const weightedPipeline = pipelineActive.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0) * (stageProbability[o.stage] || 0.1), 0);
   327→
   328→    return {
   329→      totalDmsSent,
   330→      responseRate,
   331→      meetingsBooked,
   332→      discoveryCalls,
   333→      closeRate,
   334→      avgDealSize,
   335→      avgCloseTime,
   336→      qualifiedPct,
   337→      bucketAPct,
   338→      pipelineValue,
   339→      activeDeals: pipelineActive.length,
   340→      overdueFollowups,
   341→      bamfamViolations: metrics.bamfamViolations,
   342→      closedWon: closedWon.length,
   343→      closedLost: closedLost.length,
   344→      inOrbit: inOrbit.length,
   345→      proposalsSent,
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-25 02:03:21Z)**_

Build passes. Here's what was added:

## Bottleneck Analysis Section

Added a new **"Bottleneck Analysis"** section to the Sales Dashboard, between the Conversion Funnel and Key Rates. It has two parts:

### Summary Callout Cards
Two highlight cards that immediately call out the worst pain points:
- **Biggest Drop-off** (red) — The stage transition with the lowest conversion rate (requires 3+ deals entering to be significant). Shows which stage→stage transition loses the most deals and how many are lost.
- **Slowest Stage** (amber) — The stage where deals sit the longest on average (requires 2+ deals to be significant). Shows the avg days and how many deals are currently stuck there.

### Stage-by-Stage Conversion Table
A full table showing every pipeline stage with:
| Column | What it shows |
|---|---|
| **Stage** | Stage name (with warning icons for worst/slowest) |
| **Deals In** | How many deals ever reached this stage |
| **Moved On** | How many progressed to the next stage |
| **Conversion** | % that converted (green ≥60%, amber ≥30%, red <30%) |
| **Drop-off** | Count of deals lost at this transition |
| **Avg Days** | How long current deals have been sitting in this stage (red ≥14d, amber ≥7d) |
| **Bar** | Visual conversion rate bar |

The worst conversion row gets a subtle red background highlight, the slowest stage gets amber, making bottlenecks immediately scannable.

```text
Perfect! Now I have reviewed both files completely. Let me compile a comprehensive report of all the issues I found.

## THOROUGH CODE REVIEW: Sales Pipeline

I've completed a detailed review of both files. Here are all the issues I identified:

### **salesPipelineService.ts**

#### Code Quality Issues

1. **Line 428** — `getColdDmsPaginated` called with incomplete arguments in `fetchData`:
   - The call `getColdDmsPaginated(1, 1, {})` is fetching page 1 with page size 1 — this will only get 1 result total, not a meaningful count of cold DMs
   - Should probably use a larger page size like 1000 or fetch just the count

2. **Lines 466-482** — `updatePositions` lacks error recovery:
   - Uses `Promise.all()` which means if one update fails, all others still execute but the error is returned
   - However, it only throws the first error — other failed updates are silently ignored
   - No rollback mechanism if some positions succeed and others fail, leaving data in an inconsistent state

3. **Lines 534-550** — `getColdDmsPaginated` has a pagination bug:
   - The query chain uses `.range(from, to)` which is correct
   - But if `count` is returned as `null` in the response, the function returns `count: 0` even if data exists
   - This breaks pagination logic downstream

---

### **page.tsx**

#### Logic Errors & Race Conditions

4. **Lines 421-440** — `fetchData()` has a potential stale data issue:
   - Line 428 calls `getColdDmsPaginated(1, 1, {})` which only gets 1 record
   - Line 434 sets `setOutreachAllTotal(outreachCount.count)` based on this incomplete fetch
   - When switching to the Outreach tab, this stale count is displayed instead of the real count

5. **Lines 454-473** — `fetchOutreach()` doesn't refresh `opportunities` state:
   - After bulk operations (bump, move, delete), `fetchOutreach()` is called but `opportunities` state isn't updated
   - This causes the Actions tab to show stale data while the Outreach tab shows fresh data
   - The slide-over can display inconsistent bump counts between what the user sees and the actual data

6. **Lines 550-566** — `handleStageChange()` for orbit/closed_lost bypasses activity logging:
   - Lines 551-557: When moving to `orbit` or `v2_closed_lost`, it shows a prompt and returns early
   - But the prompt itself (`confirmOrbit`, `confirmClosedLost`) doesn't trigger the activity log popup
   - Expected flow: user moves to orbit → reason prompt → activity log popup to record why
   - Actual flow: user moves to orbit → reason prompt → no activity log, inconsistent with other stage changes

7. **Line 1093** — Activity log form reset is incomplete:
   - `setActivityLogForm({ title: '', description: '', outcome: '', next_step: '' })`
   - Missing reset of `meeting_date` and `meeting_time` fields
   - If a user logs an activity with a meeting date, then immediately executes another action that shows the meeting picker, the previous date will still be in the form

8. **Lines 1026-1029** — `openActivityLogPrompt()` resets form every time:
   - Line 1028: `setActivityLogForm({ title, description: '', outcome: '', next_step: '' })`
   - This means if a user pre-fills description/outcome and the popup reopens (e.g., click Execute twice), their data is lost
   - Also missing initialization of `meeting_date` and `meeting_time`

#### UX Issues

9. **Lines 844-862** — BAMFAM violation detection is fragmented:
   - `getNextAction()` checks `postDiscovery.includes(opp.stage)` at line 847
   - But the check at line 849 uses `new Date(opp.next_meeting_at) > new Date()` without timezone consideration
   - This can cause off-by-one issues at midnight boundaries
   - The slide-over shows BAMFAM warning at line 2740-2744 but doesn't suggest actions beyond "open detail"

10. **Line 878-901** — Cold DM logic for "Send First DM" vs "Bump #X" is confusing:
    - Line 890 checks `opp.bump_number === 0 && !opp.last_bump_date` for "Send First DM"
    - But what if `bump_number === 0` but `last_bump_date` is set (reduced bump)? 
    - Line 893-896: Falls through to show `Bump #1` which is correct but the fix comment at line 889 says "was reduced" but doesn't clarify this is the intended behavior

11. **Lines 923-942** — Booked stage has a confusing action for past meetings:
    - Line 930: Checks if `next_meeting_at > new Date()` (future)
    - Line 937-942: If meeting is in the past, suggests "Discovery Done" 
    - But what if the meeting date is set but incorrect? User has no way to reschedule without going to Edit
    - The action "Discovery Done" assumes the meeting happened, which is risky if the date is wrong

12. **Lines 2453-2454** — Backdrop visibility logic is incomplete:
    - Backdrop only shows if NOT `orbitPrompt && !closedLostPrompt`
    - But if both prompts are closed and activity log is open, there's no backdrop for the activity log
    - This allows clicking behind the activity log to trigger other actions

13. **Lines 1886-1905** — Outreach table bump column has layout issues:
    - Button at line 1890-1903 is inside `onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}`
    - But the button also calls `handleRecordBump(opp.id)` which triggers the activity log popup
    - This popup won't render because the click is stopped before the state update completes

#### Performance Concerns

14. **Lines 238-415** — `dashboardMetrics` useMemo is inefficient:
    - Dependency array at line 415: `[opportunities, metrics.bamfamViolations, outreachTotal]`
    - But `outreachTotal` is only used once at line 403 and it's overwriting the server-provided `metrics`
    - This causes unnecessary recalculation when `outreachTotal` changes
    - The funnel stage analysis (lines 334-350) iterates all opps multiple times to estimate "reached stages" — this is O(n*m) where n=opps and m=stages

15. **Lines 363-371** — `dashboardMetrics` calculates average days per stage inefficiently:
    - Creates a new array `avgDaysInStage` even if not using dashboard
    - The calculation `Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(o.updated_at).getTime()) / ...)` is expensive, called for every opp
    - Should memoize this calculation or defer it to a separate selector

16. **Line 614** — Optimistic update in `handleRecordBump()` is wrong:
    - Line 615: `Math.min(o.bump_number + 1, 4)` caps the bump at 4
    - But the actual service doesn't cap it at 4, it just increments
    - If user bumps 5+ times, UI shows "4/4" but backend has "5"
    - Then `fetchData()` corrects it, causing a jarring UI flicker

#### Missing Features / Gaps

17. **Lines 1031-1067** — `handleActionExecute()` doesn't handle all action types:
    - Lines 1039-1054: Only handles `stage_change` and `bump` for activity logging
    - But line 1056-1062: `open_detail` actions don't trigger activity logging
    - This means "Book Next Meeting" and other guidance-only actions don't create activity records
    - User executes action, sees slide-over with guidance, but nothing is logged until they manually add an activity

18. **Lines 1042-1050** — `stageActivityMap` doesn't cover all stages:
    - Missing: `'proposal_call'` (should map to 'call' type)
    - Missing: `'orbit'` and `'v2_closed_lost'` (they have their own prompts, not shown in this map)
    - Missing: handling for when `targetStage` is undefined

19. **Lines 2838-2875** — Bump counter in slide-over only shows in cold_dm:
    - What about warm stage where bumps still matter?
    - Bump history is lost once you move out of cold_dm
    - No way to view bump history in the activity timeline (activities don't show bump numbers)

20. **Lines 1040 & 2898** — `handleStageChange()` can be called twice simultaneously:
    - Line 1040 in Actions tab calls `handleStageChange()`
    - But the function itself doesn't have any debouncing or loading state
    - If user clicks "Execute" twice before the API responds, two stage changes could be queued
    - Same issue at line 2898 in the Move to Stage dropdown in the slide-over

21. **Lines 3379-3607** — `renderActivityLogPrompt()` resets state on close, but never resets meeting fields:
    - Line 3404: Closes dialog and resets form but missing reset of `meeting_date` and `meeting_time`
    - These are stored in `activityLogForm` state but not included in the form definition on line 217-225
    - They only exist in the form during the dialog render, not persisted to state properly

22. **Lines 1653-1654 & 1972** — `selectAllOnPage()` is limited:
    - Only selects visible page, not all matching the filters
    - UI says "Select All on Page" but users might expect "Select All" matching filters
    - No "select all" across all pages option

#### State & Form Issues

23. **Lines 154-162** — Multiple activity-related state variables:
    - `activityForm` for the slide-over activity form
    - `activityLogForm` for the popup activity form
    - Both have overlapping fields but different structures
    - When moving between slide-over and popup, form data isn't transferred
    - If user is viewing slide-over, adds activity, then Execute another action → activity log popup, the popup starts with empty form

24. **Lines 2507-2737** — Edit mode in slide-over has a state leak:
    - Line 2508: Check `slideOverMode === 'edit'`
    - But `editingOpp` and `form` are not reset when slide-over closes (line 2500)
    - If user: Edit opp → Cancel edit → Navigate away → Return to slide-over
    - The `form` still contains the old opp data, causing confusion

25. **Lines 1443-1462** — Inline editing in table allows click propagation issues:
    - Line 1452: `onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}`
    - But line 1456 does `setEditingCell({ id: opp.id, field: 'name' })` which opens inline editor
    - The click handler at line 1441 also calls `openSlideOver()` 
    - Race condition: user clicks name → both inline editor AND slide-over open

#### Specific Line Issues

26. **Line 1917** — `handleStageChange()` called from dropdown with wrong current stage:
    - `handleStageChange(opp.id, 'warm', opp.stage)`
    - But in the Outreach table, all opps are in 'cold_dm', so passing `opp.stage` is correct
    - However, if the list somehow contains other stages (which it shouldn't), this works but is fragile

27. **Line 2453-2454** — Backdrop click handler doesn't close activity log:
    - `onClick={() => { setSlideOverOpp(null); setActionGuidance(null); }}`
    - But there's no check for `slideOverMode === 'view'` before closing
    - If user is in Edit mode in the slide-over, clicking backdrop closes it without saving
    - No confirmation dialog

28. **Lines 2747-2765** — Action guidance display isn't dismissible from all states:
    - Line 2759: Close button dismisses guidance
    - But if user clicks backdrop (line 2454), the entire slide-over closes
    - Inconsistent UX: guidance can be dismissed alone or with the whole slide-over

---

### **Summary Table**

| Type | Count | Severity | Categories |
|------|-------|----------|-----------|
| Logic Errors | 6 | High | Stale data, race conditions, missing activity logs |
| UX Issues | 7 | Medium-High | Confusing flows, incomplete resets, state leaks |
| Performance | 3 | Medium | Inefficient memoization, O(n*m) algorithms |
| Code Quality | 7 | Medium | Missing error handling, duplicated form state, incomplete maps |
| Missing Features | 6 | Low-Medium | Incomplete action mapping, limited bulk operations |
| State Management | 4 | High | State leaks, form data loss, click propagation bugs |

**Most Critical Issues:**
1. Activity log popup doesn't fire after orbit/closed_lost stage changes (line 550-596)
2. Stale `outreachTotal` count crashes pagination logic (lines 428, 434, 1591-1593)
3. Form data resets lose meeting_date/meeting_time (lines 1093, 1028, 3404)
4. Click handler race condition in inline editing (lines 1441-1456)
5. Backdrop doesn't work with activity log popup (lines 2453-2454, 2740-2765)
```

```text
   123→
   124→export interface CreateSalesPipelineOpportunityData {
   125→  name: string;
   126→  stage?: OpportunityStage;
   127→  dm_account?: DmAccount;
   128→  bucket?: Bucket;
   129→  temperature_score?: number;
   130→  source?: string;
   131→  tg_handle?: string;
   132→  owner_id?: string;
   133→  referrer?: string;
   134→  affiliate_id?: string;
   135→  deal_value?: number;
   136→  currency?: string;
```
