```text
   139→}
   140→
   141→export interface CreateActivityData {
   142→  opportunity_id: string;
   143→  type: ActivityType;
   144→  title: string;
   145→  description?: string;
   146→  outcome?: string;
   147→  next_step?: string;
   148→  next_step_date?: string;
   149→}
   150→
   151→// ============================================
   152→// Sales Pipeline Service
   153→// ============================================
   154→
   155→export class SalesPipelineService {
   156→  // ----------------------------------------
   157→  // OPPORTUNITIES
   158→  // ----------------------------------------
   159→
   160→  static async getAll(): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity[]> {
   161→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   162→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   163→      .select(`
   164→        *,
   165→        affiliate:crm_affiliates(*),
   166→        client:clients!crm_opportunities_client_id_fkey(id, name)
   167→      `)
   168→      .in('stage', ALL_V2_STAGES)
   169→      .order('position', { ascending: true })
   170→      .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
   171→
   172→    if (error) {
   173→      console.error('Error fetching sales pipeline opportunities:', error);
   174→      throw error;
   175→    }
   176→    return (data || []) as SalesPipelineOpportunity[];
   177→  }
   178→
   179→  static async create(data: CreateSalesPipelineOpportunityData): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity> {
   180→    // Dedup check: name + tg_handle
   181→    if (data.name && data.tg_handle) {
   182→      const dedupKey = `${data.name.toLowerCase().trim()}::${data.tg_handle.toLowerCase().trim()}`;
   183→      const { data: existing } = await supabase
   184→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   185→        .select('id')
   186→        .eq('dedup_key', dedupKey)
   187→        .maybeSingle();
   188→
   189→      if (existing) {
   190→        throw new Error('A deal with this name and TG handle already exists');
   191→      }
   192→
   193→      (data as any).dedup_key = dedupKey;
   194→    }
   195→
   196→    const insertData = {
   197→      ...data,
   198→      stage: data.stage || 'cold_dm',
   199→    };
   200→
   201→    const { data: created, error } = await supabase
   202→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   203→      .insert([insertData])
   204→      .select()
   205→      .single();
   206→
   207→    if (error) throw error;
   208→
   209→    // Record stage history
   210→    await CRMService.recordStageHistory('opportunity', created.id, null, insertData.stage || 'cold_dm');
   211→
   212→    // Auto-calculate temperature score
   213→    await this.recalcTemperature(created.id);
   214→
   215→    return created as SalesPipelineOpportunity;
   216→  }
   217→
   218→  static async update(
   219→    id: string,
   220→    updates: Partial<CreateSalesPipelineOpportunityData> & {
   221→      warm_sub_state?: WarmSubState | null;
   222→      orbit_reason?: OrbitReason | null;
   223→      closed_lost_reason?: string | null;
   224→      next_meeting_at?: string | null;
   225→      next_meeting_type?: string | null;
   226→      bump_number?: number;
   227→      last_bump_date?: string | null;
   228→      bucket?: Bucket | null;
   229→      calendly_sent_via?: CalendlySentVia;
   230→      calendly_sent_date?: string | null;
   231→      calendly_booked_date?: string | null;
   232→      gc_opened?: string;
   233→    }
   234→  ): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity> {
   235→    // Get current state for stage history
   236→    const { data: current } = await supabase
   237→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   238→      .select('*')
   239→      .eq('id', id)
   240→      .single();
   241→
   242→    const updateData: any = { ...updates, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() };
   243→
   244→    // Auto-set timestamps on stage transitions
   245→    if (updates.stage && current) {
   246→      if (updates.stage === 'discovery_done' && !current.discovery_call_at) {
   247→        updateData.discovery_call_at = new Date().toISOString();
   248→      }
   249→      if (updates.stage === 'proposal_sent' && !current.proposal_sent_at) {
   250→        updateData.proposal_sent_at = new Date().toISOString();
   251→      }
   252→      if ((updates.stage === 'v2_closed_won' || updates.stage === 'v2_closed_lost') && !current.closed_at) {
   253→        updateData.closed_at = new Date().toISOString();
   254→      }
   255→    }
   256→
   257→    // Auto-set bucket_changed_at
   258→    if (updates.bucket && current && updates.bucket !== current.bucket) {
   259→      updateData.bucket_changed_at = new Date().toISOString();
   260→    }
   261→
   262→    const { data: updated, error } = await supabase
   263→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   264→      .update(updateData)
   265→      .eq('id', id)
   266→      .select()
   267→      .single();
   268→
   269→    if (error) throw error;
   270→
   271→    // Record stage change
   272→    if (updates.stage && current && current.stage !== updates.stage) {
   273→      await CRMService.recordStageHistory('opportunity', id, current.stage, updates.stage);
   274→    }
   275→
   276→    // Recalculate temperature score after stage/bucket/key field changes
   277→    await this.recalcTemperature(id);
   278→
   279→    return updated as SalesPipelineOpportunity;
   280→  }
   281→
   282→  static async delete(id: string): Promise<void> {
   283→    const { error } = await supabase
   284→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   285→      .delete()
   286→      .eq('id', id);
   287→
   288→    if (error) throw error;
   289→  }
   290→
   291→  // ----------------------------------------
   292→  // BUMPS
   293→  // ----------------------------------------
   294→
   295→  static async recordBump(id: string): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity> {
   296→    const { data: current } = await supabase
   297→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   298→      .select('bump_number')
   299→      .eq('id', id)
   300→      .single();
   301→
   302→    const newBumpNumber = (current?.bump_number || 0) + 1;
   303→
   304→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   305→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   306→      .update({
   307→        bump_number: newBumpNumber,
   308→        last_bump_date: new Date().toISOString(),
   309→        last_contacted_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   310→        updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   311→      })
   312→      .eq('id', id)
   313→      .select()
   314→      .single();
   315→
   316→    if (error) throw error;
   317→
   318→    // Also create a bump activity
   319→    await this.createActivity({
   320→      opportunity_id: id,
   321→      type: 'bump',
   322→      title: `Bump #${newBumpNumber}`,
   323→    });
   324→
   325→    // Recalculate temperature score
   326→    await this.recalcTemperature(id);
   327→
   328→    return data as SalesPipelineOpportunity;
   329→  }
   330→
   331→  static async reduceBump(id: string): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity> {
   332→    const { data: current } = await supabase
   333→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   334→      .select('bump_number')
   335→      .eq('id', id)
   336→      .single();
   337→
   338→    const newBumpNumber = Math.max((current?.bump_number || 0) - 1, 0);
   339→
   340→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   341→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   342→      .update({
   343→        bump_number: newBumpNumber,
   344→        updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   345→      })
   346→      .eq('id', id)
   347→      .select()
   348→      .single();
   349→
   350→    if (error) throw error;
   351→    return data as SalesPipelineOpportunity;
   352→  }
   353→
   354→  // ----------------------------------------
   355→  // ACTIVITIES
   356→  // ----------------------------------------
   357→
   358→  static async getActivities(opportunityId: string): Promise<CRMActivity[]> {
   359→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   360→      .from('crm_activities')
   361→      .select('*')
   362→      .eq('opportunity_id', opportunityId)
   363→      .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
   364→
   365→    if (error) throw error;
   366→    return data || [];
   367→  }
   368→
   369→  static async createActivity(activityData: CreateActivityData): Promise<CRMActivity> {
   370→    const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
   371→
   372→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   373→      .from('crm_activities')
   374→      .insert([{
   375→        ...activityData,
   376→        owner_id: user?.id || null,
   377→      }])
   378→      .select()
   379→      .single();
   380→
   381→    if (error) throw error;
   382→
   383→    // Recalculate temperature score (new activity affects engagement)
   384→    await this.recalcTemperature(activityData.opportunity_id);
   385→
   386→    return data;
   387→  }
   388→
   389→  // ----------------------------------------
   390→  // BAMFAM VIOLATIONS
   391→  // ----------------------------------------
   392→
   393→  static async getBAMFAMViolations(): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity[]> {
   394→    // BAMFAM: past discovery_done with no next_meeting or overdue next_meeting
   395→    const postDiscoveryStages: SalesPipelineStage[] = [
   396→      'discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract',
   397→    ];
   398→
   399→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   400→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   401→      .select(`
   402→        *,
   403→        affiliate:crm_affiliates(*),
   404→        client:clients!crm_opportunities_client_id_fkey(id, name)
   405→      `)
   406→      .in('stage', postDiscoveryStages)
   407→      .or('next_meeting_at.is.null,next_meeting_at.lt.' + new Date().toISOString());
   408→
   409→    if (error) throw error;
   410→    return (data || []) as SalesPipelineOpportunity[];
   411→  }
   412→
   413→  // ----------------------------------------
   414→  // STAGES HELPER
   415→  // ----------------------------------------
   416→
   417→  static getAvailableStages(dmAccount: DmAccount): SalesPipelineStage[] {
   418→    if (dmAccount === 'closer') return PATH_A_STAGES;
   419→    return PATH_B_STAGES;
   420→  }
   421→
   422→  // ----------------------------------------
   423→  // METRICS
   424→  // ----------------------------------------
   425→
   426→  static async getMetrics(): Promise<{
   427→    totalCount: number;
   428→    bucketA: number;
   429→    bucketB: number;
   430→    bucketC: number;
   431→    activeValue: number;
   432→    bamfamViolations: number;
   433→  }> {
   434→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   435→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   436→      .select('stage, bucket, deal_value, next_meeting_at')
   437→      .in('stage', ALL_V2_STAGES);
   438→
   439→    if (error) throw error;
   440→
   441→    const opps = data || [];
   442→    const activeStages = PIPELINE_STAGES;
   443→    const active = opps.filter(o => activeStages.includes(o.stage as SalesPipelineStage));
   444→
   445→    const postDiscovery = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'];
   446→    const now = new Date().toISOString();
   447→    const bamfam = opps.filter(o =>
   448→      postDiscovery.includes(o.stage) &&
   449→      (!o.next_meeting_at || o.next_meeting_at < now)
   450→    );
   451→
   452→    return {
   453→      totalCount: opps.length,
   454→      bucketA: opps.filter(o => o.bucket === 'A').length,
   455→      bucketB: opps.filter(o => o.bucket === 'B').length,
   456→      bucketC: opps.filter(o => o.bucket === 'C').length,
   457→      activeValue: active.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0), 0),
   458→      bamfamViolations: bamfam.length,
   459→    };
   460→  }
   461→
   462→  // ----------------------------------------
   463→  // POSITION UPDATES
   464→  // ----------------------------------------
   465→
   466→  static async updatePositions(positions: { id: string; position: number; stage?: OpportunityStage }[]): Promise<void> {
   467→    const updates = positions.map(({ id, position, stage }) => {
   468→      const updateData: any = { position, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() };
   469→      if (stage) updateData.stage = stage;
   470→      return supabase
   471→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   472→        .update(updateData)
   473→        .eq('id', id);
   474→    });
   475→
   476→    const results = await Promise.all(updates);
   477→    const errors = results.filter(r => r.error);
   478→    if (errors.length > 0) {
   479→      console.error('Errors updating positions:', errors);
   480→      throw errors[0].error;
   481→    }
   482→  }
   483→
   484→  // ----------------------------------------
   485→  // COLD DM PAGINATED (Outreach tab)
   486→  // ----------------------------------------
   487→
   488→  static async getColdDmsPaginated(
   489→    page: number,
   490→    pageSize: number,
   491→    filters: {
   492→      dm_account?: DmAccount;
   493→      bucket?: Bucket;
   494→      bumpRange?: 'none' | '1-2' | '3+';
   495→      searchTerm?: string;
   496→      sortBy?: string;
   497→      sortAsc?: boolean;
   498→      owner_id?: string;
   499→    }
   500→  ): Promise<{ data: SalesPipelineOpportunity[]; count: number }> {
   501→    const from = (page - 1) * pageSize;
   502→    const to = from + pageSize - 1;
   503→
   504→    let query = supabase
   505→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   506→      .select(`
   507→        *,
   508→        affiliate:crm_affiliates(*),
   509→        client:clients!crm_opportunities_client_id_fkey(id, name)
   510→      `, { count: 'exact' })
   511→      .eq('stage', 'cold_dm');
   512→
   513→    // Optional filters
   514→    if (filters.dm_account) {
   515→      query = query.eq('dm_account', filters.dm_account);
   516→    }
   517→    if (filters.bucket) {
   518→      query = query.eq('bucket', filters.bucket);
   519→    }
   520→    if (filters.searchTerm) {
   521→      query = query.ilike('name', `%${filters.searchTerm}%`);
   522→    }
   523→    if (filters.owner_id) {
   524→      query = query.eq('owner_id', filters.owner_id);
   525→    }
   526→    if (filters.bumpRange === 'none') {
   527→      query = query.eq('bump_number', 0);
   528→    } else if (filters.bumpRange === '1-2') {
   529→      query = query.gte('bump_number', 1).lte('bump_number', 2);
   530→    } else if (filters.bumpRange === '3+') {
   531→      query = query.gte('bump_number', 3);
   532→    }
   533→
   534→    // Sorting
   535→    const sortField = filters.sortBy || 'created_at';
   536→    const ascending = filters.sortAsc ?? false;
   537→    query = query.order(sortField, { ascending });
   538→
   539→    // Pagination
   540→    query = query.range(from, to);
   541→
   542→    const { data, error, count } = await query;
   543→
   544→    if (error) {
   545→      console.error('Error fetching cold DMs paginated:', error);
   546→      throw error;
   547→    }
   548→
   549→    return { data: (data || []) as SalesPipelineOpportunity[], count: count || 0 };
   550→  }
   551→
   552→  // ----------------------------------------
   553→  // BULK OPERATIONS
   554→  // ----------------------------------------
   555→
   556→  // ----------------------------------------
   557→  // TEMPERATURE SCORE
   558→  // ----------------------------------------
   559→
   560→  static async recalcTemperature(id: string): Promise<number | null> {
   561→    const { data, error } = await supabase.rpc('calculate_temperature_score', { opp_id: id });
   562→    if (error) {
   563→      console.error('Error recalculating temperature:', error);
   564→      return null;
   565→    }
   566→    return data;
   567→  }
   568→
   569→  static async recalcAllTemperatures(): Promise<number | null> {
   570→    const { data, error } = await supabase.rpc('recalculate_all_temperature_scores');
   571→    if (error) {
   572→      console.error('Error recalculating all temperatures:', error);
   573→      return null;
   574→    }
   575→    return data;
   576→  }
   577→
   578→  // ----------------------------------------
   579→  // BULK OPERATIONS
   580→  // ----------------------------------------
   581→
   582→  static async bulkRecordBump(ids: string[]): Promise<void> {
   583→    await Promise.all(ids.map(id => this.recordBump(id)));
   584→  }
   585→
   586→  static async bulkUpdateStage(ids: string[], stage: SalesPipelineStage): Promise<void> {
   587→    const now = new Date().toISOString();
   588→    const updates = ids.map(id =>
   589→      supabase
   590→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   591→        .update({ stage, updated_at: now })
   592→        .eq('id', id)
   593→    );
   594→
   595→    const results = await Promise.all(updates);
   596→    const errors = results.filter(r => r.error);
   597→    if (errors.length > 0) {
   598→      console.error('Errors in bulk stage update:', errors);
   599→      throw errors[0].error;
   600→    }
   601→  }
   602→
   603→  static async bulkDelete(ids: string[]): Promise<void> {
   604→    const deletes = ids.map(id =>
   605→      supabase
   606→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   607→        .delete()
   608→        .eq('id', id)
   609→    );
   610→
   611→    const results = await Promise.all(deletes);
   612→    const errors = results.filter(r => r.error);
   613→    if (errors.length > 0) {
   614→      console.error('Errors in bulk delete:', errors);
   615→      throw errors[0].error;
   616→    }
   617→  }
   618→}
   619→
```

```text
    77→function DroppableColumn({ id, children, className }: { id: string; children: React.ReactNode; className?: string }) {
    78→  const { setNodeRef, isOver } = useDroppable({ id });
    79→  return (
    80→    <div ref={setNodeRef} className={`${className} ${isOver ? 'ring-2 ring-blue-400 ring-offset-2' : ''}`}>
    81→      {children}
    82→    </div>
    83→  );
    84→}
    85→
    86→function SortableCard({ id, children }: { id: string; children: React.ReactNode }) {
    87→  const { attributes, listeners, setNodeRef, transform, transition, isDragging } = useSortable({ id });
    88→  const style = {
    89→    transform: CSS.Transform.toString(transform),
    90→    transition,
    91→    opacity: isDragging ? 0.5 : 1,
    92→  };
    93→  return (
    94→    <div ref={setNodeRef} style={style} {...attributes} {...listeners}>
    95→      {children}
    96→    </div>
    97→  );
    98→}
    99→
   100→function SortableTableRow({ id, children, className, onClick }: { id: string; children: React.ReactNode; className?: string; onClick?: () => void }) {
   101→  const { attributes, listeners, setNodeRef, transform, transition, isDragging } = useSortable({ id });
   102→  const style: React.CSSProperties = {
   103→    transform: CSS.Translate.toString(transform),
   104→    transition,
   105→    opacity: isDragging ? 0.5 : 1,
   106→    position: 'relative' as const,
   107→    zIndex: isDragging ? 1 : 0,
   108→  };
   109→  return (
   110→    <TableRow ref={setNodeRef} style={style} className={`${className || ''} ${isDragging ? 'bg-blue-50 shadow-lg' : ''}`} onClick={onClick}>
   111→      <TableCell className="w-10">
   112→        <div
   113→          {...attributes}
   114→          {...listeners}
   115→          className="cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing p-1 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded"
   116→          onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}
   117→        >
   118→          <GripVertical className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   119→        </div>
   120→      </TableCell>
   121→      {children}
   122→    </TableRow>
   123→  );
   124→}

   233→
   234→  // ============================================
   235→  // Dashboard Metrics (computed from opportunities)
   236→  // ============================================
   237→
   238→  const dashboardMetrics = useMemo(() => {
   239→    const all = opportunities;
   240→    const pipelineActive = all.filter(o => PIPELINE_STAGES.includes(o.stage as SalesPipelineStage));
   241→    const closedWon = all.filter(o => o.stage === 'v2_closed_won');
   242→    const closedLost = all.filter(o => o.stage === 'v2_closed_lost');
   243→    const inOrbit = all.filter(o => o.stage === 'orbit');
   244→
   245→    // Stages past cold_dm = responded
   246→    const pastColdDm = all.filter(o => o.stage !== 'cold_dm');
   247→    const coldDmCount = outreachTotal > 0 ? outreachTotal : all.filter(o => o.stage === 'cold_dm').length;
   248→    const totalDmsSent = all.length; // every opp started as a DM
   249→    const responseRate = totalDmsSent > 0 ? (pastColdDm.length / totalDmsSent) * 100 : 0;
   250→
   251→    // Meetings booked = in booked or any stage after it
   252→    const bookedAndBeyond = ['booked', 'discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won'];
   253→    const meetingsBooked = all.filter(o => bookedAndBeyond.includes(o.stage)).length;
   254→
   255→    // Discovery calls = in discovery_done or later
   256→    const discoveryAndBeyond = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won'];
   257→    const discoveryCalls = all.filter(o => discoveryAndBeyond.includes(o.stage)).length;
   258→
   259→    // Close rate = won / (won + lost)
   260→    const totalClosed = closedWon.length + closedLost.length;
   261→    const closeRate = totalClosed > 0 ? (closedWon.length / totalClosed) * 100 : 0;
   262→
   263→    // Avg deal size (closed won)
   264→    const wonValues = closedWon.map(o => o.deal_value || 0).filter(v => v > 0);
   265→    const avgDealSize = wonValues.length > 0 ? wonValues.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / wonValues.length : 0;
   266→
   267→    // Avg close time (days from created_at to closed_at for won deals)
   268→    const closeTimes = closedWon
   269→      .filter(o => o.created_at && o.closed_at)
   270→      .map(o => (new Date(o.closed_at!).getTime() - new Date(o.created_at).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   271→    const avgCloseTime = closeTimes.length > 0 ? closeTimes.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / closeTimes.length : 0;
   272→
   273→    // Qualified % = bucket A + B / total
   274→    const qualifiedCount = all.filter(o => o.bucket === 'A' || o.bucket === 'B').length;
   275→    const qualifiedPct = all.length > 0 ? (qualifiedCount / all.length) * 100 : 0;
   276→
   277→    // Bucket A %
   278→    const bucketAPct = all.length > 0 ? (all.filter(o => o.bucket === 'A').length / all.length) * 100 : 0;
   279→
   280→    // Pipeline value (active)
   281→    const pipelineValue = pipelineActive.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0), 0);
   282→
   283→    // Overdue follow-ups
   284→    const now = new Date().toISOString();
   285→    const overdueFollowups = pipelineActive.filter(o =>
   286→      o.next_meeting_at && o.next_meeting_at < now
   287→    ).length;
   288→
   289→    // Proposals sent
   290→    const proposalsSent = all.filter(o =>
   291→      ['proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won'].includes(o.stage)
   292→    ).length;
   293→
   294→    // Alert metrics for manager cards
   295→    const nowDate = new Date();
   296→    const todayStart = new Date(nowDate.getFullYear(), nowDate.getMonth(), nowDate.getDate());
   297→    const weekEnd = new Date(todayStart.getTime() + 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
   298→    const meetingsThisWeek = pipelineActive.filter(o =>
   299→      o.next_meeting_at && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) >= todayStart && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) < weekEnd
   300→    ).length;
   301→    const meetingsToday = pipelineActive.filter(o =>
   302→      o.next_meeting_at && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) >= todayStart && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) < new Date(todayStart.getTime() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000)
   303→    ).length;
   304→
   305→    // Stale deals: active pipeline deals with no contact in 7+ days
   306→    const staleDeals = pipelineActive.filter(o => {
   307→      const lastDate = o.last_contacted_at || o.last_bump_date || o.created_at;
   308→      if (!lastDate) return true;
   309→      const daysSince = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(lastDate).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   310→      return daysSince >= 7;
   311→    }).length;
   312→
   313→    // Deals at risk: closing-stage deals (post-discovery) with temp < 40
   314→    const dealsAtRisk = all.filter(o =>
   315→      ['discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'].includes(o.stage) && o.temperature_score < 40
   316→    ).length;
   317→
   318→    // Total revenue (closed won value)
   319→    const totalRevenue = closedWon.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0), 0);
   320→
   321→    // Weighted pipeline = sum of (deal_value * stage_probability)
   322→    const stageProbability: Record<string, number> = {
   323→      cold_dm: 0.05, warm: 0.1, tg_intro: 0.15, booked: 0.25,
   324→      discovery_done: 0.4, proposal_sent: 0.6, proposal_call: 0.75, v2_contract: 0.9,
   325→    };
   326→    const weightedPipeline = pipelineActive.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0) * (stageProbability[o.stage] || 0.1), 0);
   327→
   328→    // Bottleneck analysis
   329→    const funnelStages: SalesPipelineStage[] = ['cold_dm', 'warm', 'tg_intro', 'booked', 'discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won'];
   330→    const stageOrder: Record<string, number> = {};
   331→    funnelStages.forEach((s, i) => { stageOrder[s] = i; });
   332→
   333→    // Count how many opps ever reached each stage (current stage or beyond)
   334→    const reachedStage = funnelStages.map(stage => {
   335→      const idx = stageOrder[stage];
   336→      // Opps currently at this stage or later (including orbit/lost which came from somewhere)
   337→      return all.filter(o => {
   338→        const oIdx = stageOrder[o.stage];
   339→        if (oIdx !== undefined) return oIdx >= idx;
   340→        // Orbit/lost — estimate their furthest stage from timestamps
   341→        if (o.stage === 'orbit' || o.stage === 'v2_closed_lost') {
   342→          if (o.proposal_sent_at && idx <= stageOrder['proposal_sent']) return true;
   343→          if (o.discovery_call_at && idx <= stageOrder['discovery_done']) return true;
   344→          if (o.calendly_booked_date && idx <= stageOrder['booked']) return true;
   345→          if (o.tg_handle && idx <= stageOrder['tg_intro']) return true;
   346→          if ((o.last_contacted_at || o.last_bump_date) && idx <= stageOrder['warm']) return true;
   347→          return idx <= stageOrder['cold_dm'];
   348→        }
   349→        return false;
   350→      }).length;
   351→    });
   352→
   353→    // Stage conversion rates (from one stage to the next)
   354→    const stageConversions = funnelStages.slice(0, -1).map((stage, i) => {
   355→      const from = reachedStage[i];
   356→      const to = reachedStage[i + 1];
   357→      const rate = from > 0 ? (to / from) * 100 : 0;
   358→      const dropoff = from - to;
   359→      return { stage, nextStage: funnelStages[i + 1], from, to, rate, dropoff };
   360→    });
   361→
   362→    // Avg days in current stage (for active pipeline deals)
   363→    const avgDaysInStage = funnelStages.slice(0, -1).map(stage => {
   364→      const oppsInStage = pipelineActive.filter(o => o.stage === stage);
   365→      if (oppsInStage.length === 0) return { stage, avgDays: 0, count: 0 };
   366→      const totalDays = oppsInStage.reduce((sum, o) => {
   367→        const days = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(o.updated_at).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   368→        return sum + days;
   369→      }, 0);
   370→      return { stage, avgDays: Math.round(totalDays / oppsInStage.length), count: oppsInStage.length };
   371→    });
   372→
   373→    // Identify the biggest bottleneck: stage with lowest conversion rate (min 3 opps entering)
   374→    const significantConversions = stageConversions.filter(c => c.from >= 3);
   375→    const worstConversion = significantConversions.length > 0
   376→      ? significantConversions.reduce((worst, c) => c.rate < worst.rate ? c : worst)
   377→      : null;
   378→
   379→    // Identify the slowest stage: where deals sit the longest
   380→    const significantStages = avgDaysInStage.filter(s => s.count >= 2);
   381→    const slowestStage = significantStages.length > 0
   382→      ? significantStages.reduce((slowest, s) => s.avgDays > slowest.avgDays ? s : slowest)
   383→      : null;
   384→
   385→    return {
   386→      totalDmsSent,
   387→      responseRate,
   388→      meetingsBooked,
   389→      discoveryCalls,
   390→      closeRate,
   391→      avgDealSize,
   392→      avgCloseTime,
   393→      qualifiedPct,
   394→      bucketAPct,
   395→      pipelineValue,
   396→      activeDeals: pipelineActive.length,
   397→      overdueFollowups,
   398→      bamfamViolations: metrics.bamfamViolations,
   399→      closedWon: closedWon.length,
   400→      closedLost: closedLost.length,
   401→      inOrbit: inOrbit.length,
   402→      proposalsSent,
   403→      coldDmCount,
   404→      meetingsThisWeek,
   405→      meetingsToday,
   406→      staleDeals,
   407→      dealsAtRisk,
   408→      totalRevenue,
   409→      weightedPipeline,
   410→      stageConversions,
   411→      avgDaysInStage,
   412→      worstConversion,
   413→      slowestStage,
   414→    };
   415→  }, [opportunities, metrics.bamfamViolations, outreachTotal]);
   416→
   417→  // ============================================
   418→  // Data Fetching
   419→  // ============================================
   420→
   421→  const fetchData = useCallback(async () => {
   422→    try {
   423→      const [opps, affs, usrs, met, outreachCount] = await Promise.all([
   424→        SalesPipelineService.getAll(),
   425→        CRMService.getAllAffiliates(),
   426→        UserService.getAllUsers(),
   427→        SalesPipelineService.getMetrics(),
   428→        SalesPipelineService.getColdDmsPaginated(1, 1, {}),
   429→      ]);
   430→      setOpportunities(opps);
   431→      setAffiliates(affs);
   432→      setUsers(usrs);
   433→      setMetrics(met);
   434→      setOutreachAllTotal(outreachCount.count);
   435→    } catch (err) {
   436→      console.error('Error fetching data:', err);
   437→    } finally {
   438→      setLoading(false);
   439→    }
   440→  }, []);
   441→
   442→  useEffect(() => { fetchData(); }, [fetchData]);
   443→
   444→  const fetchActivities = async (oppId: string) => {
   445→    try {
   446→      const acts = await SalesPipelineService.getActivities(oppId);
   447→      setActivities(acts);
   448→    } catch (err) {
   449→      console.error('Error fetching activities:', err);
   450→    }
   451→  };
   452→
   453→  // Outreach data fetching
   454→  const fetchOutreach = useCallback(async () => {
   455→    setOutreachLoading(true);
   456→    try {
   457→      const resolvedFilters = {
   458→        ...outreachFilters,
   459→        owner_id: outreachFilters.owner_id === 'mine' ? (user?.id || undefined) : outreachFilters.owner_id,
   460→      };
   461→      const [result, allResult] = await Promise.all([
   462→        SalesPipelineService.getColdDmsPaginated(outreachPage, OUTREACH_PAGE_SIZE, resolvedFilters),
   463→        SalesPipelineService.getColdDmsPaginated(1, 1, {}),
   464→      ]);
   465→      setOutreachOpps(result.data);
   466→      setOutreachTotal(result.count);
   467→      setOutreachAllTotal(allResult.count);
   468→    } catch (err) {
   469→      console.error('Error fetching outreach:', err);
   470→    } finally {
   471→      setOutreachLoading(false);
   472→    }
   473→  }, [outreachPage, outreachFilters, user?.id]);
   474→
   475→  useEffect(() => {
   476→    if (activeTab === 'outreach') {
   477→      fetchOutreach();
   478→    }
   479→  }, [activeTab, fetchOutreach]);
   480→
   481→  // ============================================
   482→  // Filtered Opportunities
   483→  // ============================================
   484→
   485→  const filteredOpportunities = opportunities.filter(opp => {
   486→    if (searchTerm && !opp.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase())) return false;
   487→    if (pathFilter === 'closer' && opp.dm_account !== 'closer') return false;
   488→    if (pathFilter === 'sdr' && opp.dm_account !== 'sdr') return false;
   489→    return true;
   490→  });
   491→
   492→  const getStageOpps = (stage: SalesPipelineStage) =>
   493→    filteredOpportunities.filter(o => o.stage === stage).sort((a, b) => a.position - b.position);
   494→
   495→  const visiblePipelineStages = (pathFilter === 'closer' ? PATH_A_STAGES : PIPELINE_STAGES).filter(s => s !== 'cold_dm');
   496→
   497→  const orbitOpps = filteredOpportunities.filter(o => o.stage === 'orbit');
   498→  const orbitByReason = ORBIT_REASONS.map(r => ({
   499→    ...r,
   500→    opps: orbitOpps.filter(o => o.orbit_reason === r.value),
```

```text
   503→  // ============================================
   504→  // CRUD Handlers

   506→
   507→  const handleCreate = async () => {
   508→    if (!form.name.trim()) return;
   509→    setIsSubmitting(true);
   510→    try {
   511→      await SalesPipelineService.create({ ...form, stage: form.stage || ('cold_dm' as OpportunityStage) });
   512→      setIsCreateOpen(false);

   520→  };
   521→
   522→  const handleUpdate = async () => {
   523→    if (!editingOpp || !form.name.trim()) return;
   524→    setIsSubmitting(true);
   525→    try {
   526→      await SalesPipelineService.update(editingOpp.id, form);
   527→      setSlideOverMode('view');
   528→      setEditingOpp(null);
   529→      setForm({ name: '' });
   530→      await fetchData();
   531→    } catch (err: any) {
   532→      alert(err.message || 'Error updating opportunity');
   533→    } finally {
   534→      setIsSubmitting(false);
   535→    }
   536→  };
   537→
   538→  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
   539→    if (!confirm('Delete this opportunity?')) return;
   540→    try {
   541→      await SalesPipelineService.delete(id);
   542→      if (slideOverOpp?.id === id) setSlideOverOpp(null);
   543→      await fetchData();
   544→      if (activeTab === 'outreach') await fetchOutreach();
   545→    } catch (err) {
   546→      console.error('Error deleting:', err);
   547→    }
   548→  };
   549→
   550→  const handleStageChange = async (oppId: string, newStage: SalesPipelineStage, currentStage: string) => {
   551→    if (newStage === 'orbit') {
   552→      setOrbitPrompt({ oppId, fromStage: currentStage });
   553→      return;
   554→    }
   555→    if (newStage === 'v2_closed_lost') {
   556→      setClosedLostPrompt({ oppId, fromStage: currentStage });
   557→      return;
   558→    }
   559→    try {
   560→      await SalesPipelineService.update(oppId, { stage: newStage as OpportunityStage });
   561→      await fetchData();
   562→      if (activeTab === 'outreach') await fetchOutreach();
   563→    } catch (err) {
   564→      console.error('Error changing stage:', err);
   565→    }
   566→  };
   567→
   568→  const confirmOrbit = async () => {
   569→    if (!orbitPrompt) return;
   570→    try {
   571→      await SalesPipelineService.update(orbitPrompt.oppId, {
   572→        stage: 'orbit' as OpportunityStage,
   573→        orbit_reason: orbitReasonValue,
   574→      });
   575→      setOrbitPrompt(null);
   576→      setOrbitReasonValue('no_response');
   577→      await fetchData();
   578→    } catch (err) {
   579→      console.error('Error moving to orbit:', err);
   580→    }
   581→  };
   582→
   583→  const confirmClosedLost = async () => {
   584→    if (!closedLostPrompt) return;
   585→    try {
   586→      await SalesPipelineService.update(closedLostPrompt.oppId, {
   587→        stage: 'v2_closed_lost' as OpportunityStage,
   588→        closed_lost_reason: closedLostReasonValue || undefined,
   589→      });
   590→      setClosedLostPrompt(null);
   591→      setClosedLostReasonValue('');
   592→      await fetchData();
   593→    } catch (err) {
   594→      console.error('Error closing lost:', err);
   595→    }
   596→  };
   597→
   598→  const handleResurrect = async (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
   599→    try {
   600→      await SalesPipelineService.update(opp.id, {
   601→        stage: 'cold_dm' as OpportunityStage,
   602→        orbit_reason: null,
   603→      });
   604→      await fetchData();
   605→    } catch (err) {
   606→      console.error('Error resurrecting:', err);
   607→    }
   608→  };
   609→
   610→  const handleRecordBump = async (oppId: string) => {
   611→    if (isBumping) return;
   612→    setIsBumping(true);
   613→    // Optimistic update — immediately reflect in UI
   614→    setOpportunities(prev => prev.map(o =>
   615→      o.id === oppId ? { ...o, bump_number: Math.min(o.bump_number + 1, 4), last_bump_date: new Date().toISOString() } : o
   616→    ));
   617→    try {
   618→      await SalesPipelineService.recordBump(oppId);
   619→      await fetchData();
   620→      if (activeTab === 'outreach') await fetchOutreach();
   621→      if (slideOverOpp?.id === oppId) {
   622→        await fetchActivities(oppId);
   623→      }
   624→    } catch (err) {
   625→      console.error('Error recording bump:', err);
   626→      await fetchData(); // revert on error
   627→    } finally {
   628→      setIsBumping(false);
   629→    }
   630→  };
   631→
   632→  const handleReduceBump = async (oppId: string) => {
   633→    if (isBumping) return;
   634→    setIsBumping(true);
   635→    // Optimistic update
   636→    setOpportunities(prev => prev.map(o =>
   637→      o.id === oppId ? { ...o, bump_number: Math.max(o.bump_number - 1, 0) } : o
   638→    ));
   639→    try {
   640→      await SalesPipelineService.reduceBump(oppId);
   641→      await fetchData();
   642→    } catch (err) {
   643→      console.error('Error reducing bump:', err);
   644→      await fetchData(); // revert on error
   645→    } finally {
   646→      setIsBumping(false);
   647→    }
   648→  };
   649→
   650→  const handleAddActivity = async () => {
   651→    if (!activityForm.title.trim() || !slideOverOpp) return;
   652→    setIsActivitySubmitting(true);
   653→    try {
   654→      await SalesPipelineService.createActivity({
   655→        ...activityForm,
   656→        opportunity_id: slideOverOpp.id,
   657→      });
   658→      // If meeting type with a date set, update next_meeting_at
   659→      if (activityForm.type === 'meeting' && activityMeetingDate) {
   660→        const meetingDate = new Date(activityMeetingDate);
   661→        if (activityMeetingTime) {
   662→          const [h, m] = activityMeetingTime.split(':').map(Number);
   663→          meetingDate.setHours(h, m, 0, 0);
   664→        }
   665→        await SalesPipelineService.update(slideOverOpp.id, { next_meeting_at: meetingDate.toISOString() });
   666→        await fetchData();
   667→      }
   668→      setActivityForm({ opportunity_id: '', type: 'note', title: '' });
   669→      setActivityMeetingDate(undefined);
   670→      setActivityMeetingTime(undefined);
   671→      await fetchActivities(slideOverOpp.id);
   672→    } catch (err) {
   673→      console.error('Error adding activity:', err);
   674→    } finally {
   675→      setIsActivitySubmitting(false);
   676→    }
   677→  };
   678→
   679→  const handleInlineEdit = async (oppId: string, field: string, value: string) => {
   680→    try {
   681→      const updates: any = {};
   682→      if (field === 'deal_value') {
   683→        updates.deal_value = value ? parseFloat(value) : null;
   684→      } else if (field === 'temperature_score') {
   685→        updates.temperature_score = parseInt(value) || 50;
   686→      } else {
   687→        updates[field] = value || null;
   688→      }
   689→      await SalesPipelineService.update(oppId, updates);
   690→      await fetchData();
   691→    } catch (err) {
   692→      console.error('Error inline edit:', err);
   693→    }
   694→    setEditingCell(null);
   695→  };
   696→
   697→  const handleRecalculateAll = async () => {
   698→    setIsRecalculating(true);
   699→    try {
   700→      await SalesPipelineService.recalcAllTemperatures();
   701→      await fetchData();
   702→      if (activeTab === 'outreach') await fetchOutreach();
   703→    } catch (err) {
   704→      console.error('Error recalculating temperatures:', err);
   705→    } finally {
   706→      setIsRecalculating(false);
   707→    }
   708→  };
   709→
   710→  // ============================================
   711→  // DnD Handlers
   712→  // ============================================
   713→
   714→  const handleDragStart = (event: DragStartEvent) => {
   715→    const id = event.active.id as string;
   716→    setActiveId(id);
   717→    setActiveOpportunity(opportunities.find(o => o.id === id) || null);
   718→  };
   719→
   720→  const handleDragEnd = async (event: DragEndEvent) => {
   721→    const { active, over } = event;
   722→    setActiveId(null);
   723→    setActiveOpportunity(null);
   724→
   725→    if (!over) return;
   726→
   727→    const oppId = active.id as string;
   728→    const overId = over.id as string;
   729→    const opp = opportunities.find(o => o.id === oppId);
   730→    if (!opp) return;
   731→
   732→    // Check if dropped on a stage column
   733→    const isStageColumn = ALL_V2_STAGES.includes(overId as SalesPipelineStage);
   734→
   735→    if (isStageColumn) {
   736→      const newStage = overId as SalesPipelineStage;
   737→      if (opp.stage !== newStage) {
   738→        await handleStageChange(oppId, newStage, opp.stage);
   739→      }
   740→    } else {
   741→      // Dropped on another card — reorder within same stage
   742→      const targetOpp = opportunities.find(o => o.id === overId);
   743→      if (targetOpp && targetOpp.stage === opp.stage) {
   744→        const stageOpps = getStageOpps(opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage);
   745→        const oldIndex = stageOpps.findIndex(o => o.id === oppId);
   746→        const newIndex = stageOpps.findIndex(o => o.id === overId);
   747→        if (oldIndex !== -1 && newIndex !== -1) {
   748→          const reordered = arrayMove(stageOpps, oldIndex, newIndex);
   749→          const positions = reordered.map((o, i) => ({ id: o.id, position: i }));
   750→          await SalesPipelineService.updatePositions(positions);
   751→          await fetchData();
   752→        }
   753→      } else if (targetOpp && targetOpp.stage !== opp.stage) {
   754→        // Dropped on card in different stage
   755→        await handleStageChange(oppId, targetOpp.stage as SalesPipelineStage, opp.stage);
   756→      }
   757→    }
   758→  };
   759→
   760→  // ============================================
   761→  // Open slide-over
   762→  // ============================================
   763→
   764→  const openSlideOver = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity, guidance?: { label: string; hint: string }) => {
   765→    setSlideOverOpp(opp);
   766→    setSlideOverMode('view');
   767→    setActionGuidance(guidance || null);
   768→    fetchActivities(opp.id);
   769→    setActivityForm({ opportunity_id: opp.id, type: 'note', title: '' });
   770→    setActivityMeetingDate(undefined);
   771→    setActivityMeetingTime(undefined);
   772→  };
   773→
   774→  const populateForm = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
   775→    setForm({
   776→      name: opp.name,
   777→      dm_account: opp.dm_account,
   778→      bucket: opp.bucket || undefined,
   779→      temperature_score: opp.temperature_score,
   780→      source: opp.source || undefined,
   781→      tg_handle: opp.tg_handle || undefined,
   782→      owner_id: opp.owner_id || undefined,
   783→      referrer: opp.referrer || undefined,
   784→      affiliate_id: opp.affiliate_id || undefined,
   785→      deal_value: opp.deal_value || undefined,
   786→      currency: opp.currency,
   787→      next_meeting_at: opp.next_meeting_at || undefined,
   788→      next_meeting_type: opp.next_meeting_type || undefined,
   789→      notes: opp.notes || undefined,
   790→    });
   791→  };
   792→
   793→  const openEditDialog = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
   794→    populateForm(opp);
   795→    if (slideOverOpp?.id === opp.id) {
   796→      // Editing from slide-over — switch to edit mode inline
   797→      setEditingOpp(opp);
   798→      setSlideOverMode('edit');
   799→    } else {
   800→      // Editing from table/kanban — open dialog
   801→      setEditingOpp(opp);
   802→    }
   803→  };
   804→
   805→  const toggleKanbanCollapse = (stage: string) => {
   806→    setCollapsedKanbanStages(prev => {
   807→      const next = new Set(prev);
   808→      next.has(stage) ? next.delete(stage) : next.add(stage);
   809→      return next;
   810→    });
   811→  };
   812→
   813→  // ============================================
   814→  // BAMFAM check
   815→  // ============================================
   816→
   817→  const isBAMFAM = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
   818→    const postDiscovery: SalesPipelineStage[] = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'];
   819→    if (!postDiscovery.includes(opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage)) return false;
   820→    if (!opp.next_meeting_at) return true;
   821→    return new Date(opp.next_meeting_at) < new Date();
   822→  };
   823→
   824→  // ============================================
   825→  // Actions Tab: getNextAction helper
   826→  // ============================================
   827→
   828→  type ActionPriority = 'urgent' | 'high' | 'medium' | 'low' | 'wait';
   829→  type ActionExecutionType = 'bump' | 'stage_change' | 'open_detail' | 'none';
   830→
   831→  type ActionAlternative = { label: string; actionType: ActionExecutionType; targetStage?: SalesPipelineStage; variant: 'default' | 'warn' | 'danger'; quick?: boolean };
   832→
   833→  const getNextAction = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity): {
   834→    label: string;
   835→    hint: string;
   836→    priority: ActionPriority;
   837→    actionType: ActionExecutionType;
   838→    targetStage?: SalesPipelineStage;
   839→    isActionable: boolean;
   840→    sortScore: number;
   841→    alternatives: ActionAlternative[];
   842→  } => {
   843→    const postDiscovery: SalesPipelineStage[] = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'];
   844→
   845→    // BAMFAM violation — any post-discovery stage with no future meeting
   846→    // For discovery_done without proposal, show both BAMFAM + Send Proposal context
   847→    if (postDiscovery.includes(opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage)) {
   848→      const hasFutureMeeting = opp.next_meeting_at && new Date(opp.next_meeting_at) > new Date();
   849→      if (!hasFutureMeeting) {
   850→        // Fix #4: discovery_done without proposal — show Send Proposal as primary, BAMFAM as hint
   851→        if (opp.stage === 'discovery_done' && !opp.proposal_sent_at) {
   852→          return { label: 'Send Proposal', hint: 'Draft & send proposal. Also book a follow-up meeting (BAMFAM).', priority: 'urgent', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'proposal_sent', isActionable: true, sortScore: 1, alternatives: [
   853→            { label: 'Book Meeting', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },
   854→            { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
   855→          ]};
   856→        }
   857→        return { label: 'Book Next Meeting!', hint: 'No future meeting set — DM to schedule', priority: 'urgent', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 1, alternatives: [
   858→          { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
   859→          { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
   860→        ]};
   861→      }
   862→    }
   863→
   864→    switch (opp.stage) {
   865→      // Fix #2: v2_contract — "Chase Signature" as primary (open_detail), "Signed!" as quick alt
   866→      case 'v2_contract':
   867→        return { label: 'Chase Signature', hint: 'Follow up on the contract — get it signed', priority: 'urgent', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 2, alternatives: [
   868→          { label: 'Signed!', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_won', variant: 'default', quick: true },
   869→          { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
   870→        ]};
   871→
   872→      case 'proposal_call':
   873→        return { label: 'To Contract', hint: 'Handle objections → move to contract', priority: 'urgent', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_contract', isActionable: true, sortScore: 3, alternatives: [
   874→          { label: 'Follow Up', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },
   875→          { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
   876→        ]};
   877→
   878→      case 'cold_dm': {
   879→        if (opp.bump_number >= 4) {
   880→          return { label: 'Review → Orbit', hint: '4 bumps sent, no reply — shelve or orbit', priority: 'medium', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', isActionable: true, sortScore: 50, alternatives: [
   881→            { label: 'Replied!', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'warm', variant: 'default', quick: true },
   882→            { label: 'Keep Bumping', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },
   883→          ]};
   884→        }
   885→        const bumpAlts: ActionAlternative[] = [
   886→          { label: 'Replied!', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'warm', variant: 'default', quick: true },
   887→          { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
   888→        ];
   889→        // Fix #6: bump_number=0 but has last_bump_date (was reduced) — show "Bump" not "Send First DM"
   890→        if (opp.bump_number === 0 && !opp.last_bump_date) {
   891→          return { label: 'Send First DM', hint: 'Send intro DM on IG/X', priority: 'high', actionType: 'bump', isActionable: true, sortScore: 10, alternatives: bumpAlts };
   892→        }
   893→        if (opp.last_bump_date) {
   894→          const daysSince = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(opp.last_bump_date).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   895→          if (daysSince >= 3) {
   896→            return { label: `Bump #${opp.bump_number + 1}`, hint: `Last bump ${daysSince}d ago — send follow-up DM`, priority: 'high', actionType: 'bump', isActionable: true, sortScore: 11, alternatives: bumpAlts };
   897→          }
   898→          const daysLeft = 3 - daysSince;
   899→          return { label: `Wait ${daysLeft}d`, hint: 'Too soon to bump again', priority: 'wait', actionType: 'none', isActionable: false, sortScore: 100, alternatives: [] };
   900→        }
   901→        return { label: `Bump #${opp.bump_number + 1}`, hint: 'Send follow-up DM', priority: 'high', actionType: 'bump', isActionable: true, sortScore: 11, alternatives: bumpAlts };
   902→      }
   903→
   904→      // Fix #3: warm/interested — open detail to enter TG handle first, "Got TG!" is quick alt after
   905→      case 'warm':
   906→        if (opp.warm_sub_state === 'interested') {
   907→          return { label: 'Get TG Handle', hint: 'They replied — ask for Telegram, then enter it in Edit', priority: 'high', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 15, alternatives: [
   908→            { label: 'Got TG!', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'tg_intro', variant: 'default', quick: true },
   909→            { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
   910→          ]};
   911→        }
   912→        return { label: 'Follow Up', hint: 'No reply yet — send another message on DM', priority: 'high', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 20, alternatives: [
   913→          { label: 'Got TG!', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'tg_intro', variant: 'default' },
   914→          { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
   915→        ]};
   916→
   917→      case 'tg_intro':
   918→        return { label: 'Booked!', hint: 'Send Calendly link on TG to schedule', priority: 'high', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'booked', isActionable: true, sortScore: 18, alternatives: [
   919→          { label: 'Follow Up', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },
   920→          { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
   921→        ]};
   922→
   923→      // Fix #1: booked with meeting — check if meeting is future vs past
   924→      case 'booked': {
   925→        if (!opp.next_meeting_at) {
   926→          return { label: 'Schedule Meeting', hint: 'Set the meeting date & time', priority: 'high', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 16, alternatives: [
   927→            { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
   928→          ]};
   929→        }
   930→        const meetingInFuture = new Date(opp.next_meeting_at) > new Date();
   931→        if (meetingInFuture) {
   932→          return { label: 'Prep for Meeting', hint: 'Review notes & prep talking points before the call', priority: 'low', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 60, alternatives: [
   933→            { label: 'Reschedule', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },
   934→            { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
   935→          ]};
   936→        }
   937→        // Meeting is in the past — call should have happened
   938→        return { label: 'Discovery Done', hint: 'Meeting happened — mark discovery complete', priority: 'high', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'discovery_done', isActionable: true, sortScore: 12, alternatives: [
   939→          { label: 'Reschedule', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },
   940→          // Fix #5: No Show opens slide-over instead of auto-orbiting
   941→          { label: 'No Show', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'warn' },
   942→        ]};
   943→      }
   944→
   945→      case 'discovery_done':
   946→        if (!opp.proposal_sent_at) {
   947→          return { label: 'Send Proposal', hint: 'Draft & send pricing proposal', priority: 'high', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'proposal_sent', isActionable: true, sortScore: 14, alternatives: [
   948→            { label: 'Need More Info', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },
   949→            { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
   950→          ]};
   951→        }
   952→        return { label: 'Follow Up Proposal', hint: 'Check if they reviewed the proposal', priority: 'high', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 19, alternatives: [
   953→          { label: 'Call Set', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'proposal_call', variant: 'default', quick: true },
   954→          { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
   955→        ]};
   956→
   957→      case 'proposal_sent':
   958→        return { label: 'Follow Up Proposal', hint: 'Check if they reviewed the proposal', priority: 'high', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 19, alternatives: [
   959→          { label: 'Call Set', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'proposal_call', variant: 'default', quick: true },
   960→          { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
   961→        ]};
   962→
   963→      case 'orbit': {
   964→        const daysSinceCreated = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(opp.created_at).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   965→        if (daysSinceCreated > 90) {
   966→          return { label: 'Resurrect', hint: '90+ days — re-engage or mark lost', priority: 'low', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 70, alternatives: [
   967→            { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
   968→          ]};
   969→        }
   970→        return { label: 'In Orbit', hint: '', priority: 'wait', actionType: 'none', isActionable: false, sortScore: 100, alternatives: [] };
   971→      }
   972→
   973→      default:
   974→        return { label: '—', hint: '', priority: 'wait', actionType: 'none', isActionable: false, sortScore: 100, alternatives: [] };
   975→    }
   976→  };
   977→
   978→  // ============================================
   979→  // Actions Tab: Derived action items
   980→  // ============================================
   981→
   982→  const PRE_DISCOVERY_STAGES = ['cold_dm', 'warm', 'tg_intro', 'booked'];
   983→  const POST_DISCOVERY_STAGES = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'];
   984→
   985→  const actionItems = useMemo(() => {
   986→    const terminalStages = ['v2_closed_won', 'v2_closed_lost'];
   987→    return opportunities
   988→      .filter(opp => !terminalStages.includes(opp.stage))
   989→      .map(opp => ({ opp, action: getNextAction(opp) }))
   990→      .filter(({ action }) => action.isActionable)
   991→      .filter(({ opp, action }) => {
   992→        if (actionFilter === 'mine') return opp.owner_id === user?.id;
   993→        if (actionFilter === 'urgent') return action.priority === 'urgent';
   994→        return true;
   995→      })
   996→      .sort((a, b) => {
   997→        if (a.action.sortScore !== b.action.sortScore) return a.action.sortScore - b.action.sortScore;
   998→        return (b.opp.temperature_score || 0) - (a.opp.temperature_score || 0);
   999→      });
```
</details></tool-use>
