  1000→  }, [opportunities, actionFilter, user?.id]);
  1001→
  1002→  const outreachActions = useMemo(() => actionItems.filter(({ opp }) => PRE_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage)), [actionItems]);
  1003→  const closingActions = useMemo(() => actionItems.filter(({ opp }) => POST_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage) || opp.stage === 'orbit'), [actionItems]);
  1004→  const displayedActions = actionPhaseFilter === 'outreach' ? outreachActions : actionPhaseFilter === 'closing' ? closingActions : actionItems;
  1005→
  1006→  // ============================================
  1007→  // Actions Tab: Execute handler
  1008→  // ============================================
  1009→
  1010→  const ACTION_GUIDANCE: Record<string, { label: string; hint: string }> = {
  1011→    'Book Next Meeting!': { label: 'Book Next Meeting', hint: 'Click the pencil icon (Edit) → set the Next Meeting date field. No deal should exist without a future meeting (BAMFAM).' },
  1012→    'Book Meeting': { label: 'Book Meeting', hint: 'Click the pencil icon (Edit) → set the Next Meeting date field to stay BAMFAM-compliant.' },
  1013→    'Get TG Handle': { label: 'Get TG Handle', hint: 'DM them asking for their Telegram handle, then click Edit → fill in the TG Handle field. Once entered, click "Got TG!" to advance.' },
  1014→    'Follow Up': { label: 'Follow Up', hint: 'Send a follow-up DM. After messaging, log it as an activity below so the team knows.' },
  1015→    'Schedule Meeting': { label: 'Schedule Meeting', hint: 'Send Calendly or propose a time. Click the pencil icon (Edit) → set the Next Meeting date field once confirmed.' },
  1016→    'Prep for Meeting': { label: 'Prep for Meeting', hint: 'Review their notes, bucket, and past activity below. Update Notes with talking points before the call.' },
  1017→    'Follow Up Proposal': { label: 'Follow Up Proposal', hint: 'Message them to check if they reviewed the proposal. Log their response as an activity below.' },
  1018→    'Need More Info': { label: 'Need More Info', hint: 'They need more details before a proposal. Add notes on what they need, then follow up.' },
  1019→    'Resurrect': { label: 'Resurrect Check', hint: 'It\'s been 90+ days. Review their notes — DM to re-engage, or move to Lost if no longer viable.' },
  1020→    'Chase Signature': { label: 'Chase Signature', hint: 'Follow up on the contract. Once they sign, use the "Signed!" button to close the deal.' },
  1021→    'Reschedule': { label: 'Reschedule Meeting', hint: 'Meeting needs rescheduling. Click the pencil icon (Edit) → update the Next Meeting date field.' },
  1022→    'No Show': { label: 'No Show', hint: 'They didn\'t show up. Log a "No Show" activity below and decide whether to reschedule or orbit.' },
  1023→    'Keep Bumping': { label: 'Keep Bumping', hint: 'Override the orbit suggestion — review notes and continue follow-up DMs.' },
  1024→  };
  1025→
  1026→  const openActivityLogPrompt = (oppId: string, oppName: string, type: ActivityType, title: string, showMeetingPicker?: boolean) => {
  1027→    setActivityLogPrompt({ oppId, oppName, type, title, showMeetingPicker });
  1028→    setActivityLogForm({ title, description: '', outcome: '', next_step: '' });
  1029→  };
  1030→
  1031→  const handleActionExecute = async (oppId: string, action: ReturnType<typeof getNextAction>, opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
  1032→    setExecutingAction(oppId);
  1033→    try {
  1034→      if (action.actionType === 'bump') {
  1035→        await handleRecordBump(oppId);
  1036→        // Show activity log popup after bump
  1037→        const bumpTitle = action.label === 'Send First DM' ? 'First DM sent' : `${action.label} sent`;
  1038→        openActivityLogPrompt(oppId, opp.name, 'message', bumpTitle);
  1039→      } else if (action.actionType === 'stage_change' && action.targetStage) {
  1040→        await handleStageChange(oppId, action.targetStage, opp.stage);
  1041→        // Show activity log popup after stage change (skip orbit/closed_lost — they have their own prompts)
  1042→        const stageActivityMap: Record<string, { type: ActivityType; title: string; showMeetingPicker?: boolean }> = {
  1043→          'warm': { type: 'message', title: 'KOL replied' },
  1044→          'tg_intro': { type: 'message', title: 'Got TG handle' },
  1045→          'booked': { type: 'meeting', title: 'Meeting booked', showMeetingPicker: true },
  1046→          'discovery_done': { type: 'meeting', title: 'Discovery call completed' },
  1047→          'proposal_sent': { type: 'proposal', title: 'Proposal sent' },
  1048→          'v2_contract': { type: 'call', title: 'Moving to contract' },
  1049→          'v2_closed_won': { type: 'note', title: 'Deal closed won!' },
  1050→        };
  1051→        const mapping = stageActivityMap[action.targetStage];
  1052→        if (mapping) {
  1053→          openActivityLogPrompt(oppId, opp.name, mapping.type, mapping.title, mapping.showMeetingPicker);
  1054→        }
  1055→      } else {
  1056→        // open_detail actions
  1057→        if (action.label === 'Book Next Meeting!' || action.label === 'Schedule Meeting') {
  1058→          openActivityLogPrompt(oppId, opp.name, 'meeting', 'Meeting scheduled', true);
  1059→        } else {
  1060→          const guidance = ACTION_GUIDANCE[action.label];
  1061→          openSlideOver(opp, guidance);
  1062→        }
  1063→      }
  1064→    } finally {
  1065→      setExecutingAction(null);
  1066→    }
  1067→  };
  1068→
  1069→  const confirmActivityLog = async () => {
  1070→    if (!activityLogPrompt) return;
  1071→    setIsActivityLogSubmitting(true);
  1072→    try {
  1073→      // Create the activity
  1074→      await SalesPipelineService.createActivity({
  1075→        opportunity_id: activityLogPrompt.oppId,
  1076→        type: activityLogPrompt.type,
  1077→        title: activityLogForm.title || activityLogPrompt.title,
  1078→        description: activityLogForm.description || undefined,
  1079→        outcome: activityLogForm.outcome || undefined,
  1080→        next_step: activityLogForm.next_step || undefined,
  1081→        next_step_date: activityLogForm.next_step_date || undefined,
  1082→      });
  1083→      // If meeting picker was shown and a date was set, update next_meeting_at
  1084→      if (activityLogPrompt.showMeetingPicker && activityLogForm.meeting_date) {
  1085→        const meetingDate = new Date(activityLogForm.meeting_date);
  1086→        if (activityLogForm.meeting_time) {
  1087→          const [h, m] = activityLogForm.meeting_time.split(':').map(Number);
  1088→          meetingDate.setHours(h, m, 0, 0);
  1089→        }
  1090→        await SalesPipelineService.update(activityLogPrompt.oppId, { next_meeting_at: meetingDate.toISOString() });
  1091→      }
  1092→      setActivityLogPrompt(null);
  1093→      setActivityLogForm({ title: '', description: '', outcome: '', next_step: '' });
  1094→      await fetchData();
  1095→      if (activeTab === 'outreach') await fetchOutreach();
  1096→    } catch (err) {
  1097→      console.error('Error logging activity:', err);
  1098→    } finally {
  1099→      setIsActivityLogSubmitting(false);
  1100→    }
  1101→  };
  1102→
  1103→  // ============================================
  1104→  // Helpers
  1105→  // ============================================
  1106→
  1107→  const getUserName = (userId: string | null) => {
  1108→    if (!userId) return '—';
  1109→    const u = users.find(u => u.id === userId);
  1110→    return u?.name || u?.email || '—';
  1111→  };
  1112→
  1113→  const activityIcon = (type: ActivityType) => {
  1114→    switch (type) {
  1115→      case 'call': return <Phone className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
  1116→      case 'message': return <MessageSquare className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
  1117→      case 'meeting': return <Calendar className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
  1118→      case 'proposal': return <FileText className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
  1119→      case 'note': return <StickyNote className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
  1120→      case 'bump': return <Zap className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
  1121→    }
  1122→  };
  1123→
  1124→  // ============================================
  1125→  // RENDER: Opportunity Card (Kanban)
  1126→  // ============================================
  1127→
  1128→  const renderCard = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity, isDragging: boolean = false) => {
  1129→    const colors = STAGE_COLORS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || STAGE_COLORS.cold_dm;
  1130→    const bamfam = isBAMFAM(opp);
  1131→
  1132→    return (
  1133→      <Card
  1134→        className={`group hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200 border-l-4 ${colors.border} ${isDragging ? 'shadow-lg ring-2 ring-blue-400 opacity-90' : ''} ${bamfam ? 'bg-red-50/30' : ''}`}
  1135→        onClick={() => openSlideOver(opp)}
  1136→      >
  1137→        <CardContent className="p-4">
  1138→          <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2">
  1139→            <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
  1140→              {/* Name with drag handle */}
  1141→              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  1142→                <GripVertical className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-300 flex-shrink-0 cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing" />
  1143→                <Building2 className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400 flex-shrink-0" />
  1144→                <p className="font-medium text-gray-900 truncate">{opp.name}</p>
  1145→              </div>
  1146→
  1147→              {/* Deal Value */}
  1148→              {opp.deal_value && (
  1149→                <p className="text-lg font-semibold text-emerald-600 mt-2">
  1150→                  ${opp.deal_value.toLocaleString()}
  1151→                </p>
  1152→              )}
  1153→
  1154→              {/* Badges */}
  1155→              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5 mt-2">
  1156→                {opp.bucket && (
  1157→                  <Badge className={`text-xs ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].bg} ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].text} border-0`}>
  1158→                    Bucket {opp.bucket}
  1159→                  </Badge>
  1160→                )}
  1161→                {opp.dm_account === 'closer' && (
  1162→                  <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs bg-white border-blue-300 text-blue-600">Closer</Badge>
  1163→                )}
  1164→                {opp.dm_account === 'sdr' && (
  1165→                  <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs bg-white border-green-300 text-green-600">SDR</Badge>
  1166→                )}
  1167→                {opp.source && (
  1168→                  <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs bg-white capitalize">
  1169→                    {opp.source.replace('_', ' ')}
  1170→                  </Badge>
  1171→                )}
  1172→              </div>
  1173→
  1174→              {/* Details */}
  1175→              <div className="mt-3 space-y-1.5 text-xs text-gray-500">
  1176→                {/* Bump progress (cold_dm only) */}
  1177→                {opp.stage === 'cold_dm' && (
  1178→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
  1179→                    <Zap className="h-3 w-3 flex-shrink-0 text-sky-500" />
  1180→                    <span>Bump {opp.bump_number}/4</span>
  1181→                    <div className="flex gap-0.5">
  1182→                      {[1, 2, 3, 4].map(i => (
  1183→                        <div key={i} className={`w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full ${i <= opp.bump_number ? 'bg-sky-500' : 'bg-gray-200'}`} />
  1184→                      ))}
  1185→                    </div>
  1186→                  </div>
  1187→                )}
  1188→
  1189→                {/* Warm sub-state */}
  1190→                {opp.stage === 'warm' && opp.warm_sub_state && (
  1191→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
  1192→                    <MessageSquare className="h-3 w-3 flex-shrink-0" />
  1193→                    <span className={opp.warm_sub_state === 'interested' ? 'text-green-600 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500'}>
  1194→                      {opp.warm_sub_state === 'interested' ? 'Interested' : 'Silent'}
  1195→                    </span>
  1196→                  </div>
  1197→                )}
  1198→
  1199→                {/* Temperature bar */}
  1200→                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  1201→                  <div className="flex-1 h-1.5 bg-gray-100 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
  1202→                    <div
  1203→                      className={`h-full rounded-full ${opp.temperature_score >= 70 ? 'bg-green-500' : opp.temperature_score >= 40 ? 'bg-amber-500' : 'bg-red-400'}`}
  1204→                      style={{ width: `${opp.temperature_score}%` }}
  1205→                    />
  1206→                  </div>
  1207→                  <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-400">{opp.temperature_score}</span>
  1208→                </div>
  1209→
  1210→                {/* BAMFAM warning */}
  1211→                {bamfam && (
  1212→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-red-600">
  1213→                    <AlertTriangle className="h-3 w-3" />
  1214→                    <span className="font-medium">BAMFAM</span>
  1215→                  </div>
  1216→                )}
  1217→
  1218→                {/* Last contacted */}
  1219→                {opp.last_contacted_at && (
  1220→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
  1221→                    <Clock className="h-3 w-3 flex-shrink-0" />
  1222→                    <span>{formatDistanceToNow(new Date(opp.last_contacted_at), { addSuffix: true })}</span>
  1223→                  </div>
  1224→                )}
  1225→              </div>
  1226→            </div>
  1227→
  1228→            {!isDragging && (
  1229→              <DropdownMenu>
  1230→                <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
  1231→                  <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-8 w-8 p-0">
  1232→                    <MoreHorizontal className="h-4 w-4" />
  1233→                  </Button>
  1234→                </DropdownMenuTrigger>
  1235→                <DropdownMenuContent align="end" className="w-48 z-[80]">
  1236→                  <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); openEditDialog(opp); }}>
  1237→                    <Edit className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Edit
  1238→                  </DropdownMenuItem>
  1239→                  {opp.stage === 'cold_dm' && (
  1240→                    <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleRecordBump(opp.id); }}>
  1241→                      <Zap className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Record Bump
  1242→                    </DropdownMenuItem>
  1243→                  )}
  1244→                  <DropdownMenuSeparator />
  1245→                  <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleStageChange(opp.id, 'orbit', opp.stage); }} className="text-orange-600">
  1246→                    <RotateCcw className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Move to Orbit
  1247→                  </DropdownMenuItem>
  1248→                  <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleDelete(opp.id); }} className="text-red-600">
  1249→                    <Trash2 className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Delete
  1250→                  </DropdownMenuItem>
  1251→                </DropdownMenuContent>
  1252→              </DropdownMenu>
  1253→            )}
  1254→          </div>
  1255→        </CardContent>
  1256→      </Card>
  1257→    );
  1258→  };
  1259→
  1260→  // ============================================
  1261→  // RENDER: Kanban View
  1262→  // ============================================
  1263→
  1264→  const renderKanban = () => (
  1265→    <DndContext sensors={sensors} collisionDetection={closestCenter} onDragStart={handleDragStart} onDragEnd={handleDragEnd}>
  1266→      <div className="flex gap-4 overflow-x-auto pb-4 h-full">
  1267→        {visiblePipelineStages.map(stage => {
  1268→          const stageOpps = getStageOpps(stage);
  1269→          const colors = STAGE_COLORS[stage];
  1270→          const isCollapsed = collapsedKanbanStages.has(stage);
  1271→          const stageValue = stageOpps.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0), 0);
  1272→
  1273→          return (
  1274→            <div
  1275→              key={stage}
  1276→              className={`${isCollapsed ? 'w-12' : 'flex-1 min-w-[280px] max-w-[320px]'} flex flex-col h-full transition-all duration-200`}
  1277→            >
  1278→              {/* Column Header */}
  1279→              <div
  1280→                className={`${isCollapsed ? 'rounded-lg' : 'rounded-t-lg'} px-4 py-3 ${colors.bg} border ${colors.border} ${isCollapsed ? '' : 'border-b-0'} flex-shrink-0 cursor-pointer select-none`}
  1281→                onClick={() => toggleKanbanCollapse(stage)}
  1282→              >
  1283→                <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
  1284→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  1285→                    {isCollapsed ? (
  1286→                      <ChevronRight className={`w-4 h-4 ${colors.text}`} />
  1287→                    ) : (
  1288→                      <ChevronDown className={`w-4 h-4 ${colors.text}`} />
  1289→                    )}
  1290→                    {!isCollapsed && (
  1291→                      <>
  1292→                        <h4 className={`font-semibold ${colors.text}`}>{STAGE_LABELS[stage]}</h4>
  1293→                        <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium">{stageOpps.length}</Badge>
  1294→                      </>
  1295→                    )}
  1296→                  </div>
  1297→                </div>
  1298→                {!isCollapsed && stageValue > 0 && (
  1299→                  <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-600 mt-1">
  1300→                    ${stageValue.toLocaleString()}
  1301→                  </p>
  1302→                )}
  1303→                {isCollapsed && (
  1304→                  <div className="mt-2 flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
  1305→                    <span className={`font-semibold ${colors.text}`} style={{ writingMode: 'vertical-rl', textOrientation: 'mixed' }}>
  1306→                      {STAGE_LABELS[stage]}
  1307→                    </span>
  1308→                    <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium mt-1">{stageOpps.length}</Badge>
  1309→                  </div>
  1310→                )}
  1311→              </div>
  1312→
  1313→              {/* Column Content - Droppable Area */}
  1314→              {!isCollapsed && (
  1315→                <DroppableColumn id={stage} className={`flex-1 bg-gray-50/50 border border-gray-200 border-t-0 rounded-b-lg p-3 space-y-3 overflow-y-auto transition-colors`}>
  1316→                  <SortableContext items={stageOpps.map(o => o.id)} strategy={verticalListSortingStrategy}>
  1317→                    {stageOpps.length === 0 ? (
  1318→                      <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-24 text-sm text-gray-400">
  1319→                        No opportunities
  1320→                      </div>
  1321→                    ) : (
  1322→                      stageOpps.map(opp => (
  1323→                        <SortableCard key={opp.id} id={opp.id}>
  1324→                          {renderCard(opp)}
  1325→                        </SortableCard>
  1326→                      ))
  1327→                    )}
  1328→                  </SortableContext>
  1329→                </DroppableColumn>
  1330→              )}
  1331→            </div>
  1332→          );
  1333→        })}
  1334→
  1335→        {/* Orbit drop zone */}
  1336→        <div className="w-12 flex flex-col h-full transition-all duration-200">
  1337→          <DroppableColumn id="orbit" className="rounded-lg px-4 py-3 bg-orange-50 border border-orange-200 flex-shrink-0 cursor-pointer select-none">
  1338→            <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
  1339→              <RotateCcw className="w-4 h-4 text-orange-700" />
  1340→              <span className="font-semibold text-orange-700 mt-2" style={{ writingMode: 'vertical-rl', textOrientation: 'mixed' }}>
  1341→                Orbit
  1342→              </span>
  1343→              <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium mt-1">{orbitOpps.length}</Badge>
  1344→            </div>
  1345→          </DroppableColumn>
  1346→        </div>
  1347→
  1348→        {/* Closed Lost drop zone */}
  1349→        <div className="w-12 flex flex-col h-full transition-all duration-200">
  1350→          <DroppableColumn id="v2_closed_lost" className="rounded-lg px-4 py-3 bg-red-50 border border-red-200 flex-shrink-0 cursor-pointer select-none">
  1351→            <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
  1352→              <X className="w-4 h-4 text-red-700" />
  1353→              <span className="font-semibold text-red-700 mt-2" style={{ writingMode: 'vertical-rl', textOrientation: 'mixed' }}>
  1354→                Lost
  1355→              </span>
  1356→              <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium mt-1">
  1357→                {filteredOpportunities.filter(o => o.stage === 'v2_closed_lost').length}
  1358→              </Badge>
  1359→            </div>
  1360→          </DroppableColumn>
  1361→        </div>
  1362→      </div>
  1363→
  1364→      <DragOverlay>
  1365→        {activeOpportunity ? (
  1366→          <div className="w-[280px]">
  1367→            {renderCard(activeOpportunity, true)}
  1368→          </div>
  1369→        ) : null}
  1370→      </DragOverlay>
  1371→    </DndContext>
  1372→  );
  1373→
  1374→  // ============================================
  1375→  // RENDER: Table View
  1376→  // ============================================
  1377→
  1378→  const renderTable = () => (
  1379→    <div className="pb-8">
  1380→      <DndContext sensors={sensors} collisionDetection={closestCenter} onDragStart={handleDragStart} onDragEnd={handleDragEnd}>
  1381→        {visiblePipelineStages.map(stage => {
  1382→          const stageOpps = getStageOpps(stage);
  1383→          const colors = STAGE_COLORS[stage];
  1384→          const isCollapsed = collapsedStages.has(stage);
  1385→          const stageValue = stageOpps.reduce((s, o) => s + (o.deal_value || 0), 0);
  1386→
  1387→          return (
  1388→            <div key={stage} className="mb-6">
  1389→              {/* Stage Header */}
  1390→              <div
  1391→                onClick={() => {
  1392→                  const next = new Set(collapsedStages);
  1393→                  isCollapsed ? next.delete(stage) : next.add(stage);
  1394→                  setCollapsedStages(next);
  1395→                }}
  1396→                className={`flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 ${colors.bg} ${isCollapsed ? 'rounded-lg' : 'rounded-t-lg'} border ${colors.border} ${isCollapsed ? '' : 'border-b-0'} cursor-pointer select-none transition-all`}
  1397→              >
  1398→                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  1399→                  {isCollapsed ? <ChevronRight className={`h-4 w-4 ${colors.text}`} /> : <ChevronDown className={`h-4 w-4 ${colors.text}`} />}
  1400→                  <h4 className={`font-semibold ${colors.text}`}>{STAGE_LABELS[stage]}</h4>
  1401→                  <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium">{stageOpps.length}</Badge>
  1402→                </div>
  1403→                {stageValue > 0 && (
  1404→                  <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-600">
  1405→                    ${stageValue.toLocaleString()}
  1406→                  </span>
  1407→                )}
  1408→              </div>
  1409→
  1410→              {!isCollapsed && (
  1411→                <div className="bg-white rounded-b-lg border border-gray-200 border-t-0">
  1412→                  <Table>
  1413→                    <TableHeader>
  1414→                      <TableRow className="bg-gray-50/50">
  1415→                        <TableHead className="w-10"></TableHead>
  1416→                        <TableHead>Name</TableHead>
  1417→                        <TableHead className="w-[70px]">Bucket</TableHead>
  1418→                        <TableHead className="w-[70px]">DM</TableHead>
  1419→                        <TableHead className="w-[90px]">Temp</TableHead>
  1420→                        <TableHead className="w-[110px]">Value</TableHead>
  1421→                        <TableHead className="w-[100px]">Owner</TableHead>
  1422→                        <TableHead className="w-[100px]">TG Handle</TableHead>
  1423→                        {stage === 'cold_dm' && <TableHead className="w-[80px]">Bumps</TableHead>}
  1424→                        <TableHead className="w-[70px]">BAMFAM</TableHead>
  1425→                        <TableHead className="w-[50px]"></TableHead>
  1426→                      </TableRow>
  1427→                    </TableHeader>
  1428→                    <TableBody>
  1429→                      <SortableContext items={stageOpps.map(o => o.id)} strategy={verticalListSortingStrategy}>
  1430→                        {stageOpps.length === 0 ? (
  1431→                          <TableRow>
  1432→                            <TableCell colSpan={11} className="text-center text-sm text-gray-400 py-8">
  1433→                              No opportunities in this stage
  1434→                            </TableCell>
  1435→                          </TableRow>
  1436→                        ) : stageOpps.map(opp => (
  1437→                          <SortableTableRow
  1438→                            key={opp.id}
  1439→                            id={opp.id}
  1440→                            className="group hover:bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer"
  1441→                            onClick={() => openSlideOver(opp)}
  1442→                          >
  1443→                              <TableCell>
  1444→                                {editingCell?.id === opp.id && editingCell.field === 'name' ? (
  1445→                                  <Input
  1446→                                    value={editingValue}
  1447→                                    onChange={e => setEditingValue(e.target.value)}
  1448→                                    onBlur={() => handleInlineEdit(opp.id, 'name', editingValue)}
  1449→                                    onKeyDown={e => { if (e.key === 'Enter') handleInlineEdit(opp.id, 'name', editingValue); if (e.key === 'Escape') setEditingCell(null); }}
  1450→                                    className="h-8 text-sm font-medium auth-input"
  1451→                                    autoFocus
  1452→                                    onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}
  1453→                                  />
  1454→                                ) : (
  1455→                                  <div
  1456→                                    onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); setEditingCell({ id: opp.id, field: 'name' }); setEditingValue(opp.name); }}
  1457→                                    className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-100 rounded px-2 py-1 -mx-2 -my-1"
  1458→                                  >
  1459→                                    <Building2 className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
  1460→                                    <span className="font-medium">{opp.name}</span>
  1461→                                  </div>
  1462→                                )}
  1463→                              </TableCell>
  1464→                              <TableCell>
  1465→                                {opp.bucket && (
  1466→                                  <span className={`inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].bg} ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].text}`}>
  1467→                                    {opp.bucket}
  1468→                                  </span>
  1469→                                )}
  1470→                              </TableCell>
  1471→                              <TableCell>
  1472→                                <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs">
  1473→                                  {opp.dm_account === 'closer' ? 'C' : opp.dm_account === 'sdr' ? 'S' : 'O'}
  1474→                                </Badge>
  1475→                              </TableCell>
  1476→                              <TableCell>
  1477→                                <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
  1478→                                  <div className="w-12 h-1.5 bg-gray-100 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
  1479→                                    <div
  1480→                                      className={`h-full rounded-full ${opp.temperature_score >= 70 ? 'bg-green-500' : opp.temperature_score >= 40 ? 'bg-amber-500' : 'bg-red-400'}`}
  1481→                                      style={{ width: `${opp.temperature_score}%` }}
  1482→                                    />
  1483→                                  </div>
  1484→                                  <span className="text-xs text-gray-400">{opp.temperature_score}</span>
  1485→                                </div>
  1486→                              </TableCell>
  1487→                              <TableCell>
  1488→                                {editingCell?.id === opp.id && editingCell.field === 'deal_value' ? (
  1489→                                  <Input
  1490→                                    type="number"
  1491→                                    value={editingValue}
  1492→                                    onChange={e => setEditingValue(e.target.value)}
  1493→                                    onBlur={() => handleInlineEdit(opp.id, 'deal_value', editingValue)}
  1494→                                    onKeyDown={e => { if (e.key === 'Enter') handleInlineEdit(opp.id, 'deal_value', editingValue); if (e.key === 'Escape') setEditingCell(null); }}
  1495→                                    className="h-8 text-sm text-right auth-input"
  1496→                                    autoFocus
  1497→                                    onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}
  1498→                                  />
  1499→                                ) : (
```

  1574→              <GripVertical className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
  1575→              <Building2 className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
  1576→              <span className="font-medium">{activeOpportunity.name}</span>
  1577→              <Badge className={`text-xs ${STAGE_COLORS[activeOpportunity.stage as SalesPipelineStage]?.bg || ''} ${STAGE_COLORS[activeOpportunity.stage as SalesPipelineStage]?.text || ''}`}>
  1578→                {STAGE_LABELS[activeOpportunity.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || activeOpportunity.stage}
  1579→              </Badge>
  1580→            </div>
  1581→          ) : null}
  1582→        </DragOverlay>
  1583→      </DndContext>
  1584→    </div>
  1585→  );
  1586→
  1587→  // ============================================
  1588→  // RENDER: Outreach Tab
  1589→  // ============================================
  1590→
  1591→  const outreachTotalPages = Math.ceil(outreachTotal / OUTREACH_PAGE_SIZE);
  1592→  const outreachStart = (outreachPage - 1) * OUTREACH_PAGE_SIZE + 1;
  1593→  const outreachEnd = Math.min(outreachPage * OUTREACH_PAGE_SIZE, outreachTotal);
  1594→
  1595→  const handleOutreachSearch = (value: string) => {
  1596→    if (outreachSearchTimeout.current) clearTimeout(outreachSearchTimeout.current);
  1597→    outreachSearchTimeout.current = setTimeout(() => {
  1598→      setOutreachFilters(prev => ({ ...prev, searchTerm: value }));
  1599→      setOutreachPage(1);
  1600→      setSelectedOutreach([]);
  1601→    }, 400);
  1602→  };
  1603→
  1604→  const handleBulkBump = async () => {
  1605→    if (selectedOutreach.length === 0 || isBulkBumping) return;
  1606→    setIsBulkBumping(true);
  1607→    try {
  1608→      await SalesPipelineService.bulkRecordBump(selectedOutreach);
  1609→      setSelectedOutreach([]);
  1610→      await fetchOutreach();
  1611→      await fetchData();
  1612→    } catch (err) {
  1613→      console.error('Error bulk bumping:', err);
  1614→    } finally {
  1615→      setIsBulkBumping(false);
  1616→    }
  1617→  };
  1618→
  1619→  const handleBulkMoveToWarm = async () => {
  1620→    if (selectedOutreach.length === 0 || isBulkMoving) return;
  1621→    setIsBulkMoving(true);
  1622→    try {
  1623→      await SalesPipelineService.bulkUpdateStage(selectedOutreach, 'warm');
  1624→      setSelectedOutreach([]);
  1625→      await fetchOutreach();
  1626→      await fetchData();
  1627→    } catch (err) {
  1628→      console.error('Error bulk moving to warm:', err);
  1629→    } finally {
  1630→      setIsBulkMoving(false);
  1631→    }
  1632→  };
  1633→
  1634→  const handleBulkDelete = async () => {
  1635→    if (selectedOutreach.length === 0) return;
  1636→    if (!confirm(`Delete ${selectedOutreach.length} selected opportunities? This cannot be undone.`)) return;
  1637→    try {
  1638→      await SalesPipelineService.bulkDelete(selectedOutreach);
  1639→      setSelectedOutreach([]);
  1640→      await fetchOutreach();
  1641→      await fetchData();
  1642→    } catch (err) {
  1643→      console.error('Error bulk deleting:', err);
  1644→    }
  1645→  };
  1646→
  1647→  const toggleOutreachSelect = (id: string) => {
  1648→    setSelectedOutreach(prev =>
  1649→      prev.includes(id) ? prev.filter(x => x !== id) : [...prev, id]
  1650→    );
  1651→  };
  1652→
  1653→  const selectAllOnPage = () => {
  1654→    setSelectedOutreach(outreachOpps.map(o => o.id));
  1655→  };
  1656→
  1657→  const renderOutreachTab = () => (
  1658→    <div className="pb-8">
  1659→      {/* Owner sub-tabs */}
  1660→      <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mb-4">
  1661→        <button
  1662→          onClick={() => { setOutreachFilters(prev => ({ ...prev, owner_id: 'mine' })); setOutreachPage(1); setSelectedOutreach([]); }}
  1663→          className={`px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-md transition-colors ${
  1664→            outreachFilters.owner_id === 'mine'
  1665→              ? 'bg-sky-100 text-sky-700 border border-sky-200'
  1666→              : 'text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100 border border-transparent'
  1667→          }`}
  1668→        >
  1669→          My Outreach
  1670→        </button>
  1671→        <button
  1672→          onClick={() => { setOutreachFilters(prev => ({ ...prev, owner_id: undefined })); setOutreachPage(1); setSelectedOutreach([]); }}
  1673→          className={`px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-md transition-colors ${
  1674→            !outreachFilters.owner_id
  1675→              ? 'bg-sky-100 text-sky-700 border border-sky-200'
  1676→              : 'text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100 border border-transparent'
  1677→          }`}
  1678→        >
  1679→          All Owners
  1680→          <span className="ml-1.5 text-[10px] font-semibold opacity-70">{outreachAllTotal}</span>
  1681→        </button>
  1682→        {users.filter(u => u.id !== user?.id).map(u => (
  1683→          <button
  1684→            key={u.id}
  1685→            onClick={() => { setOutreachFilters(prev => ({ ...prev, owner_id: u.id })); setOutreachPage(1); setSelectedOutreach([]); }}
  1686→            className={`px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-md transition-colors ${
  1687→              outreachFilters.owner_id === u.id
  1688→                ? 'bg-sky-100 text-sky-700 border border-sky-200'
  1689→                : 'text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100 border border-transparent'
  1690→            }`}
  1691→          >
  1692→            {u.name || u.email}
  1693→          </button>
  1694→        ))}
  1695→      </div>
  1696→
  1697→      {/* Filters */}
  1698→      <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4 flex-wrap">
  1699→        <div className="relative flex-1 min-w-[200px] max-w-xs">
  1700→          <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
  1701→          <Input
  1702→            placeholder="Search cold DMs..."
  1703→            defaultValue={outreachFilters.searchTerm}
  1704→            onChange={e => handleOutreachSearch(e.target.value)}
  1705→            className="pl-9 h-9 text-sm auth-input"
  1706→          />
  1707→        </div>
  1708→        <Select
  1709→          value={outreachFilters.dm_account || 'all'}
  1710→          onValueChange={v => { setOutreachFilters(prev => ({ ...prev, dm_account: v === 'all' ? undefined : v as DmAccount })); setOutreachPage(1); setSelectedOutreach([]); }}
  1711→        >
  1712→          <SelectTrigger className="h-9 w-auto text-sm auth-input [&>span]:truncate-none [&>span]:line-clamp-none">
  1713→            <SelectValue />
  1714→          </SelectTrigger>
  1715→          <SelectContent>
  1716→            <SelectItem value="all">All DM Accounts</SelectItem>
  1717→            <SelectItem value="closer">Closer</SelectItem>
  1718→            <SelectItem value="sdr">SDR</SelectItem>
  1719→          </SelectContent>
  1720→        </Select>
  1721→        <Select
  1722→          value={outreachFilters.bucket || 'all'}
  1723→          onValueChange={v => { setOutreachFilters(prev => ({ ...prev, bucket: v === 'all' ? undefined : v as Bucket })); setOutreachPage(1); setSelectedOutreach([]); }}
  1724→        >
  1725→          <SelectTrigger className="h-9 w-auto text-sm auth-input [&>span]:truncate-none [&>span]:line-clamp-none">
  1726→            <SelectValue />
  1727→          </SelectTrigger>
  1728→          <SelectContent>
  1729→            <SelectItem value="all">All Buckets</SelectItem>
  1730→            <SelectItem value="A">Bucket A</SelectItem>
  1731→            <SelectItem value="B">Bucket B</SelectItem>
  1732→            <SelectItem value="C">Bucket C</SelectItem>
  1733→          </SelectContent>
  1734→        </Select>
  1735→        <Select
  1736→          value={outreachFilters.bumpRange || 'all'}
  1737→          onValueChange={v => { setOutreachFilters(prev => ({ ...prev, bumpRange: v === 'all' ? undefined : v as 'none' | '1-2' | '3+' })); setOutreachPage(1); setSelectedOutreach([]); }}
  1738→        >
  1739→          <SelectTrigger className="h-9 w-auto text-sm auth-input [&>span]:truncate-none [&>span]:line-clamp-none">
  1740→            <SelectValue />
  1741→          </SelectTrigger>
  1742→          <SelectContent>
  1743→            <SelectItem value="all">All Bump Status</SelectItem>
  1744→            <SelectItem value="none">No Bumps</SelectItem>
  1745→            <SelectItem value="1-2">1-2 Bumps</SelectItem>
  1746→            <SelectItem value="3+">3+ Bumps</SelectItem>
  1747→          </SelectContent>
  1748→        </Select>
  1749→      </div>
  1750→
  1751→      {/* Bulk action toolbar */}
  1752→      {selectedOutreach.length > 0 && (
  1753→        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-3 px-4 py-2.5 bg-sky-50 border border-sky-200 rounded-lg">
  1754→          <span className="text-sm font-medium text-sky-800">{selectedOutreach.length} selected</span>
  1755→          <Button variant="outline" size="sm" className="h-7 text-xs" onClick={selectAllOnPage}>
  1756→            Select All on Page
  1757→          </Button>
  1758→          <Button variant="outline" size="sm" className="h-7 text-xs" onClick={() => setSelectedOutreach([])}>
  1759→            Deselect All
  1760→          </Button>
  1761→          <div className="flex-1" />
  1762→          <Button
  1763→            size="sm"
  1764→            className="h-7 text-xs bg-sky-600 hover:bg-sky-700 text-white"
  1765→            onClick={handleBulkBump}
  1766→            disabled={isBulkBumping}
  1767→          >
  1768→            {isBulkBumping ? <Loader2 className="h-3 w-3 animate-spin mr-1" /> : <Zap className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />}
  1769→            Bump All
  1770→          </Button>
  1771→          <Button
  1772→            size="sm"
  1773→            className="h-7 text-xs bg-amber-600 hover:bg-amber-700 text-white"
  1774→            onClick={handleBulkMoveToWarm}
  1775→            disabled={isBulkMoving}
  1776→          >
  1777→            {isBulkMoving ? <Loader2 className="h-3 w-3 animate-spin mr-1" /> : <ArrowRight className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />}
  1778→            Move to Warm
  1779→          </Button>
  1780→          <Button
  1781→            variant="outline"
  1782→            size="sm"
  1783→            className="h-7 text-xs text-red-600 border-red-200 hover:bg-red-50"
  1784→            onClick={handleBulkDelete}
  1785→          >
  1786→            <Trash2 className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" /> Delete
  1787→          </Button>
  1788→        </div>
  1789→      )}
  1790→
  1791→      {/* Stage Header — matching pipeline table section headers */}
  1792→      <div className={`flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 bg-sky-50 rounded-t-lg border border-sky-200 border-b-0`}>
  1793→        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  1794→          <MessageSquare className="h-4 w-4 text-sky-700" />
  1795→          <h4 className="font-semibold text-sky-700">Cold DM</h4>
  1796→          <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium">{outreachTotal}</Badge>
  1797→        </div>
  1798→        {outreachTotalPages > 1 && (
  1799→          <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">
  1800→            Page {outreachPage} of {outreachTotalPages}
  1801→          </span>
  1802→        )}
  1803→      </div>
  1804→
  1805→      {/* Table */}
  1806→      {outreachLoading ? (
  1807→        <div className="bg-white rounded-b-lg border border-gray-200 border-t-0 p-4 space-y-2">
  1808→          {Array.from({ length: 10 }).map((_, i) => (
  1809→            <Skeleton key={i} className="h-12 w-full" />
  1810→          ))}
  1811→        </div>
  1812→      ) : (
  1813→        <div className="bg-white rounded-b-lg border border-gray-200 border-t-0">
  1814→          <Table>
  1815→            <TableHeader>
  1816→              <TableRow className="bg-gray-50/50">
  1817→                <TableHead className="w-10"></TableHead>
  1818→                <TableHead>Name</TableHead>
  1819→                <TableHead className="w-[80px]">Bumps</TableHead>
  1820→                <TableHead className="w-[100px]">TG Handle</TableHead>
  1821→                <TableHead className="w-[80px]">Source</TableHead>
  1822→                <TableHead className="w-[100px]">Owner</TableHead>
  1823→                <TableHead className="w-[90px]">Created</TableHead>
  1824→                <TableHead className="w-[130px]">Last Bump</TableHead>
  1825→                <TableHead className="w-[50px]"></TableHead>
  1826→              </TableRow>
  1827→            </TableHeader>
  1828→            <TableBody>
  1829→              {outreachOpps.length === 0 ? (
  1830→                <TableRow>
  1831→                  <TableCell colSpan={9} className="text-center text-sm text-gray-400 py-8">
  1832→                    No opportunities in this stage
  1833→                  </TableCell>
  1834→                </TableRow>
  1835→              ) : outreachOpps.map((opp, index) => {
  1836→                const isChecked = selectedOutreach.includes(opp.id);
  1837→                const rowNum = outreachStart + index;
  1838→                return (
  1839→                  <TableRow
  1840→                    key={opp.id}
  1841→                    className="group hover:bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer"
  1842→                    onClick={() => openSlideOver(opp)}
  1843→                  >
  1844→                    <TableCell className="text-gray-500 text-sm w-10" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
  1845→                      <div className="flex items-center justify-center">
  1846→                        {isChecked ? (
  1847→                          <Checkbox
  1848→                            checked={true}
  1849→                            onCheckedChange={() => toggleOutreachSelect(opp.id)}
  1850→                          />
  1851→                        ) : (
  1852→                          <>
  1853→                            <span className="block group-hover:hidden text-xs">{rowNum}</span>
  1854→                            <span className="hidden group-hover:flex">
  1855→                              <Checkbox
  1856→                                checked={false}
  1857→                                onCheckedChange={() => toggleOutreachSelect(opp.id)}
  1858→                              />
  1859→                            </span>
  1860→                          </>
  1861→                        )}
  1862→                      </div>
  1863→                    </TableCell>
  1864→                    <TableCell>
  1865→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-100 rounded px-2 py-1 -mx-2 -my-1">
  1866→                        <Building2 className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
  1867→                        <span className="font-medium">{opp.name}</span>
  1868→                      </div>
  1869→                    </TableCell>
  1870→                    <TableCell>
  1871→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
  1872→                        <span className="text-sm">{opp.bump_number}/4</span>
  1873→                        <div className="flex gap-0.5">
  1874→                          {[1, 2, 3, 4].map(i => (
  1875→                            <div key={i} className={`w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full ${i <= opp.bump_number ? 'bg-sky-500' : 'bg-gray-200'}`} />
  1876→                          ))}
  1877→                        </div>
  1878→                      </div>
  1879→                    </TableCell>
  1880→                    <TableCell className="text-gray-500">{opp.tg_handle || '—'}</TableCell>
  1881→                    <TableCell className="text-gray-500 text-xs capitalize">{opp.source?.replace('_', ' ') || '—'}</TableCell>
  1882→                    <TableCell>{getUserName(opp.owner_id)}</TableCell>
  1883→                    <TableCell className="text-gray-500 text-xs">
  1884→                      {opp.created_at ? format(new Date(opp.created_at), 'MMM d') : '—'}
  1885→                    </TableCell>
  1886→                    <TableCell className="text-gray-500 text-xs" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
  1887→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
  1888→                        <span>{opp.last_bump_date ? formatDistanceToNow(new Date(opp.last_bump_date), { addSuffix: true }) : '—'}</span>
  1889→                        <div className="relative group/bump inline-flex">
  1890→                          <Button
  1891→                            variant="ghost"
  1892→                            size="sm"
  1893→                            className="h-6 px-1.5 text-sky-600 hover:text-sky-700 hover:bg-sky-50"
  1894→                            onClick={() => handleRecordBump(opp.id)}
  1895→                            disabled={isBumping}
  1896→                          >
  1897→                            <Zap className="h-3 w-3" />
  1898→                          </Button>
  1899→                          <div className="absolute bottom-full left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 mb-1.5 px-2.5 py-1 text-white text-[11px] rounded-md whitespace-nowrap opacity-0 pointer-events-none group-hover/bump:opacity-100 transition-opacity z-50" style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692' }}>
  1900→                            Record bump #{opp.bump_number + 1}
  1901→                            <div className="absolute top-full left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 border-4 border-transparent" style={{ borderTopColor: '#3e8692' }} />
  1902→                          </div>
  1903→                        </div>
  1904→                      </div>
  1905→                    </TableCell>
  1906→                    <TableCell onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
  1907→                      <DropdownMenu>
  1908→                        <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
  1909→                          <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-8 w-8 p-0">
  1910→                            <MoreHorizontal className="h-4 w-4" />
  1911→                          </Button>
  1912→                        </DropdownMenuTrigger>
  1913→                        <DropdownMenuContent align="end" className="w-48 z-[80]">
  1914→                          <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleRecordBump(opp.id); }}>
  1915→                            <Zap className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Record Bump
  1916→                          </DropdownMenuItem>
  1917→                          <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleStageChange(opp.id, 'warm', opp.stage); }}>
  1918→                            <ArrowRight className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Move to Warm
  1919→                          </DropdownMenuItem>
  1920→                          <DropdownMenuSeparator />
  1921→                          <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); openEditDialog(opp); }}>
  1922→                            <Edit className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Edit
  1923→                          </DropdownMenuItem>
  1924→                          <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleDelete(opp.id); }} className="text-red-600">
  1925→                            <Trash2 className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Delete
  1926→                          </DropdownMenuItem>
  1927→                        </DropdownMenuContent>
  1928→                      </DropdownMenu>
  1929→                    </TableCell>
  1930→                  </TableRow>
  1931→                );
  1932→              })}
  1933→            </TableBody>
  1934→          </Table>
  1935→        </div>
  1936→      )}
  1937→
  1938→      {/* Pagination */}
  1939→      {outreachTotalPages > 1 && (
  1940→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mt-4 px-1">
  1941→          <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">
  1942→            Showing {outreachStart}-{outreachEnd} of {outreachTotal}
  1943→          </div>
  1944→          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  1945→            <Button
  1946→              variant="outline"
  1947→              size="sm"
  1948→              onClick={() => { setOutreachPage(p => Math.max(1, p - 1)); setSelectedOutreach([]); }}
  1949→              disabled={outreachPage === 1}
  1950→              className="flex items-center gap-1"
  1951→            >
  1952→              <ChevronLeft className="h-4 w-4" />
  1953→              Previous
  1954→            </Button>
  1955→            <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
  1956→              {Array.from({ length: Math.min(5, outreachTotalPages) }, (_, i) => {
  1957→                let pageNum: number;
  1958→                if (outreachTotalPages <= 5) {
  1959→                  pageNum = i + 1;
  1960→                } else if (outreachPage <= 3) {
  1961→                  pageNum = i + 1;
  1962→                } else if (outreachPage >= outreachTotalPages - 2) {
  1963→                  pageNum = outreachTotalPages - 4 + i;
  1964→                } else {
  1965→                  pageNum = outreachPage - 2 + i;
  1966→                }
  1967→                return (
  1968→                  <Button
  1969→                    key={pageNum}
  1970→                    variant={outreachPage === pageNum ? 'default' : 'outline'}
  1971→                    size="sm"
  1972→                    onClick={() => { setOutreachPage(pageNum); setSelectedOutreach([]); }}
  1973→                    className={`w-8 h-8 p-0 ${outreachPage === pageNum ? 'hover:opacity-90' : ''}`}
  1974→                    style={outreachPage === pageNum ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
  1975→                  >
  1976→                    {pageNum}
  1977→                  </Button>
  1978→                );
  1979→              })}
  1980→            </div>
  1981→            <Button
  1982→              variant="outline"
  1983→              size="sm"
  1984→              onClick={() => { setOutreachPage(p => Math.min(outreachTotalPages, p + 1)); setSelectedOutreach([]); }}
  1985→              disabled={outreachPage === outreachTotalPages}
  1986→              className="flex items-center gap-1"
  1987→            >
  1988→              Next
  1989→              <ChevronRight className="h-4 w-4" />
  1990→            </Button>
  1991→          </div>
  1992→        </div>
  1993→      )}
  1994→    </div>
  1995→  );
  1996→
  1997→  // ============================================
  1998→  // RENDER: Actions Tab
  1999→  // ============================================
```
</details></tool-use>
