```text
  2000→
  2001→  const renderActionsTab = () => {
  2002→    const getPriorityIcon = (priority: ActionPriority) => {
  2003→      switch (priority) {
  2004→        case 'urgent': return <AlertTriangle className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-red-500" />;
  2005→        case 'high': return <Zap className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-amber-500" />;
  2006→        case 'medium': return <Clock className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-blue-500" />;
  2007→        case 'low': return <Clock className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-400" />;
  2008→        default: return null;
  2009→      }
  2010→    };
  2011→
  2012→    const getButtonVariant = (priority: ActionPriority): 'destructive' | 'default' | 'outline' => {
  2013→      if (priority === 'urgent') return 'destructive';
  2014→      if (priority === 'high') return 'default';
  2015→      return 'outline';
  2016→    };
  2017→
  2018→    const getTimingInfo = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity): { text: string; color: string } => {
  2019→      const daysAgo = (date: string | null) => {
  2020→        if (!date) return null;
  2021→        return Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(date).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  2022→      };
  2023→      const daysUntil = (date: string | null) => {
  2024→        if (!date) return null;
  2025→        return Math.ceil((new Date(date).getTime() - Date.now()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  2026→      };
  2027→
  2028→      // Cold DM — show last bump timing
  2029→      if (opp.stage === 'cold_dm') {
  2030→        if (opp.bump_number === 0) return { text: 'Not bumped', color: 'text-gray-500' };
  2031→        const d = daysAgo(opp.last_bump_date);
  2032→        if (d === null) return { text: `${opp.bump_number}/4 bumps`, color: 'text-gray-500' };
  2033→        return {
  2034→          text: `Bumped ${d}d ago`,
  2035→          color: d >= 3 ? 'text-amber-500 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500',
  2036→        };
  2037→      }
  2038→
  2039→      // Stages with next_meeting — show meeting timing
  2040→      if (opp.next_meeting_at) {
  2041→        const d = daysUntil(opp.next_meeting_at);
  2042→        if (d !== null) {
  2043→          if (d < 0) return { text: `Meeting ${Math.abs(d)}d ago`, color: 'text-red-500 font-medium' };
  2044→          if (d === 0) return { text: 'Meeting today', color: 'text-blue-600 font-medium' };
  2045→          return { text: `Meeting in ${d}d`, color: d <= 2 ? 'text-blue-600 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500' };
  2046→        }
  2047→      }
  2048→
  2049→      // Proposal sent — show how long ago
  2050→      if (opp.stage === 'proposal_sent' || (opp.stage === 'discovery_done' && opp.proposal_sent_at)) {
  2051→        const d = daysAgo(opp.proposal_sent_at);
  2052→        if (d !== null) return {
  2053→          text: `Sent ${d}d ago`,
  2054→          color: d >= 5 ? 'text-amber-500 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500',
  2055→        };
  2056→      }
  2057→
  2058→      // Orbit — show time in orbit
  2059→      if (opp.stage === 'orbit') {
  2060→        const d = daysAgo(opp.updated_at);
  2061→        if (d !== null) return { text: `${d}d in orbit`, color: d > 90 ? 'text-amber-500 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500' };
  2062→      }
  2063→
  2064→      // Default — days since last contact
  2065→      const lastDate = opp.last_contacted_at || opp.last_bump_date || opp.created_at;
  2066→      const d = daysAgo(lastDate);
  2067→      if (d === null) return { text: '—', color: 'text-gray-400' };
  2068→      return {
  2069→        text: `${d}d silent`,
  2070→        color: d >= 7 ? 'text-red-500 font-medium' : d >= 3 ? 'text-amber-500' : 'text-gray-500',
  2071→      };
  2072→    };
  2073→
  2074→    const currentItems = displayedActions;
  2075→    const emptyLabel = actionPhaseFilter === 'outreach' ? 'No outreach actions needed' :
  2076→      actionPhaseFilter === 'closing' ? 'No closing actions needed' :
  2077→      'No actions needed right now';
  2078→
  2079→    return (
  2080→      <div className="pb-8">
  2081→        {/* Top row: Owner filter + Phase tabs */}
  2082→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
  2083→          <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
  2084→            {([
  2085→              { key: 'all' as const, label: 'All Actions' },
  2086→              { key: 'mine' as const, label: 'My Actions' },
  2087→              { key: 'urgent' as const, label: 'Urgent Only' },
  2088→            ]).map(f => (
  2089→              <button
  2090→                key={f.key}
  2091→                onClick={() => setActionFilter(f.key)}
  2092→                className={`px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-md transition-colors ${
  2093→                  actionFilter === f.key
  2094→                    ? 'bg-sky-100 text-sky-700 border border-sky-200'
  2095→                    : 'text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100 border border-transparent'
  2096→                }`}
  2097→              >
  2098→                {f.label}
  2099→              </button>
  2100→            ))}
  2101→          </div>
  2102→          <div className="flex items-center gap-1 bg-gray-100 rounded-lg p-0.5">
  2103→            {([
  2104→              { key: 'all' as const, label: 'All', count: actionItems.length },
  2105→              { key: 'outreach' as const, label: 'Outreach', count: outreachActions.length },
  2106→              { key: 'closing' as const, label: 'Closing', count: closingActions.length },
  2107→            ]).map(p => (
  2108→              <button
  2109→                key={p.key}
  2110→                onClick={() => setActionPhaseFilter(p.key)}
  2111→                className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-md transition-colors ${
  2112→                  actionPhaseFilter === p.key
  2113→                    ? 'bg-white text-gray-900 shadow-sm'
  2114→                    : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'
  2115→                }`}
  2116→              >
  2117→                {p.key === 'outreach' && <Send className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />}
  2118→                {p.key === 'closing' && <Target className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />}
  2119→                {p.key === 'all' && <Zap className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />}
  2120→                {p.label}
  2121→                <span className={`ml-0.5 text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0 rounded-full ${
  2122→                  actionPhaseFilter === p.key ? 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700' : 'bg-transparent text-gray-400'
  2123→                }`}>{p.count}</span>
  2124→              </button>
  2125→            ))}
  2126→          </div>
  2127→        </div>
  2128→
  2129→        {/* Section Header */}
  2130→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 bg-violet-50 rounded-t-lg border border-violet-200 border-b-0">
  2131→          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  2132→            {actionPhaseFilter === 'outreach' ? <Send className="h-4 w-4 text-violet-700" /> : actionPhaseFilter === 'closing' ? <Target className="h-4 w-4 text-violet-700" /> : <Zap className="h-4 w-4 text-violet-700" />}
  2133→            <h4 className="font-semibold text-violet-700">
  2134→              {actionPhaseFilter === 'outreach' ? 'Outreach Actions' : actionPhaseFilter === 'closing' ? 'Closing Actions' : 'All Action Items'}
  2135→            </h4>
  2136→            <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium">{currentItems.length}</Badge>
  2137→            {actionPhaseFilter === 'outreach' && (
  2138→              <span className="text-[11px] text-violet-500 ml-1">Cold DM, Warm, TG Intro, Booked</span>
  2139→            )}
  2140→            {actionPhaseFilter === 'closing' && (
  2141→              <span className="text-[11px] text-violet-500 ml-1">Discovery Done, Proposal, Contract</span>
  2142→            )}
  2143→          </div>
  2144→        </div>
  2145→
  2146→        {/* Table */}
  2147→        <div className="bg-white rounded-b-lg border border-gray-200 border-t-0">
  2148→          <Table>
  2149→            <TableHeader>
  2150→              <TableRow className="bg-gray-50/50">
  2151→                <TableHead>Name</TableHead>
  2152→                <TableHead className="w-[140px]">Stage</TableHead>
  2153→                <TableHead className="w-[70px]">Bucket</TableHead>
  2154→                <TableHead className="w-[260px]">Next Action</TableHead>
  2155→                <TableHead className="w-[120px]">Timing</TableHead>
  2156→                <TableHead className="w-[90px]">Temp</TableHead>
  2157→                <TableHead className="w-[100px]">Owner</TableHead>
  2158→                <TableHead className="w-[150px]"></TableHead>
  2159→              </TableRow>
  2160→            </TableHeader>
  2161→            <TableBody>
  2162→              {currentItems.length === 0 ? (
  2163→                <TableRow>
  2164→                  <TableCell colSpan={8} className="text-center py-12">
  2165→                    <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2 text-gray-400">
  2166→                      <Zap className="h-8 w-8" />
  2167→                      <p className="text-sm font-medium">{emptyLabel}</p>
  2168→                      <p className="text-xs">All caught up — check back later</p>
  2169→                    </div>
  2170→                  </TableCell>
  2171→                </TableRow>
  2172→              ) : currentItems.map(({ opp, action }) => {
  2173→                const timing = getTimingInfo(opp);
  2174→                const stageColors = STAGE_COLORS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || STAGE_COLORS.cold_dm;
  2175→                return (
  2176→                  <TableRow
  2177→                    key={opp.id}
  2178→                    className={`group hover:bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer ${action.priority === 'urgent' ? 'bg-red-50/40' : ''}`}
  2179→                    onClick={() => openSlideOver(opp)}
  2180→                  >
  2181→                    <TableCell>
  2182→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  2183→                        <Building2 className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
  2184→                        <span className="font-medium">{opp.name}</span>
  2185→                      </div>
  2186→                    </TableCell>
  2187→                    <TableCell>
  2188→                      <span className={`inline-flex items-center whitespace-nowrap rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${stageColors.bg} ${stageColors.text} ${stageColors.border}`}>
  2189→                        {STAGE_LABELS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || opp.stage}
  2190→                      </span>
  2191→                    </TableCell>
  2192→                    <TableCell>
  2193→                      {opp.bucket && (
  2194→                        <span className={`inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].bg} ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].text}`}>
  2195→                          {opp.bucket}
  2196→                        </span>
  2197→                      )}
  2198→                    </TableCell>
  2199→                    <TableCell>
  2200→                      <div>
  2201→                        <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
  2202→                          {getPriorityIcon(action.priority)}
  2203→                          <span className={`text-sm font-medium ${
  2204→                            action.priority === 'urgent' ? 'text-red-700' :
  2205→                            action.priority === 'high' ? 'text-amber-700' :
  2206→                            'text-gray-600'
  2207→                          }`}>
  2208→                            {action.label}
  2209→                          </span>
  2210→                        </div>
  2211→                        {action.hint && (
  2212→                          <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-400 mt-0.5 ml-5">{action.hint}</p>
  2213→                        )}
  2214→                      </div>
  2215→                    </TableCell>
  2216→                    <TableCell>
  2217→                      <span className={`text-xs ${timing.color}`}>{timing.text}</span>
  2218→                    </TableCell>
  2219→                    <TableCell>
  2220→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
  2221→                        <div className="w-12 h-1.5 bg-gray-100 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
  2222→                          <div
  2223→                            className={`h-full rounded-full ${opp.temperature_score >= 70 ? 'bg-green-500' : opp.temperature_score >= 40 ? 'bg-amber-500' : 'bg-red-400'}`}
  2224→                            style={{ width: `${opp.temperature_score}%` }}
  2225→                          />
  2226→                        </div>
  2227→                        <span className="text-xs text-gray-400">{opp.temperature_score}</span>
  2228→                      </div>
  2229→                    </TableCell>
  2230→                    <TableCell>{getUserName(opp.owner_id)}</TableCell>
  2231→                    <TableCell onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
  2232→                      {(() => {
  2233→                        const quickAlt = action.alternatives.find(a => a.quick);
  2234→                        const dropdownAlts = action.alternatives.filter(a => !a.quick);
  2235→                        return (
  2236→                          <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
  2237→                            <Button
  2238→                              variant={getButtonVariant(action.priority)}
  2239→                              size="sm"
  2240→                              className="h-7 text-xs"
  2241→                              disabled={executingAction === opp.id}
  2242→                              onClick={() => handleActionExecute(opp.id, action, opp)}
  2243→                              style={action.priority === 'high' ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : undefined}
  2244→                            >
  2245→                              {executingAction === opp.id ? (
  2246→                                <Loader2 className="h-3 w-3 animate-spin mr-1" />
  2247→                              ) : null}
  2248→                              {action.label}
  2249→                            </Button>
  2250→                            {quickAlt && (
  2251→                              <Button
  2252→                                variant="outline"
  2253→                                size="sm"
  2254→                                className="h-7 text-xs border-emerald-300 text-emerald-700 hover:bg-emerald-50"
  2255→                                onClick={() => {
  2256→                                  if (quickAlt.actionType === 'stage_change' && quickAlt.targetStage) {
  2257→                                    handleStageChange(opp.id, quickAlt.targetStage, opp.stage);
  2258→                                  } else {
  2259→                                    openSlideOver(opp, ACTION_GUIDANCE[quickAlt.label]);
  2260→                                  }
  2261→                                }}
  2262→                              >
  2263→                                {quickAlt.label}
  2264→                              </Button>
  2265→                            )}
  2266→                            {dropdownAlts.length > 0 && (
  2267→                              <DropdownMenu>
  2268→                                <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
  2269→                                  <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-7 w-7 p-0">
  2270→                                    <ChevronDown className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
  2271→                                  </Button>
  2272→                                </DropdownMenuTrigger>
  2273→                                <DropdownMenuContent align="end" className="w-44 z-[80]">
  2274→                                  {dropdownAlts.map(alt => (
  2275→                                    <DropdownMenuItem
  2276→                                      key={alt.label}
  2277→                                      className={alt.variant === 'danger' ? 'text-red-600' : alt.variant === 'warn' ? 'text-orange-600' : ''}
  2278→                                      onClick={() => {
  2279→                                        if (alt.actionType === 'stage_change' && alt.targetStage) {
  2280→                                          handleStageChange(opp.id, alt.targetStage, opp.stage);
  2281→                                        } else {
  2282→                                          openSlideOver(opp, ACTION_GUIDANCE[alt.label]);
  2283→                                        }
  2284→                                      }}
  2285→                                    >
  2286→                                      {alt.variant === 'danger' ? <X className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-2" /> :
  2287→                                       alt.variant === 'warn' ? <RotateCcw className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-2" /> :
  2288→                                       <ArrowRight className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-2" />}
  2289→                                      {alt.label}
  2290→                                    </DropdownMenuItem>
  2291→                                  ))}
  2292→                                </DropdownMenuContent>
  2293→                              </DropdownMenu>
  2294→                            )}
  2295→                          </div>
  2296→                        );
  2297→                      })()}
  2298→                    </TableCell>
  2299→                  </TableRow>
  2300→                );
  2301→              })}
  2302→            </TableBody>
  2303→          </Table>
  2304→        </div>
  2305→      </div>
  2306→    );
  2307→  };
  2308→
  2309→  // ============================================
  2310→  // RENDER: Orbit Tab
  2311→  // ============================================
  2312→
  2313→  const renderOrbitTab = () => (
  2314→    <div className="pb-8">
  2315→      {orbitByReason.map(group => {
  2316→        const isCollapsed = collapsedStages.has(`orbit_${group.value}`);
  2317→        const groupValue = group.opps.reduce((s, o) => s + (o.deal_value || 0), 0);
  2318→
  2319→        return (
  2320→          <div key={group.value} className="mb-6">
  2321→            {/* Group Header */}
  2322→            <div
  2323→              onClick={() => {
  2324→                const next = new Set(collapsedStages);
  2325→                const key = `orbit_${group.value}`;
  2326→                isCollapsed ? next.delete(key) : next.add(key);
  2327→                setCollapsedStages(next);
  2328→              }}
  2329→              className={`flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 bg-orange-50 ${isCollapsed ? 'rounded-lg' : 'rounded-t-lg'} border border-orange-200 ${isCollapsed ? '' : 'border-b-0'} cursor-pointer select-none transition-all`}
  2330→            >
  2331→              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  2332→                {isCollapsed ? <ChevronRight className="h-4 w-4 text-orange-700" /> : <ChevronDown className="h-4 w-4 text-orange-700" />}
  2333→                <h4 className="font-semibold text-orange-700">{group.label}</h4>
  2334→                <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium">{group.opps.length}</Badge>
  2335→              </div>
  2336→              {groupValue > 0 && (
  2337→                <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-600">
  2338→                  ${groupValue.toLocaleString()}
  2339→                </span>
  2340→              )}
  2341→            </div>
  2342→
  2343→            {!isCollapsed && (
  2344→              <div className="bg-white rounded-b-lg border border-gray-200 border-t-0">
  2345→                <Table>
  2346→                  <TableHeader>
  2347→                    <TableRow className="bg-gray-50/50">
  2348→                      <TableHead>Name</TableHead>
  2349→                      <TableHead className="w-[70px]">Bucket</TableHead>
  2350→                      <TableHead className="w-[70px]">DM</TableHead>
  2351→                      <TableHead className="w-[90px]">Temp</TableHead>
  2352→                      <TableHead className="w-[110px]">Value</TableHead>
  2353→                      <TableHead className="w-[100px]">Owner</TableHead>
  2354→                      <TableHead className="w-[120px]">Time in Orbit</TableHead>
  2355→                      <TableHead className="w-[120px]">Last Contacted</TableHead>
  2356→                      <TableHead className="w-[50px]"></TableHead>
  2357→                    </TableRow>
  2358→                  </TableHeader>
  2359→                  <TableBody>
  2360→                    {group.opps.length === 0 ? (
  2361→                      <TableRow>
  2362→                        <TableCell colSpan={9} className="text-center text-sm text-gray-400 py-8">
  2363→                          No opportunities
  2364→                        </TableCell>
  2365→                      </TableRow>
  2366→                    ) : group.opps.map(opp => (
  2367→                      <TableRow key={opp.id} className="group hover:bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer" onClick={() => openSlideOver(opp)}>
  2368→                        <TableCell>
  2369→                          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  2370→                            <Building2 className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
  2371→                            <span className="font-medium">{opp.name}</span>
  2372→                          </div>
  2373→                        </TableCell>
  2374→                        <TableCell>
  2375→                          {opp.bucket && (
  2376→                            <span className={`inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].bg} ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].text}`}>
  2377→                              {opp.bucket}
  2378→                            </span>
  2379→                          )}
  2380→                        </TableCell>
  2381→                        <TableCell>
  2382→                          <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs">
  2383→                            {opp.dm_account === 'closer' ? 'C' : opp.dm_account === 'sdr' ? 'S' : 'O'}
  2384→                          </Badge>
  2385→                        </TableCell>
  2386→                        <TableCell>
  2387→                          <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
  2388→                            <div className="w-12 h-1.5 bg-gray-100 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
  2389→                              <div
  2390→                                className={`h-full rounded-full ${opp.temperature_score >= 70 ? 'bg-green-500' : opp.temperature_score >= 40 ? 'bg-amber-500' : 'bg-red-400'}`}
  2391→                                style={{ width: `${opp.temperature_score}%` }}
  2392→                              />
  2393→                            </div>
  2394→                            <span className="text-xs text-gray-400">{opp.temperature_score}</span>
  2395→                          </div>
  2396→                        </TableCell>
  2397→                        <TableCell>
  2398→                          {opp.deal_value ? (
  2399→                            <span className="font-semibold text-emerald-600">${opp.deal_value.toLocaleString()}</span>
  2400→                          ) : (
  2401→                            <span className="text-gray-400">-</span>
  2402→                          )}
  2403→                        </TableCell>
  2404→                        <TableCell>{getUserName(opp.owner_id)}</TableCell>
  2405→                        <TableCell className="text-gray-500">{opp.updated_at ? formatDistanceToNow(new Date(opp.updated_at)) : '—'}</TableCell>
  2406→                        <TableCell className="text-gray-500">{opp.last_contacted_at ? formatDistanceToNow(new Date(opp.last_contacted_at), { addSuffix: true }) : '—'}</TableCell>
  2407→                        <TableCell>
  2408→                          <DropdownMenu>
  2409→                            <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
  2410→                              <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-8 w-8 p-0">
  2411→                                <MoreHorizontal className="h-4 w-4" />
  2412→                              </Button>
  2413→                            </DropdownMenuTrigger>
  2414→                            <DropdownMenuContent align="end" className="w-48 z-[80]">
  2415→                              <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); openEditDialog(opp); }}>
  2416→                                <Edit className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Edit
  2417→                              </DropdownMenuItem>
  2418→                              <DropdownMenuSeparator />
  2419→                              <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleResurrect(opp); }} className="text-blue-600">
  2420→                                <ArrowRight className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Resurrect
  2421→                              </DropdownMenuItem>
  2422→                              <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleDelete(opp.id); }} className="text-red-600">
  2423→                                <Trash2 className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Delete
  2424→                              </DropdownMenuItem>
  2425→                            </DropdownMenuContent>
  2426→                          </DropdownMenu>
  2427→                        </TableCell>
  2428→                      </TableRow>
  2429→                    ))}
  2430→                  </TableBody>
  2431→                </Table>
  2432→              </div>
  2433→            )}
  2434→          </div>
  2435→        );
  2436→      })}
  2437→    </div>
  2438→  );
  2439→
  2440→  // ============================================
  2441→  // RENDER: Activity Slide-Over
  2442→  // ============================================
  2443→
  2444→  const renderSlideOver = () => {
  2445→    if (!slideOverOpp || typeof document === 'undefined') return null;
  2446→    const opp = opportunities.find(o => o.id === slideOverOpp.id) || slideOverOpp;
  2447→    const bamfam = isBAMFAM(opp);
  2448→    const stageColors = STAGE_COLORS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || STAGE_COLORS.cold_dm;
  2449→
  2450→    return createPortal(
  2451→      <>
  2452→      {/* Backdrop */}
  2453→      {!orbitPrompt && !closedLostPrompt && (
  2454→        <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/20 z-[60]" onClick={() => { setSlideOverOpp(null); setActionGuidance(null); }} />
  2455→      )}
  2456→      <div className="fixed inset-y-0 right-0 w-[480px] bg-white border-l shadow-xl z-[70] flex flex-col">
  2457→        {/* Header */}
  2458→        <div className="px-6 py-4 border-b bg-gradient-to-r from-gray-50 to-white">
  2459→          <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
  2460→            <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
  2461→              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  2462→                <Building2 className="h-5 w-5 text-gray-400 flex-shrink-0" />
  2463→                <h3 className="font-semibold text-lg text-gray-900 truncate">
  2464→                  {slideOverMode === 'edit' ? 'Edit Opportunity' : opp.name}
  2465→                </h3>
  2466→              </div>
  2467→              {slideOverMode === 'view' && (
  2468→                <>
  2469→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-2">
  2470→                    <Badge className={`text-xs ${stageColors.bg} ${stageColors.text} border ${stageColors.border}`}>
  2471→                      {STAGE_LABELS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || opp.stage}
  2472→                    </Badge>
  2473→                    {opp.bucket && (
  2474→                      <Badge className={`text-xs ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].bg} ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].text} border-0`}>
  2475→                        Bucket {opp.bucket}
  2476→                      </Badge>
  2477→                    )}
  2478→                    {opp.dm_account && (
  2479→                      <Badge variant="outline" className={`text-xs ${opp.dm_account === 'closer' ? 'border-blue-300 text-blue-600' : 'border-green-300 text-green-600'}`}>
  2480→                        {opp.dm_account === 'closer' ? 'Closer' : opp.dm_account === 'sdr' ? 'SDR' : 'Other'}
  2481→                      </Badge>
  2482→                    )}
  2483→                  </div>
  2484→                  {opp.deal_value && (
  2485→                    <p className="text-xl font-bold text-emerald-600 mt-2">${opp.deal_value.toLocaleString()} <span className="text-sm font-normal text-gray-400">{opp.currency}</span></p>
  2486→                  )}
  2487→                </>
  2488→              )}
  2489→            </div>
  2490→            <div className="flex items-center gap-1 flex-shrink-0">
  2491→              {slideOverMode === 'view' ? (
  2492→                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-8 w-8 p-0" onClick={() => openEditDialog(opp)}>
  2493→                  <Edit className="h-4 w-4" />
  2494→                </Button>
  2495→              ) : (
  2496→                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-8 px-2 text-xs" onClick={() => { setSlideOverMode('view'); setEditingOpp(null); setForm({ name: '' }); }}>
  2497→                  Cancel
  2498→                </Button>
  2499→              )}
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
  2835→            )}

  2837→            {/* Bump Counter (cold_dm only) */}
  2838→            {opp.stage === 'cold_dm' && (

  2840→                <h4 className="text-xs font-semibold text-sky-700 uppercase tracking-wider mb-3">Bump Progress</h4>

  2843→                    <div className="flex gap-1.5">
  2844→                      {[1, 2, 3, 4].map(i => (

  2846→                      ))}
  2847→                    </div>
  2848→                    <span className="text-sm font-medium text-sky-800">{opp.bump_number} / 4 bumps</span>
  2849→                  </div>
  2850→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
  2851→                    <Button
  2852→                      variant="outline"
  2853→                      size="sm"
  2854→                      className="h-8 w-8 p-0 border-sky-300 text-sky-700 hover:bg-sky-100"
  2855→                      onClick={() => handleReduceBump(opp.id)}
  2856→                      disabled={opp.bump_number <= 0 || isBumping}
  2857→                    >
  2858→                      {isBumping ? <Loader2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5 animate-spin" /> : <Minus className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />}
  2859→                    </Button>
  2860→                    <Button
  2861→                      variant="outline"
  2862→                      size="sm"
  2863→                      className="h-8 px-3 border-sky-300 text-sky-700 hover:bg-sky-100 text-xs font-medium"
  2864→                      onClick={() => handleRecordBump(opp.id)}
  2865→                      disabled={isBumping}
  2866→                    >
  2867→                      {isBumping ? <Loader2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5 animate-spin mr-1" /> : <Plus className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-1" />} Bump
  2868→                    </Button>
  2869→                  </div>
  2870→                </div>
  2871→                {opp.last_bump_date && (
  2872→                  <p className="text-xs text-sky-600 mt-2">Last bump: {formatDistanceToNow(new Date(opp.last_bump_date), { addSuffix: true })}</p>
  2873→                )}
  2874→              </div>
  2875→            )}
  2876→
  2877→            {/* Quick Actions */}
  2878→            <div className="flex gap-2 flex-wrap">
  2879→              <Button
  2880→                variant="outline" size="sm" className="text-xs text-orange-600 border-orange-300 hover:bg-orange-50"
  2881→                onClick={() => handleStageChange(opp.id, 'orbit', opp.stage)}
  2882→              >
  2883→                <RotateCcw className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-1" /> Move to Orbit
  2884→              </Button>
  2885→              <Button
  2886→                variant="outline" size="sm" className="text-xs text-red-600 border-red-300 hover:bg-red-50"
  2887→                onClick={() => handleDelete(opp.id)}
  2888→              >
  2889→                <Trash2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-1" /> Delete
  2890→              </Button>
  2891→            </div>
  2892→
  2893→            {/* Stage Move */}
  2894→            <div className="grid gap-2">
  2895→              <Label className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Move to Stage</Label>
  2896→              <Select
  2897→                value={opp.stage}
  2898→                onValueChange={(v) => handleStageChange(opp.id, v as SalesPipelineStage, opp.stage)}
  2899→              >
  2900→                <SelectTrigger className="auth-input">
  2901→                  <SelectValue />
  2902→                </SelectTrigger>
  2903→                <SelectContent>
  2904→                  {ALL_V2_STAGES.map(s => (
  2905→                    <SelectItem key={s} value={s}>{STAGE_LABELS[s]}</SelectItem>
  2906→                  ))}
  2907→                </SelectContent>
  2908→              </Select>
  2909→            </div>
  2910→
  2911→            {/* Activity Timeline */}
  2912→            <div className="border-t pt-6">
  2913→              <h4 className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-4">Activity Timeline</h4>
  2914→
  2915→              {/* Add activity form */}
  2916→              <div className="space-y-3 mb-6 p-4 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg border border-gray-200">
  2917→                <div className="flex gap-2">
  2918→                  <Select
  2919→                    value={activityForm.type}
  2920→                    onValueChange={v => setActivityForm(f => ({ ...f, type: v as ActivityType }))}
  2921→                  >
  2922→                    <SelectTrigger className="h-9 text-sm w-28 auth-input">
  2923→                      <SelectValue />
  2924→                    </SelectTrigger>
  2925→                    <SelectContent>
  2926→                      <SelectItem value="note">Note</SelectItem>
  2927→                      <SelectItem value="call">Call</SelectItem>
  2928→                      <SelectItem value="message">Message</SelectItem>
  2929→                      <SelectItem value="meeting">Meeting</SelectItem>
  2930→                      <SelectItem value="proposal">Proposal</SelectItem>
  2931→                    </SelectContent>
  2932→                  </Select>
  2933→                  <Input
  2934→                    placeholder="Title..."
  2935→                    value={activityForm.title}
  2936→                    onChange={e => setActivityForm(f => ({ ...f, title: e.target.value }))}
  2937→                    className="h-9 text-sm flex-1 auth-input"
  2938→                  />
  2939→                </div>
  2940→                <Textarea
  2941→                  placeholder="Description (optional)"
  2942→                  value={activityForm.description || ''}
  2943→                  onChange={e => setActivityForm(f => ({ ...f, description: e.target.value }))}
  2944→                  className="text-sm min-h-[60px] auth-input"
  2945→                  rows={2}
  2946→                />
  2947→                <div className="flex gap-2">
  2948→                  <Input
  2949→                    placeholder="Outcome"
  2950→                    value={activityForm.outcome || ''}
  2951→                    onChange={e => setActivityForm(f => ({ ...f, outcome: e.target.value }))}
  2952→                    className="h-9 text-sm flex-1 auth-input"
  2953→                  />
  2954→                  <Input
  2955→                    placeholder="Next step"
  2956→                    value={activityForm.next_step || ''}
  2957→                    onChange={e => setActivityForm(f => ({ ...f, next_step: e.target.value }))}
  2958→                    className="h-9 text-sm flex-1 auth-input"
  2959→                  />
  2960→                </div>
  2961→                {/* Meeting Date/Time (only for meeting type) */}
  2962→                {activityForm.type === 'meeting' && (
  2963→                  <div className="flex gap-2">
  2964→                    <Popover>
  2965→                      <PopoverTrigger asChild>
  2966→                        <Button
  2967→                          variant="outline"
  2968→                          className="h-9 text-sm flex-1 auth-input justify-start font-normal"
  2969→                          style={{ borderColor: '#e5e7eb', backgroundColor: 'white', color: activityMeetingDate ? '#111827' : '#9ca3af' }}
  2970→                        >
  2971→                          <Calendar className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
  2972→                          {activityMeetingDate ? format(new Date(activityMeetingDate), 'MMM d, yyyy') : 'Meeting date'}
  2973→                        </Button>
  2974→                      </PopoverTrigger>
  2975→                      <PopoverContent className="!bg-white border shadow-md p-0 w-auto z-[80]" align="start">
  2976→                        <CalendarPicker
  2977→                          mode="single"
  2978→                          selected={activityMeetingDate ? new Date(activityMeetingDate) : undefined}
  2979→                          onSelect={date => setActivityMeetingDate(date ? date.toISOString() : undefined)}
  2980→                          initialFocus
  2981→                          classNames={{ day_selected: 'text-white hover:text-white focus:text-white' }}
  2982→                          modifiersStyles={{ selected: { backgroundColor: '#3e8692' } }}
  2983→                        />
  2984→                      </PopoverContent>
  2985→                    </Popover>
  2986→                    <Popover>
  2987→                      <PopoverTrigger asChild>
  2988→                        <Button
  2989→                          variant="outline"
  2990→                          className="h-9 text-sm flex-1 auth-input justify-start font-normal"
  2991→                          style={{ borderColor: '#e5e7eb', backgroundColor: 'white', color: activityMeetingTime ? '#111827' : '#9ca3af' }}
  2992→                        >
  2993→                          <Clock className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
  2994→                          {activityMeetingTime
  2995→                            ? (() => { const [h, m] = activityMeetingTime.split(':').map(Number); return `${h === 0 ? 12 : h > 12 ? h - 12 : h}:${String(m).padStart(2, '0')} ${h >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM'}`; })()
  2996→                            : 'Time'}
  2997→                        </Button>
  2998→                      </PopoverTrigger>
  2999→                      <PopoverContent className="!bg-white border shadow-md p-0 w-auto z-[80]" align="start">
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
  3330→                          <SelectItem value="USDT">USDT</SelectItem>
  3331→                          <SelectItem value="USDC">USDC</SelectItem>
  3332→                          <SelectItem value="ETH">ETH</SelectItem>
  3333→                          <SelectItem value="BTC">BTC</SelectItem>
  3334→                        </SelectContent>
  3335→                      </Select>
  3336→                    </div>
  3337→                  </div>
  3338→
  3339→                  {isEdit && (
  3340→                    <div className="grid gap-2">
  3341→                      <Label>Temperature Score: {form.temperature_score || 50} (Manual Override)</Label>
  3342→                      <input
  3343→                        type="range"
  3344→                        min="0"
  3345→                        max="100"
  3346→                        value={form.temperature_score || 50}
  3347→                        onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, temperature_score: parseInt(e.target.value) }))}
  3348→                        className="w-full accent-[#3e8692]"
  3349→                      />
  3350→                    </div>
  3351→                  )}
  3352→                </div>
  3353→              </details>
  3354→          </div>
  3355→
  3356→            <DialogFooter>
  3357→              <Button type="button" variant="outline" onClick={() => { setIsCreateOpen(false); setEditingOpp(null); setForm({ name: '' }); }}>
  3358→                Cancel
  3359→              </Button>
  3360→              <Button
  3361→                type="submit"
  3362→                disabled={isSubmitting || !form.name.trim()}
  3363→                className="hover:opacity-90"
  3364→                style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
  3365→              >
  3366→                {isSubmitting ? 'Saving...' : isEdit ? 'Update' : 'Create'}
  3367→              </Button>
  3368→            </DialogFooter>
  3369→          </form>
  3370→        </DialogContent>
  3371→      </Dialog>
  3372→    );
  3373→  };
  3374→
  3375→  // ============================================
  3376→  // RENDER: Activity Log Prompt
  3377→  // ============================================
  3378→
  3379→  const renderActivityLogPrompt = () => {
  3380→    const ACTIVITY_TYPE_LABELS: Record<ActivityType, { label: string; icon: React.ReactNode; color: string }> = {
  3381→      call: { label: 'Call', icon: <Phone className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />, color: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700' },
  3382→      message: { label: 'Message', icon: <MessageSquare className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />, color: 'bg-sky-100 text-sky-700' },
  3383→      meeting: { label: 'Meeting', icon: <Calendar className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />, color: 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-700' },
  3384→      proposal: { label: 'Proposal', icon: <FileText className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />, color: 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700' },
  3385→      note: { label: 'Note', icon: <StickyNote className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />, color: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700' },
  3386→      bump: { label: 'Bump', icon: <Zap className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />, color: 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-700' },
  3387→    };
  3388→
  3389→    const typeInfo = activityLogPrompt ? ACTIVITY_TYPE_LABELS[activityLogPrompt.type] : null;
  3390→    const meetingDateObj = activityLogForm.meeting_date ? new Date(activityLogForm.meeting_date) : undefined;
  3391→
  3392→    // Apply meeting_time to meetingDateObj for display
  3393→    const getMeetingDateTime = () => {
  3394→      if (!meetingDateObj) return undefined;
  3395→      const d = new Date(meetingDateObj);
  3396→      if (activityLogForm.meeting_time) {
  3397→        const [h, m] = activityLogForm.meeting_time.split(':').map(Number);
  3398→        d.setHours(h, m, 0, 0);
  3399→      }
  3400→      return d;
  3401→    };
  3402→
  3403→    return (
  3404→      <Dialog open={!!activityLogPrompt} onOpenChange={open => { if (!open) { setActivityLogPrompt(null); setActivityLogForm({ title: '', description: '', outcome: '', next_step: '' }); } }}>
  3405→        <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-md z-[80]">
  3406→          <DialogHeader>
  3407→            <DialogTitle>Log Activity — {activityLogPrompt?.oppName}</DialogTitle>
  3408→            <DialogDescription>Add context to this activity before saving.</DialogDescription>
  3409→          </DialogHeader>
  3410→          <div className="space-y-4">
  3411→            {/* Type badge (read-only) */}
  3412→            {typeInfo && (
  3413→              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  3414→                <Badge className={`${typeInfo.color} border-0 gap-1`}>
  3415→                  {typeInfo.icon}
  3416→                  {typeInfo.label}
  3417→                </Badge>
  3418→              </div>
  3419→            )}
  3420→
  3421→            {/* Title (editable) */}
  3422→            <div className="grid gap-1.5">
  3423→              <Label className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Title</Label>
  3424→              <Input
  3425→                value={activityLogForm.title}
  3426→                onChange={e => setActivityLogForm(f => ({ ...f, title: e.target.value }))}
  3427→                className="auth-input"
  3428→                placeholder="Activity title..."
  3429→              />
  3430→            </div>
  3431→
  3432→            {/* Meeting Date/Time pickers */}
  3433→            {activityLogPrompt?.showMeetingPicker && (
  3434→              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
  3435→                <div className="grid gap-1.5">
  3436→                  <Label className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Meeting Date</Label>
  3437→                  <Popover>
  3438→                    <PopoverTrigger asChild>
  3439→                      <Button
  3440→                        variant="outline"
  3441→                        className="auth-input justify-start text-left font-normal w-full"
  3442→                        style={{ borderColor: '#e5e7eb', backgroundColor: 'white', color: activityLogForm.meeting_date ? '#111827' : '#9ca3af' }}
  3443→                      >
  3444→                        <Calendar className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
  3445→                        {meetingDateObj ? format(meetingDateObj, 'MMM d, yyyy') : 'Select date'}
  3446→                      </Button>
  3447→                    </PopoverTrigger>
  3448→                    <PopoverContent className="!bg-white border shadow-md p-0 w-auto z-[90]" align="start">
  3449→                      <CalendarPicker
  3450→                        mode="single"
  3451→                        selected={meetingDateObj}
  3452→                        onSelect={date => {
  3453→                          setActivityLogForm(f => ({ ...f, meeting_date: date ? date.toISOString() : undefined }));
  3454→                        }}
  3455→                        initialFocus
  3456→                        classNames={{ day_selected: 'text-white hover:text-white focus:text-white' }}
  3457→                        modifiersStyles={{ selected: { backgroundColor: '#3e8692' } }}
  3458→                      />
  3459→                    </PopoverContent>
  3460→                  </Popover>
  3461→                </div>
  3462→                <div className="grid gap-1.5">
  3463→                  <Label className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Meeting Time</Label>
  3464→                  <Popover>
  3465→                    <PopoverTrigger asChild>
  3466→                      <Button
  3467→                        variant="outline"
  3468→                        className="auth-input justify-start text-left font-normal w-full"
  3469→                        style={{ borderColor: '#e5e7eb', backgroundColor: 'white', color: activityLogForm.meeting_time ? '#111827' : '#9ca3af' }}
  3470→                      >
  3471→                        <Clock className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
  3472→                        {activityLogForm.meeting_time
  3473→                          ? (() => { const [h, m] = activityLogForm.meeting_time!.split(':').map(Number); return `${h === 0 ? 12 : h > 12 ? h - 12 : h}:${String(m).padStart(2, '0')} ${h >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM'}`; })()
  3474→                          : 'Select time'}
  3475→                      </Button>
  3476→                    </PopoverTrigger>
  3477→                    <PopoverContent className="!bg-white border shadow-md p-0 w-auto z-[90]" align="start">
  3478→                      <div className="flex gap-0 divide-x">
  3479→                        <ScrollArea className="h-[200px] w-[70px]">
  3480→                          <div className="p-1">
  3481→                            {Array.from({ length: 24 }, (_, h) => {
  3482→                              const label = `${h === 0 ? 12 : h > 12 ? h - 12 : h} ${h >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM'}`;
  3483→                              const isSelected = activityLogForm.meeting_time && parseInt(activityLogForm.meeting_time.split(':')[0]) === h;
  3484→                              return (
  3485→                                <Button
  3486→                                  key={h}
  3487→                                  variant="ghost"
  3488→                                  className={`w-full justify-center font-normal text-xs h-7 px-1 ${isSelected ? 'text-white hover:text-white' : ''}`}
  3489→                                  style={isSelected ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
  3490→                                  onClick={() => {
  3491→                                    const currentMin = activityLogForm.meeting_time ? activityLogForm.meeting_time.split(':')[1] : '00';
  3492→                                    setActivityLogForm(f => ({ ...f, meeting_time: `${h}:${currentMin}` }));
  3493→                                  }}
  3494→                                >
  3495→                                  {label}
  3496→                                </Button>
  3497→                              );
  3498→                            })}
  3499→                          </div>
  3500→                        </ScrollArea>
  3501→                        <ScrollArea className="h-[200px] w-[50px]">
  3502→                          <div className="p-1">
  3503→                            {Array.from({ length: 60 }, (_, m) => {
  3504→                              const isSelected = activityLogForm.meeting_time && parseInt(activityLogForm.meeting_time.split(':')[1]) === m;
  3505→                              return (
  3506→                                <Button
  3507→                                  key={m}
  3508→                                  variant="ghost"
  3509→                                  className={`w-full justify-center font-normal text-xs h-7 px-1 ${isSelected ? 'text-white hover:text-white' : ''}`}
  3510→                                  style={isSelected ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
  3511→                                  onClick={() => {
  3512→                                    const currentHour = activityLogForm.meeting_time ? activityLogForm.meeting_time.split(':')[0] : '9';
  3513→                                    setActivityLogForm(f => ({ ...f, meeting_time: `${currentHour}:${m}` }));
  3514→                                  }}
  3515→                                >
  3516→                                  {String(m).padStart(2, '0')}
  3517→                                </Button>
  3518→                              );
  3519→                            })}
  3520→                          </div>
  3521→                        </ScrollArea>
  3522→                      </div>
  3523→                    </PopoverContent>
  3524→                  </Popover>
  3525→                </div>
  3526→              </div>
  3527→            )}
  3528→
  3529→            {/* Description */}
  3530→            <div className="grid gap-1.5">
  3531→              <Label className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Description <span className="font-normal normal-case text-gray-400">(optional)</span></Label>
  3532→              <Textarea
  3533→                value={activityLogForm.description}
  3534→                onChange={e => setActivityLogForm(f => ({ ...f, description: e.target.value }))}
  3535→                className="auth-input min-h-[60px]"
  3536→                placeholder="Add context..."
  3537→                rows={2}
  3538→              />
  3539→            </div>
  3540→
  3541→            {/* Outcome + Next Step */}
  3542→            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
  3543→              <div className="grid gap-1.5">
  3544→                <Label className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Outcome <span className="font-normal normal-case text-gray-400">(optional)</span></Label>
  3545→                <Input
  3546→                  value={activityLogForm.outcome}
  3547→                  onChange={e => setActivityLogForm(f => ({ ...f, outcome: e.target.value }))}
  3548→                  className="auth-input"
  3549→                  placeholder="Result..."
  3550→                />
  3551→              </div>
  3552→              <div className="grid gap-1.5">
  3553→                <Label className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Next Step <span className="font-normal normal-case text-gray-400">(optional)</span></Label>
  3554→                <Input
  3555→                  value={activityLogForm.next_step}
  3556→                  onChange={e => setActivityLogForm(f => ({ ...f, next_step: e.target.value }))}
  3557→                  className="auth-input"
  3558→                  placeholder="What's next..."
  3559→                />
  3560→              </div>
  3561→            </div>
  3562→
  3563→            {/* Next Step Date */}
  3564→            <div className="grid gap-1.5">
  3565→              <Label className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Next Step Date <span className="font-normal normal-case text-gray-400">(optional)</span></Label>
  3566→              <Popover>
  3567→                <PopoverTrigger asChild>
  3568→                  <Button
  3569→                    variant="outline"
  3570→                    className="auth-input justify-start text-left font-normal w-full"

  3572→                  >
  3573→                    <Calendar className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
  3574→                    {activityLogForm.next_step_date
  3575→                      ? new Date(activityLogForm.next_step_date).toLocaleDateString()
  3576→                      : 'Select date'}
  3577→                  </Button>
  3578→                </PopoverTrigger>
  3579→                <PopoverContent className="!bg-white border shadow-md p-0 w-auto z-[90]" align="start">
  3580→                  <CalendarPicker
  3581→                    mode="single"
  3582→                    selected={activityLogForm.next_step_date ? new Date(activityLogForm.next_step_date) : undefined}
  3583→                    onSelect={date => setActivityLogForm(f => ({ ...f, next_step_date: date ? date.toISOString() : undefined }))}
  3584→                    initialFocus
  3585→                    classNames={{ day_selected: 'text-white hover:text-white focus:text-white' }}
  3586→                    modifiersStyles={{ selected: { backgroundColor: '#3e8692' } }}
  3587→                  />
  3588→                </PopoverContent>
  3589→              </Popover>
  3590→            </div>
  3591→          </div>
  3592→          <DialogFooter>
  3593→            <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => { setActivityLogPrompt(null); setActivityLogForm({ title: '', description: '', outcome: '', next_step: '' }); }}>Cancel</Button>
  3594→            <Button
  3595→              onClick={confirmActivityLog}
  3596→              disabled={isActivityLogSubmitting}
  3597→              style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
  3598→              className="hover:opacity-90"
  3599→            >
```
