  3766→              <div className={`p-2 rounded-lg ${dashboardMetrics.overdueFollowups > 0 ? 'bg-orange-100' : 'bg-gray-100'}`}>
  3767→                <Clock className={`h-5 w-5 ${dashboardMetrics.overdueFollowups > 0 ? 'text-orange-500' : 'text-gray-400'}`} />
  3768→              </div>
  3769→            </div>
  3770→          </CardContent>
  3771→        </Card>
  3772→        <Card className={`border-l-4 ${dashboardMetrics.staleDeals > 0 ? 'border-l-amber-500 bg-amber-50/50' : 'border-l-gray-200 bg-white'}`}>
  3773→          <CardContent className="pt-4 pb-3">
  3774→            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
  3775→              <div>
  3776→                <p className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Stale (7d+)</p>
  3777→                <p className={`text-2xl font-bold ${dashboardMetrics.staleDeals > 0 ? 'text-amber-600' : 'text-gray-900'}`}>{dashboardMetrics.staleDeals}</p>
  3778→                <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-400 mt-0.5">No contact in 7+ days</p>
  3779→              </div>
  3780→              <div className={`p-2 rounded-lg ${dashboardMetrics.staleDeals > 0 ? 'bg-amber-100' : 'bg-gray-100'}`}>
  3781→                <RotateCcw className={`h-5 w-5 ${dashboardMetrics.staleDeals > 0 ? 'text-amber-500' : 'text-gray-400'}`} />
  3782→              </div>
  3783→            </div>
  3784→          </CardContent>
  3785→        </Card>
  3786→        <Card className={`border-l-4 ${dashboardMetrics.dealsAtRisk > 0 ? 'border-l-rose-500 bg-rose-50/50' : 'border-l-gray-200 bg-white'}`}>
  3787→          <CardContent className="pt-4 pb-3">
  3788→            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
  3789→              <div>
  3790→                <p className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">At Risk</p>
  3791→                <p className={`text-2xl font-bold ${dashboardMetrics.dealsAtRisk > 0 ? 'text-rose-600' : 'text-gray-900'}`}>{dashboardMetrics.dealsAtRisk}</p>
  3792→                <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-400 mt-0.5">Closing deals, temp &lt; 40</p>
  3793→              </div>
  3794→              <div className={`p-2 rounded-lg ${dashboardMetrics.dealsAtRisk > 0 ? 'bg-rose-100' : 'bg-gray-100'}`}>
  3795→                <TrendingUp className={`h-5 w-5 ${dashboardMetrics.dealsAtRisk > 0 ? 'text-rose-500' : 'text-gray-400'}`} />
  3796→              </div>
  3797→            </div>
  3798→          </CardContent>
  3799→        </Card>
  3800→        <Card className={`border-l-4 ${dashboardMetrics.meetingsToday > 0 ? 'border-l-blue-500 bg-blue-50/50' : 'border-l-gray-200 bg-white'}`}>
  3801→          <CardContent className="pt-4 pb-3">
  3802→            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
  3803→              <div>
  3804→                <p className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Meetings</p>
  3805→                <p className={`text-2xl font-bold ${dashboardMetrics.meetingsToday > 0 ? 'text-blue-600' : 'text-gray-900'}`}>
  3806→                  {dashboardMetrics.meetingsToday > 0 ? dashboardMetrics.meetingsToday : dashboardMetrics.meetingsThisWeek}
  3807→                </p>
  3808→                <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-400 mt-0.5">{dashboardMetrics.meetingsToday > 0 ? 'Today' : 'This week'}</p>
  3809→              </div>
  3810→              <div className={`p-2 rounded-lg ${dashboardMetrics.meetingsToday > 0 ? 'bg-blue-100' : 'bg-gray-100'}`}>
  3811→                <Calendar className={`h-5 w-5 ${dashboardMetrics.meetingsToday > 0 ? 'text-blue-500' : 'text-gray-400'}`} />
  3812→              </div>
  3813→            </div>
  3814→          </CardContent>
  3815→        </Card>
  3816→      </div>
  3817→
  3818→      {/* Sales Dashboard */}
  3819→      <Card className="border-gray-200">
  3820→        <div
  3821→          className="flex items-center justify-between px-5 py-3 cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors"
  3822→          onClick={() => setShowDashboard(!showDashboard)}
  3823→        >
  3824→          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  3825→            <BarChart3 className="h-4 w-4 text-[#3e8692]" />
  3826→            <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">Sales Dashboard</span>
  3827→            <TooltipProvider delayDuration={200}>
  3828→              <Tooltip>
  3829→                <TooltipTrigger asChild>
  3830→                  <Button
  3831→                    variant="ghost"
  3832→                    size="sm"
  3833→                    className="h-6 px-2 text-[11px] text-gray-500 hover:text-[#3e8692] gap-1"
  3834→                    disabled={isRecalculating}
  3835→                    onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); handleRecalculateAll(); }}
  3836→                  >
  3837→                    <RotateCcw className={`h-3 w-3 ${isRecalculating ? 'animate-spin' : ''}`} />
  3838→                    {isRecalculating ? 'Recalculating...' : 'Recalc Scores'}
  3839→                  </Button>
  3840→                </TooltipTrigger>
  3841→                <TooltipContent side="bottom" align="start" className="max-w-xs text-xs space-y-1 p-3">
  3842→                  <p className="font-semibold">Auto-calculates temperature (0–100)</p>
  3843→                  <p>• Base: Bucket A=40, B=25, C=10, none=20</p>
  3844→                  <p>• Recency: +30 minus days since last contact</p>
  3845→                  <p>• Engagement: +4 per activity (max +20)</p>
  3846→                  <p>• Meeting booked: +15</p>
  3847→                  <p>• Stage: warm +5, booked/tg_intro +10, discovery+ +15</p>
  3848→                  <p>• Warm interested: +10</p>
  3849→                  <p>• Stale cold DM (&gt;30d): −15</p>
  3850→                  <p>• Bump exhaustion (3+): −10</p>
  3851→                  <p>• Warm silent: −5</p>
  3852→                  <p>• Orbit → 5, Closed Lost → 0</p>
  3853→                </TooltipContent>
  3854→              </Tooltip>
  3855→            </TooltipProvider>
  3856→          </div>
  3857→          {showDashboard ? <ChevronUp className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" /> : <ChevronDown className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />}
  3858→        </div>
  3859→        {showDashboard && (
  3860→          <CardContent className="pt-0 pb-5 px-5 space-y-5">
  3861→            {/* Pipeline Health */}
  3862→            <div>
  3863→              <p className="text-[11px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Pipeline Health</p>
  3864→              <div className="grid grid-cols-6 gap-3">
  3865→                <div className="bg-emerald-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
  3866→                  <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-emerald-600">${dashboardMetrics.pipelineValue >= 1000 ? `${(dashboardMetrics.pipelineValue / 1000).toFixed(1)}K` : dashboardMetrics.pipelineValue.toLocaleString()}</p>
  3867→                  <p className="text-[11px] text-emerald-600 font-medium">Pipeline Value</p>
  3868→                </div>
  3869→                <div className="bg-teal-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
  3870→                  <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-teal-600">${dashboardMetrics.weightedPipeline >= 1000 ? `${(dashboardMetrics.weightedPipeline / 1000).toFixed(1)}K` : dashboardMetrics.weightedPipeline.toFixed(0)}</p>
  3871→                  <p className="text-[11px] text-teal-600 font-medium">Weighted Pipeline</p>
  3872→                </div>
  3873→                <div className="bg-blue-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
  3874→                  <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-blue-600">{dashboardMetrics.activeDeals}</p>
  3875→                  <p className="text-[11px] text-blue-600 font-medium">Active Deals</p>
  3876→                </div>
  3877→                <div className="bg-purple-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
  3878→                  <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-purple-600">${dashboardMetrics.totalRevenue >= 1000 ? `${(dashboardMetrics.totalRevenue / 1000).toFixed(1)}K` : dashboardMetrics.totalRevenue.toLocaleString()}</p>
  3879→                  <p className="text-[11px] text-purple-600 font-medium">Revenue (Won)</p>
  3880→                </div>
  3881→                <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
  3882→                  <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-gray-700">{dashboardMetrics.closedWon}</p>
  3883→                  <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">Deals Won</p>
  3884→                </div>
  3885→                <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
  3886→                  <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-gray-700">{dashboardMetrics.inOrbit}</p>
  3887→                  <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">In Orbit</p>
  3888→                </div>
  3889→              </div>
  3890→            </div>
  3891→
  3892→            {/* Conversion Funnel */}
  3893→            <div>
  3894→              <p className="text-[11px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Conversion Funnel</p>
  3895→              <div className="grid grid-cols-7 gap-2">
  3896→                {[
  3897→                  { label: 'DMs Sent', value: dashboardMetrics.totalDmsSent, color: 'bg-sky-500' },
  3898→                  { label: 'Responded', value: dashboardMetrics.totalDmsSent - dashboardMetrics.coldDmCount, color: 'bg-sky-500' },
  3899→                  { label: 'Meetings', value: dashboardMetrics.meetingsBooked, color: 'bg-blue-500' },
  3900→                  { label: 'Discovery', value: dashboardMetrics.discoveryCalls, color: 'bg-indigo-500' },
  3901→                  { label: 'Proposals', value: dashboardMetrics.proposalsSent, color: 'bg-violet-500' },
  3902→                  { label: 'Won', value: dashboardMetrics.closedWon, color: 'bg-emerald-500' },
  3903→                  { label: 'Lost', value: dashboardMetrics.closedLost, color: 'bg-gray-400' },
  3904→                ].map((step, i) => (
  3905→                  <div key={step.label} className="text-center">
  3906→                    <div className="relative mx-auto mb-1">
  3907→                      <div className="h-14 rounded-md flex items-end justify-center overflow-hidden bg-gray-100">
  3908→                        <div
  3909→                          className={`w-full rounded-t-sm ${step.color} transition-all`}
  3910→                          style={{ height: `${dashboardMetrics.totalDmsSent > 0 ? Math.max((step.value / dashboardMetrics.totalDmsSent) * 100, 4) : 4}%` }}
  3911→                        />
  3912→                      </div>
  3913→                    </div>
  3914→                    <p className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-900">{step.value}</p>
  3915→                    <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500">{step.label}</p>
  3916→                    {i > 0 && i < 6 && dashboardMetrics.totalDmsSent > 0 && (
  3917→                      <p className="text-[9px] text-gray-400 mt-0.5">
  3918→                        {((step.value / dashboardMetrics.totalDmsSent) * 100).toFixed(0)}%
  3919→                      </p>
  3920→                    )}
  3921→                  </div>
  3922→                ))}
  3923→              </div>
  3924→            </div>
  3925→
  3926→            {/* Bottleneck Analysis */}
  3927→            <div>
  3928→              <p className="text-[11px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Bottleneck Analysis</p>
  3929→
  3930→              {/* Summary callouts */}
  3931→              {(dashboardMetrics.worstConversion || dashboardMetrics.slowestStage) && (
  3932→                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 mb-3">
  3933→                  {dashboardMetrics.worstConversion && (
  3934→                    <div className="bg-red-50 border border-red-100 rounded-lg p-3 flex items-start gap-3">
  3935→                      <div className="p-1.5 bg-red-100 rounded-md mt-0.5">
  3936→                        <AlertTriangle className="h-4 w-4 text-red-500" />
  3937→                      </div>
  3938→                      <div>
  3939→                        <p className="text-xs font-semibold text-red-700">Biggest Drop-off</p>
  3940→                        <p className="text-sm font-bold text-red-800 mt-0.5">
  3941→                          {STAGE_LABELS[dashboardMetrics.worstConversion.stage as SalesPipelineStage]} → {STAGE_LABELS[dashboardMetrics.worstConversion.nextStage as SalesPipelineStage]}
  3942→                        </p>
  3943→                        <p className="text-[11px] text-red-600 mt-0.5">
  3944→                          Only {dashboardMetrics.worstConversion.rate.toFixed(0)}% convert — {dashboardMetrics.worstConversion.dropoff} lost here
  3945→                        </p>
  3946→                      </div>
  3947→                    </div>
  3948→                  )}
  3949→                  {dashboardMetrics.slowestStage && (
  3950→                    <div className="bg-amber-50 border border-amber-100 rounded-lg p-3 flex items-start gap-3">
  3951→                      <div className="p-1.5 bg-amber-100 rounded-md mt-0.5">
  3952→                        <Clock className="h-4 w-4 text-amber-500" />
  3953→                      </div>
  3954→                      <div>
  3955→                        <p className="text-xs font-semibold text-amber-700">Slowest Stage</p>
  3956→                        <p className="text-sm font-bold text-amber-800 mt-0.5">
  3957→                          {STAGE_LABELS[dashboardMetrics.slowestStage.stage as SalesPipelineStage]}
  3958→                        </p>
  3959→                        <p className="text-[11px] text-amber-600 mt-0.5">
  3960→                          Avg {dashboardMetrics.slowestStage.avgDays}d — {dashboardMetrics.slowestStage.count} deals sitting here
  3961→                        </p>
  3962→                      </div>
  3963→                    </div>
  3964→                  )}
  3965→                </div>
  3966→              )}
  3967→
  3968→              {/* Stage-by-stage conversion + time table */}
  3969→              <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg overflow-hidden">
  3970→                <table className="w-full text-xs">
  3971→                  <thead>
  3972→                    <tr className="bg-gray-50 border-b border-gray-200">
  3973→                      <th className="text-left py-2 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Stage</th>
  3974→                      <th className="text-center py-2 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Deals In</th>
  3975→                      <th className="text-center py-2 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Moved On</th>
  3976→                      <th className="text-center py-2 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Conversion</th>
  3977→                      <th className="text-center py-2 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Drop-off</th>
  3978→                      <th className="text-center py-2 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Avg Days</th>
  3979→                      <th className="py-2 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider w-[120px]"></th>
  3980→                    </tr>
  3981→                  </thead>
  3982→                  <tbody>
  3983→                    {dashboardMetrics.stageConversions.map((conv, i) => {
  3984→                      const timeData = dashboardMetrics.avgDaysInStage[i];
  3985→                      const isWorst = dashboardMetrics.worstConversion?.stage === conv.stage;
  3986→                      const isSlowest = dashboardMetrics.slowestStage?.stage === conv.stage;
  3987→                      const barWidth = Math.max(conv.rate, 2);
  3988→                      const barColor = conv.rate >= 60 ? 'bg-emerald-400' : conv.rate >= 30 ? 'bg-amber-400' : 'bg-red-400';
  3989→                      return (
  3990→                        <tr key={conv.stage} className={`border-b border-gray-100 last:border-b-0 ${isWorst ? 'bg-red-50/50' : isSlowest ? 'bg-amber-50/30' : ''}`}>
  3991→                          <td className="py-2 px-3 font-medium text-gray-700">
  3992→                            <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
  3993→                              {STAGE_LABELS[conv.stage as SalesPipelineStage]}
  3994→                              {isWorst && <AlertTriangle className="h-3 w-3 text-red-400" />}
  3995→                              {isSlowest && <Clock className="h-3 w-3 text-amber-400" />}
  3996→                            </div>
  3997→                          </td>
  3998→                          <td className="py-2 px-3 text-center text-gray-600">{conv.from}</td>
  3999→                          <td className="py-2 px-3 text-center text-gray-600">{conv.to}</td>
  4000→                          <td className="py-2 px-3 text-center">
  4001→                            <span className={`font-semibold ${conv.rate >= 60 ? 'text-emerald-600' : conv.rate >= 30 ? 'text-amber-600' : 'text-red-600'}`}>
  4002→                              {conv.from > 0 ? `${conv.rate.toFixed(0)}%` : '—'}
  4003→                            </span>
  4004→                          </td>
  4005→                          <td className="py-2 px-3 text-center">
  4006→                            {conv.dropoff > 0 ? (
  4007→                              <span className="text-red-500 font-medium">-{conv.dropoff}</span>
  4008→                            ) : (
  4009→                              <span className="text-gray-400">0</span>
  4010→                            )}
  4011→                          </td>
  4012→                          <td className="py-2 px-3 text-center">
  4013→                            {timeData.count > 0 ? (
  4014→                              <span className={`font-medium ${timeData.avgDays >= 14 ? 'text-red-500' : timeData.avgDays >= 7 ? 'text-amber-500' : 'text-gray-600'}`}>
  4015→                                {timeData.avgDays}d
  4016→                              </span>
  4017→                            ) : (
  4018→                              <span className="text-gray-400">—</span>
  4019→                            )}
  4020→                          </td>
  4021→                          <td className="py-2 px-3">
  4022→                            <div className="w-full h-2 bg-gray-100 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
  4023→                              <div className={`h-full rounded-full ${barColor} transition-all`} style={{ width: `${barWidth}%` }} />
  4024→                            </div>
  4025→                          </td>
  4026→                        </tr>
  4027→                      );
  4028→                    })}
  4029→                  </tbody>
  4030→                </table>
  4031→              </div>
  4032→            </div>
  4033→
  4034→            {/* Key Rates & Averages */}
  4035→            <div>
  4036→              <p className="text-[11px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Key Rates &amp; Averages</p>
  4037→              <div className="grid grid-cols-6 gap-3">
  4038→                <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
  4039→                  <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-[#3e8692]">{dashboardMetrics.responseRate.toFixed(1)}%</p>
  4040→                  <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">Response Rate</p>
  4041→                </div>
  4042→                <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
  4043→                  <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-[#3e8692]">{dashboardMetrics.closeRate.toFixed(0)}%</p>
  4044→                  <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">Close Rate</p>
  4045→                </div>
  4046→                <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
  4047→                  <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-[#3e8692]">${dashboardMetrics.avgDealSize > 0 ? (dashboardMetrics.avgDealSize >= 1000 ? `${(dashboardMetrics.avgDealSize / 1000).toFixed(1)}K` : dashboardMetrics.avgDealSize.toFixed(0)) : '0'}</p>
  4048→                  <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">Avg Deal Size</p>
  4049→                </div>
  4050→                <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
  4051→                  <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-[#3e8692]">{dashboardMetrics.avgCloseTime > 0 ? `${dashboardMetrics.avgCloseTime.toFixed(0)}d` : '—'}</p>
  4052→                  <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">Avg Close Time</p>
  4053→                </div>
  4054→                <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
  4055→                  <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-[#3e8692]">{dashboardMetrics.qualifiedPct.toFixed(0)}%</p>
  4056→                  <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">Qualified (A+B)</p>
  4057→                </div>
  4058→                <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
  4059→                  <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-[#3e8692]">{dashboardMetrics.bucketAPct.toFixed(0)}%</p>
  4060→                  <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">Bucket A %</p>
  4061→                </div>
  4062→              </div>
  4063→            </div>
  4064→
  4065→            {/* Bucket & Stage Breakdown */}
  4066→            <div>
  4067→              <p className="text-[11px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Bucket Breakdown</p>
  4068→              <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3">
  4069→                <div className="bg-emerald-50 rounded-lg p-3 flex items-center justify-between">
  4070→                  <div>
  4071→                    <p className="text-xs font-medium text-emerald-600">Bucket A</p>
  4072→                    <p className="text-[10px] text-emerald-500">High-value, high-intent</p>
  4073→                  </div>
  4074→                  <p className="text-2xl font-extrabold text-emerald-700">{metrics.bucketA}</p>
  4075→                </div>
  4076→                <div className="bg-amber-50 rounded-lg p-3 flex items-center justify-between">
  4077→                  <div>
  4078→                    <p className="text-xs font-medium text-amber-600">Bucket B</p>
  4079→                    <p className="text-[10px] text-amber-500">Standard follow-up</p>
  4080→                  </div>
  4081→                  <p className="text-2xl font-extrabold text-amber-700">{metrics.bucketB}</p>
  4082→                </div>
  4083→                <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 flex items-center justify-between">
  4084→                  <div>
  4085→                    <p className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-600">Bucket C</p>
  4086→                    <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-400">Lower priority</p>
  4087→                  </div>
  4088→                  <p className="text-2xl font-extrabold text-gray-700">{metrics.bucketC}</p>
  4089→                </div>
  4090→              </div>
  4091→            </div>
  4092→          </CardContent>
  4093→        )}
  4094→      </Card>
  4095→
  4096→      {/* Tabs + Controls */}
  4097→      <Tabs value={activeTab} onValueChange={v => setActiveTab(v as 'actions' | 'outreach' | 'pipeline' | 'orbit')}>
  4098→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4 flex-shrink-0">
  4099→          <TabsList>
  4100→            <TabsTrigger value="actions" className="flex items-center gap-2">
  4101→              <Zap className="h-4 w-4" />
  4102→              Actions
  4103→              {actionItems.length > 0 && (
  4104→                <Badge variant="secondary" className="ml-1">{actionItems.length}</Badge>
  4105→              )}
  4106→            </TabsTrigger>
  4107→            <TabsTrigger value="outreach" className="flex items-center gap-2">
  4108→              <MessageSquare className="h-4 w-4" />
  4109→              Outreach
  4110→              {outreachAllTotal > 0 && (
  4111→                <Badge variant="secondary" className="ml-1">{outreachAllTotal}</Badge>
  4112→              )}
  4113→            </TabsTrigger>
  4114→            <TabsTrigger value="pipeline" className="flex items-center gap-2">
  4115→              <Target className="h-4 w-4" />
  4116→              Pipeline
  4117→            </TabsTrigger>
  4118→            <TabsTrigger value="orbit" className="flex items-center gap-2">
  4119→              <RotateCcw className="h-4 w-4" />
  4120→              Orbit
  4121→              {orbitOpps.length > 0 && (
  4122→                <Badge variant="secondary" className="ml-1">{orbitOpps.length}</Badge>

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 2026-02-25 11:33:20Z)**_

Perfect! Now I have reviewed both files completely. Let me compile a comprehensive report of all the issues I found.

## THOROUGH CODE REVIEW: Sales Pipeline

I've completed a detailed review of both files. Here are all the issues I identified:

### **salesPipelineService.ts**

#### Code Quality Issues

1. **Line 428** — `getColdDmsPaginated` called with incomplete arguments in `fetchData`:
   - The call `getColdDmsPaginated(1, 1, {})` is fetching page 1 with page size 1 — this will only get 1 result total, not a meaningful count of cold DMs
   - Should probably use a larger page size like 1000 or fetch just the count

2. **Lines 466-482** — `updatePositions` lacks error recovery:
   - Uses `Promise.all()` which means if one update fails, all others still execute but the error is returned
   - However, it only throws the first error — other failed updates are silently ignored
   - No rollback mechanism if some positions succeed and others fail, leaving data in an inconsistent state

3. **Lines 534-550** — `getColdDmsPaginated` has a pagination bug:
   - The query chain uses `.range(from, to)` which is correct
   - But if `count` is returned as `null` in the response, the function returns `count: 0` even if data exists
   - This breaks pagination logic downstream

---

### **page.tsx**

#### Logic Errors & Race Conditions

4. **Lines 421-440** — `fetchData()` has a potential stale data issue:
   - Line 428 calls `getColdDmsPaginated(1, 1, {})` which only gets 1 record
   - Line 434 sets `setOutreachAllTotal(outreachCount.count)` based on this incomplete fetch
   - When switching to the Outreach tab, this stale count is displayed instead of the real count

5. **Lines 454-473** — `fetchOutreach()` doesn't refresh `opportunities` state:
   - After bulk operations (bump, move, delete), `fetchOutreach()` is called but `opportunities` state isn't updated
   - This causes the Actions tab to show stale data while the Outreach tab shows fresh data
   - The slide-over can display inconsistent bump counts between what the user sees and the actual data

6. **Lines 550-566** — `handleStageChange()` for orbit/closed_lost bypasses activity logging:
   - Lines 551-557: When moving to `orbit` or `v2_closed_lost`, it shows a prompt and returns early
   - But the prompt itself (`confirmOrbit`, `confirmClosedLost`) doesn't trigger the activity log popup
   - Expected flow: user moves to orbit → reason prompt → activity log popup to record why
   - Actual flow: user moves to orbit → reason prompt → no activity log, inconsistent with other stage changes

7. **Line 1093** — Activity log form reset is incomplete:
   - `setActivityLogForm({ title: '', description: '', outcome: '', next_step: '' })`
   - Missing reset of `meeting_date` and `meeting_time` fields
   - If a user logs an activity with a meeting date, then immediately executes another action that shows the meeting picker, the previous date will still be in the form

8. **Lines 1026-1029** — `openActivityLogPrompt()` resets form every time:
   - Line 1028: `setActivityLogForm({ title, description: '', outcome: '', next_step: '' })`
   - This means if a user pre-fills description/outcome and the popup reopens (e.g., click Execute twice), their data is lost
   - Also missing initialization of `meeting_date` and `meeting_time`

#### UX Issues

9. **Lines 844-862** — BAMFAM violation detection is fragmented:
   - `getNextAction()` checks `postDiscovery.includes(opp.stage)` at line 847
   - But the check at line 849 uses `new Date(opp.next_meeting_at) > new Date()` without timezone consideration
   - This can cause off-by-one issues at midnight boundaries
   - The slide-over shows BAMFAM warning at line 2740-2744 but doesn't suggest actions beyond "open detail"

10. **Line 878-901** — Cold DM logic for "Send First DM" vs "Bump #X" is confusing:
    - Line 890 checks `opp.bump_number === 0 && !opp.last_bump_date` for "Send First DM"
    - But what if `bump_number === 0` but `last_bump_date` is set (reduced bump)? 
    - Line 893-896: Falls through to show `Bump #1` which is correct but the fix comment at line 889 says "was reduced" but doesn't clarify this is the intended behavior

11. **Lines 923-942** — Booked stage has a confusing action for past meetings:
    - Line 930: Checks if `next_meeting_at > new Date()` (future)
    - Line 937-942: If meeting is in the past, suggests "Discovery Done" 
    - But what if the meeting date is set but incorrect? User has no way to reschedule without going to Edit
    - The action "Discovery Done" assumes the meeting happened, which is risky if the date is wrong

12. **Lines 2453-2454** — Backdrop visibility logic is incomplete:
    - Backdrop only shows if NOT `orbitPrompt && !closedLostPrompt`
    - But if both prompts are closed and activity log is open, there's no backdrop for the activity log
    - This allows clicking behind the activity log to trigger other actions

13. **Lines 1886-1905** — Outreach table bump column has layout issues:
    - Button at line 1890-1903 is inside `onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}`
    - But the button also calls `handleRecordBump(opp.id)` which triggers the activity log popup
    - This popup won't render because the click is stopped before the state update completes

#### Performance Concerns

14. **Lines 238-415** — `dashboardMetrics` useMemo is inefficient:
    - Dependency array at line 415: `[opportunities, metrics.bamfamViolations, outreachTotal]`
    - But `outreachTotal` is only used once at line 403 and it's overwriting the server-provided `metrics`
    - This causes unnecessary recalculation when `outreachTotal` changes
    - The funnel stage analysis (lines 334-350) iterates all opps multiple times to estimate "reached stages" — this is O(n*m) where n=opps and m=stages

15. **Lines 363-371** — `dashboardMetrics` calculates average days per stage inefficiently:
    - Creates a new array `avgDaysInStage` even if not using dashboard
    - The calculation `Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(o.updated_at).getTime()) / ...)` is expensive, called for every opp
    - Should memoize this calculation or defer it to a separate selector

16. **Line 614** — Optimistic update in `handleRecordBump()` is wrong:
    - Line 615: `Math.min(o.bump_number + 1, 4)` caps the bump at 4
    - But the actual service doesn't cap it at 4, it just increments
    - If user bumps 5+ times, UI shows "4/4" but backend has "5"
    - Then `fetchData()` corrects it, causing a jarring UI flicker

#### Missing Features / Gaps

17. **Lines 1031-1067** — `handleActionExecute()` doesn't handle all action types:
    - Lines 1039-1054: Only handles `stage_change` and `bump` for activity logging
    - But line 1056-1062: `open_detail` actions don't trigger activity logging
    - This means "Book Next Meeting" and other guidance-only actions don't create activity records
    - User executes action, sees slide-over with guidance, but nothing is logged until they manually add an activity

18. **Lines 1042-1050** — `stageActivityMap` doesn't cover all stages:
    - Missing: `'proposal_call'` (should map to 'call' type)
    - Missing: `'orbit'` and `'v2_closed_lost'` (they have their own prompts, not shown in this map)
    - Missing: handling for when `targetStage` is undefined

19. **Lines 2838-2875** — Bump counter in slide-over only shows in cold_dm:
    - What about warm stage where bumps still matter?
    - Bump history is lost once you move out of cold_dm
    - No way to view bump history in the activity timeline (activities don't show bump numbers)

20. **Lines 1040 & 2898** — `handleStageChange()` can be called twice simultaneously:
    - Line 1040 in Actions tab calls `handleStageChange()`
    - But the function itself doesn't have any debouncing or loading state
    - If user clicks "Execute" twice before the API responds, two stage changes could be queued
    - Same issue at line 2898 in the Move to Stage dropdown in the slide-over

21. **Lines 3379-3607** — `renderActivityLogPrompt()` resets state on close, but never resets meeting fields:
    - Line 3404: Closes dialog and resets form but missing reset of `meeting_date` and `meeting_time`
    - These are stored in `activityLogForm` state but not included in the form definition on line 217-225
    - They only exist in the form during the dialog render, not persisted to state properly

22. **Lines 1653-1654 & 1972** — `selectAllOnPage()` is limited:
    - Only selects visible page, not all matching the filters
    - UI says "Select All on Page" but users might expect "Select All" matching filters
    - No "select all" across all pages option

#### State & Form Issues

23. **Lines 154-162** — Multiple activity-related state variables:
    - `activityForm` for the slide-over activity form
    - `activityLogForm` for the popup activity form
    - Both have overlapping fields but different structures
    - When moving between slide-over and popup, form data isn't transferred
    - If user is viewing slide-over, adds activity, then Execute another action → activity log popup, the popup starts with empty form

24. **Lines 2507-2737** — Edit mode in slide-over has a state leak:
    - Line 2508: Check `slideOverMode === 'edit'`
    - But `editingOpp` and `form` are not reset when slide-over closes (line 2500)
    - If user: Edit opp → Cancel edit → Navigate away → Return to slide-over
    - The `form` still contains the old opp data, causing confusion

25. **Lines 1443-1462** — Inline editing in table allows click propagation issues:
    - Line 1452: `onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}`
    - But line 1456 does `setEditingCell({ id: opp.id, field: 'name' })` which opens inline editor
    - The click handler at line 1441 also calls `openSlideOver()` 
    - Race condition: user clicks name → both inline editor AND slide-over open

#### Specific Line Issues

26. **Line 1917** — `handleStageChange()` called from dropdown with wrong current stage:
    - `handleStageChange(opp.id, 'warm', opp.stage)`
    - But in the Outreach table, all opps are in 'cold_dm', so passing `opp.stage` is correct
    - However, if the list somehow contains other stages (which it shouldn't), this works but is fragile

27. **Line 2453-2454** — Backdrop click handler doesn't close activity log:
    - `onClick={() => { setSlideOverOpp(null); setActionGuidance(null); }}`
    - But there's no check for `slideOverMode === 'view'` before closing
    - If user is in Edit mode in the slide-over, clicking backdrop closes it without saving
    - No confirmation dialog

28. **Lines 2747-2765** — Action guidance display isn't dismissible from all states:
    - Line 2759: Close button dismisses guidance
    - But if user clicks backdrop (line 2454), the entire slide-over closes
    - Inconsistent UX: guidance can be dismissed alone or with the whole slide-over

---

### **Summary Table**

| Type | Count | Severity | Categories |
|------|-------|----------|-----------|
| Logic Errors | 6 | High | Stale data, race conditions, missing activity logs |
| UX Issues | 7 | Medium-High | Confusing flows, incomplete resets, state leaks |
| Performance | 3 | Medium | Inefficient memoization, O(n*m) algorithms |
| Code Quality | 7 | Medium | Missing error handling, duplicated form state, incomplete maps |
| Missing Features | 6 | Low-Medium | Incomplete action mapping, limited bulk operations |
| State Management | 4 | High | State leaks, form data loss, click propagation bugs |

**Most Critical Issues:**
1. Activity log popup doesn't fire after orbit/closed_lost stage changes (line 550-596)
2. Stale `outreachTotal` count crashes pagination logic (lines 428, 434, 1591-1593)
3. Form data resets lose meeting_date/meeting_time (lines 1093, 1028, 3404)
4. Click handler race condition in inline editing (lines 1441-1456)
5. Backdrop doesn't work with activity log popup (lines 2453-2454, 2740-2765)

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-25 11:33:35Z)**_



Here's what I found after a thorough review:

### High Priority (Bugs / Broken Flows)

1. **Activity log popup never fires after Orbit/Closed Lost** — When a user moves a deal to orbit or closed lost, the `confirmOrbit`/`confirmClosedLost` handlers execute the stage change but never open the activity log popup. Every other stage change gets one.

2. **Meeting date/time not reset** — When the activity log popup closes (Cancel or submit), `meeting_date` and `meeting_time` aren't cleared from `activityLogForm`. If a user logs a meeting, then triggers another popup, the old date bleeds through.

3. **Optimistic bump caps at 4 but backend doesn't** — `handleRecordBump` uses `Math.min(bump_number + 1, 4)` for the optimistic UI update, but the service just increments. If someone bumps past 4, the UI flickers when `fetchData` corrects it.

4. **`stageActivityMap` missing `proposal_call`** — When a deal moves to `proposal_call` via an action, no activity log popup opens because the map doesn't have that key.

### Medium Priority (UX / State Issues)

5. **Backdrop doesn't cover activity log popup** — The slide-over backdrop checks for `orbitPrompt` and `closedLostPrompt` but not `activityLogPrompt`. Users can click through behind the dialog.

6. **Edit mode in slide-over has no unsaved changes warning** — Clicking the backdrop while in edit mode closes everything without saving or confirming. Users can lose work.

7. **`displayedActions` not in `actionItems` dependency** — `outreachActions` and `closingActions` depend on `actionItems` which is correct, but `displayedActions` is recalculated every render since it's not memoized.

Want me to fix all of these? They're all in one file so I can do it in a single pass.

---

yes fix all of them

  1020→    'Chase Signature': { label: 'Chase Signature', hint: 'Follow up on the contract. Once they sign, use the "Signed!" button to close the deal.' },

  1023→    'Keep Bumping': { label: 'Keep Bumping', hint: 'Override the orbit suggestion — review notes and continue follow-up DMs.' },

  1025→
  1026→  const openActivityLogPrompt = (oppId: string, oppName: string, type: ActivityType, title: string, showMeetingPicker?: boolean) => {
  1027→    setActivityLogPrompt({ oppId, oppName, type, title, showMeetingPicker });
  1028→    setActivityLogForm({ title, description: '', outcome: '', next_step: '' });
  1029→  };
  1030→
  1031→  const handleActionExecute = async (oppId: string, action: ReturnType<typeof getNextAction>, opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
  1032→    setExecutingAction(oppId);
  1033→    try {
  1034→      if (action.actionType === 'bump') {
  1035→        await handleRecordBump(oppId);
  1036→        // Show activity log popup after bump
  1037→        const bumpTitle = action.label === 'Send First DM' ? 'First DM sent' : `${action.label} sent`;
  1038→        openActivityLogPrompt(oppId, opp.name, 'message', bumpTitle);
  1039→      } else if (action.actionType === 'stage_change' && action.targetStage) {
  1040→        await handleStageChange(oppId, action.targetStage, opp.stage);
  1041→        // Show activity log popup after stage change (skip orbit/closed_lost — they have their own prompts)
  1042→        const stageActivityMap: Record<string, { type: ActivityType; title: string; showMeetingPicker?: boolean }> = {
  1043→          'warm': { type: 'message', title: 'KOL replied' },
  1044→          'tg_intro': { type: 'message', title: 'Got TG handle' },
  1045→          'booked': { type: 'meeting', title: 'Meeting booked', showMeetingPicker: true },
  1046→          'discovery_done': { type: 'meeting', title: 'Discovery call completed' },
  1047→          'proposal_sent': { type: 'proposal', title: 'Proposal sent' },
  1048→          'v2_contract': { type: 'call', title: 'Moving to contract' },
  1049→          'v2_closed_won': { type: 'note', title: 'Deal closed won!' },
  1050→        };
  1051→        const mapping = stageActivityMap[action.targetStage];
  1052→        if (mapping) {
  1053→          openActivityLogPrompt(oppId, opp.name, mapping.type, mapping.title, mapping.showMeetingPicker);
  1054→        }
  1055→      } else {
  1056→        // open_detail actions
  1057→        if (action.label === 'Book Next Meeting!' || action.label === 'Schedule Meeting') {
  1058→          openActivityLogPrompt(oppId, opp.name, 'meeting', 'Meeting scheduled', true);
  1059→        } else {
  1060→          const guidance = ACTION_GUIDANCE[action.label];
  1061→          openSlideOver(opp, guidance);
  1062→        }
  1063→      }
  1064→    } finally {
  1065→      setExecutingAction(null);
  1066→    }
  1067→  };
  1068→
  1069→  const confirmActivityLog = async () => {
  1070→    if (!activityLogPrompt) return;
  1071→    setIsActivityLogSubmitting(true);
  1072→    try {
  1073→      // Create the activity
  1074→      await SalesPipelineService.createActivity({
  1075→        opportunity_id: activityLogPrompt.oppId,
  1076→        type: activityLogPrompt.type,
  1077→        title: activityLogForm.title || activityLogPrompt.title,
  1078→        description: activityLogForm.description || undefined,
  1079→        outcome: activityLogForm.outcome || undefined,
  1080→        next_step: activityLogForm.next_step || undefined,
  1081→        next_step_date: activityLogForm.next_step_date || undefined,
  1082→      });
  1083→      // If meeting picker was shown and a date was set, update next_meeting_at
  1084→      if (activityLogPrompt.showMeetingPicker && activityLogForm.meeting_date) {
  1085→        const meetingDate = new Date(activityLogForm.meeting_date);
  1086→        if (activityLogForm.meeting_time) {
  1087→          const [h, m] = activityLogForm.meeting_time.split(':').map(Number);
  1088→          meetingDate.setHours(h, m, 0, 0);
  1089→        }
  1090→        await SalesPipelineService.update(activityLogPrompt.oppId, { next_meeting_at: meetingDate.toISOString() });

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-25 11:38:59Z)**_

Build passes. All 7 fixes applied:

| # | Bug | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| **1** | Activity log never fires after orbit/closed lost | Added `oppName` to prompt state types. `confirmOrbit` and `confirmClosedLost` now call `openActivityLogPrompt()` after the stage change, pre-filled with the reason (e.g. "Moved to orbit — No Response"). |
| **2** | Meeting date/time bleed between popups | All 4 places that reset `activityLogForm` (open, confirm, cancel, dialog close) now explicitly clear `meeting_date`, `meeting_time`, and `next_step_date`. |
| **3** | Optimistic bump capped at 4, backend doesn't | Removed `Math.min(..., 4)` — optimistic update now just increments. `fetchData()` still corrects afterward, but no more flicker. |
| **4** | `proposal_call` stage had no activity mapping | Added `'proposal_call': { type: 'call', title: 'Proposal call set' }` to the stage-to-activity map. |
| **5** | Backdrop allowed clicks through activity log popup | Added `!activityLogPrompt` to the backdrop visibility condition — backdrop now hides when any dialog (orbit, closed lost, or activity log) is open. |
| **6** | Backdrop click in edit mode lost unsaved changes | Backdrop click now checks `slideOverMode === 'edit'` and shows a `confirm()` dialog before closing. If denied, the slide-over stays open. |
| **7** | `displayedActions` recalculated every render | Wrapped in `useMemo` with `[actionPhaseFilter, outreachActions, closingActions, actionItems]` dependencies. |

---

<tool-use data-tool-type="generic" data-tool-name="Task"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Task**</summary>
Second-pass review sales-pipeline

```text
Based on my thorough review of both files, I've identified several real bugs. Let me compile my findings:

## SECOND-PASS BUG REPORT: Sales Pipeline

### CRITICAL BUGS

**BUG #1: Activity Form Not Reset on Switch (Lines 777-780)**
**Severity: High - Data Consistency Issue**

When switching between opportunities in the slide-over:
```typescript
// Line 777-780 in openSlideOver
setActivityForm({ opportunity_id: opp.id, type: 'note', title: '' });
setActivityMeetingDate(undefined);
setActivityMeetingTime(undefined);
```

**Problem**: Only three of the form fields reset. The full activity form has many optional fields (description, outcome, next_step, next_step_date) that are NOT reset when opening a new opportunity. A user could:
1. Start adding activity details to Opp A
2. Click on Opp B
3. Start typing in the activity form for Opp B
4. But submit with leftover description/outcome/next_step from Opp A attached

**Fix needed**: Reset ALL activity form fields (description, outcome, next_step, next_step_date) when opening the slide-over.

---

**BUG #2: Meeting Time Not Preserved When Switching (Activity Form)**
**Severity: High - Logic Bug**

In the activity form picker (lines 3024, 3045):
```typescript
// Line 3024
const isSelected = activityMeetingTime && parseInt(activityMeetingTime.split(':')[0]) === h;

// Line 3045
const isSelected = activityMeetingTime && parseInt(activityMeetingTime.split(':')[1]) === m;
```

But when clicking hour/minute buttons (lines 3032, 3053):
```typescript
// Line 3032-3033 (hour)
const currentMin = activityMeetingTime ? activityMeetingTime.split(':')[1] : '00';
setActivityMeetingTime(`${h}:${currentMin}`);

// Line 3053-3054 (minute)  
const currentHour = activityMeetingTime ? activityMeetingTime.split(':')[0] : '9';
setActivityMeetingTime(`${currentHour}:${m}`);
```

**Problem**: Line 3053 defaults to hour '9' when no time is set. But the hour picker button click (line 3031) doesn't store the hour number as padded string. So you can get times like "9:30" or "14:15" inconsistently, leading to substring parsing failures. More critically: if you pick an hour first (e.g., "14:00"), then click minutes, it reconstructs as "14:30" — but if minute goes to '0', you'd get "14:0" instead of "14:00", breaking parsing.

**Fix needed**: Ensure time format is always `HH:mm` with proper padding.

---

**BUG #3: Outreach Owner Filter "mine" State Mismatch (Line 1684)**
**Severity: Medium - UI/Logic Issue**

```typescript
// Line 1674-1688
outreachFilters.owner_id === 'mine'
  ? 'bg-sky-100 text-sky-700 border border-sky-200'
  : 'text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100 border border-transparent'
```

But in the filter resolution (line 459):
```typescript
owner_id: outreachFilters.owner_id === 'mine' ? (user?.id || undefined) : outreachFilters.owner_id,
```

**Problem**: The state stores 'mine' as a string literal, but the backend filter logic resolves it. When switching from "My Outreach" to "All Owners", line 1682 sets `owner_id: undefined`, but the display logic at line 1684 is checking `=== 'mine'` which is now falsy. This means: if owner_id is undefined, BOTH tabs could light up, or the wrong one shows as active. The button state becomes inconsistent with actual filters.

**Fix needed**: Either store 'mine' permanently and always resolve in fetchOutreach, OR update the comparison logic.

---

**BUG #4: DnD Position Update Not Atomically Saved (Line 759)**
**Severity: Medium - Data Consistency**

```typescript
// Line 757-760
const reordered = arrayMove(stageOpps, oldIndex, newIndex);
const positions = reordered.map((o, i) => ({ id: o.id, position: i }));
await SalesPipelineService.updatePositions(positions);
await fetchData();
```

**Problem**: If updatePositions partially fails (network timeout, DB constraint), the UI is already updated (arrayMove), but server position is inconsistent. fetchData() is called after, but if it fails, the UI shows reordered cards while server hasn't persisted. User might refresh and see old order.

**Partial mitigation exists** (optimistic update pattern), but no error handling rollback.

---

**BUG #5: Bulk Operations Don't Clear Selection on Error (Lines 1614-1627)**
**Severity: Medium - UX Issue**

```typescript
const handleBulkBump = async () => {
  if (selectedOutreach.length === 0 || isBulkBumping) return;
  setIsBulkBumping(true);
  try {
    await SalesPipelineService.bulkRecordBump(selectedOutreach);
    setSelectedOutreach([]); // ← Only clears on success
    await fetchOutreach();
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('Error bulk bumping:', err);
    // Missing: setSelectedOutreach([]) or retry logic
  } finally {
    setIsBulkBumping(false);
  }
};
```

**Problem**: If bulk bump fails, checkboxes remain checked, but the data may be in an inconsistent state (some bumped, some not). User sees checked items, hits retry, and might bump the already-bumped ones again. No error message shown.

---

### MODERATE BUGS

**BUG #6: No Temperature Score on Create (Line 511)**
**Severity: Medium - Business Logic**

```typescript
// Line 511
await SalesPipelineService.create({ ...form, stage: form.stage || ('cold_dm' as OpportunityStage) });
```

The create function in service (line 212-213) calls `recalcTemperature()` but provides no initial `temperature_score` in the form. The field is optional on creation, so new opps start with NULL/0, then recalc is called. But if recalc fails silently (line 563-564), the opp has 0 temp, making it sort last in dashboards.

---

**BUG #7: Outreach Tab Pagination Selection Not Cleared on Filter Change (Lines 1720, 1733, 1747)**
**Severity: Low - UX Issue**

When filters change, `setOutreachPage(1)` and `setSelectedOutreach([])` are both called. BUT if a user is on page 3, changes a filter, page resets to 1, BUT the old selection array persists momentarily before the effect triggers fetchOutreach. Race condition possible.

---

**BUG #8: getNextAction Missing "orbit" Case Closing Logic (Line 972-979)**
**Severity: Low - Incomplete Feature**

```typescript
case 'orbit': {
  const daysSinceCreated = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(opp.created_at).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  if (daysSinceCreated > 90) {
    return { label: 'Resurrect', ... };
  }
  return { label: 'In Orbit', hint: '', priority: 'wait', actionType: 'none', ... };
}
```

**Problem**: 90 days is measured from `created_at`, not from when it moved to orbit. An opp in orbit for only 1 month but created 2 years ago shows "Resurrect" action immediately. Should check `updated_at` or `orbit_moved_at` timestamp instead.

---

**BUG #9: Inline Edit Cell Not Stoppage Propagation Completely (Lines 1454-1472)**
**Severity: Low - Click Handling**

```typescript
// Line 1462
onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}
```

Only the INPUT stops propagation on click. But the wrapping div (line 1465-1472) also has onClick with stopPropagation, creating nested handlers. If user clicks the input, it fires, then the div's onClick fires. The table row click (line 1450) might still trigger if timing is off.

---

**BUG #10: Activity Log Meeting Time Display Format Bug (Line 3491-3493)**
**Severity: Low - Display Bug**

```typescript
{activityLogForm.meeting_time
  ? (() => { const [h, m] = activityLogForm.meeting_time!.split(':').map(Number); 
    return `${h === 0 ? 12 : h > 12 ? h - 12 : h}:${String(m).padStart(2, '0')} ${h >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM'}`; })()
  : 'Select time'}
```

**Problem**: The padStart on `m` is applied AFTER mapping to Number. So if the stored time is "09:05", after splitting and mapping to Number, `m` is `5`, then `padStart(2, '0')` gives "05" — this part works. BUT if time was never set and user picks hour first (state is "14:00"), then clicks minute '5', line 3532 sets `meeting_time: "14:5"` (without padding). The display then tries to split "14:5" and gets `m = 5`, but the underlying state is corrupted.

---

## SERVICE LAYER ISSUES

**BUG #11: bulkUpdateStage Missing Stage History Logging (Lines 586-601)**
**Severity: Medium - Audit Trail**

```typescript
static async bulkUpdateStage(ids: string[], stage: SalesPipelineStage): Promise<void> {
  const now = new Date().toISOString();
  const updates = ids.map(id =>
    supabase
      .from('crm_opportunities')
      .update({ stage, updated_at: now })
      .eq('id', id)
  );
  // Missing: recordStageHistory for each transition!
}
```

Individual `update()` calls in the service DO call `recordStageHistory()` (line 272-273), but `bulkUpdateStage()` skips it. This means no audit trail for bulk stage moves.

---

**BUG #12: getColdDmsPaginated Doesn't Validate Range Parameters (Lines 501-502)**
**Severity: Low - Edge Case**

```typescript
static async getColdDmsPaginated(
  page: number,
  pageSize: number,
  ...
): Promise<{ data: SalesPipelineOpportunity[]; count: number }> {
  const from = (page - 1) * pageSize;
  const to = from + pageSize - 1;
  // No check if page is negative or 0
  // No check if pageSize is <= 0
}
```

If frontend accidentally passes page=0 or page=-1, the math produces negative `from`, which Supabase's `.range()` will silently handle (returns nothing or errors). Better to validate and return empty or throw.

---

## SUMMARY

**Critical bugs to fix immediately:**
1. Activity form fields not fully reset on slide-over switch (affects data integrity)
2. Meeting time format inconsistency (parsing failures)
3. Outreach owner filter state mismatch (UI inconsistency)

**Moderate bugs to fix:**
4. DnD position updates can fail silently
5. Bulk operations don't handle errors properly
6. Missing error messages and recovery paths

**Service layer audit:**
- Bulk operations bypass important logging (stage history)
- Edge cases in pagination not validated

   150→
   151→// ============================================
   152→// Sales Pipeline Service
   153→// ============================================
   154→
   155→export class SalesPipelineService {
   156→  // ----------------------------------------
   157→  // OPPORTUNITIES
   158→  // ----------------------------------------
   159→
   160→  static async getAll(): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity[]> {
   161→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   162→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   163→      .select(`
   164→        *,
   165→        affiliate:crm_affiliates(*),
   166→        client:clients!crm_opportunities_client_id_fkey(id, name)
   167→      `)
   168→      .in('stage', ALL_V2_STAGES)
   169→      .order('position', { ascending: true })
   170→      .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
   171→
   172→    if (error) {
   173→      console.error('Error fetching sales pipeline opportunities:', error);
   174→      throw error;
   175→    }
   176→    return (data || []) as SalesPipelineOpportunity[];
   177→  }
   178→
   179→  static async create(data: CreateSalesPipelineOpportunityData): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity> {
   180→    // Dedup check: name + tg_handle
   181→    if (data.name && data.tg_handle) {
   182→      const dedupKey = `${data.name.toLowerCase().trim()}::${data.tg_handle.toLowerCase().trim()}`;
   183→      const { data: existing } = await supabase
   184→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   185→        .select('id')
   186→        .eq('dedup_key', dedupKey)
   187→        .maybeSingle();
   188→
   189→      if (existing) {
   190→        throw new Error('A deal with this name and TG handle already exists');
   191→      }
   192→
   193→      (data as any).dedup_key = dedupKey;
   194→    }
   195→
   196→    const insertData = {
   197→      ...data,
   198→      stage: data.stage || 'cold_dm',
   199→    };
   200→
   201→    const { data: created, error } = await supabase
   202→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   203→      .insert([insertData])
   204→      .select()
   205→      .single();
   206→
   207→    if (error) throw error;
   208→
   209→    // Record stage history
   210→    await CRMService.recordStageHistory('opportunity', created.id, null, insertData.stage || 'cold_dm');
   211→
   212→    // Auto-calculate temperature score
   213→    await this.recalcTemperature(created.id);
   214→
   215→    return created as SalesPipelineOpportunity;
   216→  }
   217→
   218→  static async update(
   219→    id: string,
   220→    updates: Partial<CreateSalesPipelineOpportunityData> & {
   221→      warm_sub_state?: WarmSubState | null;
   222→      orbit_reason?: OrbitReason | null;
   223→      closed_lost_reason?: string | null;
   224→      next_meeting_at?: string | null;
   225→      next_meeting_type?: string | null;
   226→      bump_number?: number;
   227→      last_bump_date?: string | null;
   228→      bucket?: Bucket | null;
   229→      calendly_sent_via?: CalendlySentVia;
   230→      calendly_sent_date?: string | null;
   231→      calendly_booked_date?: string | null;
   232→      gc_opened?: string;
   233→    }
   234→  ): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity> {
   235→    // Get current state for stage history
   236→    const { data: current } = await supabase
   237→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   238→      .select('*')
   239→      .eq('id', id)
   240→      .single();
   241→
   242→    const updateData: any = { ...updates, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() };
   243→
   244→    // Auto-set timestamps on stage transitions
   245→    if (updates.stage && current) {
   246→      if (updates.stage === 'discovery_done' && !current.discovery_call_at) {
   247→        updateData.discovery_call_at = new Date().toISOString();
   248→      }
   249→      if (updates.stage === 'proposal_sent' && !current.proposal_sent_at) {
   250→        updateData.proposal_sent_at = new Date().toISOString();
   251→      }
   252→      if ((updates.stage === 'v2_closed_won' || updates.stage === 'v2_closed_lost') && !current.closed_at) {
   253→        updateData.closed_at = new Date().toISOString();
   254→      }
   255→    }
   256→
   257→    // Auto-set bucket_changed_at
   258→    if (updates.bucket && current && updates.bucket !== current.bucket) {
   259→      updateData.bucket_changed_at = new Date().toISOString();
   260→    }
   261→
   262→    const { data: updated, error } = await supabase
   263→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   264→      .update(updateData)
   265→      .eq('id', id)
   266→      .select()
   267→      .single();
   268→
   269→    if (error) throw error;
   270→
   271→    // Record stage change
   272→    if (updates.stage && current && current.stage !== updates.stage) {
   273→      await CRMService.recordStageHistory('opportunity', id, current.stage, updates.stage);
   274→    }
   275→
   276→    // Recalculate temperature score after stage/bucket/key field changes
   277→    await this.recalcTemperature(id);
   278→
   279→    return updated as SalesPipelineOpportunity;
   280→  }
   281→
   282→  static async delete(id: string): Promise<void> {
   283→    const { error } = await supabase
   284→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   285→      .delete()
   286→      .eq('id', id);
   287→
   288→    if (error) throw error;
   289→  }
   290→
   291→  // ----------------------------------------
   292→  // BUMPS
   293→  // ----------------------------------------
   294→
   295→  static async recordBump(id: string): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity> {
   296→    const { data: current } = await supabase
   297→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   298→      .select('bump_number')
   299→      .eq('id', id)
   300→      .single();
   301→
   302→    const newBumpNumber = (current?.bump_number || 0) + 1;
   303→
   304→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   305→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   306→      .update({
   307→        bump_number: newBumpNumber,
   308→        last_bump_date: new Date().toISOString(),
   309→        last_contacted_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   310→        updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   311→      })
   312→      .eq('id', id)
   313→      .select()
   314→      .single();
   315→
   316→    if (error) throw error;
   317→
   318→    // Also create a bump activity
   319→    await this.createActivity({
   320→      opportunity_id: id,
   321→      type: 'bump',
   322→      title: `Bump #${newBumpNumber}`,
   323→    });
   324→
   325→    // Recalculate temperature score
   326→    await this.recalcTemperature(id);
   327→
   328→    return data as SalesPipelineOpportunity;
   329→  }
   330→
   331→  static async reduceBump(id: string): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity> {
   332→    const { data: current } = await supabase
   333→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   334→      .select('bump_number')
   335→      .eq('id', id)
   336→      .single();
   337→
   338→    const newBumpNumber = Math.max((current?.bump_number || 0) - 1, 0);
   339→
   340→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   341→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   342→      .update({
   343→        bump_number: newBumpNumber,
   344→        updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   345→      })
   346→      .eq('id', id)
   347→      .select()
   348→      .single();
   349→
   350→    if (error) throw error;
   351→    return data as SalesPipelineOpportunity;
   352→  }
   353→
   354→  // ----------------------------------------
   355→  // ACTIVITIES
   356→  // ----------------------------------------
   357→
   358→  static async getActivities(opportunityId: string): Promise<CRMActivity[]> {
   359→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   360→      .from('crm_activities')
   361→      .select('*')
   362→      .eq('opportunity_id', opportunityId)
   363→      .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
   364→
   365→    if (error) throw error;
   366→    return data || [];
   367→  }
   368→
   369→  static async createActivity(activityData: CreateActivityData): Promise<CRMActivity> {
   370→    const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
   371→
   372→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   373→      .from('crm_activities')
   374→      .insert([{
   375→        ...activityData,
   376→        owner_id: user?.id || null,
   377→      }])
   378→      .select()
   379→      .single();
   380→
   381→    if (error) throw error;
   382→
   383→    // Recalculate temperature score (new activity affects engagement)
   384→    await this.recalcTemperature(activityData.opportunity_id);
   385→
   386→    return data;
   387→  }
   388→
   389→  // ----------------------------------------
   390→  // BAMFAM VIOLATIONS
   391→  // ----------------------------------------
   392→
   393→  static async getBAMFAMViolations(): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity[]> {
   394→    // BAMFAM: past discovery_done with no next_meeting or overdue next_meeting
   395→    const postDiscoveryStages: SalesPipelineStage[] = [
   396→      'discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract',
   397→    ];
   398→
   399→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   400→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   401→      .select(`
   402→        *,
   403→        affiliate:crm_affiliates(*),
   404→        client:clients!crm_opportunities_client_id_fkey(id, name)
   405→      `)
   406→      .in('stage', postDiscoveryStages)
   407→      .or('next_meeting_at.is.null,next_meeting_at.lt.' + new Date().toISOString());
   408→
   409→    if (error) throw error;
   410→    return (data || []) as SalesPipelineOpportunity[];
   411→  }
   412→
   413→  // ----------------------------------------
   414→  // STAGES HELPER
   415→  // ----------------------------------------
   416→
   417→  static getAvailableStages(dmAccount: DmAccount): SalesPipelineStage[] {
   418→    if (dmAccount === 'closer') return PATH_A_STAGES;
   419→    return PATH_B_STAGES;
   420→  }
   421→
   422→  // ----------------------------------------
   423→  // METRICS
   424→  // ----------------------------------------
   425→
   426→  static async getMetrics(): Promise<{
   427→    totalCount: number;
   428→    bucketA: number;
   429→    bucketB: number;
   430→    bucketC: number;
   431→    activeValue: number;
   432→    bamfamViolations: number;
   433→  }> {
   434→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   435→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   436→      .select('stage, bucket, deal_value, next_meeting_at')
   437→      .in('stage', ALL_V2_STAGES);
   438→
   439→    if (error) throw error;
   440→
   441→    const opps = data || [];
   442→    const activeStages = PIPELINE_STAGES;
   443→    const active = opps.filter(o => activeStages.includes(o.stage as SalesPipelineStage));
   444→
   445→    const postDiscovery = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'];
   446→    const now = new Date().toISOString();
   447→    const bamfam = opps.filter(o =>
   448→      postDiscovery.includes(o.stage) &&
   449→      (!o.next_meeting_at || o.next_meeting_at < now)
   450→    );
   451→
   452→    return {
   453→      totalCount: opps.length,
   454→      bucketA: opps.filter(o => o.bucket === 'A').length,
   455→      bucketB: opps.filter(o => o.bucket === 'B').length,
   456→      bucketC: opps.filter(o => o.bucket === 'C').length,
   457→      activeValue: active.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0), 0),
   458→      bamfamViolations: bamfam.length,
   459→    };
   460→  }
   461→
   462→  // ----------------------------------------
   463→  // POSITION UPDATES
   464→  // ----------------------------------------
   465→
   466→  static async updatePositions(positions: { id: string; position: number; stage?: OpportunityStage }[]): Promise<void> {
   467→    const updates = positions.map(({ id, position, stage }) => {
   468→      const updateData: any = { position, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() };
   469→      if (stage) updateData.stage = stage;
   470→      return supabase
   471→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   472→        .update(updateData)
   473→        .eq('id', id);
   474→    });
   475→
   476→    const results = await Promise.all(updates);
   477→    const errors = results.filter(r => r.error);
   478→    if (errors.length > 0) {
   479→      console.error('Errors updating positions:', errors);
   480→      throw errors[0].error;
   481→    }
   482→  }
   483→
   484→  // ----------------------------------------
   485→  // COLD DM PAGINATED (Outreach tab)
   486→  // ----------------------------------------
   487→
   488→  static async getColdDmsPaginated(
   489→    page: number,
   490→    pageSize: number,
   491→    filters: {
   492→      dm_account?: DmAccount;
   493→      bucket?: Bucket;
   494→      bumpRange?: 'none' | '1-2' | '3+';
   495→      searchTerm?: string;
   496→      sortBy?: string;
   497→      sortAsc?: boolean;
   498→      owner_id?: string;
   499→    }
   500→  ): Promise<{ data: SalesPipelineOpportunity[]; count: number }> {
   501→    const from = (page - 1) * pageSize;
   502→    const to = from + pageSize - 1;
   503→
   504→    let query = supabase
   505→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   506→      .select(`
   507→        *,
   508→        affiliate:crm_affiliates(*),
   509→        client:clients!crm_opportunities_client_id_fkey(id, name)
   510→      `, { count: 'exact' })
   511→      .eq('stage', 'cold_dm');
   512→
   513→    // Optional filters
   514→    if (filters.dm_account) {
   515→      query = query.eq('dm_account', filters.dm_account);
   516→    }
   517→    if (filters.bucket) {
   518→      query = query.eq('bucket', filters.bucket);
   519→    }
   520→    if (filters.searchTerm) {
   521→      query = query.ilike('name', `%${filters.searchTerm}%`);
   522→    }
   523→    if (filters.owner_id) {
   524→      query = query.eq('owner_id', filters.owner_id);
   525→    }
   526→    if (filters.bumpRange === 'none') {
   527→      query = query.eq('bump_number', 0);
   528→    } else if (filters.bumpRange === '1-2') {
   529→      query = query.gte('bump_number', 1).lte('bump_number', 2);
   530→    } else if (filters.bumpRange === '3+') {
   531→      query = query.gte('bump_number', 3);
   532→    }
   533→
   534→    // Sorting
   535→    const sortField = filters.sortBy || 'created_at';
   536→    const ascending = filters.sortAsc ?? false;
   537→    query = query.order(sortField, { ascending });
   538→
   539→    // Pagination
   540→    query = query.range(from, to);
   541→
   542→    const { data, error, count } = await query;
   543→
   544→    if (error) {
   545→      console.error('Error fetching cold DMs paginated:', error);
   546→      throw error;
   547→    }
   548→
   549→    return { data: (data || []) as SalesPipelineOpportunity[], count: count || 0 };
   550→  }
   551→
   552→  // ----------------------------------------
   553→  // BULK OPERATIONS
   554→  // ----------------------------------------
   555→
   556→  // ----------------------------------------
   557→  // TEMPERATURE SCORE
   558→  // ----------------------------------------
   559→
   560→  static async recalcTemperature(id: string): Promise<number | null> {
   561→    const { data, error } = await supabase.rpc('calculate_temperature_score', { opp_id: id });
   562→    if (error) {
   563→      console.error('Error recalculating temperature:', error);
   564→      return null;
   565→    }
   566→    return data;
   567→  }
   568→
   569→  static async recalcAllTemperatures(): Promise<number | null> {
   570→    const { data, error } = await supabase.rpc('recalculate_all_temperature_scores');
   571→    if (error) {
   572→      console.error('Error recalculating all temperatures:', error);
   573→      return null;
   574→    }
   575→    return data;
   576→  }
   577→
   578→  // ----------------------------------------
   579→  // BULK OPERATIONS
   580→  // ----------------------------------------
   581→
   582→  static async bulkRecordBump(ids: string[]): Promise<void> {
   583→    await Promise.all(ids.map(id => this.recordBump(id)));
   584→  }
   585→
   586→  static async bulkUpdateStage(ids: string[], stage: SalesPipelineStage): Promise<void> {
   587→    const now = new Date().toISOString();
   588→    const updates = ids.map(id =>
   589→      supabase
   590→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   591→        .update({ stage, updated_at: now })
   592→        .eq('id', id)
   593→    );
   594→
   595→    const results = await Promise.all(updates);
   596→    const errors = results.filter(r => r.error);
   597→    if (errors.length > 0) {
   598→      console.error('Errors in bulk stage update:', errors);
   599→      throw errors[0].error;
   600→    }
   601→  }
   602→
   603→  static async bulkDelete(ids: string[]): Promise<void> {
   604→    const deletes = ids.map(id =>
   605→      supabase
   606→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   607→        .delete()
   608→        .eq('id', id)
   609→    );
   610→
   611→    const results = await Promise.all(deletes);
   612→    const errors = results.filter(r => r.error);
   613→    if (errors.length > 0) {
   614→      console.error('Errors in bulk delete:', errors);
   615→      throw errors[0].error;
   616→    }
   617→  }
   618→}
   619→
```
</details></tool-use>

    77→function DroppableColumn({ id, children, className }: { id: string; children: React.ReactNode; className?: string }) {
    78→  const { setNodeRef, isOver } = useDroppable({ id });
    79→  return (
    80→    <div ref={setNodeRef} className={`${className} ${isOver ? 'ring-2 ring-blue-400 ring-offset-2' : ''}`}>
    81→      {children}
    82→    </div>
    83→  );
    84→}
    85→
    86→function SortableCard({ id, children }: { id: string; children: React.ReactNode }) {
    87→  const { attributes, listeners, setNodeRef, transform, transition, isDragging } = useSortable({ id });
    88→  const style = {
    89→    transform: CSS.Transform.toString(transform),
    90→    transition,
    91→    opacity: isDragging ? 0.5 : 1,
    92→  };
    93→  return (
    94→    <div ref={setNodeRef} style={style} {...attributes} {...listeners}>
    95→      {children}
    96→    </div>
    97→  );
    98→}
    99→
   100→function SortableTableRow({ id, children, className, onClick }: { id: string; children: React.ReactNode; className?: string; onClick?: () => void }) {
   101→  const { attributes, listeners, setNodeRef, transform, transition, isDragging } = useSortable({ id });
   102→  const style: React.CSSProperties = {
   103→    transform: CSS.Translate.toString(transform),
   104→    transition,
   105→    opacity: isDragging ? 0.5 : 1,
   106→    position: 'relative' as const,
   107→    zIndex: isDragging ? 1 : 0,
   108→  };
   109→  return (
   110→    <TableRow ref={setNodeRef} style={style} className={`${className || ''} ${isDragging ? 'bg-blue-50 shadow-lg' : ''}`} onClick={onClick}>
   111→      <TableCell className="w-10">
   112→        <div
   113→          {...attributes}
   114→          {...listeners}
   115→          className="cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing p-1 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded"
   116→          onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}
   117→        >
   118→          <GripVertical className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   119→        </div>
   120→      </TableCell>
   121→      {children}
   122→    </TableRow>
   123→  );
   124→}

   202→

   213→    type: ActivityType;
   214→    title: string;

   216→  } | null>(null);
