   220→    outcome: string;
   221→    next_step: string;
   222→    next_step_date?: string;
   223→    meeting_date?: string;
   224→    meeting_time?: string;
   225→  }>({ title: '', description: '', outcome: '', next_step: '' });
   226→  const [isActivityLogSubmitting, setIsActivityLogSubmitting] = useState(false);
   227→
   228→  // DnD sensors
   229→  const sensors = useSensors(
   230→    useSensor(PointerSensor, { activationConstraint: { distance: 8 } }),
   231→    useSensor(KeyboardSensor)
   232→  );
   233→
   234→  // ============================================
   235→  // Dashboard Metrics (computed from opportunities)
   236→  // ============================================
   237→
   238→  const dashboardMetrics = useMemo(() => {
   239→    const all = opportunities;
   240→    const pipelineActive = all.filter(o => PIPELINE_STAGES.includes(o.stage as SalesPipelineStage));
   241→    const closedWon = all.filter(o => o.stage === 'v2_closed_won');
   242→    const closedLost = all.filter(o => o.stage === 'v2_closed_lost');
   243→    const inOrbit = all.filter(o => o.stage === 'orbit');
   244→
   245→    // Stages past cold_dm = responded
   246→    const pastColdDm = all.filter(o => o.stage !== 'cold_dm');
   247→    const coldDmCount = outreachTotal > 0 ? outreachTotal : all.filter(o => o.stage === 'cold_dm').length;
   248→    const totalDmsSent = all.length; // every opp started as a DM
   249→    const responseRate = totalDmsSent > 0 ? (pastColdDm.length / totalDmsSent) * 100 : 0;
   250→
   251→    // Meetings booked = in booked or any stage after it
   252→    const bookedAndBeyond = ['booked', 'discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won'];
   253→    const meetingsBooked = all.filter(o => bookedAndBeyond.includes(o.stage)).length;
   254→
   255→    // Discovery calls = in discovery_done or later
   256→    const discoveryAndBeyond = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won'];
   257→    const discoveryCalls = all.filter(o => discoveryAndBeyond.includes(o.stage)).length;
   258→
   259→    // Close rate = won / (won + lost)
   260→    const totalClosed = closedWon.length + closedLost.length;
   261→    const closeRate = totalClosed > 0 ? (closedWon.length / totalClosed) * 100 : 0;
   262→
   263→    // Avg deal size (closed won)
   264→    const wonValues = closedWon.map(o => o.deal_value || 0).filter(v => v > 0);
   265→    const avgDealSize = wonValues.length > 0 ? wonValues.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / wonValues.length : 0;
   266→
   267→    // Avg close time (days from created_at to closed_at for won deals)
   268→    const closeTimes = closedWon
   269→      .filter(o => o.created_at && o.closed_at)
   270→      .map(o => (new Date(o.closed_at!).getTime() - new Date(o.created_at).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   271→    const avgCloseTime = closeTimes.length > 0 ? closeTimes.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / closeTimes.length : 0;
   272→
   273→    // Qualified % = bucket A + B / total
   274→    const qualifiedCount = all.filter(o => o.bucket === 'A' || o.bucket === 'B').length;
   275→    const qualifiedPct = all.length > 0 ? (qualifiedCount / all.length) * 100 : 0;
   276→
   277→    // Bucket A %
   278→    const bucketAPct = all.length > 0 ? (all.filter(o => o.bucket === 'A').length / all.length) * 100 : 0;
   279→
   280→    // Pipeline value (active)
   281→    const pipelineValue = pipelineActive.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0), 0);
   282→
   283→    // Overdue follow-ups
   284→    const now = new Date().toISOString();
   285→    const overdueFollowups = pipelineActive.filter(o =>
   286→      o.next_meeting_at && o.next_meeting_at < now
   287→    ).length;
   288→
   289→    // Proposals sent
   290→    const proposalsSent = all.filter(o =>
   291→      ['proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won'].includes(o.stage)
   292→    ).length;
   293→
   294→    // Alert metrics for manager cards
   295→    const nowDate = new Date();
   296→    const todayStart = new Date(nowDate.getFullYear(), nowDate.getMonth(), nowDate.getDate());
   297→    const weekEnd = new Date(todayStart.getTime() + 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
   298→    const meetingsThisWeek = pipelineActive.filter(o =>
   299→      o.next_meeting_at && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) >= todayStart && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) < weekEnd
   300→    ).length;
   301→    const meetingsToday = pipelineActive.filter(o =>
   302→      o.next_meeting_at && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) >= todayStart && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) < new Date(todayStart.getTime() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000)
   303→    ).length;
   304→
   305→    // Stale deals: active pipeline deals with no contact in 7+ days
   306→    const staleDeals = pipelineActive.filter(o => {
   307→      const lastDate = o.last_contacted_at || o.last_bump_date || o.created_at;
   308→      if (!lastDate) return true;
   309→      const daysSince = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(lastDate).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   310→      return daysSince >= 7;
   311→    }).length;
   312→
   313→    // Deals at risk: closing-stage deals (post-discovery) with temp < 40
   314→    const dealsAtRisk = all.filter(o =>
   315→      ['discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'].includes(o.stage) && o.temperature_score < 40
   316→    ).length;
   317→
   318→    // Total revenue (closed won value)
   319→    const totalRevenue = closedWon.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0), 0);
   320→
   321→    // Weighted pipeline = sum of (deal_value * stage_probability)
   322→    const stageProbability: Record<string, number> = {
   323→      cold_dm: 0.05, warm: 0.1, tg_intro: 0.15, booked: 0.25,
   324→      discovery_done: 0.4, proposal_sent: 0.6, proposal_call: 0.75, v2_contract: 0.9,
   325→    };
   326→    const weightedPipeline = pipelineActive.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0) * (stageProbability[o.stage] || 0.1), 0);
   327→
   328→    // Bottleneck analysis
   329→    const funnelStages: SalesPipelineStage[] = ['cold_dm', 'warm', 'tg_intro', 'booked', 'discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won'];
   330→    const stageOrder: Record<string, number> = {};
   331→    funnelStages.forEach((s, i) => { stageOrder[s] = i; });
   332→
   333→    // Count how many opps ever reached each stage (current stage or beyond)
   334→    const reachedStage = funnelStages.map(stage => {
   335→      const idx = stageOrder[stage];
   336→      // Opps currently at this stage or later (including orbit/lost which came from somewhere)
   337→      return all.filter(o => {
   338→        const oIdx = stageOrder[o.stage];
   339→        if (oIdx !== undefined) return oIdx >= idx;
   340→        // Orbit/lost — estimate their furthest stage from timestamps
   341→        if (o.stage === 'orbit' || o.stage === 'v2_closed_lost') {
   342→          if (o.proposal_sent_at && idx <= stageOrder['proposal_sent']) return true;
   343→          if (o.discovery_call_at && idx <= stageOrder['discovery_done']) return true;
   344→          if (o.calendly_booked_date && idx <= stageOrder['booked']) return true;
   345→          if (o.tg_handle && idx <= stageOrder['tg_intro']) return true;
   346→          if ((o.last_contacted_at || o.last_bump_date) && idx <= stageOrder['warm']) return true;
   347→          return idx <= stageOrder['cold_dm'];
   348→        }
   349→        return false;
   350→      }).length;
   351→    });
   352→
   353→    // Stage conversion rates (from one stage to the next)
   354→    const stageConversions = funnelStages.slice(0, -1).map((stage, i) => {
   355→      const from = reachedStage[i];
   356→      const to = reachedStage[i + 1];
   357→      const rate = from > 0 ? (to / from) * 100 : 0;
   358→      const dropoff = from - to;
   359→      return { stage, nextStage: funnelStages[i + 1], from, to, rate, dropoff };
   360→    });
   361→
   362→    // Avg days in current stage (for active pipeline deals)
   363→    const avgDaysInStage = funnelStages.slice(0, -1).map(stage => {
   364→      const oppsInStage = pipelineActive.filter(o => o.stage === stage);
   365→      if (oppsInStage.length === 0) return { stage, avgDays: 0, count: 0 };
   366→      const totalDays = oppsInStage.reduce((sum, o) => {
   367→        const days = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(o.updated_at).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   368→        return sum + days;
   369→      }, 0);
   370→      return { stage, avgDays: Math.round(totalDays / oppsInStage.length), count: oppsInStage.length };
   371→    });
   372→
   373→    // Identify the biggest bottleneck: stage with lowest conversion rate (min 3 opps entering)
   374→    const significantConversions = stageConversions.filter(c => c.from >= 3);
   375→    const worstConversion = significantConversions.length > 0
   376→      ? significantConversions.reduce((worst, c) => c.rate < worst.rate ? c : worst)
   377→      : null;
   378→
   379→    // Identify the slowest stage: where deals sit the longest
   380→    const significantStages = avgDaysInStage.filter(s => s.count >= 2);
   381→    const slowestStage = significantStages.length > 0
   382→      ? significantStages.reduce((slowest, s) => s.avgDays > slowest.avgDays ? s : slowest)
   383→      : null;
   384→
   385→    return {
   386→      totalDmsSent,
   387→      responseRate,
   388→      meetingsBooked,
   389→      discoveryCalls,
   390→      closeRate,
   391→      avgDealSize,
   392→      avgCloseTime,
   393→      qualifiedPct,
   394→      bucketAPct,
   395→      pipelineValue,
   396→      activeDeals: pipelineActive.length,
   397→      overdueFollowups,
   398→      bamfamViolations: metrics.bamfamViolations,
   399→      closedWon: closedWon.length,
```
</details></tool-use>

   417→  // ============================================

   421→  const fetchData = useCallback(async () => {

   424→        SalesPipelineService.getAll(),
   425→        CRMService.getAllAffiliates(),

   434→      setOutreachAllTotal(outreachCount.count);

   439→    }
   440→  }, []);
   441→
   442→  useEffect(() => { fetchData(); }, [fetchData]);
   443→
   444→  const fetchActivities = async (oppId: string) => {
   445→    try {
   446→      const acts = await SalesPipelineService.getActivities(oppId);
   447→      setActivities(acts);
   448→    } catch (err) {
   449→      console.error('Error fetching activities:', err);

   451→  };
   452→
   453→  // Outreach data fetching
   454→  const fetchOutreach = useCallback(async () => {
   455→    setOutreachLoading(true);
   456→    try {
   457→      const resolvedFilters = {
   458→        ...outreachFilters,
   459→        owner_id: outreachFilters.owner_id === 'mine' ? (user?.id || undefined) : outreachFilters.owner_id,
   460→      };
   461→      const [result, allResult] = await Promise.all([
   462→        SalesPipelineService.getColdDmsPaginated(outreachPage, OUTREACH_PAGE_SIZE, resolvedFilters),
   463→        SalesPipelineService.getColdDmsPaginated(1, 1, {}),
   464→      ]);
   465→      setOutreachOpps(result.data);
   466→      setOutreachTotal(result.count);
   467→      setOutreachAllTotal(allResult.count);
   468→    } catch (err) {
   469→      console.error('Error fetching outreach:', err);
   470→    } finally {
   471→      setOutreachLoading(false);
   472→    }
   473→  }, [outreachPage, outreachFilters, user?.id]);
   474→
   475→  useEffect(() => {
   476→    if (activeTab === 'outreach') {
   477→      fetchOutreach();
   478→    }
   479→  }, [activeTab, fetchOutreach]);
   480→
   481→  // ============================================
   482→  // Filtered Opportunities
   483→  // ============================================
   484→
   485→  const filteredOpportunities = opportunities.filter(opp => {
   486→    if (searchTerm && !opp.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase())) return false;
   487→    if (pathFilter === 'closer' && opp.dm_account !== 'closer') return false;
   488→    if (pathFilter === 'sdr' && opp.dm_account !== 'sdr') return false;
   489→    return true;
   490→  });
   491→
   492→  const getStageOpps = (stage: SalesPipelineStage) =>
   493→    filteredOpportunities.filter(o => o.stage === stage).sort((a, b) => a.position - b.position);
   494→
   495→  const visiblePipelineStages = (pathFilter === 'closer' ? PATH_A_STAGES : PIPELINE_STAGES).filter(s => s !== 'cold_dm');
   496→
   497→  const orbitOpps = filteredOpportunities.filter(o => o.stage === 'orbit');
   498→  const orbitByReason = ORBIT_REASONS.map(r => ({
   499→    ...r,
   500→    opps: orbitOpps.filter(o => o.orbit_reason === r.value),
   501→  }));
   502→
   503→  // ============================================
   504→  // CRUD Handlers
   505→  // ============================================
   506→
   507→  const handleCreate = async () => {
   508→    if (!form.name.trim()) return;
   509→    setIsSubmitting(true);
   510→    try {
   511→      await SalesPipelineService.create({ ...form, stage: form.stage || ('cold_dm' as OpportunityStage) });
   512→      setIsCreateOpen(false);
   513→      setForm({ name: '' });
   514→      await fetchData();
   515→    } catch (err: any) {
   516→      alert(err.message || 'Error creating opportunity');
   517→    } finally {
   518→      setIsSubmitting(false);
   519→    }
   520→  };
   521→
   522→  const handleUpdate = async () => {
   523→    if (!editingOpp || !form.name.trim()) return;
   524→    setIsSubmitting(true);
   525→    try {
   526→      await SalesPipelineService.update(editingOpp.id, form);
   527→      setSlideOverMode('view');
   528→      setEditingOpp(null);
   529→      setForm({ name: '' });
   530→      await fetchData();
   531→    } catch (err: any) {
   532→      alert(err.message || 'Error updating opportunity');
   533→    } finally {
   534→      setIsSubmitting(false);
   535→    }
   536→  };
   537→
   538→  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
   539→    if (!confirm('Delete this opportunity?')) return;
   540→    try {
   541→      await SalesPipelineService.delete(id);
   542→      if (slideOverOpp?.id === id) setSlideOverOpp(null);
   543→      await fetchData();
   544→      if (activeTab === 'outreach') await fetchOutreach();
   545→    } catch (err) {
   546→      console.error('Error deleting:', err);
   547→    }
   548→  };
   549→
   550→  const handleStageChange = async (oppId: string, newStage: SalesPipelineStage, currentStage: string) => {
   551→    const oppName = opportunities.find(o => o.id === oppId)?.name || '';
   552→    if (newStage === 'orbit') {

   557→      setClosedLostPrompt({ oppId, oppName, fromStage: currentStage });
   558→      return;
   559→    }

   561→      await SalesPipelineService.update(oppId, { stage: newStage as OpportunityStage });

   563→      if (activeTab === 'outreach') await fetchOutreach();
   564→    } catch (err) {
   565→      console.error('Error changing stage:', err);
   566→    }
   567→  };
   568→
   569→  const confirmOrbit = async () => {
   570→    if (!orbitPrompt) return;
   571→    const { oppId, oppName } = orbitPrompt;
   572→    const reasonLabel = ORBIT_REASONS.find(r => r.value === orbitReasonValue)?.label || orbitReasonValue;
   573→    try {
   574→      await SalesPipelineService.update(oppId, {
   575→        stage: 'orbit' as OpportunityStage,
   576→        orbit_reason: orbitReasonValue,
   577→      });
   578→      setOrbitPrompt(null);
   579→      setOrbitReasonValue('no_response');
   580→      await fetchData();
   581→      // Open activity log popup
   582→      openActivityLogPrompt(oppId, oppName, 'note', `Moved to orbit — ${reasonLabel}`);
   583→    } catch (err) {
   584→      console.error('Error moving to orbit:', err);
   585→    }
   586→  };
   587→
   588→  const confirmClosedLost = async () => {
   589→    if (!closedLostPrompt) return;
   590→    const { oppId, oppName } = closedLostPrompt;
   591→    try {
   592→      await SalesPipelineService.update(oppId, {
   593→        stage: 'v2_closed_lost' as OpportunityStage,
   594→        closed_lost_reason: closedLostReasonValue || undefined,
   595→      });
   596→      setClosedLostPrompt(null);
   597→      setClosedLostReasonValue('');
   598→      await fetchData();
   599→      // Open activity log popup

   607→  const handleResurrect = async (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
   608→    try {
   609→      await SalesPipelineService.update(opp.id, {
   610→        stage: 'cold_dm' as OpportunityStage,
   611→        orbit_reason: null,
   612→      });
   613→      await fetchData();
   614→    } catch (err) {
   615→      console.error('Error resurrecting:', err);
   616→    }
   617→  };
   618→
   619→  const handleRecordBump = async (oppId: string) => {
   620→    if (isBumping) return;
   621→    setIsBumping(true);
   622→    // Optimistic update — immediately reflect in UI
   623→    setOpportunities(prev => prev.map(o =>
   624→      o.id === oppId ? { ...o, bump_number: o.bump_number + 1, last_bump_date: new Date().toISOString() } : o
   625→    ));
   626→    try {
   627→      await SalesPipelineService.recordBump(oppId);
   628→      await fetchData();
   629→      if (activeTab === 'outreach') await fetchOutreach();
   630→      if (slideOverOpp?.id === oppId) {
   631→        await fetchActivities(oppId);
   632→      }
   633→    } catch (err) {
   634→      console.error('Error recording bump:', err);
   635→      await fetchData(); // revert on error
   636→    } finally {
   637→      setIsBumping(false);
   638→    }
   639→  };
   640→
   641→  const handleReduceBump = async (oppId: string) => {
   642→    if (isBumping) return;
   643→    setIsBumping(true);
   644→    // Optimistic update
   645→    setOpportunities(prev => prev.map(o =>
   646→      o.id === oppId ? { ...o, bump_number: Math.max(o.bump_number - 1, 0) } : o
   647→    ));
   648→    try {
   649→      await SalesPipelineService.reduceBump(oppId);
   650→      await fetchData();
   651→    } catch (err) {
   652→      console.error('Error reducing bump:', err);
   653→      await fetchData(); // revert on error
   654→    } finally {
   655→      setIsBumping(false);
   656→    }
   657→  };
   658→
   659→  const handleAddActivity = async () => {
   660→    if (!activityForm.title.trim() || !slideOverOpp) return;
   661→    setIsActivitySubmitting(true);
   662→    try {
   663→      await SalesPipelineService.createActivity({
   664→        ...activityForm,
   665→        opportunity_id: slideOverOpp.id,
   666→      });
   667→      // If meeting type with a date set, update next_meeting_at
   668→      if (activityForm.type === 'meeting' && activityMeetingDate) {
   669→        const meetingDate = new Date(activityMeetingDate);
   670→        if (activityMeetingTime) {
   671→          const [h, m] = activityMeetingTime.split(':').map(Number);
   672→          meetingDate.setHours(h, m, 0, 0);
   673→        }
   674→        await SalesPipelineService.update(slideOverOpp.id, { next_meeting_at: meetingDate.toISOString() });
   675→        await fetchData();
   676→      }
   677→      setActivityForm({ opportunity_id: '', type: 'note', title: '' });
   678→      setActivityMeetingDate(undefined);
   679→      setActivityMeetingTime(undefined);
   680→      await fetchActivities(slideOverOpp.id);
   681→    } catch (err) {
   682→      console.error('Error adding activity:', err);
   683→    } finally {
   684→      setIsActivitySubmitting(false);
   685→    }
   686→  };
   687→
   688→  const handleInlineEdit = async (oppId: string, field: string, value: string) => {
   689→    try {
   690→      const updates: any = {};
   691→      if (field === 'deal_value') {
   692→        updates.deal_value = value ? parseFloat(value) : null;
   693→      } else if (field === 'temperature_score') {
   694→        updates.temperature_score = parseInt(value) || 50;
   695→      } else {
   696→        updates[field] = value || null;
   697→      }
   698→      await SalesPipelineService.update(oppId, updates);
   699→      await fetchData();
   700→    } catch (err) {
   701→      console.error('Error inline edit:', err);
   702→    }
   703→    setEditingCell(null);
   704→  };
   705→
   706→  const handleRecalculateAll = async () => {
   707→    setIsRecalculating(true);
   708→    try {
   709→      await SalesPipelineService.recalcAllTemperatures();
   710→      await fetchData();
   711→      if (activeTab === 'outreach') await fetchOutreach();
   712→    } catch (err) {
   713→      console.error('Error recalculating temperatures:', err);
   714→    } finally {
   715→      setIsRecalculating(false);
   716→    }
   717→  };
   718→
   719→  // ============================================
   720→  // DnD Handlers
   721→  // ============================================
   722→
   723→  const handleDragStart = (event: DragStartEvent) => {
   724→    const id = event.active.id as string;
   725→    setActiveId(id);
   726→    setActiveOpportunity(opportunities.find(o => o.id === id) || null);
   727→  };
   728→
   729→  const handleDragEnd = async (event: DragEndEvent) => {
   730→    const { active, over } = event;
   731→    setActiveId(null);
   732→    setActiveOpportunity(null);
   733→
   734→    if (!over) return;
   735→
   736→    const oppId = active.id as string;
   737→    const overId = over.id as string;
   738→    const opp = opportunities.find(o => o.id === oppId);
   739→    if (!opp) return;
   740→
   741→    // Check if dropped on a stage column
   742→    const isStageColumn = ALL_V2_STAGES.includes(overId as SalesPipelineStage);
   743→
   744→    if (isStageColumn) {
   745→      const newStage = overId as SalesPipelineStage;
   746→      if (opp.stage !== newStage) {
   747→        await handleStageChange(oppId, newStage, opp.stage);
   748→      }
   749→    } else {
   750→      // Dropped on another card — reorder within same stage
   751→      const targetOpp = opportunities.find(o => o.id === overId);
   752→      if (targetOpp && targetOpp.stage === opp.stage) {
   753→        const stageOpps = getStageOpps(opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage);
   754→        const oldIndex = stageOpps.findIndex(o => o.id === oppId);
   755→        const newIndex = stageOpps.findIndex(o => o.id === overId);
   756→        if (oldIndex !== -1 && newIndex !== -1) {
   757→          const reordered = arrayMove(stageOpps, oldIndex, newIndex);
   758→          const positions = reordered.map((o, i) => ({ id: o.id, position: i }));
   759→          await SalesPipelineService.updatePositions(positions);
   760→          await fetchData();
   761→        }
   762→      } else if (targetOpp && targetOpp.stage !== opp.stage) {
   763→        // Dropped on card in different stage
   764→        await handleStageChange(oppId, targetOpp.stage as SalesPipelineStage, opp.stage);
   765→      }
   766→    }
   767→  };
   768→
   769→  // ============================================
   770→  // Open slide-over
   771→  // ============================================
   772→
   773→  const openSlideOver = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity, guidance?: { label: string; hint: string }) => {
   774→    setSlideOverOpp(opp);
   775→    setSlideOverMode('view');
   776→    setActionGuidance(guidance || null);
   777→    fetchActivities(opp.id);
   778→    setActivityForm({ opportunity_id: opp.id, type: 'note', title: '' });
   779→    setActivityMeetingDate(undefined);
   780→    setActivityMeetingTime(undefined);
   781→  };
   782→
   783→  const populateForm = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
   784→    setForm({
   785→      name: opp.name,
   786→      dm_account: opp.dm_account,
   787→      bucket: opp.bucket || undefined,
   788→      temperature_score: opp.temperature_score,
   789→      source: opp.source || undefined,
   790→      tg_handle: opp.tg_handle || undefined,
   791→      owner_id: opp.owner_id || undefined,
   792→      referrer: opp.referrer || undefined,
   793→      affiliate_id: opp.affiliate_id || undefined,
   794→      deal_value: opp.deal_value || undefined,
   795→      currency: opp.currency,
   796→      next_meeting_at: opp.next_meeting_at || undefined,
   797→      next_meeting_type: opp.next_meeting_type || undefined,
   798→      notes: opp.notes || undefined,
   799→    });
```
</details></tool-use>

   800→  };

   826→  const isBAMFAM = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
   827→    const postDiscovery: SalesPipelineStage[] = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'];
   828→    if (!postDiscovery.includes(opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage)) return false;
   829→    if (!opp.next_meeting_at) return true;
   830→    return new Date(opp.next_meeting_at) < new Date();
   831→  };
   832→
   833→  // ============================================
   834→  // Actions Tab: getNextAction helper
   835→  // ============================================
   836→
   837→  type ActionPriority = 'urgent' | 'high' | 'medium' | 'low' | 'wait';
   838→  type ActionExecutionType = 'bump' | 'stage_change' | 'open_detail' | 'none';
   839→
   840→  type ActionAlternative = { label: string; actionType: ActionExecutionType; targetStage?: SalesPipelineStage; variant: 'default' | 'warn' | 'danger'; quick?: boolean };
   841→
   842→  const getNextAction = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity): {
   843→    label: string;
   844→    hint: string;
   845→    priority: ActionPriority;
   846→    actionType: ActionExecutionType;
   847→    targetStage?: SalesPipelineStage;
   848→    isActionable: boolean;
   849→    sortScore: number;
   850→    alternatives: ActionAlternative[];
   851→  } => {
   852→    const postDiscovery: SalesPipelineStage[] = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'];
   853→
   854→    // BAMFAM violation — any post-discovery stage with no future meeting
   855→    // For discovery_done without proposal, show both BAMFAM + Send Proposal context
   856→    if (postDiscovery.includes(opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage)) {
   857→      const hasFutureMeeting = opp.next_meeting_at && new Date(opp.next_meeting_at) > new Date();
   858→      if (!hasFutureMeeting) {
   859→        // Fix #4: discovery_done without proposal — show Send Proposal as primary, BAMFAM as hint

   861→          return { label: 'Send Proposal', hint: 'Draft & send proposal. Also book a follow-up meeting (BAMFAM).', priority: 'urgent', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'proposal_sent', isActionable: true, sortScore: 1, alternatives: [
   862→            { label: 'Book Meeting', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },
   863→            { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
   864→          ]};
   865→        }
   866→        return { label: 'Book Next Meeting!', hint: 'No future meeting set — DM to schedule', priority: 'urgent', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 1, alternatives: [
   867→          { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
   868→          { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
   869→        ]};
   870→      }
   871→    }
   872→
   873→    switch (opp.stage) {

   877→          { label: 'Signed!', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_won', variant: 'default', quick: true },
   878→          { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
   879→        ]};
   880→
   881→      case 'proposal_call':
   882→        return { label: 'To Contract', hint: 'Handle objections → move to contract', priority: 'urgent', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_contract', isActionable: true, sortScore: 3, alternatives: [
   883→          { label: 'Follow Up', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },
   884→          { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
   885→        ]};
   886→
   887→      case 'cold_dm': {
   888→        if (opp.bump_number >= 4) {
   889→          return { label: 'Review → Orbit', hint: '4 bumps sent, no reply — shelve or orbit', priority: 'medium', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', isActionable: true, sortScore: 50, alternatives: [
   890→            { label: 'Replied!', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'warm', variant: 'default', quick: true },
   891→            { label: 'Keep Bumping', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },
   892→          ]};
   893→        }
   894→        const bumpAlts: ActionAlternative[] = [
   895→          { label: 'Replied!', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'warm', variant: 'default', quick: true },
   896→          { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
   897→        ];
   898→        // Fix #6: bump_number=0 but has last_bump_date (was reduced) — show "Bump" not "Send First DM"
   899→        if (opp.bump_number === 0 && !opp.last_bump_date) {
   900→          return { label: 'Send First DM', hint: 'Send intro DM on IG/X', priority: 'high', actionType: 'bump', isActionable: true, sortScore: 10, alternatives: bumpAlts };
   901→        }
   902→        if (opp.last_bump_date) {
   903→          const daysSince = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(opp.last_bump_date).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   904→          if (daysSince >= 3) {
   905→            return { label: `Bump #${opp.bump_number + 1}`, hint: `Last bump ${daysSince}d ago — send follow-up DM`, priority: 'high', actionType: 'bump', isActionable: true, sortScore: 11, alternatives: bumpAlts };
   906→          }
   907→          const daysLeft = 3 - daysSince;
   908→          return { label: `Wait ${daysLeft}d`, hint: 'Too soon to bump again', priority: 'wait', actionType: 'none', isActionable: false, sortScore: 100, alternatives: [] };
   909→        }
   910→        return { label: `Bump #${opp.bump_number + 1}`, hint: 'Send follow-up DM', priority: 'high', actionType: 'bump', isActionable: true, sortScore: 11, alternatives: bumpAlts };
   911→      }
   912→
   913→      // Fix #3: warm/interested — open detail to enter TG handle first, "Got TG!" is quick alt after

   926→      case 'tg_intro':

   928→          { label: 'Follow Up', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },
   929→          { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
   930→        ]};
   931→
   932→      // Fix #1: booked with meeting — check if meeting is future vs past
   933→      case 'booked': {
   934→        if (!opp.next_meeting_at) {
   935→          return { label: 'Schedule Meeting', hint: 'Set the meeting date & time', priority: 'high', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 16, alternatives: [
   936→            { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
   937→          ]};
   938→        }
   939→        const meetingInFuture = new Date(opp.next_meeting_at) > new Date();
   940→        if (meetingInFuture) {
   941→          return { label: 'Prep for Meeting', hint: 'Review notes & prep talking points before the call', priority: 'low', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 60, alternatives: [
   942→            { label: 'Reschedule', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },
   943→            { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
   944→          ]};
   945→        }
   946→        // Meeting is in the past — call should have happened
   947→        return { label: 'Discovery Done', hint: 'Meeting happened — mark discovery complete', priority: 'high', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'discovery_done', isActionable: true, sortScore: 12, alternatives: [
   948→          { label: 'Reschedule', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },
   949→          // Fix #5: No Show opens slide-over instead of auto-orbiting
   950→          { label: 'No Show', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'warn' },
   951→        ]};
   952→      }
   953→
   954→      case 'discovery_done':
   955→        if (!opp.proposal_sent_at) {
   956→          return { label: 'Send Proposal', hint: 'Draft & send pricing proposal', priority: 'high', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'proposal_sent', isActionable: true, sortScore: 14, alternatives: [
   957→            { label: 'Need More Info', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },
   958→            { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
   959→          ]};
   960→        }
   961→        return { label: 'Follow Up Proposal', hint: 'Check if they reviewed the proposal', priority: 'high', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 19, alternatives: [
   962→          { label: 'Call Set', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'proposal_call', variant: 'default', quick: true },
   963→          { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
   964→        ]};
   965→
   966→      case 'proposal_sent':
   967→        return { label: 'Follow Up Proposal', hint: 'Check if they reviewed the proposal', priority: 'high', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 19, alternatives: [
   968→          { label: 'Call Set', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'proposal_call', variant: 'default', quick: true },
   969→          { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
   970→        ]};
   971→
   972→      case 'orbit': {
   973→        const daysSinceCreated = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(opp.created_at).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   974→        if (daysSinceCreated > 90) {
   975→          return { label: 'Resurrect', hint: '90+ days — re-engage or mark lost', priority: 'low', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 70, alternatives: [
   976→            { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
   977→          ]};
   978→        }
   979→        return { label: 'In Orbit', hint: '', priority: 'wait', actionType: 'none', isActionable: false, sortScore: 100, alternatives: [] };
   980→      }
   981→
   982→      default:
   983→        return { label: '—', hint: '', priority: 'wait', actionType: 'none', isActionable: false, sortScore: 100, alternatives: [] };
   984→    }
   985→  };
   986→
   987→  // ============================================
   988→  // Actions Tab: Derived action items
   989→  // ============================================
   990→
   991→  const PRE_DISCOVERY_STAGES = ['cold_dm', 'warm', 'tg_intro', 'booked'];
   992→  const POST_DISCOVERY_STAGES = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'];
   993→
   994→  const actionItems = useMemo(() => {
   995→    const terminalStages = ['v2_closed_won', 'v2_closed_lost'];
   996→    return opportunities
   997→      .filter(opp => !terminalStages.includes(opp.stage))
   998→      .map(opp => ({ opp, action: getNextAction(opp) }))
   999→      .filter(({ action }) => action.isActionable)

```text
  1000→      .filter(({ opp, action }) => {
  1001→        if (actionFilter === 'mine') return opp.owner_id === user?.id;
  1002→        if (actionFilter === 'urgent') return action.priority === 'urgent';
  1003→        return true;
  1004→      })
  1005→      .sort((a, b) => {

  1007→        return (b.opp.temperature_score || 0) - (a.opp.temperature_score || 0);
  1008→      });
  1009→  }, [opportunities, actionFilter, user?.id]);
  1010→
  1011→  const outreachActions = useMemo(() => actionItems.filter(({ opp }) => PRE_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage)), [actionItems]);
  1012→  const closingActions = useMemo(() => actionItems.filter(({ opp }) => POST_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage) || opp.stage === 'orbit'), [actionItems]);
  1013→  const displayedActions = useMemo(() => actionPhaseFilter === 'outreach' ? outreachActions : actionPhaseFilter === 'closing' ? closingActions : actionItems, [actionPhaseFilter, outreachActions, closingActions, actionItems]);
  1014→
  1015→  // ============================================
  1016→  // Actions Tab: Execute handler
  1017→  // ============================================
  1018→
  1019→  const ACTION_GUIDANCE: Record<string, { label: string; hint: string }> = {
  1020→    'Book Next Meeting!': { label: 'Book Next Meeting', hint: 'Click the pencil icon (Edit) → set the Next Meeting date field. No deal should exist without a future meeting (BAMFAM).' },
  1021→    'Book Meeting': { label: 'Book Meeting', hint: 'Click the pencil icon (Edit) → set the Next Meeting date field to stay BAMFAM-compliant.' },
  1022→    'Get TG Handle': { label: 'Get TG Handle', hint: 'DM them asking for their Telegram handle, then click Edit → fill in the TG Handle field. Once entered, click "Got TG!" to advance.' },
  1023→    'Follow Up': { label: 'Follow Up', hint: 'Send a follow-up DM. After messaging, log it as an activity below so the team knows.' },
  1024→    'Schedule Meeting': { label: 'Schedule Meeting', hint: 'Send Calendly or propose a time. Click the pencil icon (Edit) → set the Next Meeting date field once confirmed.' },
  1025→    'Prep for Meeting': { label: 'Prep for Meeting', hint: 'Review their notes, bucket, and past activity below. Update Notes with talking points before the call.' },
  1026→    'Follow Up Proposal': { label: 'Follow Up Proposal', hint: 'Message them to check if they reviewed the proposal. Log their response as an activity below.' },
  1027→    'Need More Info': { label: 'Need More Info', hint: 'They need more details before a proposal. Add notes on what they need, then follow up.' },
  1028→    'Resurrect': { label: 'Resurrect Check', hint: 'It\'s been 90+ days. Review their notes — DM to re-engage, or move to Lost if no longer viable.' },
  1029→    'Chase Signature': { label: 'Chase Signature', hint: 'Follow up on the contract. Once they sign, use the "Signed!" button to close the deal.' },
  1030→    'Reschedule': { label: 'Reschedule Meeting', hint: 'Meeting needs rescheduling. Click the pencil icon (Edit) → update the Next Meeting date field.' },
  1031→    'No Show': { label: 'No Show', hint: 'They didn\'t show up. Log a "No Show" activity below and decide whether to reschedule or orbit.' },
  1032→    'Keep Bumping': { label: 'Keep Bumping', hint: 'Override the orbit suggestion — review notes and continue follow-up DMs.' },
  1033→  };
  1034→
  1035→  const openActivityLogPrompt = (oppId: string, oppName: string, type: ActivityType, title: string, showMeetingPicker?: boolean) => {
  1036→    setActivityLogPrompt({ oppId, oppName, type, title, showMeetingPicker });
  1037→    setActivityLogForm({ title, description: '', outcome: '', next_step: '', meeting_date: undefined, meeting_time: undefined, next_step_date: undefined });
  1038→  };
  1039→
  1040→  const handleActionExecute = async (oppId: string, action: ReturnType<typeof getNextAction>, opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
  1041→    setExecutingAction(oppId);
  1042→    try {
  1043→      if (action.actionType === 'bump') {
  1044→        await handleRecordBump(oppId);
  1045→        // Show activity log popup after bump
  1046→        const bumpTitle = action.label === 'Send First DM' ? 'First DM sent' : `${action.label} sent`;
  1047→        openActivityLogPrompt(oppId, opp.name, 'message', bumpTitle);
  1048→      } else if (action.actionType === 'stage_change' && action.targetStage) {
  1049→        await handleStageChange(oppId, action.targetStage, opp.stage);
  1050→        // Show activity log popup after stage change (skip orbit/closed_lost — they have their own prompts)
  1051→        const stageActivityMap: Record<string, { type: ActivityType; title: string; showMeetingPicker?: boolean }> = {
  1052→          'warm': { type: 'message', title: 'KOL replied' },
  1053→          'tg_intro': { type: 'message', title: 'Got TG handle' },
  1054→          'booked': { type: 'meeting', title: 'Meeting booked', showMeetingPicker: true },
  1055→          'discovery_done': { type: 'meeting', title: 'Discovery call completed' },
  1056→          'proposal_sent': { type: 'proposal', title: 'Proposal sent' },
  1057→          'proposal_call': { type: 'call', title: 'Proposal call set' },
  1058→          'v2_contract': { type: 'call', title: 'Moving to contract' },
  1059→          'v2_closed_won': { type: 'note', title: 'Deal closed won!' },
  1060→        };
  1061→        const mapping = stageActivityMap[action.targetStage];
  1062→        if (mapping) {
  1063→          openActivityLogPrompt(oppId, opp.name, mapping.type, mapping.title, mapping.showMeetingPicker);
  1064→        }
  1065→      } else {
  1066→        // open_detail actions
  1067→        if (action.label === 'Book Next Meeting!' || action.label === 'Schedule Meeting') {
  1068→          openActivityLogPrompt(oppId, opp.name, 'meeting', 'Meeting scheduled', true);
  1069→        } else {
  1070→          const guidance = ACTION_GUIDANCE[action.label];
  1071→          openSlideOver(opp, guidance);
  1072→        }
  1073→      }
  1074→    } finally {
  1075→      setExecutingAction(null);
  1076→    }
  1077→  };
  1078→
  1079→  const confirmActivityLog = async () => {
  1080→    if (!activityLogPrompt) return;
  1081→    setIsActivityLogSubmitting(true);
  1082→    try {
  1083→      // Create the activity
  1084→      await SalesPipelineService.createActivity({
  1085→        opportunity_id: activityLogPrompt.oppId,
  1086→        type: activityLogPrompt.type,
  1087→        title: activityLogForm.title || activityLogPrompt.title,
  1088→        description: activityLogForm.description || undefined,
  1089→        outcome: activityLogForm.outcome || undefined,
  1090→        next_step: activityLogForm.next_step || undefined,
  1091→        next_step_date: activityLogForm.next_step_date || undefined,
  1092→      });
  1093→      // If meeting picker was shown and a date was set, update next_meeting_at
  1094→      if (activityLogPrompt.showMeetingPicker && activityLogForm.meeting_date) {
  1095→        const meetingDate = new Date(activityLogForm.meeting_date);
  1096→        if (activityLogForm.meeting_time) {
  1097→          const [h, m] = activityLogForm.meeting_time.split(':').map(Number);
  1098→          meetingDate.setHours(h, m, 0, 0);
  1099→        }
  1100→        await SalesPipelineService.update(activityLogPrompt.oppId, { next_meeting_at: meetingDate.toISOString() });
  1101→      }
  1102→      setActivityLogPrompt(null);
  1103→      setActivityLogForm({ title: '', description: '', outcome: '', next_step: '', meeting_date: undefined, meeting_time: undefined, next_step_date: undefined });
  1104→      await fetchData();
  1105→      if (activeTab === 'outreach') await fetchOutreach();
  1106→    } catch (err) {
  1107→      console.error('Error logging activity:', err);
  1108→    } finally {
  1109→      setIsActivityLogSubmitting(false);
  1110→    }
  1111→  };
  1112→
  1113→  // ============================================
  1114→  // Helpers
  1115→  // ============================================
  1116→
  1117→  const getUserName = (userId: string | null) => {
  1118→    if (!userId) return '—';
  1119→    const u = users.find(u => u.id === userId);
  1120→    return u?.name || u?.email || '—';
  1121→  };
  1122→
  1123→  const activityIcon = (type: ActivityType) => {
  1124→    switch (type) {
  1125→      case 'call': return <Phone className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
  1126→      case 'message': return <MessageSquare className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
  1127→      case 'meeting': return <Calendar className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
  1128→      case 'proposal': return <FileText className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
  1129→      case 'note': return <StickyNote className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
  1130→      case 'bump': return <Zap className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
  1131→    }
  1132→  };
  1133→
  1134→  // ============================================
  1135→  // RENDER: Opportunity Card (Kanban)
  1136→  // ============================================
  1137→
  1138→  const renderCard = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity, isDragging: boolean = false) => {
  1139→    const colors = STAGE_COLORS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || STAGE_COLORS.cold_dm;
  1140→    const bamfam = isBAMFAM(opp);
  1141→
  1142→    return (
  1143→      <Card
  1144→        className={`group hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200 border-l-4 ${colors.border} ${isDragging ? 'shadow-lg ring-2 ring-blue-400 opacity-90' : ''} ${bamfam ? 'bg-red-50/30' : ''}`}
  1145→        onClick={() => openSlideOver(opp)}
  1146→      >
  1147→        <CardContent className="p-4">
  1148→          <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2">
  1149→            <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
  1150→              {/* Name with drag handle */}
  1151→              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  1152→                <GripVertical className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-300 flex-shrink-0 cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing" />
  1153→                <Building2 className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400 flex-shrink-0" />
  1154→                <p className="font-medium text-gray-900 truncate">{opp.name}</p>
  1155→              </div>
  1156→
  1157→              {/* Deal Value */}
  1158→              {opp.deal_value && (
  1159→                <p className="text-lg font-semibold text-emerald-600 mt-2">
  1160→                  ${opp.deal_value.toLocaleString()}
  1161→                </p>
  1162→              )}
  1163→
  1164→              {/* Badges */}
  1165→              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5 mt-2">
  1166→                {opp.bucket && (
  1167→                  <Badge className={`text-xs ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].bg} ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].text} border-0`}>
  1168→                    Bucket {opp.bucket}
  1169→                  </Badge>
  1170→                )}
  1171→                {opp.dm_account === 'closer' && (
  1172→                  <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs bg-white border-blue-300 text-blue-600">Closer</Badge>
  1173→                )}
  1174→                {opp.dm_account === 'sdr' && (
  1175→                  <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs bg-white border-green-300 text-green-600">SDR</Badge>
  1176→                )}
  1177→                {opp.source && (
  1178→                  <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs bg-white capitalize">
  1179→                    {opp.source.replace('_', ' ')}
  1180→                  </Badge>
  1181→                )}
  1182→              </div>
  1183→
  1184→              {/* Details */}
  1185→              <div className="mt-3 space-y-1.5 text-xs text-gray-500">
  1186→                {/* Bump progress (cold_dm only) */}
  1187→                {opp.stage === 'cold_dm' && (
  1188→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
  1189→                    <Zap className="h-3 w-3 flex-shrink-0 text-sky-500" />
  1190→                    <span>Bump {opp.bump_number}/4</span>
  1191→                    <div className="flex gap-0.5">
  1192→                      {[1, 2, 3, 4].map(i => (
  1193→                        <div key={i} className={`w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full ${i <= opp.bump_number ? 'bg-sky-500' : 'bg-gray-200'}`} />
  1194→                      ))}
  1195→                    </div>
  1196→                  </div>
  1197→                )}
  1198→
  1199→                {/* Warm sub-state */}
```
</details></tool-use>

  1273→
  1274→  const renderKanban = () => (

  1276→      <div className="flex gap-4 overflow-x-auto pb-4 h-full">
  1277→        {visiblePipelineStages.map(stage => {

  1282→
  1283→          return (
  1284→            <div
  1285→              key={stage}
  1286→              className={`${isCollapsed ? 'w-12' : 'flex-1 min-w-[280px] max-w-[320px]'} flex flex-col h-full transition-all duration-200`}
  1287→            >

  1289→              <div
  1290→                className={`${isCollapsed ? 'rounded-lg' : 'rounded-t-lg'} px-4 py-3 ${colors.bg} border ${colors.border} ${isCollapsed ? '' : 'border-b-0'} flex-shrink-0 cursor-pointer select-none`}
  1291→                onClick={() => toggleKanbanCollapse(stage)}
  1292→              >
  1293→                <div className="flex items-center justify-between">

  1295→                    {isCollapsed ? (

  1298→                      <ChevronDown className={`w-4 h-4 ${colors.text}`} />
  1299→                    )}
  1300→                    {!isCollapsed && (
  1301→                      <>
  1302→                        <h4 className={`font-semibold ${colors.text}`}>{STAGE_LABELS[stage]}</h4>

  1304→                      </>
  1305→                    )}
  1306→                  </div>

  1321→              </div>
  1322→
  1323→              {/* Column Content - Droppable Area */}
  1324→              {!isCollapsed && (
  1325→                <DroppableColumn id={stage} className={`flex-1 bg-gray-50/50 border border-gray-200 border-t-0 rounded-b-lg p-3 space-y-3 overflow-y-auto transition-colors`}>
  1326→                  <SortableContext items={stageOpps.map(o => o.id)} strategy={verticalListSortingStrategy}>

  1330→                      </div>
  1331→                    ) : (

  1333→                        <SortableCard key={opp.id} id={opp.id}>

  1338→                  </SortableContext>

  1540→                                  </span>
  1541→                                ) : (
  1542→                                  <span className="text-green-600 text-xs">OK</span>
  1543→                                )}
  1544→                              </TableCell>
  1545→                              <TableCell>
  1546→                                <DropdownMenu>
  1547→                                  <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
  1548→                                    <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-8 w-8 p-0">
  1549→                                      <MoreHorizontal className="h-4 w-4" />
  1550→                                    </Button>
  1551→                                  </DropdownMenuTrigger>
  1552→                                  <DropdownMenuContent align="end" className="w-48 z-[80]">
  1553→                                    <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); openEditDialog(opp); }}>
  1554→                                      <Edit className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Edit
  1555→                                    </DropdownMenuItem>
  1556→                                    {opp.stage === 'cold_dm' && (
  1557→                                      <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleRecordBump(opp.id); }}>
  1558→                                        <Zap className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Record Bump
  1559→                                      </DropdownMenuItem>
  1560→                                    )}
  1561→                                    <DropdownMenuSeparator />
  1562→                                    <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleStageChange(opp.id, 'orbit', opp.stage); }} className="text-orange-600">
  1563→                                      <RotateCcw className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Move to Orbit
  1564→                                    </DropdownMenuItem>
  1565→                                    <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleDelete(opp.id); }} className="text-red-600">
  1566→                                      <Trash2 className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Delete
  1567→                                    </DropdownMenuItem>
  1568→                                  </DropdownMenuContent>
  1569→                                </DropdownMenu>
  1570→                              </TableCell>
  1571→                          </SortableTableRow>
  1572→                        ))}
  1573→                      </SortableContext>
  1574→                    </TableBody>
  1575→                  </Table>
  1576→                </div>
  1577→              )}
  1578→            </div>
  1579→          );
  1580→        })}
  1581→        <DragOverlay>
  1582→          {activeOpportunity ? (
  1583→            <div className="bg-white border border-gray-300 shadow-lg rounded px-4 py-2 flex items-center gap-3">
  1584→              <GripVertical className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
  1585→              <Building2 className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
  1586→              <span className="font-medium">{activeOpportunity.name}</span>
  1587→              <Badge className={`text-xs ${STAGE_COLORS[activeOpportunity.stage as SalesPipelineStage]?.bg || ''} ${STAGE_COLORS[activeOpportunity.stage as SalesPipelineStage]?.text || ''}`}>
  1588→                {STAGE_LABELS[activeOpportunity.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || activeOpportunity.stage}
  1589→              </Badge>
  1590→            </div>
  1591→          ) : null}
  1592→        </DragOverlay>
  1593→      </DndContext>
  1594→    </div>
  1595→  );
  1596→
  1597→  // ============================================
  1598→  // RENDER: Outreach Tab
  1599→  // ============================================
```

  1616→    setIsBulkBumping(true);
  1617→    try {
  1618→      await SalesPipelineService.bulkRecordBump(selectedOutreach);
  1619→      setSelectedOutreach([]);
  1620→      await fetchOutreach();
  1621→      await fetchData();
  1622→    } catch (err) {
  1623→      console.error('Error bulk bumping:', err);

  1625→      setIsBulkBumping(false);
  1626→    }
  1627→  };
  1628→
  1629→  const handleBulkMoveToWarm = async () => {

  1633→      await SalesPipelineService.bulkUpdateStage(selectedOutreach, 'warm');

  1636→      await fetchData();

  1640→      setIsBulkMoving(false);

  1643→
  1644→  const handleBulkDelete = async () => {

  1647→    try {
  1648→      await SalesPipelineService.bulkDelete(selectedOutreach);

  1651→      await fetchData();

  1910→                            Record bump #{opp.bump_number + 1}

  1946→      )}
  1947→
  1948→      {/* Pagination */}
  1949→      {outreachTotalPages > 1 && (
  1950→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mt-4 px-1">
  1951→          <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">
  1952→            Showing {outreachStart}-{outreachEnd} of {outreachTotal}
  1953→          </div>
  1954→          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  1955→            <Button
  1956→              variant="outline"
  1957→              size="sm"
  1958→              onClick={() => { setOutreachPage(p => Math.max(1, p - 1)); setSelectedOutreach([]); }}
  1959→              disabled={outreachPage === 1}
  1960→              className="flex items-center gap-1"
  1961→            >
  1962→              <ChevronLeft className="h-4 w-4" />
  1963→              Previous
  1964→            </Button>
  1965→            <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
  1966→              {Array.from({ length: Math.min(5, outreachTotalPages) }, (_, i) => {
  1967→                let pageNum: number;
  1968→                if (outreachTotalPages <= 5) {
  1969→                  pageNum = i + 1;
  1970→                } else if (outreachPage <= 3) {
  1971→                  pageNum = i + 1;
  1972→                } else if (outreachPage >= outreachTotalPages - 2) {
  1973→                  pageNum = outreachTotalPages - 4 + i;
  1974→                } else {
  1975→                  pageNum = outreachPage - 2 + i;
  1976→                }
  1977→                return (
  1978→                  <Button
  1979→                    key={pageNum}
  1980→                    variant={outreachPage === pageNum ? 'default' : 'outline'}
  1981→                    size="sm"
  1982→                    onClick={() => { setOutreachPage(pageNum); setSelectedOutreach([]); }}
  1983→                    className={`w-8 h-8 p-0 ${outreachPage === pageNum ? 'hover:opacity-90' : ''}`}
  1984→                    style={outreachPage === pageNum ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
  1985→                  >
  1986→                    {pageNum}
  1987→                  </Button>
  1988→                );
  1989→              })}
  1990→            </div>
  1991→            <Button
  1992→              variant="outline"
  1993→              size="sm"
  1994→              onClick={() => { setOutreachPage(p => Math.min(outreachTotalPages, p + 1)); setSelectedOutreach([]); }}
  1995→              disabled={outreachPage === outreachTotalPages}
  1996→              className="flex items-center gap-1"
  1997→            >
  1998→              Next
  1999→              <ChevronRight className="h-4 w-4" />
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./app/crm/sales-pipeline/page.tsx`

```text
  2000→            </Button>
  2001→          </div>
  2002→        </div>
  2003→      )}
  2004→    </div>
  2005→  );
  2006→
  2007→  // ============================================
  2008→  // RENDER: Actions Tab
  2009→  // ============================================
  2010→
  2011→  const renderActionsTab = () => {
  2012→    const getPriorityIcon = (priority: ActionPriority) => {
  2013→      switch (priority) {
  2014→        case 'urgent': return <AlertTriangle className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-red-500" />;
  2015→        case 'high': return <Zap className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-amber-500" />;
  2016→        case 'medium': return <Clock className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-blue-500" />;
  2017→        case 'low': return <Clock className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-400" />;
  2018→        default: return null;
  2019→      }
  2020→    };
  2021→
  2022→    const getButtonVariant = (priority: ActionPriority): 'destructive' | 'default' | 'outline' => {
  2023→      if (priority === 'urgent') return 'destructive';
  2024→      if (priority === 'high') return 'default';
  2025→      return 'outline';
  2026→    };
  2027→
  2028→    const getTimingInfo = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity): { text: string; color: string } => {
  2029→      const daysAgo = (date: string | null) => {
  2030→        if (!date) return null;
  2031→        return Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(date).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  2032→      };
  2033→      const daysUntil = (date: string | null) => {
  2034→        if (!date) return null;
  2035→        return Math.ceil((new Date(date).getTime() - Date.now()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  2036→      };
  2037→
  2038→      // Cold DM — show last bump timing
  2039→      if (opp.stage === 'cold_dm') {
  2040→        if (opp.bump_number === 0) return { text: 'Not bumped', color: 'text-gray-500' };
  2041→        const d = daysAgo(opp.last_bump_date);
  2042→        if (d === null) return { text: `${opp.bump_number}/4 bumps`, color: 'text-gray-500' };
  2043→        return {
  2044→          text: `Bumped ${d}d ago`,
  2045→          color: d >= 3 ? 'text-amber-500 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500',
  2046→        };
  2047→      }
  2048→
  2049→      // Stages with next_meeting — show meeting timing
  2050→      if (opp.next_meeting_at) {
  2051→        const d = daysUntil(opp.next_meeting_at);
  2052→        if (d !== null) {
  2053→          if (d < 0) return { text: `Meeting ${Math.abs(d)}d ago`, color: 'text-red-500 font-medium' };
  2054→          if (d === 0) return { text: 'Meeting today', color: 'text-blue-600 font-medium' };
  2055→          return { text: `Meeting in ${d}d`, color: d <= 2 ? 'text-blue-600 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500' };
  2056→        }
  2057→      }
  2058→
  2059→      // Proposal sent — show how long ago
  2060→      if (opp.stage === 'proposal_sent' || (opp.stage === 'discovery_done' && opp.proposal_sent_at)) {
  2061→        const d = daysAgo(opp.proposal_sent_at);
  2062→        if (d !== null) return {
  2063→          text: `Sent ${d}d ago`,
  2064→          color: d >= 5 ? 'text-amber-500 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500',
  2065→        };
  2066→      }
  2067→
  2068→      // Orbit — show time in orbit
  2069→      if (opp.stage === 'orbit') {
  2070→        const d = daysAgo(opp.updated_at);
  2071→        if (d !== null) return { text: `${d}d in orbit`, color: d > 90 ? 'text-amber-500 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500' };
  2072→      }
  2073→
  2074→      // Default — days since last contact
  2075→      const lastDate = opp.last_contacted_at || opp.last_bump_date || opp.created_at;
  2076→      const d = daysAgo(lastDate);
  2077→      if (d === null) return { text: '—', color: 'text-gray-400' };
  2078→      return {
  2079→        text: `${d}d silent`,
  2080→        color: d >= 7 ? 'text-red-500 font-medium' : d >= 3 ? 'text-amber-500' : 'text-gray-500',
  2081→      };
  2082→    };
  2083→
  2084→    const currentItems = displayedActions;
  2085→    const emptyLabel = actionPhaseFilter === 'outreach' ? 'No outreach actions needed' :
  2086→      actionPhaseFilter === 'closing' ? 'No closing actions needed' :
  2087→      'No actions needed right now';
  2088→
  2089→    return (
  2090→      <div className="pb-8">
  2091→        {/* Top row: Owner filter + Phase tabs */}
  2092→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
  2093→          <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
  2094→            {([
  2095→              { key: 'all' as const, label: 'All Actions' },
  2096→              { key: 'mine' as const, label: 'My Actions' },
  2097→              { key: 'urgent' as const, label: 'Urgent Only' },
  2098→            ]).map(f => (
  2099→              <button
  2100→                key={f.key}
  2101→                onClick={() => setActionFilter(f.key)}
  2102→                className={`px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-md transition-colors ${
  2103→                  actionFilter === f.key
  2104→                    ? 'bg-sky-100 text-sky-700 border border-sky-200'
  2105→                    : 'text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100 border border-transparent'
  2106→                }`}
  2107→              >
  2108→                {f.label}
  2109→              </button>
  2110→            ))}
  2111→          </div>
  2112→          <div className="flex items-center gap-1 bg-gray-100 rounded-lg p-0.5">
  2113→            {([
  2114→              { key: 'all' as const, label: 'All', count: actionItems.length },
  2115→              { key: 'outreach' as const, label: 'Outreach', count: outreachActions.length },
  2116→              { key: 'closing' as const, label: 'Closing', count: closingActions.length },
  2117→            ]).map(p => (
  2118→              <button
  2119→                key={p.key}
  2120→                onClick={() => setActionPhaseFilter(p.key)}
  2121→                className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-md transition-colors ${
  2122→                  actionPhaseFilter === p.key
  2123→                    ? 'bg-white text-gray-900 shadow-sm'
  2124→                    : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'
  2125→                }`}
  2126→              >
  2127→                {p.key === 'outreach' && <Send className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />}
  2128→                {p.key === 'closing' && <Target className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />}
  2129→                {p.key === 'all' && <Zap className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />}
  2130→                {p.label}
  2131→                <span className={`ml-0.5 text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0 rounded-full ${
  2132→                  actionPhaseFilter === p.key ? 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700' : 'bg-transparent text-gray-400'
  2133→                }`}>{p.count}</span>
  2134→              </button>
  2135→            ))}
  2136→          </div>
  2137→        </div>
  2138→
  2139→        {/* Section Header */}
  2140→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 bg-violet-50 rounded-t-lg border border-violet-200 border-b-0">
  2141→          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  2142→            {actionPhaseFilter === 'outreach' ? <Send className="h-4 w-4 text-violet-700" /> : actionPhaseFilter === 'closing' ? <Target className="h-4 w-4 text-violet-700" /> : <Zap className="h-4 w-4 text-violet-700" />}
  2143→            <h4 className="font-semibold text-violet-700">
  2144→              {actionPhaseFilter === 'outreach' ? 'Outreach Actions' : actionPhaseFilter === 'closing' ? 'Closing Actions' : 'All Action Items'}
  2145→            </h4>
  2146→            <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium">{currentItems.length}</Badge>
  2147→            {actionPhaseFilter === 'outreach' && (
  2148→              <span className="text-[11px] text-violet-500 ml-1">Cold DM, Warm, TG Intro, Booked</span>
  2149→            )}
  2150→            {actionPhaseFilter === 'closing' && (
  2151→              <span className="text-[11px] text-violet-500 ml-1">Discovery Done, Proposal, Contract</span>
  2152→            )}
  2153→          </div>
  2154→        </div>
  2155→
  2156→        {/* Table */}
  2157→        <div className="bg-white rounded-b-lg border border-gray-200 border-t-0">
  2158→          <Table>
  2159→            <TableHeader>
  2160→              <TableRow className="bg-gray-50/50">
  2161→                <TableHead>Name</TableHead>
  2162→                <TableHead className="w-[140px]">Stage</TableHead>
  2163→                <TableHead className="w-[70px]">Bucket</TableHead>
  2164→                <TableHead className="w-[260px]">Next Action</TableHead>
  2165→                <TableHead className="w-[120px]">Timing</TableHead>
  2166→                <TableHead className="w-[90px]">Temp</TableHead>
  2167→                <TableHead className="w-[100px]">Owner</TableHead>
  2168→                <TableHead className="w-[150px]"></TableHead>
  2169→              </TableRow>
  2170→            </TableHeader>
  2171→            <TableBody>
  2172→              {currentItems.length === 0 ? (
  2173→                <TableRow>
  2174→                  <TableCell colSpan={8} className="text-center py-12">
  2175→                    <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2 text-gray-400">
  2176→                      <Zap className="h-8 w-8" />
  2177→                      <p className="text-sm font-medium">{emptyLabel}</p>
  2178→                      <p className="text-xs">All caught up — check back later</p>
  2179→                    </div>
  2180→                  </TableCell>
  2181→                </TableRow>
  2182→              ) : currentItems.map(({ opp, action }) => {
  2183→                const timing = getTimingInfo(opp);
  2184→                const stageColors = STAGE_COLORS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || STAGE_COLORS.cold_dm;
  2185→                return (
  2186→                  <TableRow
  2187→                    key={opp.id}
  2188→                    className={`group hover:bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer ${action.priority === 'urgent' ? 'bg-red-50/40' : ''}`}
  2189→                    onClick={() => openSlideOver(opp)}
  2190→                  >
  2191→                    <TableCell>
  2192→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  2193→                        <Building2 className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
  2194→                        <span className="font-medium">{opp.name}</span>
  2195→                      </div>
  2196→                    </TableCell>
  2197→                    <TableCell>
  2198→                      <span className={`inline-flex items-center whitespace-nowrap rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${stageColors.bg} ${stageColors.text} ${stageColors.border}`}>
  2199→                        {STAGE_LABELS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || opp.stage}
```

  2340→            >
  2341→              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">

  2343→                <h4 className="font-semibold text-orange-700">{group.label}</h4>
