  2408→                          {opp.deal_value ? (
  2409→                            <span className="font-semibold text-emerald-600">${opp.deal_value.toLocaleString()}</span>
  2410→                          ) : (
  2411→                            <span className="text-gray-400">-</span>
  2412→                          )}
  2413→                        </TableCell>
  2414→                        <TableCell>{getUserName(opp.owner_id)}</TableCell>
  2415→                        <TableCell className="text-gray-500">{opp.updated_at ? formatDistanceToNow(new Date(opp.updated_at)) : '—'}</TableCell>
  2416→                        <TableCell className="text-gray-500">{opp.last_contacted_at ? formatDistanceToNow(new Date(opp.last_contacted_at), { addSuffix: true }) : '—'}</TableCell>
  2417→                        <TableCell>
  2418→                          <DropdownMenu>
  2419→                            <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
  2420→                              <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-8 w-8 p-0">
  2421→                                <MoreHorizontal className="h-4 w-4" />
  2422→                              </Button>
  2423→                            </DropdownMenuTrigger>
  2424→                            <DropdownMenuContent align="end" className="w-48 z-[80]">
  2425→                              <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); openEditDialog(opp); }}>
  2426→                                <Edit className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Edit
  2427→                              </DropdownMenuItem>
  2428→                              <DropdownMenuSeparator />
  2429→                              <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleResurrect(opp); }} className="text-blue-600">
  2430→                                <ArrowRight className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Resurrect
  2431→                              </DropdownMenuItem>
  2432→                              <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleDelete(opp.id); }} className="text-red-600">
  2433→                                <Trash2 className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Delete
  2434→                              </DropdownMenuItem>
  2435→                            </DropdownMenuContent>
  2436→                          </DropdownMenu>
  2437→                        </TableCell>
  2438→                      </TableRow>
  2439→                    ))}
  2440→                  </TableBody>
  2441→                </Table>
  2442→              </div>
  2443→            )}
  2444→          </div>
  2445→        );
  2446→      })}
  2447→    </div>
  2448→  );
  2449→
  2450→  // ============================================
  2451→  // RENDER: Activity Slide-Over
  2452→  // ============================================
  2453→
  2454→  const renderSlideOver = () => {
  2455→    if (!slideOverOpp || typeof document === 'undefined') return null;
  2456→    const opp = opportunities.find(o => o.id === slideOverOpp.id) || slideOverOpp;
  2457→    const bamfam = isBAMFAM(opp);
  2458→    const stageColors = STAGE_COLORS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || STAGE_COLORS.cold_dm;
  2459→
  2460→    return createPortal(
  2461→      <>
  2462→      {/* Backdrop */}
  2463→      {!orbitPrompt && !closedLostPrompt && !activityLogPrompt && (
  2464→        <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/20 z-[60]" onClick={() => {
  2465→          if (slideOverMode === 'edit') {
  2466→            if (!confirm('You have unsaved changes. Close anyway?')) return;
  2467→            setSlideOverMode('view');
  2468→            setEditingOpp(null);
  2469→            setForm({ name: '' });
  2470→          }
  2471→          setSlideOverOpp(null);
  2472→          setActionGuidance(null);
  2473→        }} />
  2474→      )}
  2475→      <div className="fixed inset-y-0 right-0 w-[480px] bg-white border-l shadow-xl z-[70] flex flex-col">
  2476→        {/* Header */}
  2477→        <div className="px-6 py-4 border-b bg-gradient-to-r from-gray-50 to-white">
  2478→          <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
  2479→            <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
  2480→              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  2481→                <Building2 className="h-5 w-5 text-gray-400 flex-shrink-0" />
  2482→                <h3 className="font-semibold text-lg text-gray-900 truncate">
  2483→                  {slideOverMode === 'edit' ? 'Edit Opportunity' : opp.name}
  2484→                </h3>
  2485→              </div>
  2486→              {slideOverMode === 'view' && (
  2487→                <>
  2488→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-2">
  2489→                    <Badge className={`text-xs ${stageColors.bg} ${stageColors.text} border ${stageColors.border}`}>
  2490→                      {STAGE_LABELS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || opp.stage}
  2491→                    </Badge>
  2492→                    {opp.bucket && (
  2493→                      <Badge className={`text-xs ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].bg} ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].text} border-0`}>
  2494→                        Bucket {opp.bucket}
  2495→                      </Badge>
  2496→                    )}
  2497→                    {opp.dm_account && (
  2498→                      <Badge variant="outline" className={`text-xs ${opp.dm_account === 'closer' ? 'border-blue-300 text-blue-600' : 'border-green-300 text-green-600'}`}>
  2499→                        {opp.dm_account === 'closer' ? 'Closer' : opp.dm_account === 'sdr' ? 'SDR' : 'Other'}
  2500→                      </Badge>
  2501→                    )}
  2502→                  </div>
  2503→                  {opp.deal_value && (
  2504→                    <p className="text-xl font-bold text-emerald-600 mt-2">${opp.deal_value.toLocaleString()} <span className="text-sm font-normal text-gray-400">{opp.currency}</span></p>
  2505→                  )}
  2506→                </>
  2507→              )}
  2508→            </div>
  2509→            <div className="flex items-center gap-1 flex-shrink-0">
  2510→              {slideOverMode === 'view' ? (
  2511→                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-8 w-8 p-0" onClick={() => openEditDialog(opp)}>
  2512→                  <Edit className="h-4 w-4" />
  2513→                </Button>
  2514→              ) : (
  2515→                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-8 px-2 text-xs" onClick={() => { setSlideOverMode('view'); setEditingOpp(null); setForm({ name: '' }); }}>
  2516→                  Cancel
  2517→                </Button>
  2518→              )}
  2519→              <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-8 w-8 p-0" onClick={() => { setSlideOverOpp(null); setSlideOverMode('view'); setEditingOpp(null); setForm({ name: '' }); setActionGuidance(null); }}>
  2520→                <X className="h-4 w-4" />
  2521→              </Button>
  2522→            </div>
  2523→          </div>
  2524→        </div>
  2525→
  2526→        {/* Edit mode */}
  2527→        {slideOverMode === 'edit' && (
  2528→          <ScrollArea className="flex-1">
  2529→            <form onSubmit={e => { e.preventDefault(); handleUpdate(); }} className="p-6">
  2530→              <div className="grid gap-4">
  2531→                <div className="grid gap-2">
  2532→                  <Label className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Name *</Label>
  2533→                  <Input value={form.name} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, name: e.target.value }))} placeholder="Company or contact name" className="auth-input" />
  2534→                </div>
  2535→                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
  2536→                  <div className="grid gap-2">
  2537→                    <Label className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">DM Account</Label>
  2538→                    <Select value={form.dm_account || 'sdr'} onValueChange={v => setForm(f => ({ ...f, dm_account: v as DmAccount }))}>
  2539→                      <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue /></SelectTrigger>
  2540→                      <SelectContent>
  2541→                        <SelectItem value="closer">Closer (Path A)</SelectItem>
  2542→                        <SelectItem value="sdr">SDR (Path B)</SelectItem>
  2543→                        <SelectItem value="other">Other</SelectItem>
  2544→                      </SelectContent>
  2545→                    </Select>
  2546→                  </div>
  2547→                  <div className="grid gap-2">
  2548→                    <Label className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Bucket</Label>
  2549→                    <Select value={form.bucket || ''} onValueChange={v => setForm(f => ({ ...f, bucket: v as Bucket }))}>
  2550→                      <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue placeholder="Select..." /></SelectTrigger>
  2551→                      <SelectContent>
  2552→                        <SelectItem value="A">A - High Priority</SelectItem>
  2553→                        <SelectItem value="B">B - Medium</SelectItem>
  2554→                        <SelectItem value="C">C - Low Priority</SelectItem>
  2555→                      </SelectContent>
  2556→                    </Select>
  2557→                  </div>
  2558→                </div>
  2559→                <div className="grid gap-2">
  2560→                  <Label className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Temperature: {form.temperature_score || 50}</Label>
  2561→                  <input type="range" min="0" max="100" value={form.temperature_score || 50} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, temperature_score: parseInt(e.target.value) }))} className="w-full accent-[#3e8692]" />
  2562→                </div>
  2563→                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
  2564→                  <div className="grid gap-2">
  2565→                    <Label className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Source</Label>
  2566→                    <Select value={form.source || ''} onValueChange={v => setForm(f => ({ ...f, source: v }))}>
  2567→                      <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue placeholder="Select..." /></SelectTrigger>
  2568→                      <SelectContent>
  2569→                        <SelectItem value="referral">Referral</SelectItem>
  2570→                        <SelectItem value="inbound">Inbound</SelectItem>
  2571→                        <SelectItem value="event">Event</SelectItem>
  2572→                        <SelectItem value="cold_outreach">Cold Outreach</SelectItem>
  2573→                      </SelectContent>
  2574→                    </Select>
  2575→                  </div>
  2576→                  <div className="grid gap-2">
  2577→                    <Label className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">TG Handle</Label>
  2578→                    <Input value={form.tg_handle || ''} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, tg_handle: e.target.value }))} placeholder="@handle" className="auth-input" />
  2579→                  </div>
  2580→                </div>
  2581→                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
  2582→                  <div className="grid gap-2">
  2583→                    <Label className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Owner</Label>
  2584→                    <Select value={form.owner_id || ''} onValueChange={v => setForm(f => ({ ...f, owner_id: v }))}>
  2585→                      <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue placeholder="Select..." /></SelectTrigger>
  2586→                      <SelectContent>
  2587→                        {users.map(u => (
  2588→                          <SelectItem key={u.id} value={u.id}>{u.name || u.email}</SelectItem>
  2589→                        ))}
  2590→                      </SelectContent>
  2591→                    </Select>
  2592→                  </div>
  2593→                  <div className="grid gap-2">
  2594→                    <Label className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Referrer</Label>
  2595→                    <Input value={form.referrer || ''} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, referrer: e.target.value }))} placeholder="Who referred?" className="auth-input" />
  2596→                  </div>
  2597→                </div>
  2598→                <div className="grid gap-2">
  2599→                  <Label className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Affiliate</Label>
  2600→                  <Select value={form.affiliate_id || ''} onValueChange={v => setForm(f => ({ ...f, affiliate_id: v }))}>
  2601→                    <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue placeholder="Select affiliate..." /></SelectTrigger>
  2602→                    <SelectContent>
  2603→                      {affiliates.map(a => (
  2604→                        <SelectItem key={a.id} value={a.id}>{a.name}</SelectItem>
  2605→                      ))}
  2606→                    </SelectContent>
  2607→                  </Select>
  2608→                </div>
  2609→                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
  2610→                  <div className="grid gap-2">
  2611→                    <Label className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Deal Value</Label>
  2612→                    <Input type="number" value={form.deal_value || ''} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, deal_value: e.target.value ? parseFloat(e.target.value) : undefined }))} placeholder="0" className="auth-input" />
  2613→                  </div>
  2614→                  <div className="grid gap-2">
  2615→                    <Label className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Currency</Label>
  2616→                    <Select value={form.currency || 'USD'} onValueChange={v => setForm(f => ({ ...f, currency: v }))}>
  2617→                      <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue /></SelectTrigger>
  2618→                      <SelectContent>
  2619→                        <SelectItem value="USD">USD</SelectItem>
  2620→                        <SelectItem value="USDT">USDT</SelectItem>
  2621→                        <SelectItem value="USDC">USDC</SelectItem>
  2622→                        <SelectItem value="ETH">ETH</SelectItem>
  2623→                        <SelectItem value="BTC">BTC</SelectItem>
  2624→                      </SelectContent>
  2625→                    </Select>
  2626→                  </div>
  2627→                </div>
  2628→                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
  2629→                  <div className="grid gap-2">
  2630→                    <Label className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Meeting Date</Label>
  2631→                    <Popover>
  2632→                      <PopoverTrigger asChild>
  2633→                        <Button
  2634→                          variant="outline"
  2635→                          className="auth-input justify-start text-left font-normal w-full"
  2636→                          style={{ borderColor: '#e5e7eb', backgroundColor: 'white', color: form.next_meeting_at ? '#111827' : '#9ca3af' }}
  2637→                        >
  2638→                          <Calendar className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
  2639→                          {form.next_meeting_at ? format(new Date(form.next_meeting_at), 'MMM d, yyyy') : 'Select date'}
  2640→                        </Button>
  2641→                      </PopoverTrigger>
  2642→                      <PopoverContent className="!bg-white border shadow-md p-0 w-auto z-[80]" align="start">
  2643→                        <CalendarPicker
  2644→                          mode="single"
  2645→                          selected={form.next_meeting_at ? new Date(form.next_meeting_at) : undefined}
  2646→                          onSelect={date => {
  2647→                            if (date) {
  2648→                              const existing = form.next_meeting_at ? new Date(form.next_meeting_at) : new Date();
  2649→                              date.setHours(existing.getHours(), existing.getMinutes());

  2800→                      />
  2801→                    </div>
  2802→                    <span className="text-xs font-medium">{opp.temperature_score}%</span>
  2803→                  </div>
  2804→                </div>
  2805→                <div>
  2806→                  <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">Owner</span>
  2807→                  <p className="font-medium mt-0.5">{getUserName(opp.owner_id)}</p>
  2808→                </div>
  2809→                <div>
  2810→                  <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">TG Handle</span>
  2811→                  <p className="font-medium mt-0.5">{opp.tg_handle || '—'}</p>
  2812→                </div>
  2813→                <div>
  2814→                  <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">Source</span>
  2815→                  <p className="font-medium mt-0.5 capitalize">{opp.source?.replace('_', ' ') || '—'}</p>
  2816→                </div>
  2817→                {opp.next_meeting_at && (
  2818→                  <div>
  2819→                    <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">Next Meeting</span>
  2820→                    <p className="font-medium mt-0.5">{format(new Date(opp.next_meeting_at), 'MMM d, yyyy h:mm a')}</p>
  2821→                  </div>
  2822→                )}
  2823→                {opp.referrer && (
  2824→                  <div>
  2825→                    <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">Referrer</span>
  2826→                    <p className="font-medium mt-0.5">{opp.referrer}</p>
  2827→                  </div>
  2828→                )}
  2829→                {opp.last_contacted_at && (
  2830→                  <div>
  2831→                    <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">Last Contacted</span>
  2832→                    <p className="font-medium mt-0.5">{formatDistanceToNow(new Date(opp.last_contacted_at), { addSuffix: true })}</p>
  2833→                  </div>
  2834→                )}
  2835→                <div>
  2836→                  <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">Affiliate</span>
  2837→                  {opp.affiliate ? (
  2838→                    <div className="mt-0.5">
  2839→                      <Badge className="text-xs" style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}>{opp.affiliate.name}</Badge>
  2840→                    </div>
  2841→                  ) : (
  2842→                    <p className="font-medium mt-0.5 text-gray-400">—</p>
  2843→                  )}
  2844→                </div>
  2845→              </div>
  2846→            </div>
  2847→
  2848→            {/* Notes */}
  2849→            {opp.notes && (
  2850→              <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 p-4">
  2851→                <h4 className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Notes</h4>
  2852→                <p className="text-sm text-gray-700 whitespace-pre-wrap">{opp.notes}</p>
  2853→              </div>
  2854→            )}
  2855→
  2856→            {/* Bump Counter (cold_dm only) */}
  2857→            {opp.stage === 'cold_dm' && (
  2858→              <div className="bg-sky-50 rounded-lg border border-sky-200 p-4">
  2859→                <h4 className="text-xs font-semibold text-sky-700 uppercase tracking-wider mb-3">Bump Progress</h4>
  2860→                <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
  2861→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
  2862→                    <div className="flex gap-1.5">
  2863→                      {[1, 2, 3, 4].map(i => (
  2864→                        <div key={i} className={`w-3 h-3 rounded-full border-2 ${i <= opp.bump_number ? 'bg-sky-500 border-sky-500' : 'bg-white border-sky-300'}`} />
  2865→                      ))}
  2866→                    </div>
  2867→                    <span className="text-sm font-medium text-sky-800">{opp.bump_number} / 4 bumps</span>
  2868→                  </div>
  2869→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
  2870→                    <Button
  2871→                      variant="outline"
  2872→                      size="sm"
  2873→                      className="h-8 w-8 p-0 border-sky-300 text-sky-700 hover:bg-sky-100"
  2874→                      onClick={() => handleReduceBump(opp.id)}
  2875→                      disabled={opp.bump_number <= 0 || isBumping}
  2876→                    >
  2877→                      {isBumping ? <Loader2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5 animate-spin" /> : <Minus className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />}
  2878→                    </Button>
  2879→                    <Button
  2880→                      variant="outline"
  2881→                      size="sm"
  2882→                      className="h-8 px-3 border-sky-300 text-sky-700 hover:bg-sky-100 text-xs font-medium"
  2883→                      onClick={() => handleRecordBump(opp.id)}
  2884→                      disabled={isBumping}
  2885→                    >
  2886→                      {isBumping ? <Loader2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5 animate-spin mr-1" /> : <Plus className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-1" />} Bump
  2887→                    </Button>
  2888→                  </div>
  2889→                </div>
  2890→                {opp.last_bump_date && (
  2891→                  <p className="text-xs text-sky-600 mt-2">Last bump: {formatDistanceToNow(new Date(opp.last_bump_date), { addSuffix: true })}</p>
  2892→                )}
  2893→              </div>
  2894→            )}
  2895→
  2896→            {/* Quick Actions */}
  2897→            <div className="flex gap-2 flex-wrap">
  2898→              <Button
  2899→                variant="outline" size="sm" className="text-xs text-orange-600 border-orange-300 hover:bg-orange-50"
```
</details></tool-use>

  3168→  const renderFormDialog = () => {
  3169→    const isEdit = !!editingOpp;
  3170→    // Only open as dialog for create, or edit when NOT in slide-over edit mode
  3171→    const isOpen = isCreateOpen || (!!editingOpp && slideOverMode !== 'edit');
  3172→
  3173→    return (
  3174→      <Dialog open={isOpen} onOpenChange={open => {
  3175→        if (!open) { setIsCreateOpen(false); setEditingOpp(null); setForm({ name: '' }); }
  3176→      }}>
  3177→        <DialogContent className="max-w-md">
  3178→          <DialogHeader>
  3179→            <DialogTitle>{isEdit ? 'Edit Opportunity' : 'New Opportunity'}</DialogTitle>
  3180→            <DialogDescription>
  3181→              {isEdit ? 'Update opportunity details.' : 'Add a new opportunity to the sales pipeline.'}
  3182→            </DialogDescription>
  3183→          </DialogHeader>

  3186→              {/* Basic Info */}
  3187→              <div className="grid gap-2">
  3188→                <Label>Name *</Label>
  3189→                <Input
  3190→                  value={form.name}
  3191→                  onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, name: e.target.value }))}
  3192→                  placeholder="Company or contact name"
  3193→                  className="auth-input"
  3194→                />

  3491→                        {activityLogForm.meeting_time
  3492→                          ? (() => { const [h, m] = activityLogForm.meeting_time!.split(':').map(Number); return `${h === 0 ? 12 : h > 12 ? h - 12 : h}:${String(m).padStart(2, '0')} ${h >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM'}`; })()

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 2026-02-25 13:10:54Z)**_

Based on my thorough review of both files, I've identified several real bugs. Let me compile my findings:

## SECOND-PASS BUG REPORT: Sales Pipeline

### CRITICAL BUGS

**BUG #1: Activity Form Not Reset on Switch (Lines 777-780)**
**Severity: High - Data Consistency Issue**

When switching between opportunities in the slide-over:
```typescript
// Line 777-780 in openSlideOver
setActivityForm({ opportunity_id: opp.id, type: 'note', title: '' });
setActivityMeetingDate(undefined);
setActivityMeetingTime(undefined);
```

**Problem**: Only three of the form fields reset. The full activity form has many optional fields (description, outcome, next_step, next_step_date) that are NOT reset when opening a new opportunity. A user could:
1. Start adding activity details to Opp A
2. Click on Opp B
3. Start typing in the activity form for Opp B
4. But submit with leftover description/outcome/next_step from Opp A attached

**Fix needed**: Reset ALL activity form fields (description, outcome, next_step, next_step_date) when opening the slide-over.

---

**BUG #2: Meeting Time Not Preserved When Switching (Activity Form)**
**Severity: High - Logic Bug**

In the activity form picker (lines 3024, 3045):
```typescript
// Line 3024
const isSelected = activityMeetingTime && parseInt(activityMeetingTime.split(':')[0]) === h;

// Line 3045
const isSelected = activityMeetingTime && parseInt(activityMeetingTime.split(':')[1]) === m;
```

But when clicking hour/minute buttons (lines 3032, 3053):
```typescript
// Line 3032-3033 (hour)
const currentMin = activityMeetingTime ? activityMeetingTime.split(':')[1] : '00';
setActivityMeetingTime(`${h}:${currentMin}`);

// Line 3053-3054 (minute)  
const currentHour = activityMeetingTime ? activityMeetingTime.split(':')[0] : '9';
setActivityMeetingTime(`${currentHour}:${m}`);
```

**Problem**: Line 3053 defaults to hour '9' when no time is set. But the hour picker button click (line 3031) doesn't store the hour number as padded string. So you can get times like "9:30" or "14:15" inconsistently, leading to substring parsing failures. More critically: if you pick an hour first (e.g., "14:00"), then click minutes, it reconstructs as "14:30" — but if minute goes to '0', you'd get "14:0" instead of "14:00", breaking parsing.

**Fix needed**: Ensure time format is always `HH:mm` with proper padding.

---

**BUG #3: Outreach Owner Filter "mine" State Mismatch (Line 1684)**
**Severity: Medium - UI/Logic Issue**

```typescript
// Line 1674-1688
outreachFilters.owner_id === 'mine'
  ? 'bg-sky-100 text-sky-700 border border-sky-200'
  : 'text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100 border border-transparent'
```

But in the filter resolution (line 459):
```typescript
owner_id: outreachFilters.owner_id === 'mine' ? (user?.id || undefined) : outreachFilters.owner_id,
```

**Problem**: The state stores 'mine' as a string literal, but the backend filter logic resolves it. When switching from "My Outreach" to "All Owners", line 1682 sets `owner_id: undefined`, but the display logic at line 1684 is checking `=== 'mine'` which is now falsy. This means: if owner_id is undefined, BOTH tabs could light up, or the wrong one shows as active. The button state becomes inconsistent with actual filters.

**Fix needed**: Either store 'mine' permanently and always resolve in fetchOutreach, OR update the comparison logic.

---

**BUG #4: DnD Position Update Not Atomically Saved (Line 759)**
**Severity: Medium - Data Consistency**

```typescript
// Line 757-760
const reordered = arrayMove(stageOpps, oldIndex, newIndex);
const positions = reordered.map((o, i) => ({ id: o.id, position: i }));
await SalesPipelineService.updatePositions(positions);
await fetchData();
```

**Problem**: If updatePositions partially fails (network timeout, DB constraint), the UI is already updated (arrayMove), but server position is inconsistent. fetchData() is called after, but if it fails, the UI shows reordered cards while server hasn't persisted. User might refresh and see old order.

**Partial mitigation exists** (optimistic update pattern), but no error handling rollback.

---

**BUG #5: Bulk Operations Don't Clear Selection on Error (Lines 1614-1627)**
**Severity: Medium - UX Issue**

```typescript
const handleBulkBump = async () => {
  if (selectedOutreach.length === 0 || isBulkBumping) return;
  setIsBulkBumping(true);
  try {
    await SalesPipelineService.bulkRecordBump(selectedOutreach);
    setSelectedOutreach([]); // ← Only clears on success
    await fetchOutreach();
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('Error bulk bumping:', err);
    // Missing: setSelectedOutreach([]) or retry logic
  } finally {
    setIsBulkBumping(false);
  }
};
```

**Problem**: If bulk bump fails, checkboxes remain checked, but the data may be in an inconsistent state (some bumped, some not). User sees checked items, hits retry, and might bump the already-bumped ones again. No error message shown.

---

### MODERATE BUGS

**BUG #6: No Temperature Score on Create (Line 511)**
**Severity: Medium - Business Logic**

```typescript
// Line 511
await SalesPipelineService.create({ ...form, stage: form.stage || ('cold_dm' as OpportunityStage) });
```

The create function in service (line 212-213) calls `recalcTemperature()` but provides no initial `temperature_score` in the form. The field is optional on creation, so new opps start with NULL/0, then recalc is called. But if recalc fails silently (line 563-564), the opp has 0 temp, making it sort last in dashboards.

---

**BUG #7: Outreach Tab Pagination Selection Not Cleared on Filter Change (Lines 1720, 1733, 1747)**
**Severity: Low - UX Issue**

When filters change, `setOutreachPage(1)` and `setSelectedOutreach([])` are both called. BUT if a user is on page 3, changes a filter, page resets to 1, BUT the old selection array persists momentarily before the effect triggers fetchOutreach. Race condition possible.

---

**BUG #8: getNextAction Missing "orbit" Case Closing Logic (Line 972-979)**
**Severity: Low - Incomplete Feature**

```typescript
case 'orbit': {
  const daysSinceCreated = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(opp.created_at).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  if (daysSinceCreated > 90) {
    return { label: 'Resurrect', ... };
  }
  return { label: 'In Orbit', hint: '', priority: 'wait', actionType: 'none', ... };
}
```

**Problem**: 90 days is measured from `created_at`, not from when it moved to orbit. An opp in orbit for only 1 month but created 2 years ago shows "Resurrect" action immediately. Should check `updated_at` or `orbit_moved_at` timestamp instead.

---

**BUG #9: Inline Edit Cell Not Stoppage Propagation Completely (Lines 1454-1472)**
**Severity: Low - Click Handling**

```typescript
// Line 1462
onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}
```

Only the INPUT stops propagation on click. But the wrapping div (line 1465-1472) also has onClick with stopPropagation, creating nested handlers. If user clicks the input, it fires, then the div's onClick fires. The table row click (line 1450) might still trigger if timing is off.

---

**BUG #10: Activity Log Meeting Time Display Format Bug (Line 3491-3493)**
**Severity: Low - Display Bug**

```typescript
{activityLogForm.meeting_time
  ? (() => { const [h, m] = activityLogForm.meeting_time!.split(':').map(Number); 
    return `${h === 0 ? 12 : h > 12 ? h - 12 : h}:${String(m).padStart(2, '0')} ${h >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM'}`; })()
  : 'Select time'}
```

**Problem**: The padStart on `m` is applied AFTER mapping to Number. So if the stored time is "09:05", after splitting and mapping to Number, `m` is `5`, then `padStart(2, '0')` gives "05" — this part works. BUT if time was never set and user picks hour first (state is "14:00"), then clicks minute '5', line 3532 sets `meeting_time: "14:5"` (without padding). The display then tries to split "14:5" and gets `m = 5`, but the underlying state is corrupted.

---

## SERVICE LAYER ISSUES

**BUG #11: bulkUpdateStage Missing Stage History Logging (Lines 586-601)**
**Severity: Medium - Audit Trail**

```typescript
static async bulkUpdateStage(ids: string[], stage: SalesPipelineStage): Promise<void> {
  const now = new Date().toISOString();
  const updates = ids.map(id =>
    supabase
      .from('crm_opportunities')
      .update({ stage, updated_at: now })
      .eq('id', id)
  );
  // Missing: recordStageHistory for each transition!
}
```

Individual `update()` calls in the service DO call `recordStageHistory()` (line 272-273), but `bulkUpdateStage()` skips it. This means no audit trail for bulk stage moves.

---

**BUG #12: getColdDmsPaginated Doesn't Validate Range Parameters (Lines 501-502)**
**Severity: Low - Edge Case**

```typescript
static async getColdDmsPaginated(
  page: number,
  pageSize: number,
  ...
): Promise<{ data: SalesPipelineOpportunity[]; count: number }> {
  const from = (page - 1) * pageSize;
  const to = from + pageSize - 1;
  // No check if page is negative or 0
  // No check if pageSize is <= 0
}
```

If frontend accidentally passes page=0 or page=-1, the math produces negative `from`, which Supabase's `.range()` will silently handle (returns nothing or errors). Better to validate and return empty or throw.

---

## SUMMARY

**Critical bugs to fix immediately:**
1. Activity form fields not fully reset on slide-over switch (affects data integrity)
2. Meeting time format inconsistency (parsing failures)
3. Outreach owner filter state mismatch (UI inconsistency)

**Moderate bugs to fix:**
4. DnD position updates can fail silently
5. Bulk operations don't handle errors properly
6. Missing error messages and recovery paths

**Service layer audit:**
- Bulk operations bypass important logging (stage history)
- Edge cases in pagination not validated

   - Post-discovery stages: `discovery_done, proposal_sent, proposal_call, v2_contract`

     **dashboardMetrics useMemo expanded** with alert metrics (meetingsThisWeek, meetingsToday, staleDeals, dealsAtRisk, totalRevenue, weightedPipeline) and bottleneck analysis (stageConversions, avgDaysInStage, worstConversion, slowestStage). Key bottleneck logic:
     ```typescript
     const funnelStages: SalesPipelineStage[] = ['cold_dm', 'warm', 'tg_intro', 'booked', 'discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won'];
     // reachedStage: counts opps that ever reached each stage
     // stageConversions: from/to/rate/dropoff for each transition
     // avgDaysInStage: avg days current deals sit in each stage
     // worstConversion: lowest conversion rate (min 3 opps)
     // slowestStage: longest avg time (min 2 deals)
     ```
     
     **Phase filtering for actions tab:**
     ```typescript
     const PRE_DISCOVERY_STAGES = ['cold_dm', 'warm', 'tg_intro', 'booked'];
     const POST_DISCOVERY_STAGES = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'];
     const outreachActions = useMemo(() => actionItems.filter(({ opp }) => PRE_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage)), [actionItems]);
     const closingActions = useMemo(() => actionItems.filter(({ opp }) => POST_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage) || opp.stage === 'orbit'), [actionItems]);
     const displayedActions = useMemo(() => actionPhaseFilter === 'outreach' ? outreachActions : actionPhaseFilter === 'closing' ? closingActions : actionItems, [actionPhaseFilter, outreachActions, closingActions, actionItems]);
     ```
     
     **handleStageChange updated** to pass oppName to orbit/closedLost prompts:
     ```typescript
     const oppName = opportunities.find(o => o.id === oppId)?.name || '';
     ```
     
     **confirmOrbit/confirmClosedLost updated** to fire activity log popup after stage change:
     ```typescript
     // In confirmOrbit:
     openActivityLogPrompt(oppId, oppName, 'note', `Moved to orbit — ${reasonLabel}`);
     // In confirmClosedLost:
     openActivityLogPrompt(oppId, oppName, 'note', reason);
     ```

       const meetingDate = new Date(activityMeetingDate);

    77→function DroppableColumn({ id, children, className }: { id: string; children: React.ReactNode; className?: string }) {
    78→  const { setNodeRef, isOver } = useDroppable({ id });
    79→  return (
    80→    <div ref={setNodeRef} className={`${className} ${isOver ? 'ring-2 ring-blue-400 ring-offset-2' : ''}`}>
    81→      {children}
    82→    </div>
    83→  );
    84→}
    85→
    86→function SortableCard({ id, children }: { id: string; children: React.ReactNode }) {
    87→  const { attributes, listeners, setNodeRef, transform, transition, isDragging } = useSortable({ id });
    88→  const style = {
    89→    transform: CSS.Transform.toString(transform),
    90→    transition,
    91→    opacity: isDragging ? 0.5 : 1,
    92→  };
    93→  return (
    94→    <div ref={setNodeRef} style={style} {...attributes} {...listeners}>
    95→      {children}
    96→    </div>
    97→  );
    98→}
    99→
   100→function SortableTableRow({ id, children, className, onClick }: { id: string; children: React.ReactNode; className?: string; onClick?: () => void }) {
   101→  const { attributes, listeners, setNodeRef, transform, transition, isDragging } = useSortable({ id });
   102→  const style: React.CSSProperties = {
   103→    transform: CSS.Translate.toString(transform),
   104→    transition,
   105→    opacity: isDragging ? 0.5 : 1,
   106→    position: 'relative' as const,
   107→    zIndex: isDragging ? 1 : 0,
   108→  };
   109→  return (
   110→    <TableRow ref={setNodeRef} style={style} className={`${className || ''} ${isDragging ? 'bg-blue-50 shadow-lg' : ''}`} onClick={onClick}>
   111→      <TableCell className="w-10">
   112→        <div
   113→          {...attributes}
   114→          {...listeners}
   115→          className="cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing p-1 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded"
   116→          onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}
   117→        >
   118→          <GripVertical className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   119→        </div>
   120→      </TableCell>
   121→      {children}
   122→    </TableRow>
   123→  );
   124→}
   125→

     1→import { supabase } from './supabase';
     2→import { CRMService, CRMOpportunity, OpportunityStage, CRMAffiliate } from './crmService';
     3→
     4→// ============================================
     5→// Sales Pipeline v2 Types
     6→// ============================================
     7→
     8→export type SalesPipelineStage =
     9→  | 'cold_dm' | 'warm' | 'tg_intro' | 'booked' | 'discovery_done'
    10→  | 'proposal_sent' | 'proposal_call' | 'v2_contract' | 'v2_closed_won'
    11→  | 'orbit' | 'v2_closed_lost' | 'nurture';
    12→
    13→export type Bucket = 'A' | 'B' | 'C';
    14→export type DmAccount = 'closer' | 'sdr' | 'other';
    15→export type WarmSubState = 'interested' | 'silent';
    16→export type CalendlySentVia = 'dm' | 'tg' | 'not_yet';
    17→export type OrbitReason = 'no_budget' | 'bad_timing' | 'no_response' | 'competitor' | 'other';
    18→export type ActivityType = 'call' | 'message' | 'meeting' | 'proposal' | 'note' | 'bump';
    19→
    20→export const ORBIT_REASONS: { value: OrbitReason; label: string }[] = [
    21→  { value: 'no_budget', label: 'No Budget' },
    22→  { value: 'bad_timing', label: 'Bad Timing' },
    23→  { value: 'no_response', label: 'No Response' },
    24→  { value: 'competitor', label: 'Went with Competitor' },
    25→  { value: 'other', label: 'Other' },
    26→];
    27→
    28→export const PIPELINE_STAGES: SalesPipelineStage[] = [
    29→  'cold_dm', 'warm', 'tg_intro', 'booked', 'discovery_done',
    30→  'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won',
    31→];
    32→
    33→export const PATH_A_STAGES: SalesPipelineStage[] = [
    34→  'cold_dm', 'warm', 'booked', 'discovery_done',
    35→  'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won',
    36→];
    37→
    38→export const PATH_B_STAGES: SalesPipelineStage[] = [
    39→  'cold_dm', 'warm', 'tg_intro', 'booked', 'discovery_done',
    40→  'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won',
    41→];
    42→
    43→export const ALL_V2_STAGES: SalesPipelineStage[] = [
    44→  'cold_dm', 'warm', 'tg_intro', 'booked', 'discovery_done',
    45→  'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won',
    46→  'orbit', 'v2_closed_lost', 'nurture',
    47→];
    48→
    49→export const STAGE_LABELS: Record<SalesPipelineStage, string> = {
    50→  cold_dm: 'Cold DM',
    51→  warm: 'Warm',
    52→  tg_intro: 'TG Intro',
    53→  booked: 'Booked',
    54→  discovery_done: 'Discovery Done',
    55→  proposal_sent: 'Proposal Sent',
    56→  proposal_call: 'Proposal Call',
    57→  v2_contract: 'Contract',
    58→  v2_closed_won: 'Closed Won',
    59→  orbit: 'Orbit',
    60→  v2_closed_lost: 'Closed Lost',

    62→};
    63→
    64→export const STAGE_COLORS: Record<SalesPipelineStage, { bg: string; text: string; border: string; solid: string }> = {
    65→  cold_dm: { bg: 'bg-sky-50', text: 'text-sky-700', border: 'border-sky-200', solid: 'bg-sky-500' },
    66→  warm: { bg: 'bg-amber-50', text: 'text-amber-700', border: 'border-amber-200', solid: 'bg-amber-500' },
    67→  tg_intro: { bg: 'bg-violet-50', text: 'text-violet-700', border: 'border-violet-200', solid: 'bg-violet-500' },
    68→  booked: { bg: 'bg-blue-50', text: 'text-blue-700', border: 'border-blue-200', solid: 'bg-blue-500' },
    69→  discovery_done: { bg: 'bg-indigo-50', text: 'text-indigo-700', border: 'border-indigo-200', solid: 'bg-indigo-500' },

    71→  proposal_call: { bg: 'bg-fuchsia-50', text: 'text-fuchsia-700', border: 'border-fuchsia-200', solid: 'bg-fuchsia-500' },
    72→  v2_contract: { bg: 'bg-cyan-50', text: 'text-cyan-700', border: 'border-cyan-200', solid: 'bg-cyan-500' },

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./app/crm/sales-pipeline/page.tsx`

```text
   200→  const outreachSearchTimeout = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout | null>(null);
   201→  const OUTREACH_PAGE_SIZE = 50;
   202→
   203→  // Actions tab state
   204→  const [actionFilter, setActionFilter] = useState<'all' | 'mine' | 'urgent'>('mine');
   205→  const [actionPhaseFilter, setActionPhaseFilter] = useState<'all' | 'outreach' | 'closing'>('all');
   206→  const [executingAction, setExecutingAction] = useState<string | null>(null);
   207→  const [actionGuidance, setActionGuidance] = useState<{ label: string; hint: string } | null>(null);
   208→
   209→  // Activity log popup (shown after action execution)
   210→  const [activityLogPrompt, setActivityLogPrompt] = useState<{
   211→    oppId: string;
   212→    oppName: string;
   213→    type: ActivityType;
   214→    title: string;
   215→    showMeetingPicker?: boolean;
   216→  } | null>(null);
   217→  const [activityLogForm, setActivityLogForm] = useState<{
   218→    title: string;
   219→    description: string;
   220→    outcome: string;
   221→    next_step: string;
   222→    next_step_date?: string;
   223→    meeting_date?: string;
   224→    meeting_time?: string;
   225→  }>({ title: '', description: '', outcome: '', next_step: '' });
   226→  const [isActivityLogSubmitting, setIsActivityLogSubmitting] = useState(false);
   227→
   228→  // DnD sensors
   229→  const sensors = useSensors(
   230→    useSensor(PointerSensor, { activationConstraint: { distance: 8 } }),
   231→    useSensor(KeyboardSensor)
   232→  );
   233→
   234→  // ============================================
   235→  // Dashboard Metrics (computed from opportunities)
   236→  // ============================================
   237→
   238→  const dashboardMetrics = useMemo(() => {
   239→    const all = opportunities;
   240→    const pipelineActive = all.filter(o => PIPELINE_STAGES.includes(o.stage as SalesPipelineStage));
   241→    const closedWon = all.filter(o => o.stage === 'v2_closed_won');
   242→    const closedLost = all.filter(o => o.stage === 'v2_closed_lost');
   243→    const inOrbit = all.filter(o => o.stage === 'orbit');
   244→
   245→    // Stages past cold_dm = responded
   246→    const pastColdDm = all.filter(o => o.stage !== 'cold_dm');
   247→    const coldDmCount = outreachTotal > 0 ? outreachTotal : all.filter(o => o.stage === 'cold_dm').length;
   248→    const totalDmsSent = all.length; // every opp started as a DM
   249→    const responseRate = totalDmsSent > 0 ? (pastColdDm.length / totalDmsSent) * 100 : 0;
   250→
   251→    // Meetings booked = in booked or any stage after it
   252→    const bookedAndBeyond = ['booked', 'discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won'];
   253→    const meetingsBooked = all.filter(o => bookedAndBeyond.includes(o.stage)).length;
   254→
   255→    // Discovery calls = in discovery_done or later
   256→    const discoveryAndBeyond = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won'];
   257→    const discoveryCalls = all.filter(o => discoveryAndBeyond.includes(o.stage)).length;
   258→
   259→    // Close rate = won / (won + lost)
   260→    const totalClosed = closedWon.length + closedLost.length;
   261→    const closeRate = totalClosed > 0 ? (closedWon.length / totalClosed) * 100 : 0;
   262→
   263→    // Avg deal size (closed won)
   264→    const wonValues = closedWon.map(o => o.deal_value || 0).filter(v => v > 0);
   265→    const avgDealSize = wonValues.length > 0 ? wonValues.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / wonValues.length : 0;
   266→
   267→    // Avg close time (days from created_at to closed_at for won deals)
   268→    const closeTimes = closedWon
   269→      .filter(o => o.created_at && o.closed_at)
   270→      .map(o => (new Date(o.closed_at!).getTime() - new Date(o.created_at).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   271→    const avgCloseTime = closeTimes.length > 0 ? closeTimes.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / closeTimes.length : 0;
   272→
   273→    // Qualified % = bucket A + B / total
   274→    const qualifiedCount = all.filter(o => o.bucket === 'A' || o.bucket === 'B').length;
   275→    const qualifiedPct = all.length > 0 ? (qualifiedCount / all.length) * 100 : 0;
   276→
   277→    // Bucket A %
   278→    const bucketAPct = all.length > 0 ? (all.filter(o => o.bucket === 'A').length / all.length) * 100 : 0;
   279→
   280→    // Pipeline value (active)
   281→    const pipelineValue = pipelineActive.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0), 0);
   282→
   283→    // Overdue follow-ups
   284→    const now = new Date().toISOString();
   285→    const overdueFollowups = pipelineActive.filter(o =>
   286→      o.next_meeting_at && o.next_meeting_at < now
   287→    ).length;
   288→
   289→    // Proposals sent
   290→    const proposalsSent = all.filter(o =>
   291→      ['proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won'].includes(o.stage)
   292→    ).length;
   293→
   294→    // Alert metrics for manager cards
   295→    const nowDate = new Date();
   296→    const todayStart = new Date(nowDate.getFullYear(), nowDate.getMonth(), nowDate.getDate());
   297→    const weekEnd = new Date(todayStart.getTime() + 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
   298→    const meetingsThisWeek = pipelineActive.filter(o =>
   299→      o.next_meeting_at && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) >= todayStart && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) < weekEnd
   300→    ).length;
   301→    const meetingsToday = pipelineActive.filter(o =>
   302→      o.next_meeting_at && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) >= todayStart && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) < new Date(todayStart.getTime() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000)
   303→    ).length;
   304→
   305→    // Stale deals: active pipeline deals with no contact in 7+ days
   306→    const staleDeals = pipelineActive.filter(o => {
   307→      const lastDate = o.last_contacted_at || o.last_bump_date || o.created_at;
   308→      if (!lastDate) return true;
   309→      const daysSince = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(lastDate).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   310→      return daysSince >= 7;
   311→    }).length;
   312→
   313→    // Deals at risk: closing-stage deals (post-discovery) with temp < 40
   314→    const dealsAtRisk = all.filter(o =>
   315→      ['discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'].includes(o.stage) && o.temperature_score < 40
   316→    ).length;
   317→
   318→    // Total revenue (closed won value)
   319→    const totalRevenue = closedWon.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0), 0);
   320→
   321→    // Weighted pipeline = sum of (deal_value * stage_probability)
   322→    const stageProbability: Record<string, number> = {
   323→      cold_dm: 0.05, warm: 0.1, tg_intro: 0.15, booked: 0.25,
   324→      discovery_done: 0.4, proposal_sent: 0.6, proposal_call: 0.75, v2_contract: 0.9,
   325→    };
   326→    const weightedPipeline = pipelineActive.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0) * (stageProbability[o.stage] || 0.1), 0);
   327→
   328→    // Bottleneck analysis
   329→    const funnelStages: SalesPipelineStage[] = ['cold_dm', 'warm', 'tg_intro', 'booked', 'discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won'];
   330→    const stageOrder: Record<string, number> = {};
   331→    funnelStages.forEach((s, i) => { stageOrder[s] = i; });
   332→
   333→    // Count how many opps ever reached each stage (current stage or beyond)
   334→    const reachedStage = funnelStages.map(stage => {
   335→      const idx = stageOrder[stage];
   336→      // Opps currently at this stage or later (including orbit/lost which came from somewhere)
   337→      return all.filter(o => {
   338→        const oIdx = stageOrder[o.stage];
   339→        if (oIdx !== undefined) return oIdx >= idx;
   340→        // Orbit/lost — estimate their furthest stage from timestamps
   341→        if (o.stage === 'orbit' || o.stage === 'v2_closed_lost') {
   342→          if (o.proposal_sent_at && idx <= stageOrder['proposal_sent']) return true;
   343→          if (o.discovery_call_at && idx <= stageOrder['discovery_done']) return true;
   344→          if (o.calendly_booked_date && idx <= stageOrder['booked']) return true;
   345→          if (o.tg_handle && idx <= stageOrder['tg_intro']) return true;
   346→          if ((o.last_contacted_at || o.last_bump_date) && idx <= stageOrder['warm']) return true;
   347→          return idx <= stageOrder['cold_dm'];
   348→        }
   349→        return false;
   350→      }).length;
   351→    });
   352→
   353→    // Stage conversion rates (from one stage to the next)
   354→    const stageConversions = funnelStages.slice(0, -1).map((stage, i) => {
   355→      const from = reachedStage[i];
   356→      const to = reachedStage[i + 1];
   357→      const rate = from > 0 ? (to / from) * 100 : 0;
   358→      const dropoff = from - to;
   359→      return { stage, nextStage: funnelStages[i + 1], from, to, rate, dropoff };
   360→    });
   361→
   362→    // Avg days in current stage (for active pipeline deals)
   363→    const avgDaysInStage = funnelStages.slice(0, -1).map(stage => {
   364→      const oppsInStage = pipelineActive.filter(o => o.stage === stage);
   365→      if (oppsInStage.length === 0) return { stage, avgDays: 0, count: 0 };
   366→      const totalDays = oppsInStage.reduce((sum, o) => {
   367→        const days = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(o.updated_at).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   368→        return sum + days;
   369→      }, 0);
   370→      return { stage, avgDays: Math.round(totalDays / oppsInStage.length), count: oppsInStage.length };
   371→    });
   372→
   373→    // Identify the biggest bottleneck: stage with lowest conversion rate (min 3 opps entering)
   374→    const significantConversions = stageConversions.filter(c => c.from >= 3);
   375→    const worstConversion = significantConversions.length > 0
   376→      ? significantConversions.reduce((worst, c) => c.rate < worst.rate ? c : worst)
   377→      : null;
   378→
   379→    // Identify the slowest stage: where deals sit the longest
   380→    const significantStages = avgDaysInStage.filter(s => s.count >= 2);
   381→    const slowestStage = significantStages.length > 0
   382→      ? significantStages.reduce((slowest, s) => s.avgDays > slowest.avgDays ? s : slowest)
   383→      : null;
   384→
   385→    return {
   386→      totalDmsSent,
   387→      responseRate,
   388→      meetingsBooked,
   389→      discoveryCalls,
   390→      closeRate,
   391→      avgDealSize,
   392→      avgCloseTime,
   393→      qualifiedPct,
   394→      bucketAPct,
   395→      pipelineValue,
   396→      activeDeals: pipelineActive.length,
   397→      overdueFollowups,
   398→      bamfamViolations: metrics.bamfamViolations,
   399→      closedWon: closedWon.length,
   400→      closedLost: closedLost.length,
   401→      inOrbit: inOrbit.length,
   402→      proposalsSent,
   403→      coldDmCount,
   404→      meetingsThisWeek,
   405→      meetingsToday,
   406→      staleDeals,
   407→      dealsAtRisk,
   408→      totalRevenue,
   409→      weightedPipeline,
   410→      stageConversions,
   411→      avgDaysInStage,
   412→      worstConversion,
   413→      slowestStage,
   414→    };
   415→  }, [opportunities, metrics.bamfamViolations, outreachTotal]);
   416→
   417→  // ============================================
   418→  // Data Fetching
   419→  // ============================================
   420→
   421→  const fetchData = useCallback(async () => {
   422→    try {
   423→      const [opps, affs, usrs, met, outreachCount] = await Promise.all([
   424→        SalesPipelineService.getAll(),
   425→        CRMService.getAllAffiliates(),
   426→        UserService.getAllUsers(),
   427→        SalesPipelineService.getMetrics(),
   428→        SalesPipelineService.getColdDmsPaginated(1, 1, {}),
   429→      ]);
   430→      setOpportunities(opps);
   431→      setAffiliates(affs);
   432→      setUsers(usrs);
   433→      setMetrics(met);
   434→      setOutreachAllTotal(outreachCount.count);
   435→    } catch (err) {
   436→      console.error('Error fetching data:', err);
   437→    } finally {
   438→      setLoading(false);
   439→    }
   440→  }, []);
   441→
   442→  useEffect(() => { fetchData(); }, [fetchData]);
   443→
   444→  const fetchActivities = async (oppId: string) => {
   445→    try {
   446→      const acts = await SalesPipelineService.getActivities(oppId);
   447→      setActivities(acts);
   448→    } catch (err) {
   449→      console.error('Error fetching activities:', err);
   450→    }
   451→  };
   452→
   453→  // Outreach data fetching
   454→  const fetchOutreach = useCallback(async () => {
   455→    setOutreachLoading(true);
   456→    try {
   457→      const resolvedFilters = {
   458→        ...outreachFilters,
   459→        owner_id: outreachFilters.owner_id === 'mine' ? (user?.id || undefined) : outreachFilters.owner_id,
   460→      };

Perfect! Now I have all the information I need. Let me compile the complete bug location report:

## Bug Location Report for `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/crm/sales-pipeline/page.tsx`

### 1. **Activity form fields not reset on slide-over switch**
**Location: Lines 773-781** (`openSlideOver` function)

When switching between different opportunities in the slide-over, the `activityForm` is only partially reset. It resets `opportunity_id`, `type`, and `title`, but the `description`, `outcome`, `next_step`, and `next_step_date` fields persist from the previous opportunity.

```typescript
const openSlideOver = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity, guidance?: { label: string; hint: string }) => {
  setSlideOverOpp(opp);
  setSlideOverMode('view');
  setActionGuidance(guidance || null);
  fetchActivities(opp.id);
  setActivityForm({ opportunity_id: opp.id, type: 'note', title: '' });  // Line 778: Missing description, outcome, next_step reset
  setActivityMeetingDate(undefined);
  setActivityMeetingTime(undefined);
};
```

**Fix needed:** Add `description: '', outcome: '', next_step: '', next_step_date: undefined` to the reset at line 778.

---

### 2. **Meeting time format - minute zero-padding**
**Locations: Lines 3511 and 3532** (Activity log popup minute/hour selection)

When selecting minutes in the activity log popup, the minute value is not zero-padded when concatenated with the hour. This creates invalid time strings like "9:5" instead of "9:05".

**Line 3511** - Hour selection:
```typescript
const currentMin = activityLogForm.meeting_time ? activityLogForm.meeting_time.split(':')[1] : '00';
setActivityLogForm(f => ({ ...f, meeting_time: `${h}:${currentMin}` }));  // Missing padding
```

**Line 3532** - Minute selection:
```typescript
const currentHour = activityLogForm.meeting_time ? activityLogForm.meeting_time.split(':')[0] : '9';
setActivityLogForm(f => ({ ...f, meeting_time: `${currentHour}:${m}` }));  // m is not padded
```

**Fix needed:** Pad both values: `${String(h).padStart(2, '0')}:${String(m).padStart(2, '0')}`

---

### 3. **getNextAction orbit case - date field bug**
**Location: Line 973** (`getNextAction` function, 'orbit' case)

The orbit case uses `created_at` to calculate the 90-day resurrection check, but it should likely use `updated_at` to track when the opportunity was last updated in orbit status.

```typescript
case 'orbit': {
  const daysSinceCreated = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(opp.created_at).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));  // Line 973: using created_at
  if (daysSinceCreated > 90) {
    return { label: 'Resurrect', hint: '90+ days — re-engage or mark lost', priority: 'low', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 70, alternatives: [
      { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
    ]};
  }
  return { label: 'In Orbit', hint: '', priority: 'wait', actionType: 'none', isActionable: false, sortScore: 100, alternatives: [] };
}
```

**Fix needed:** Should probably use `updated_at` instead: `new Date(opp.updated_at).getTime()`

---

### 4. **Bulk operations error handling**
**Locations: Lines 1614-1627 and 1629-1642** (`handleBulkBump` and `handleBulkMoveToWarm`)

Both bulk operations have poor error handling:
- They don't clear `selectedOutreach` on error (only on success)
- They don't show error messages to the user (only console.error)

**handleBulkBump (Lines 1614-1627):**
```typescript
const handleBulkBump = async () => {
  if (selectedOutreach.length === 0 || isBulkBumping) return;
  setIsBulkBumping(true);
  try {
    await SalesPipelineService.bulkRecordBump(selectedOutreach);
    setSelectedOutreach([]);  // Only cleared on success
    await fetchOutreach();
    await fetchData();
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('Error bulk bumping:', err);  // No user-facing error message, selectedOutreach not cleared
  } finally {
    setIsBulkBumping(false);
  }
};
```

**handleBulkMoveToWarm (Lines 1629-1642):**
```typescript
const handleBulkMoveToWarm = async () => {
  if (selectedOutreach.length === 0 || isBulkMoving) return;
  setIsBulkMoving(true);
  try {
    await SalesPipelineService.bulkUpdateStage(selectedOutreach, 'warm');
    setSelectedOutreach([]);
    await fetchOutreach();
    await fetchData();
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('Error bulk moving to warm:', err);  // Same issue
  } finally {
    setIsBulkMoving(false);
  }
};
```

**Fix needed:** Add `setSelectedOutreach([])` in catch block and display toast/alert for user feedback.

---

### 5. **No temperature_score on create**
**Location: Line 511** (`handleCreate` function)

When creating a new opportunity, the `temperature_score` is not initialized. The form object starts with just `{ name: '' }` (line 154) and the create handler doesn't set a default temperature score.

```typescript
const [form, setForm] = useState<CreateSalesPipelineOpportunityData & { next_meeting_at?: string; next_meeting_type?: string }>({ name: '' });
// ...
const handleCreate = async () => {
  if (!form.name.trim()) return;
  setIsSubmitting(true);
  try {
    await SalesPipelineService.create({ ...form, stage: form.stage || ('cold_dm' as OpportunityStage) });  // Line 511: no temperature_score
```

**Fix needed:** Add `temperature_score: 50` (or appropriate default) in the create call or form initialization.

---

### 6. **Outreach pagination selection race condition**
**Locations: Lines 1609, 1672, 1682, 1695, 1720, 1733, 1747, 1958, 1982, 1994** (All setOutreachPage calls)

While most pagination handlers properly clear `selectedOutreach`, there are several locations where `setOutreachPage` is called but `setSelectedOutreach([])` may not be called in proper sequence, creating a potential race condition where selection persists across pages.

**Examples:**
- Line 1609: Search filter changes
```typescript
setOutreachFilters(prev => ({ ...prev, searchTerm: value }));
setOutreachPage(1);
setSelectedOutreach([]);  // Order is correct here
```

- Line 1958, 1982, 1994: Pagination buttons - these do clear selection properly.

**Potential issue:** The selections might not clear synchronously before page change renders.

---

### 7. **Inline edit cell click propagation**
**Location: Line 1462** (Name field inline edit input)

The inline edit input cell for the name field correctly stops propagation:
```typescript
<Input
  // ...
  onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}  // Line 1462: correct
/>
```

**Location: Line 1507** (Deal value field inline edit input)

The inline edit input for deal_value also correctly stops propagation:
```typescript
<Input
  // ...
  onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}  // Line 1507: correct
/>
```

**Status:** The inline edit cells appear to have proper click propagation stopping in place. However, if there are other inline-editable cells (temperature, bucket, etc.) they should be verified for the same pattern.

---

### 8. **Activity log meeting time display format**
**Location: Line 3492** (Activity log popup meeting time display)

The meeting time display format is correctly padded with `padStart(2, '0')`, which properly formats minutes:

```typescript
{activityLogForm.meeting_time
  ? (() => { const [h, m] = activityLogForm.meeting_time!.split(':').map(Number); return `${h === 0 ? 12 : h > 12 ? h - 12 : h}:${String(m).padStart(2, '0')} ${h >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM'}`; })()  // Line 3492: correctly padded
  : 'Select time'}
```

**Status:** This display is correctly padded. The issue is in the INPUT/SELECTION (lines 3511, 3532) where values are created without padding.

---

## Summary

| Bug # | Issue | Lines | Severity |
|-------|-------|-------|----------|
| 1 | Activity form not fully reset | 778 | Medium |
| 2 | Meeting time minute not zero-padded | 3511, 3532 | Medium |
| 3 | Orbit resurrection uses created_at | 973 | Medium |
| 4 | Bulk ops don't clear selection/show errors | 1622-1623, 1637-1638 | High |
| 5 | No temperature_score on create | 511 | Medium |
| 6 | Pagination selection race condition | Multiple | Low |
| 7 | Inline edit click propagation | 1462, 1507 | Low (appears OK) |
| 8 | Activity log time format | 3492 | Low (appears OK) |

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 2026-02-25 13:14:37Z)**_

Perfect! Now I have all the information I need. Let me compile the complete bug location report:

## Bug Location Report for `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/crm/sales-pipeline/page.tsx`

### 1. **Activity form fields not reset on slide-over switch**
**Location: Lines 773-781** (`openSlideOver` function)

When switching between different opportunities in the slide-over, the `activityForm` is only partially reset. It resets `opportunity_id`, `type`, and `title`, but the `description`, `outcome`, `next_step`, and `next_step_date` fields persist from the previous opportunity.

```typescript
const openSlideOver = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity, guidance?: { label: string; hint: string }) => {
  setSlideOverOpp(opp);
  setSlideOverMode('view');
  setActionGuidance(guidance || null);
  fetchActivities(opp.id);
  setActivityForm({ opportunity_id: opp.id, type: 'note', title: '' });  // Line 778: Missing description, outcome, next_step reset
  setActivityMeetingDate(undefined);
  setActivityMeetingTime(undefined);
};
```

**Fix needed:** Add `description: '', outcome: '', next_step: '', next_step_date: undefined` to the reset at line 778.

---

### 2. **Meeting time format - minute zero-padding**
**Locations: Lines 3511 and 3532** (Activity log popup minute/hour selection)

When selecting minutes in the activity log popup, the minute value is not zero-padded when concatenated with the hour. This creates invalid time strings like "9:5" instead of "9:05".

**Line 3511** - Hour selection:
```typescript
const currentMin = activityLogForm.meeting_time ? activityLogForm.meeting_time.split(':')[1] : '00';
setActivityLogForm(f => ({ ...f, meeting_time: `${h}:${currentMin}` }));  // Missing padding
```

**Line 3532** - Minute selection:
```typescript
const currentHour = activityLogForm.meeting_time ? activityLogForm.meeting_time.split(':')[0] : '9';
setActivityLogForm(f => ({ ...f, meeting_time: `${currentHour}:${m}` }));  // m is not padded
```

**Fix needed:** Pad both values: `${String(h).padStart(2, '0')}:${String(m).padStart(2, '0')}`

---

### 3. **getNextAction orbit case - date field bug**
**Location: Line 973** (`getNextAction` function, 'orbit' case)

The orbit case uses `created_at` to calculate the 90-day resurrection check, but it should likely use `updated_at` to track when the opportunity was last updated in orbit status.

```typescript
case 'orbit': {
  const daysSinceCreated = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(opp.created_at).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));  // Line 973: using created_at
  if (daysSinceCreated > 90) {
    return { label: 'Resurrect', hint: '90+ days — re-engage or mark lost', priority: 'low', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 70, alternatives: [
      { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
    ]};
  }
  return { label: 'In Orbit', hint: '', priority: 'wait', actionType: 'none', isActionable: false, sortScore: 100, alternatives: [] };
}
```

**Fix needed:** Should probably use `updated_at` instead: `new Date(opp.updated_at).getTime()`

---

### 4. **Bulk operations error handling**
**Locations: Lines 1614-1627 and 1629-1642** (`handleBulkBump` and `handleBulkMoveToWarm`)

Both bulk operations have poor error handling:
- They don't clear `selectedOutreach` on error (only on success)
- They don't show error messages to the user (only console.error)

**handleBulkBump (Lines 1614-1627):**
```typescript
const handleBulkBump = async () => {
  if (selectedOutreach.length === 0 || isBulkBumping) return;
  setIsBulkBumping(true);
  try {
    await SalesPipelineService.bulkRecordBump(selectedOutreach);
    setSelectedOutreach([]);  // Only cleared on success
    await fetchOutreach();
    await fetchData();
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('Error bulk bumping:', err);  // No user-facing error message, selectedOutreach not cleared
  } finally {
    setIsBulkBumping(false);
  }
};
```

**handleBulkMoveToWarm (Lines 1629-1642):**
```typescript
const handleBulkMoveToWarm = async () => {
  if (selectedOutreach.length === 0 || isBulkMoving) return;
  setIsBulkMoving(true);
  try {
    await SalesPipelineService.bulkUpdateStage(selectedOutreach, 'warm');
    setSelectedOutreach([]);
    await fetchOutreach();
    await fetchData();
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('Error bulk moving to warm:', err);  // Same issue
  } finally {
    setIsBulkMoving(false);
  }
};
```

**Fix needed:** Add `setSelectedOutreach([])` in catch block and display toast/alert for user feedback.

---

### 5. **No temperature_score on create**
**Location: Line 511** (`handleCreate` function)

When creating a new opportunity, the `temperature_score` is not initialized. The form object starts with just `{ name: '' }` (line 154) and the create handler doesn't set a default temperature score.

```typescript
const [form, setForm] = useState<CreateSalesPipelineOpportunityData & { next_meeting_at?: string; next_meeting_type?: string }>({ name: '' });
// ...
const handleCreate = async () => {
  if (!form.name.trim()) return;
  setIsSubmitting(true);
  try {
    await SalesPipelineService.create({ ...form, stage: form.stage || ('cold_dm' as OpportunityStage) });  // Line 511: no temperature_score
```

**Fix needed:** Add `temperature_score: 50` (or appropriate default) in the create call or form initialization.

---

### 6. **Outreach pagination selection race condition**
**Locations: Lines 1609, 1672, 1682, 1695, 1720, 1733, 1747, 1958, 1982, 1994** (All setOutreachPage calls)

While most pagination handlers properly clear `selectedOutreach`, there are several locations where `setOutreachPage` is called but `setSelectedOutreach([])` may not be called in proper sequence, creating a potential race condition where selection persists across pages.

**Examples:**
- Line 1609: Search filter changes
```typescript
setOutreachFilters(prev => ({ ...prev, searchTerm: value }));
setOutreachPage(1);
setSelectedOutreach([]);  // Order is correct here
```

- Line 1958, 1982, 1994: Pagination buttons - these do clear selection properly.

**Potential issue:** The selections might not clear synchronously before page change renders.

---

### 7. **Inline edit cell click propagation**
**Location: Line 1462** (Name field inline edit input)

The inline edit input cell for the name field correctly stops propagation:
```typescript
<Input
  // ...
  onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}  // Line 1462: correct
/>
```

**Location: Line 1507** (Deal value field inline edit input)

The inline edit input for deal_value also correctly stops propagation:
```typescript
<Input
  // ...
  onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}  // Line 1507: correct
/>
```

**Status:** The inline edit cells appear to have proper click propagation stopping in place. However, if there are other inline-editable cells (temperature, bucket, etc.) they should be verified for the same pattern.

---

### 8. **Activity log meeting time display format**
**Location: Line 3492** (Activity log popup meeting time display)

The meeting time display format is correctly padded with `padStart(2, '0')`, which properly formats minutes:

```typescript
{activityLogForm.meeting_time
  ? (() => { const [h, m] = activityLogForm.meeting_time!.split(':').map(Number); return `${h === 0 ? 12 : h > 12 ? h - 12 : h}:${String(m).padStart(2, '0')} ${h >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM'}`; })()  // Line 3492: correctly padded
  : 'Select time'}
```

**Status:** This display is correctly padded. The issue is in the INPUT/SELECTION (lines 3511, 3532) where values are created without padding.

---

## Summary

| Bug # | Issue | Lines | Severity |
|-------|-------|-------|----------|
| 1 | Activity form not fully reset | 778 | Medium |
| 2 | Meeting time minute not zero-padded | 3511, 3532 | Medium |
| 3 | Orbit resurrection uses created_at | 973 | Medium |
| 4 | Bulk ops don't clear selection/show errors | 1622-1623, 1637-1638 | High |
| 5 | No temperature_score on create | 511 | Medium |
| 6 | Pagination selection race condition | Multiple | Low |
| 7 | Inline edit click propagation | 1462, 1507 | Low (appears OK) |
| 8 | Activity log time format | 3492 | Low (appears OK) |

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-25 13:15:57Z)**_

Build passes. Here's a summary of all the fixes applied:

**Fixes applied (6 bugs):**

1. **Activity form fields not fully reset on slide-over switch** (line 778) — Added `description: '', outcome: '', next_step: '', next_step_date: undefined` to the `setActivityForm` reset in `openSlideOver()`. Previously these fields persisted when switching between opps.

2. **Meeting time format inconsistency** (4 locations) — Zero-padded both hours and minutes in all time picker selections:
   - Slide-over hour picker (line 3033): `${h}:` → `${String(h).padStart(2, '0')}:`
   - Slide-over minute picker (line 3054): `${currentHour}:${m}` → `${currentHour}:${String(m).padStart(2, '0')}`
   - Activity log popup hour picker (line 3511): same fix
   - Activity log popup minute picker (line 3532): same fix
   - Also fixed default fallback from `'9'` to `'09'`

3. **Orbit resurrection uses `created_at` instead of `updated_at`** (line 973) — Changed to `opp.updated_at` so the 90-day check measures time since the deal was moved to orbit, not when it was first created.

4. **Bulk operations don't clear selection on error or show errors** — Added `alert()` for user-facing error messages and `setSelectedOutreach([])` in catch blocks for `handleBulkBump`, `handleBulkMoveToWarm`, and `handleBulkDelete`.

5. **No temperature_score on create** (line 511) — Added `temperature_score: form.temperature_score ?? 50` as a default when creating new opportunities.

6. **Outreach pagination selection** — Verified this was already properly handled (all `setOutreachPage` calls already had `setSelectedOutreach([])` nearby). No change needed.

---

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-25 13:20:39Z)**_

Build passes. Here's what changed:

**Before:** Small cards with a subtle border-left accent and light pastel backgrounds. The numbers were `text-2xl` and the icon sat in a small rounded box on the right. Easy to miss at a glance.

**After:** When a metric has issues (count > 0), the entire card fills with a bold solid color (red, orange, amber, rose, blue) with white text, a drop shadow, and a decorative circle accent in the background. Key improvements:

- **Full-color fill** when active — cards go from white to solid red/orange/amber/rose/blue, making problems impossible to miss
- **Larger numbers** — `text-3xl font-black` for the count, much more prominent
- **Icon + label at top** — icon moved inline next to the label for a cleaner hierarchy
- **Shadow + ring** — `shadow-lg` and `ring-1` give active cards depth and pop off the page
- **Meetings card bonus** — when there are meetings today, it also shows "+N this wk" for the remaining week count
- **Quiet when clear** — cards stay white/gray when count is 0, so they don't cry wolf

---

  3873→              </Tooltip>
