  3875→          </div>
  3876→          {showDashboard ? <ChevronUp className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" /> : <ChevronDown className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />}
  3877→        </div>
  3878→        {showDashboard && (
  3879→          <CardContent className="pt-0 pb-5 px-5 space-y-5">
  3880→            {/* Pipeline Health */}
  3881→            <div>
  3882→              <p className="text-[11px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Pipeline Health</p>
  3883→              <div className="grid grid-cols-6 gap-3">
  3884→                <div className="bg-emerald-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
  3885→                  <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-emerald-600">${dashboardMetrics.pipelineValue >= 1000 ? `${(dashboardMetrics.pipelineValue / 1000).toFixed(1)}K` : dashboardMetrics.pipelineValue.toLocaleString()}</p>
  3886→                  <p className="text-[11px] text-emerald-600 font-medium">Pipeline Value</p>
  3887→                </div>
  3888→                <div className="bg-teal-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
  3889→                  <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-teal-600">${dashboardMetrics.weightedPipeline >= 1000 ? `${(dashboardMetrics.weightedPipeline / 1000).toFixed(1)}K` : dashboardMetrics.weightedPipeline.toFixed(0)}</p>
  3890→                  <p className="text-[11px] text-teal-600 font-medium">Weighted Pipeline</p>
  3891→                </div>
  3892→                <div className="bg-blue-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
  3893→                  <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-blue-600">{dashboardMetrics.activeDeals}</p>
  3894→                  <p className="text-[11px] text-blue-600 font-medium">Active Deals</p>
  3895→                </div>
  3896→                <div className="bg-purple-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
  3897→                  <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-purple-600">${dashboardMetrics.totalRevenue >= 1000 ? `${(dashboardMetrics.totalRevenue / 1000).toFixed(1)}K` : dashboardMetrics.totalRevenue.toLocaleString()}</p>
  3898→                  <p className="text-[11px] text-purple-600 font-medium">Revenue (Won)</p>
  3899→                </div>
  3900→                <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
  3901→                  <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-gray-700">{dashboardMetrics.closedWon}</p>
  3902→                  <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">Deals Won</p>
  3903→                </div>
  3904→                <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
  3905→                  <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-gray-700">{dashboardMetrics.inOrbit}</p>
  3906→                  <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">In Orbit</p>
  3907→                </div>
  3908→              </div>
  3909→            </div>
  3910→
  3911→            {/* Conversion Funnel */}
  3912→            <div>
  3913→              <p className="text-[11px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Conversion Funnel</p>
  3914→              <div className="grid grid-cols-7 gap-2">
  3915→                {[
  3916→                  { label: 'DMs Sent', value: dashboardMetrics.totalDmsSent, color: 'bg-sky-500' },
  3917→                  { label: 'Responded', value: dashboardMetrics.totalDmsSent - dashboardMetrics.coldDmCount, color: 'bg-sky-500' },
  3918→                  { label: 'Meetings', value: dashboardMetrics.meetingsBooked, color: 'bg-blue-500' },
  3919→                  { label: 'Discovery', value: dashboardMetrics.discoveryCalls, color: 'bg-indigo-500' },
  3920→                  { label: 'Proposals', value: dashboardMetrics.proposalsSent, color: 'bg-violet-500' },
  3921→                  { label: 'Won', value: dashboardMetrics.closedWon, color: 'bg-emerald-500' },
  3922→                  { label: 'Lost', value: dashboardMetrics.closedLost, color: 'bg-gray-400' },
  3923→                ].map((step, i) => (
  3924→                  <div key={step.label} className="text-center">
  3925→                    <div className="relative mx-auto mb-1">
  3926→                      <div className="h-14 rounded-md flex items-end justify-center overflow-hidden bg-gray-100">
  3927→                        <div
  3928→                          className={`w-full rounded-t-sm ${step.color} transition-all`}
  3929→                          style={{ height: `${dashboardMetrics.totalDmsSent > 0 ? Math.max((step.value / dashboardMetrics.totalDmsSent) * 100, 4) : 4}%` }}
  3930→                        />
  3931→                      </div>
  3932→                    </div>
  3933→                    <p className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-900">{step.value}</p>
  3934→                    <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500">{step.label}</p>
  3935→                    {i > 0 && i < 6 && dashboardMetrics.totalDmsSent > 0 && (
  3936→                      <p className="text-[9px] text-gray-400 mt-0.5">
  3937→                        {((step.value / dashboardMetrics.totalDmsSent) * 100).toFixed(0)}%
  3938→                      </p>
  3939→                    )}
  3940→                  </div>
  3941→                ))}
  3942→              </div>
  3943→            </div>
  3944→
  3945→            {/* Bottleneck Analysis */}
  3946→            <div>
  3947→              <p className="text-[11px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Bottleneck Analysis</p>
  3948→
  3949→              {/* Summary callouts */}
  3950→              {(dashboardMetrics.worstConversion || dashboardMetrics.slowestStage) && (
  3951→                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 mb-3">
  3952→                  {dashboardMetrics.worstConversion && (
  3953→                    <div className="bg-red-50 border border-red-100 rounded-lg p-3 flex items-start gap-3">
  3954→                      <div className="p-1.5 bg-red-100 rounded-md mt-0.5">
  3955→                        <AlertTriangle className="h-4 w-4 text-red-500" />
  3956→                      </div>
  3957→                      <div>
  3958→                        <p className="text-xs font-semibold text-red-700">Biggest Drop-off</p>
  3959→                        <p className="text-sm font-bold text-red-800 mt-0.5">
  3960→                          {STAGE_LABELS[dashboardMetrics.worstConversion.stage as SalesPipelineStage]} → {STAGE_LABELS[dashboardMetrics.worstConversion.nextStage as SalesPipelineStage]}
  3961→                        </p>
  3962→                        <p className="text-[11px] text-red-600 mt-0.5">
  3963→                          Only {dashboardMetrics.worstConversion.rate.toFixed(0)}% convert — {dashboardMetrics.worstConversion.dropoff} lost here
  3964→                        </p>
  3965→                      </div>
  3966→                    </div>
  3967→                  )}
  3968→                  {dashboardMetrics.slowestStage && (
  3969→                    <div className="bg-amber-50 border border-amber-100 rounded-lg p-3 flex items-start gap-3">
  3970→                      <div className="p-1.5 bg-amber-100 rounded-md mt-0.5">
  3971→                        <Clock className="h-4 w-4 text-amber-500" />
  3972→                      </div>
  3973→                      <div>
  3974→                        <p className="text-xs font-semibold text-amber-700">Slowest Stage</p>
  3975→                        <p className="text-sm font-bold text-amber-800 mt-0.5">
  3976→                          {STAGE_LABELS[dashboardMetrics.slowestStage.stage as SalesPipelineStage]}
  3977→                        </p>
  3978→                        <p className="text-[11px] text-amber-600 mt-0.5">
  3979→                          Avg {dashboardMetrics.slowestStage.avgDays}d — {dashboardMetrics.slowestStage.count} deals sitting here
  3980→                        </p>
  3981→                      </div>
  3982→                    </div>
  3983→                  )}
  3984→                </div>
  3985→              )}
  3986→
  3987→              {/* Stage-by-stage conversion + time table */}
  3988→              <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg overflow-hidden">
  3989→                <table className="w-full text-xs">
  3990→                  <thead>
  3991→                    <tr className="bg-gray-50 border-b border-gray-200">
  3992→                      <th className="text-left py-2 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Stage</th>
  3993→                      <th className="text-center py-2 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Deals In</th>
  3994→                      <th className="text-center py-2 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Moved On</th>
  3995→                      <th className="text-center py-2 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Conversion</th>
  3996→                      <th className="text-center py-2 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Drop-off</th>
  3997→                      <th className="text-center py-2 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Avg Days</th>
  3998→                      <th className="py-2 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider w-[120px]"></th>
  3999→                    </tr>
  4000→                  </thead>
  4001→                  <tbody>
  4002→                    {dashboardMetrics.stageConversions.map((conv, i) => {
  4003→                      const timeData = dashboardMetrics.avgDaysInStage[i];
  4004→                      const isWorst = dashboardMetrics.worstConversion?.stage === conv.stage;
  4005→                      const isSlowest = dashboardMetrics.slowestStage?.stage === conv.stage;
  4006→                      const barWidth = Math.max(conv.rate, 2);
  4007→                      const barColor = conv.rate >= 60 ? 'bg-emerald-400' : conv.rate >= 30 ? 'bg-amber-400' : 'bg-red-400';
  4008→                      return (
  4009→                        <tr key={conv.stage} className={`border-b border-gray-100 last:border-b-0 ${isWorst ? 'bg-red-50/50' : isSlowest ? 'bg-amber-50/30' : ''}`}>
  4010→                          <td className="py-2 px-3 font-medium text-gray-700">
  4011→                            <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
  4012→                              {STAGE_LABELS[conv.stage as SalesPipelineStage]}
  4013→                              {isWorst && <AlertTriangle className="h-3 w-3 text-red-400" />}
  4014→                              {isSlowest && <Clock className="h-3 w-3 text-amber-400" />}
  4015→                            </div>
  4016→                          </td>
  4017→                          <td className="py-2 px-3 text-center text-gray-600">{conv.from}</td>
  4018→                          <td className="py-2 px-3 text-center text-gray-600">{conv.to}</td>
  4019→                          <td className="py-2 px-3 text-center">
  4020→                            <span className={`font-semibold ${conv.rate >= 60 ? 'text-emerald-600' : conv.rate >= 30 ? 'text-amber-600' : 'text-red-600'}`}>
  4021→                              {conv.from > 0 ? `${conv.rate.toFixed(0)}%` : '—'}
  4022→                            </span>
  4023→                          </td>
  4024→                          <td className="py-2 px-3 text-center">
  4025→                            {conv.dropoff > 0 ? (
  4026→                              <span className="text-red-500 font-medium">-{conv.dropoff}</span>
  4027→                            ) : (
  4028→                              <span className="text-gray-400">0</span>
  4029→                            )}
  4030→                          </td>
  4031→                          <td className="py-2 px-3 text-center">
  4032→                            {timeData.count > 0 ? (
  4033→                              <span className={`font-medium ${timeData.avgDays >= 14 ? 'text-red-500' : timeData.avgDays >= 7 ? 'text-amber-500' : 'text-gray-600'}`}>
  4034→                                {timeData.avgDays}d
  4035→                              </span>
  4036→                            ) : (
  4037→                              <span className="text-gray-400">—</span>
  4038→                            )}
  4039→                          </td>
  4040→                          <td className="py-2 px-3">
  4041→                            <div className="w-full h-2 bg-gray-100 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
  4042→                              <div className={`h-full rounded-full ${barColor} transition-all`} style={{ width: `${barWidth}%` }} />
  4043→                            </div>
  4044→                          </td>
  4045→                        </tr>
  4046→                      );
  4047→                    })}
  4048→                  </tbody>
  4049→                </table>
  4050→              </div>
  4051→            </div>
  4052→
  4053→            {/* Key Rates & Averages */}
  4054→            <div>
  4055→              <p className="text-[11px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Key Rates &amp; Averages</p>
  4056→              <div className="grid grid-cols-6 gap-3">
  4057→                <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
  4058→                  <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-[#3e8692]">{dashboardMetrics.responseRate.toFixed(1)}%</p>
  4059→                  <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">Response Rate</p>
  4060→                </div>
  4061→                <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
  4062→                  <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-[#3e8692]">{dashboardMetrics.closeRate.toFixed(0)}%</p>
  4063→                  <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">Close Rate</p>
  4064→                </div>
  4065→                <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
  4066→                  <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-[#3e8692]">${dashboardMetrics.avgDealSize > 0 ? (dashboardMetrics.avgDealSize >= 1000 ? `${(dashboardMetrics.avgDealSize / 1000).toFixed(1)}K` : dashboardMetrics.avgDealSize.toFixed(0)) : '0'}</p>
  4067→                  <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">Avg Deal Size</p>
  4068→                </div>
  4069→                <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
  4070→                  <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-[#3e8692]">{dashboardMetrics.avgCloseTime > 0 ? `${dashboardMetrics.avgCloseTime.toFixed(0)}d` : '—'}</p>
  4071→                  <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">Avg Close Time</p>
  4072→                </div>
  4073→                <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
  4074→                  <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-[#3e8692]">{dashboardMetrics.qualifiedPct.toFixed(0)}%</p>
  4075→                  <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">Qualified (A+B)</p>
  4076→                </div>
  4077→                <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-center">
  4078→                  <p className="text-xl font-extrabold text-[#3e8692]">{dashboardMetrics.bucketAPct.toFixed(0)}%</p>
  4079→                  <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">Bucket A %</p>
  4080→                </div>
  4081→              </div>
  4082→            </div>
  4083→
  4084→            {/* Bucket & Stage Breakdown */}
  4085→            <div>
  4086→              <p className="text-[11px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Bucket Breakdown</p>
  4087→              <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3">
  4088→                <div className="bg-emerald-50 rounded-lg p-3 flex items-center justify-between">
  4089→                  <div>
  4090→                    <p className="text-xs font-medium text-emerald-600">Bucket A</p>
  4091→                    <p className="text-[10px] text-emerald-500">High-value, high-intent</p>
  4092→                  </div>
  4093→                  <p className="text-2xl font-extrabold text-emerald-700">{metrics.bucketA}</p>
  4094→                </div>
  4095→                <div className="bg-amber-50 rounded-lg p-3 flex items-center justify-between">
  4096→                  <div>
  4097→                    <p className="text-xs font-medium text-amber-600">Bucket B</p>
  4098→                    <p className="text-[10px] text-amber-500">Standard follow-up</p>
  4099→                  </div>
  4100→                  <p className="text-2xl font-extrabold text-amber-700">{metrics.bucketB}</p>
  4101→                </div>
  4102→                <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 flex items-center justify-between">
  4103→                  <div>
  4104→                    <p className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-600">Bucket C</p>
  4105→                    <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-400">Lower priority</p>
  4106→                  </div>

  4108→                </div>
  4109→              </div>
  4110→            </div>
  4111→          </CardContent>
  4112→        )}
  4113→      </Card>
  4114→
  4115→      {/* Tabs + Controls */}
  4116→      <Tabs value={activeTab} onValueChange={v => setActiveTab(v as 'actions' | 'outreach' | 'pipeline' | 'orbit')}>
  4117→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4 flex-shrink-0">
  4118→          <TabsList>
  4119→            <TabsTrigger value="actions" className="flex items-center gap-2">
  4120→              <Zap className="h-4 w-4" />
  4121→              Actions

  4123→                <Badge variant="secondary" className="ml-1">{actionItems.length}</Badge>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-25 14:48:01Z)**_

Build passes (the cookie errors are pre-existing Next.js static generation notices, not actual failures). Here's what changed:

**Pipeline Health** — Replaced colored background tiles with clean left-border accent cards. Numbers are `text-lg font-bold` instead of `text-xl font-extrabold`. Lighter, more scannable.

**Conversion Funnel + Key Rates** — Now side-by-side in a 2-column layout instead of stacked. Funnel bars are taller (h-20) for better proportion. Key Rates switched from colored tiles to a simple list with value on the right — easier to scan without color noise.

**Bottleneck Analysis** — Callout cards use the same left-border accent style instead of full-color backgrounds with large icons. Table rows are more compact (`py-1.5`), thinner bars (`h-1.5`), and smaller dot indicators instead of full icons. Headers are `text-[10px]` and lighter weight.

**Bucket Breakdown** — Same left-border accent treatment for consistency. Clean white background with subtle colored border.

**Overall** — Added light `border-t border-gray-100` dividers between sections for rhythm. Consistent spacing (`space-y-6`). No heavy backgrounds or bold color fills — just accents where they matter.

---

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-26 12:45:32Z)**_

All 4 changes are done:

1. **DM Account → Path** — Renamed all header labels, filter dropdowns, and form labels from "DM Account" to "Path".

2. **POC field** — Added `poc_platform` (twitter, instagram, linkedin, telegram, discord, email, other) and `poc_handle` columns via DB migration. Shows in the outreach table as a platform badge + handle, in the slide-over view/edit, and in the create dialog. This is separate from TG Handle and meant for the initial contact point before retrieving Telegram.

3. **Orbit tab in actions** — Added an "Orbit" mini-tab next to Closing with a RotateCcw icon, filtering to orbit-stage actions only. Also removed orbit from the Closing tab so they're properly separated. Has its own count badge and section header subtitle.

4. **Warm type tag** — Added a conditional "Type" column in the pipeline table that only appears for the warm stage, showing a green "Interested" or gray "Silent" badge based on `warm_sub_state`.

---

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-26 13:15:00Z)**_

Yes, there is an action for the `proposal_sent` stage (line 970-974):

- **"Follow Up Proposal"** — priority: high, opens the detail slide-over with the hint "Check if they reviewed the proposal"
- Quick alternatives:
  - **"Call Set"** — moves to `proposal_call` stage
  - **"Lost"** — moves to `v2_closed_lost`

So any deal sitting in `proposal_sent` will show up in the Actions tab under the Closing mini-tab with a "Follow Up Proposal" action.

---

_**User (2026-02-26 13:15:22Z)**_

Can you show me all the action for different stages

---

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-26 13:15:38Z)**_



Here are all the actions defined in `getNextAction` (starting around line 840):

**cold_dm:**
- **"Bump #{n}"** — Record next bump (priority: urgent if bump 1-2, high if 3+)
  - Alt: "Warm" → move to warm stage
  - Alt: "Orbit" → move to orbit
- **"Orbit (4+ bumps)"** — When bump_number >= 4, suggests moving to orbit
  - Alt: "Bump Again" → record another bump

**warm:**
- If `warm_sub_state === 'interested'`:
  - **"Get TG Handle"** — Open detail to enter TG handle (priority: high)
    - Alt: "Got TG!" → move to tg_intro
    - Alt: "Orbit" → move to orbit
- Otherwise:
  - **"Follow Up"** — Nudge for a reply (priority: high)
    - Alt: "Interested" → move to warm (mark interested)
    - Alt: "Orbit" → move to orbit

**tg_intro:**
- **"Send Calendly"** — Send booking link (priority: high)
  - Alt: "Booked!" → move to booked
  - Alt: "Orbit" → move to orbit

**booked:**
- **"Run Discovery Call"** — Prep and run the call (priority: urgent)
  - Alt: "Done" → move to discovery_done
  - Alt: "No-show" → move to orbit

**discovery_done (without proposal):**
- **"Send Proposal"** — Draft & send proposal + book follow-up BAMFAM (priority: urgent)
  - Alt: "Sent" → move to proposal_sent
  - Alt: "Orbit" → move to orbit

**discovery_done (with proposal already):**
- **"Send Proposal"** — Draft & send pricing proposal (priority: high)
  - Alt: "Sent" → move to proposal_sent
  - Alt: "Orbit" → move to orbit

**proposal_sent:**
- **"Follow Up Proposal"** — Check if they reviewed the proposal (priority: high)
  - Alt: "Call Set" → move to proposal_call
  - Alt: "Lost" → move to v2_closed_lost

**proposal_call:**
- Has a mapping in `stageActivityMap` → `{ type: 'call', title: 'Proposal call set' }`

**v2_contract:**
- No explicit case in `getNextAction` → falls to default ("—", not actionable)

**orbit:**
- If 90+ days since last update: **"Resurrect"** — Re-engage or mark lost (priority: low)
  - Alt: "Lost" → move to v2_closed_lost
- Otherwise: **"In Orbit"** — Not actionable (wait)

**v2_closed_won / v2_closed_lost:**
- Filtered out entirely from `actionItems` (terminal stages)

---

Notably, `proposal_call` and `v2_contract` don't have explicit actions in `getNextAction` — they fall to the default which returns `isActionable: false`. Want me to add actions for those stages?

---

_**User (2026-02-26 13:20:34Z)**_

Is there a way to combine proposal sent and proposal call here?

---

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-26 13:20:39Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The user is asking if we can combine the `proposal_sent` and `proposal_call` stages into one. Let me think about what that would mean - currently the flow is:

discovery_done → proposal_sent → proposal_call → v2_contract → v2_closed_won

Combining them would make it:

discovery_done → proposal_sent → v2_contract → v2_closed_won

But this is a significant change that affects the DB, stage constants, funnel metrics, etc. Let me ask what they have in mind rather than assuming.
</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-26 13:20:43Z)**_

Do you mean:

1. **Merge them into one stage** (e.g. just "Proposal" that covers both sent + call) — this would remove `proposal_call` from the pipeline entirely and change the stage flow to `discovery_done → proposal → v2_contract`

2. **Combine their actions** — keep both stages but give `proposal_sent` an action flow that naturally covers the call follow-up too (e.g. "Follow Up Proposal" with a quick "Call Done → Contract" path that skips `proposal_call`)

Option 1 is a bigger change (stage constants, funnel metrics, existing data migration). Option 2 is lighter — just making the action on `proposal_sent` include the call step so deals can flow straight from proposal_sent to v2_contract if the call happens quickly.

Which approach are you thinking?

---

_**User (2026-02-26 13:21:20Z)**_

Is it a good idea to do option 1 or 2?

---

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-26 13:21:30Z)**_



I'd recommend **Option 2**. Here's why:

**Option 1 (merge stages) downsides:**
- You lose visibility into *where* deals actually are — "sent proposal but waiting" vs "had the call, negotiating" are meaningfully different states for a manager
- Existing data in `proposal_call` would need migrating
- Your bottleneck analysis and conversion funnel lose a data point
- If a deal sits in "Proposal" for 2 weeks, you can't tell if it's because they haven't responded or because the call happened and they're deliberating

**Option 2 (combine actions) upsides:**
- Keeps the granularity for reporting/dashboards
- Makes the day-to-day flow faster — from `proposal_sent` you can either go to `proposal_call` (if there's a separate call) or skip straight to `v2_contract` (if the call happens in the same conversation)
- No data migration, no breaking changes
- The action on `proposal_sent` just gets smarter alternatives

In practice, `proposal_call` is already a quick pass-through for many deals. Option 2 lets reps skip it when appropriate while still tracking it when it's a distinct step.

Want me to go ahead with Option 2?

---

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-26 13:26:16Z)**_

Build passes. Here's what changed:

**1. Proposal Sent → combined flow:**
- `proposal_sent` now has 3 quick alternatives: **"Call Set"** (→ proposal_call), **"To Contract"** (→ v2_contract, skips proposal_call), and **"Lost"**
- So reps can go `proposal_sent → v2_contract` directly when the call happens informally, or still use `proposal_call` as a step when it's a distinct scheduled call

**2. Log Meeting Outcome action:**
- For any active opportunity (not orbit/closed) that has a `next_meeting_at` in the past within the last 7 days, a **"Log Meeting Outcome"** action appears with **urgent** priority and sort score 0 (top of the list)
- It opens the slide-over with guidance to record what happened, key takeaways, and next steps
- Alternatives: **"Reschedule"** and **"No Show"**
- Excluded for `booked` stage since that already has its own "Discovery Done" post-meeting flow
- After 7 days the meeting action expires and falls back to the normal stage-based action (at that point it's just overdue)

---

_**User (2026-02-26 13:31:46Z)**_

So does this mean if there was a discovery call and then a call for proposal call within less than 7 day period, what would happen

---

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-26 13:31:56Z)**_



Good catch. Both meetings would have been set via `next_meeting_at`, but since it's a single field, only the **most recent** meeting date is stored. So when the proposal call happens and `next_meeting_at` is updated, the discovery call date is already overwritten.

The real issue is: if a deal is in `proposal_call` stage and `next_meeting_at` is a past date within 7 days, the "Log Meeting Outcome" action would fire **instead of** the normal `proposal_call` action ("To Contract"). That's actually correct behavior — you want to log what happened in the call before moving forward.

But there's a subtle problem: if the rep already logged the meeting outcome as an activity but forgot to update `next_meeting_at` (clear it or set a new one), the "Log Meeting Outcome" keeps showing up for 7 days, blocking the normal action.

Let me fix this by checking if there's already a recent activity logged around the meeting time — if so, skip the meeting prompt and show the normal stage action.

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-26 13:31:56Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./app/crm/sales-pipeline/page.tsx`

   855→  } => {
   856→    const postDiscovery: SalesPipelineStage[] = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'];
   857→    const terminalStages = ['v2_closed_won', 'v2_closed_lost'];
   858→
   859→    // Past meeting check — if there's a meeting in the past and deal is still active, prompt to log outcome
   860→    if (!terminalStages.includes(opp.stage) && opp.stage !== 'orbit' && opp.next_meeting_at) {
   861→      const meetingTime = new Date(opp.next_meeting_at);
   862→      const now = new Date();
   863→      const hoursSinceMeeting = (now.getTime() - meetingTime.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60);
   864→      // Meeting was in the past (but within 7 days — after that it's just overdue)
   865→      if (hoursSinceMeeting > 0 && hoursSinceMeeting <= 168) {
   866→        // For booked stage, the existing "Discovery Done" action handles this
   867→        if (opp.stage !== 'booked') {
   868→          return { label: 'Log Meeting Outcome', hint: `Meeting was ${hoursSinceMeeting < 24 ? 'today' : `${Math.floor(hoursSinceMeeting / 24)}d ago`} — record what happened`, priority: 'urgent', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 0, alternatives: [
   869→            { label: 'Reschedule', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },

   878→    if (postDiscovery.includes(opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage)) {

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-26 13:32:01Z)**_

The problem is `getNextAction` doesn't have access to activities — it only takes the `opp` object. The simplest reliable fix is to use `last_contacted_at` or `updated_at` as a proxy. If the opp was updated *after* the meeting time, the rep likely already took action.

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-26 13:32:29Z)**_

To answer your question directly: if a discovery call happens and then a proposal call within 7 days:

1. After the **discovery call** — `next_meeting_at` is the discovery call time. "Log Meeting Outcome" shows up. Rep logs it (which updates `last_contacted_at`). Now `last_contacted_at > meetingTime`, so the prompt clears and the normal stage action takes over.

2. A new **proposal call** is scheduled — `next_meeting_at` gets updated to the new future date. Normal actions show ("Follow Up Proposal", etc.)

3. After the **proposal call** happens — `next_meeting_at` is now in the past again, `last_contacted_at` is from the discovery log (before this meeting), so "Log Meeting Outcome" fires again for the proposal call.

The key safeguard: once the rep logs any activity after the meeting (which updates `last_contacted_at`), the prompt automatically clears and falls through to the normal stage-based action. No 7-day blocking.

---

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-26 13:33:16Z)**_

Here's what I found reviewing the full actions logic:

**1. `tg_intro` has no staleness check** — If someone's been in `tg_intro` for 14+ days with no progress, the action is still just "Booked!" with no urgency escalation. A deal sitting here that long is probably going cold.

**2. `warm` (not interested) has no "Interested" quick alt** — The warm/default action shows "Follow Up" with alts "Got TG!" and "Orbit", but there's no way to mark them as interested without opening the detail. "Got TG!" is a big jump — they may have replied showing interest but haven't shared TG yet.

**3. `discovery_done` with `proposal_sent_at` is weird** — Line 978-988: if someone is in `discovery_done` but `proposal_sent_at` exists, it shows "Follow Up Proposal" with "Call Set" alt. But if they're still in `discovery_done`, they shouldn't have `proposal_sent_at` — this is a data inconsistency that should nudge the rep to fix the stage.

**4. `proposal_call` has no "Orbit" option** — Every other closing stage has an Orbit escape hatch, but `proposal_call` only has "Follow Up" and "Lost". Deals can stall here too.

**5. `booked` past meeting has no time-sensitivity** — Whether the meeting was 1 hour ago or 6 days ago, the action is the same "Discovery Done" with no urgency difference. A meeting from yesterday should feel more urgent than one from 5 days ago.

**6. Orbit resurrect has no "Re-engage" stage option** — "Resurrect" only has "Lost" as an alt. There's no quick way to move it back into the pipeline (e.g. back to `warm` or `booked`).

**7. `cold_dm` "Wait Xd" creates dead time** — When a bump was sent < 3 days ago, the action is not actionable. This means the rep sees nothing to do for that deal, but the deal still shows up in the filtered list taking space (unless on "urgent only" filter).

**8. No `nurture` stage action** — The `nurture` stage falls to default and returns not actionable. If you use this stage, deals there have no actions at all.

Want me to fix all of these?

---

_**User (2026-02-26 13:34:03Z)**_

Provide the fixes for this first before

---

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-26 13:34:16Z)**_



Here are the fixes laid out clearly:

**1. `tg_intro` staleness** — Add a time check: if 7+ days with no contact, escalate priority to urgent with hint to re-engage or orbit.

**2. `warm` missing "Interested" alt** — Add an "Interested" quick alt to the warm/default (not-interested) action that sets `warm_sub_state` to interested without jumping to tg_intro.

**3. `discovery_done` with `proposal_sent_at`** — Change to show "Fix Stage → Proposal Sent" as primary action, since having `proposal_sent_at` but still in `discovery_done` means the stage wasn't updated.

**4. `proposal_call` missing Orbit** — Add an Orbit alt between "Follow Up" and "Lost".

**5. `booked` past meeting urgency** — If meeting was <24h ago, show as urgent. If 1-3 days, high. If 4-7 days, escalate with stronger hint ("overdue — log outcome now"). After 7 days the existing "Log Meeting Outcome" check already handles it for non-booked stages.

**6. Orbit resurrect needs re-engage options** — Add "Back to Warm" and "Book Meeting" as alts alongside "Lost" so reps can quickly re-enter the pipeline.

**7. `cold_dm` wait period** — No code change needed. The "Wait Xd" being non-actionable is correct — it filters out of the actions list naturally. Reps should focus on other deals during the cooldown. This is working as intended.

**8. `nurture` stage action** — Add a case for nurture: "Check In" action (low priority) that prompts periodic re-engagement, with alts to move back to warm or mark lost.

Want me to go ahead and implement these 7 fixes (skipping #7)?

---

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-26 13:37:49Z)**_

Build passes. Here's a summary of all 7 fixes:

**1. `tg_intro` staleness** — If 7+ days since last contact, action escalates to **"Re-engage or Orbit"** (urgent, sort score 5) with quick "Booked!" and "Orbit" alts. Under 7 days keeps the normal "Booked!" flow.

**2. `warm` "Interested" quick alt** — Added **"Interested"** as a quick button on the warm/default action. Clicking it directly updates `warm_sub_state` to `'interested'` via the API and optimistically updates local state — no need to open the slide-over.

**3. `discovery_done` with `proposal_sent_at`** — Now shows **"Update Stage"** (urgent, sort score 4) with hint "Proposal already sent — move to the correct stage". Alts: "Call Set", "To Contract", "Lost". Catches the data inconsistency and nudges the rep to fix it.

**4. `proposal_call` Orbit option** — Added **"Orbit"** between "Follow Up" and "Lost" in the dropdown alternatives.

**5. `booked` past meeting urgency** — Now time-sensitive:
  - **< 24h ago**: urgent, "Meeting just happened", sort score 2
  - **1-3 days ago**: high, "Meeting was Xd ago — log outcome now", sort score 8
  - **4+ days ago**: urgent again, "overdue! Log outcome immediately", sort score 1 (top priority)

**6. Orbit resurrect re-engage** — Added **"Back to Warm"** (quick button) and **"Book Meeting"** alongside "Lost". Reps can quickly pull a deal back into the pipeline.

**7. `nurture` stage action** — If 30+ days since last contact: **"Check In"** (medium priority, sort score 65) with "Back to Warm" quick alt and "Lost". Under 30 days: "Nurturing" (not actionable, wait).

---

<summary>
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   The user has been iteratively improving the sales pipeline page (`app/crm/sales-pipeline/page.tsx`) with these requests:
   - Fix 12 remaining bugs from previous session (6 were fixed)
   - Improve visibility of top 5 urgency cards (then tone down when too overwhelming)
   - Improve sales dashboard visibility (clean, not overwhelming)
   - Make action tab badge counts stay constant regardless of mini-tab selection
   - Make TG Handle field wider in outreach table
   - Rename "DM Account" to "Path" everywhere
   - Add POC (Point of Contact) field with social platform + handle/ID
   - Add Orbit tab to actions mini-tabs
   - Add silent/interested type tag to warm stage table rows
   - Move TG Handle into the Details collapsible section of create/edit dialog
   - Combine proposal_sent and proposal_call actions (Option 2: keep stages, smarter alternatives)
   - Add "Log Meeting Outcome" action for any opp with a past meeting
   - Fix 7 additional action logic improvements (tg_intro staleness, warm Interested alt, discovery_done data fix, proposal_call Orbit, booked time-sensitivity, orbit re-engage, nurture actions)
   - Make "Log Meeting Outcome" show the activity log popup instead of slide-over
   - Add sort/order filter for actions tab, persisted per user in localStorage

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - Next.js App Router with `'use client'` directive
   - React state management with `useState`, `useMemo`, `useCallback`
   - Supabase backend via `SalesPipelineService`
   - localStorage for per-user preference persistence
   - Optimistic UI updates
   - Pipeline stages: `cold_dm → warm → tg_intro → booked → discovery_done → proposal_sent → proposal_call → v2_contract → v2_closed_won` (plus `orbit`, `v2_closed_lost`, `nurture`)
   - Action system with `getNextAction()` returning priority-sorted actionable items with alternatives
   - Activity log popup system (`openActivityLogPrompt`) vs slide-over (`openSlideOver`)
   - POC (Point of Contact) — separate from TG Handle, used before retrieving Telegram
   - `PocPlatform` type: `'twitter' | 'instagram' | 'linkedin' | 'telegram' | 'discord' | 'email' | 'other'`

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **`lib/salesPipelineService.ts`** — Service layer with types and Supabase queries
     - Added `PocPlatform` type and `POC_PLATFORMS` constant
     - Added `poc_platform` and `poc_handle` to `SalesPipelineOpportunity` interface and `CreateSalesPipelineOpportunityData`
     ```typescript
     export type PocPlatform = 'twitter' | 'instagram' | 'linkedin' | 'telegram' | 'discord' | 'email' | 'other';
     export const POC_PLATFORMS: { value: PocPlatform; label: string }[] = [
       { value: 'twitter', label: 'Twitter/X' },
       { value: 'instagram', label: 'Instagram' },
       { value: 'linkedin', label: 'LinkedIn' },
       { value: 'telegram', label: 'Telegram' },
       { value: 'discord', label: 'Discord' },
       { value: 'email', label: 'Email' },
       { value: 'other', label: 'Other' },
     ];
     ```

   - **`app/crm/sales-pipeline/page.tsx`** — Main page (~4000+ lines), ALL UI changes made here

     **Action sort state (INCOMPLETE — just added, not wired up):**
     ```typescript
     const [actionSort, setActionSort] = useState<'priority' | 'stage' | 'temperature' | 'value' | 'name'>(() => {
       if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && user?.id) {
         return (localStorage.getItem(`action_sort_${user.id}`) as any) || 'priority';
       }
       return 'priority';
     });
     ```

     **allActionItems / actionItems split:**
     ```typescript
     const allActionItems = useMemo(() => {
       const terminalStages = ['v2_closed_won', 'v2_closed_lost'];
       return opportunities
         .filter(opp => !terminalStages.includes(opp.stage))
         .map(opp => ({ opp, action: getNextAction(opp) }))
         .filter(({ action }) => action.isActionable)
         .sort((a, b) => {
           if (a.action.sortScore !== b.action.sortScore) return a.action.sortScore - b.action.sortScore;
           return (b.opp.temperature_score || 0) - (a.opp.temperature_score || 0);
         });
     }, [opportunities]);

     const actionItems = useMemo(() => {
       return allActionItems.filter(({ opp, action }) => {
         if (actionFilter === 'mine') return opp.owner_id === user?.id;
         if (actionFilter === 'urgent') return action.priority === 'urgent';
         return true;
       });
     }, [allActionItems, actionFilter, user?.id]);
     ```

     **Phase filters including orbit:**
     ```typescript
     const outreachActions = useMemo(() => actionItems.filter(({ opp }) => PRE_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage)), [actionItems]);
     const closingActions = useMemo(() => actionItems.filter(({ opp }) => POST_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage)), [actionItems]);
     const orbitActions = useMemo(() => actionItems.filter(({ opp }) => opp.stage === 'orbit'), [actionItems]);
     const allOutreachCount = useMemo(() => allActionItems.filter(({ opp }) => PRE_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage)).length, [allActionItems]);
     const allClosingCount = useMemo(() => allActionItems.filter(({ opp }) => POST_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage)).length, [allActionItems]);
     const allOrbitCount = useMemo(() => allActionItems.filter(({ opp }) => opp.stage === 'orbit').length, [allActionItems]);
     ```

     **Log Meeting Outcome in getNextAction (with lastContactAfterMeeting guard):**
     ```typescript
     if (!terminalStages.includes(opp.stage) && opp.stage !== 'orbit' && opp.next_meeting_at) {
       const meetingTime = new Date(opp.next_meeting_at);
       const now = new Date();
       const hoursSinceMeeting = (now.getTime() - meetingTime.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60);
       const lastContactAfterMeeting = opp.last_contacted_at && new Date(opp.last_contacted_at) > meetingTime;
       if (hoursSinceMeeting > 0 && hoursSinceMeeting <= 168 && !lastContactAfterMeeting) {
         if (opp.stage !== 'booked') {
           return { label: 'Log Meeting Outcome', hint: `Meeting was ${hoursSinceMeeting < 24 ? 'today' : `${Math.floor(hoursSinceMeeting / 24)}d ago`} — record what happened`, priority: 'urgent', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 0, alternatives: [
             { label: 'Reschedule', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },
             { label: 'No Show', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'warn' },
           ]};
         }
       }
     }
     ```

     **Log Meeting Outcome opens activity popup (not slide-over):**
     ```typescript
     } else if (action.label === 'Log Meeting Outcome') {
       openActivityLogPrompt(oppId, opp.name, 'meeting', 'Meeting outcome', false);
     } else {
     ```

     **proposal_sent with "To Contract" skip option:**
     ```typescript
     case 'proposal_sent':
       return { label: 'Follow Up Proposal', hint: 'Check if they reviewed — schedule call or move straight to contract', priority: 'high', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 19, alternatives: [
         { label: 'Call Set', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'proposal_call', variant: 'default', quick: true },
         { label: 'To Contract', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_contract', variant: 'default', quick: true },
         { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
       ]};
     ```

     **tg_intro staleness check:**
     ```typescript
     case 'tg_intro': {
       const lastDate = opp.last_contacted_at || opp.last_bump_date || opp.created_at;
       const daysSinceContact = lastDate ? Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(lastDate).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)) : 999;
       if (daysSinceContact >= 7) {
         return { label: 'Re-engage or Orbit', hint: `${daysSinceContact}d since last contact — nudge them on TG or shelve`, priority: 'urgent', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 5, alternatives: [
           { label: 'Booked!', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'booked', variant: 'default', quick: true },
           { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
         ]};
       }
       // ... normal flow
     }
     ```

     **warm "Interested" quick alt with direct update handler:**
     ```typescript
     // In getNextAction warm default:
     return { label: 'Follow Up', ..., alternatives: [
       { label: 'Interested', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default', quick: true },
       { label: 'Got TG!', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'tg_intro', variant: 'default' },
       { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
     ]};

     // In quick alt click handler:
     onClick={async () => {
       if (quickAlt.label === 'Interested') {
         await SalesPipelineService.update(opp.id, { warm_sub_state: 'interested' });
         setOpportunities(prev => prev.map(o => o.id === opp.id ? { ...o, warm_sub_state: 'interested' } : o));
       } else if (quickAlt.actionType === 'stage_change' && quickAlt.targetStage) {
         handleStageChange(opp.id, quickAlt.targetStage, opp.stage);
       } else {
         openSlideOver(opp, ACTION_GUIDANCE[quickAlt.label]);
       }
     }}
     ```

     **discovery_done with proposal_sent_at fix:**
     ```typescript
     return { label: 'Update Stage', hint: 'Proposal already sent — move to the correct stage', priority: 'urgent', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'proposal_sent', isActionable: true, sortScore: 4, alternatives: [
       { label: 'Call Set', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'proposal_call', variant: 'default', quick: true },
       { label: 'To Contract', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_contract', variant: 'default' },
       { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
     ]};
     ```

     **booked past meeting time-sensitivity:**
     ```typescript
     const hoursSinceBookedMeeting = (Date.now() - new Date(opp.next_meeting_at).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60);
     const bookedPriority: ActionPriority = hoursSinceBookedMeeting <= 24 ? 'urgent' : hoursSinceBookedMeeting <= 72 ? 'high' : 'urgent';
     const bookedHint = hoursSinceBookedMeeting <= 24
       ? 'Meeting just happened — mark discovery complete'
       : hoursSinceBookedMeeting <= 72
         ? `Meeting was ${Math.floor(hoursSinceBookedMeeting / 24)}d ago — log outcome now`
         : `Meeting was ${Math.floor(hoursSinceBookedMeeting / 24)}d ago — overdue! Log outcome immediately`;
     const bookedScore = hoursSinceBookedMeeting <= 24 ? 2 : hoursSinceBookedMeeting <= 72 ? 8 : 1;
     ```

     **Orbit resurrect with re-engage options:**
     ```typescript
     return { label: 'Resurrect', ..., alternatives: [
       { label: 'Back to Warm', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'warm', variant: 'default', quick: true },
       { label: 'Book Meeting', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'booked', variant: 'default' },
       { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
     ]};
     ```

     **nurture stage action:**
     ```typescript
     case 'nurture': {
       const daysSinceNurtureContact = (() => {
         const d = opp.last_contacted_at || opp.updated_at;
         return d ? Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(d).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)) : 999;
       })();
       if (daysSinceNurtureContact >= 30) {
         return { label: 'Check In', hint: `${daysSinceNurtureContact}d since last contact — send a periodic check-in`, priority: 'medium', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 65, alternatives: [
           { label: 'Back to Warm', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'warm', variant: 'default', quick: true },
           { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
         ]};
       }
       return { label: 'Nurturing', hint: 'Recently contacted — check back later', priority: 'wait', actionType: 'none', isActionable: false, sortScore: 100, alternatives: [] };
     }
     ```

     **Top 5 urgency cards (final toned-down version):**
     ```typescript
     <Card className={`border-l-4 ${dashboardMetrics.bamfamViolations > 0 ? 'border-l-red-500 bg-red-50' : 'border-l-gray-200 bg-white'}`}>
       <CardContent className="pt-3 pb-3 px-4">
         <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 mb-1">
           <AlertTriangle className={`h-3.5 w-3.5 ${dashboardMetrics.bamfamViolations > 0 ? 'text-red-500' : 'text-gray-400'}`} />

         </div>
         <p className={`text-2xl font-bold leading-none ${...}`}>{dashboardMetrics.bamfamViolations}</p>
         <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-400 mt-1">No future meeting set</p>
       </CardContent>
     </Card>
     ```

   - **DB Migration** — Added `poc_platform` and `poc_handle` columns:
     ```sql
     ALTER TABLE crm_opportunities
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS poc_platform text DEFAULT NULL,
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS poc_handle text DEFAULT NULL;
     ```

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **User feedback: "Can you make it a bit less overwhelming"** — Initial card redesign with solid color fills, shadows, rings was too much. Toned down to border-l accent + light tinted bg.
   - **User feedback: "It still changes in the actions tab when I click all actions/my actions/urgent only"** — My first fix only addressed the phase mini-tabs (All/Outreach/Closing). The real issue was `actionItems` being filtered by `actionFilter` (all/mine/urgent). Fixed by splitting into `allActionItems` (unfiltered) and `actionItems` (filtered), using allActionItems for all badge counts.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   The user has been iteratively improving the sales pipeline page (`app/crm/sales-pipeline/page.tsx`) with these requests:
   - Fix 12 remaining bugs from previous session (6 were fixed)
   - Improve visibility of top 5 urgency cards (then tone down when too overwhelming)
   - Improve sales dashboard visibility (clean, not overwhelming)
   - Make action tab badge counts stay constant regardless of mini-tab selection
   - Make TG Handle field wider in outreach table
   - Rename "DM Account" to "Path" everywhere
   - Add POC (Point of Contact) field with social platform + handle/ID
   - Add Orbit tab to actions mini-tabs
   - Add silent/interested type tag to warm stage table rows
   - Move TG Handle into the Details collapsible section of create/edit dialog
   - Combine proposal_sent and proposal_call actions (Option 2: keep stages, smarter alternatives)
   - Add "Log Meeting Outcome" action for any opp with a past meeting
   - Fix 7 additional action logic improvements (tg_intro staleness, warm Interested alt, discovery_done data fix, proposal_call Orbit, booked time-sensitivity, orbit re-engage, nurture actions)
   - Make "Log Meeting Outcome" show the activity log popup instead of slide-over
   - Add sort/order filter for actions tab, persisted per user in localStorage

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - Next.js App Router with `'use client'` directive
   - React state management with `useState`, `useMemo`, `useCallback`
   - Supabase backend via `SalesPipelineService`
   - localStorage for per-user preference persistence
   - Optimistic UI updates
   - Pipeline stages: `cold_dm → warm → tg_intro → booked → discovery_done → proposal_sent → proposal_call → v2_contract → v2_closed_won` (plus `orbit`, `v2_closed_lost`, `nurture`)
   - Action system with `getNextAction()` returning priority-sorted actionable items with alternatives
   - Activity log popup system (`openActivityLogPrompt`) vs slide-over (`openSlideOver`)
   - POC (Point of Contact) — separate from TG Handle, used before retrieving Telegram
   - `PocPlatform` type: `'twitter' | 'instagram' | 'linkedin' | 'telegram' | 'discord' | 'email' | 'other'`

     const [actionSort, setActionSort] = useState<'priority' | 'stage' | 'temperature' | 'value' | 'name'>(() => {
       if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && user?.id) {
         return (localStorage.getItem(`action_sort_${user.id}`) as any) || 'priority';

       return 'priority';

     **allActionItems / actionItems split:**
     ```typescript
     const allActionItems = useMemo(() => {
       const terminalStages = ['v2_closed_won', 'v2_closed_lost'];
       return opportunities
         .filter(opp => !terminalStages.includes(opp.stage))
         .map(opp => ({ opp, action: getNextAction(opp) }))
         .filter(({ action }) => action.isActionable)
         .sort((a, b) => {
           if (a.action.sortScore !== b.action.sortScore) return a.action.sortScore - b.action.sortScore;
           return (b.opp.temperature_score || 0) - (a.opp.temperature_score || 0);
         });
     }, [opportunities]);

     const actionItems = useMemo(() => {
       return allActionItems.filter(({ opp, action }) => {
         if (actionFilter === 'mine') return opp.owner_id === user?.id;
         if (actionFilter === 'urgent') return action.priority === 'urgent';
         return true;
       });
     }, [allActionItems, actionFilter, user?.id]);
     ```

     **Phase filters including orbit:**
     ```typescript
     const outreachActions = useMemo(() => actionItems.filter(({ opp }) => PRE_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage)), [actionItems]);
     const closingActions = useMemo(() => actionItems.filter(({ opp }) => POST_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage)), [actionItems]);
     const orbitActions = useMemo(() => actionItems.filter(({ opp }) => opp.stage === 'orbit'), [actionItems]);
     const allOutreachCount = useMemo(() => allActionItems.filter(({ opp }) => PRE_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage)).length, [allActionItems]);
     const allClosingCount = useMemo(() => allActionItems.filter(({ opp }) => POST_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage)).length, [allActionItems]);
     const allOrbitCount = useMemo(() => allActionItems.filter(({ opp }) => opp.stage === 'orbit').length, [allActionItems]);
     ```

     ```typescript
     if (!terminalStages.includes(opp.stage) && opp.stage !== 'orbit' && opp.next_meeting_at) {
       const meetingTime = new Date(opp.next_meeting_at);
       const now = new Date();
       const hoursSinceMeeting = (now.getTime() - meetingTime.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60);
       const lastContactAfterMeeting = opp.last_contacted_at && new Date(opp.last_contacted_at) > meetingTime;
       if (hoursSinceMeeting > 0 && hoursSinceMeeting <= 168 && !lastContactAfterMeeting) {
         if (opp.stage !== 'booked') {
           return { label: 'Log Meeting Outcome', hint: `Meeting was ${hoursSinceMeeting < 24 ? 'today' : `${Math.floor(hoursSinceMeeting / 24)}d ago`} — record what happened`, priority: 'urgent', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 0, alternatives: [
             { label: 'Reschedule', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },
             { label: 'No Show', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'warn' },
           ]};
         }
       }
     }
     ```

       if (daysSinceContact >= 7) {
         return { label: 'Re-engage or Orbit', hint: `${daysSinceContact}d since last contact — nudge them on TG or shelve`, priority: 'urgent', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 5, alternatives: [
           { label: 'Booked!', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'booked', variant: 'default', quick: true },
           { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
         ]};
       }
       // ... normal flow
     }
     ```

     **warm "Interested" quick alt with direct update handler:**
     ```typescript
     // In getNextAction warm default:
     return { label: 'Follow Up', ..., alternatives: [
       { label: 'Interested', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default', quick: true },
       { label: 'Got TG!', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'tg_intro', variant: 'default' },
       { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
     ]};

     // In quick alt click handler:
     onClick={async () => {
       if (quickAlt.label === 'Interested') {
         await SalesPipelineService.update(opp.id, { warm_sub_state: 'interested' });
         setOpportunities(prev => prev.map(o => o.id === opp.id ? { ...o, warm_sub_state: 'interested' } : o));
       } else if (quickAlt.actionType === 'stage_change' && quickAlt.targetStage) {
         handleStageChange(opp.id, quickAlt.targetStage, opp.stage);
       } else {
         openSlideOver(opp, ACTION_GUIDANCE[quickAlt.label]);
       }
     }}
     ```

     **discovery_done with proposal_sent_at fix:**
     ```typescript
     return { label: 'Update Stage', hint: 'Proposal already sent — move to the correct stage', priority: 'urgent', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'proposal_sent', isActionable: true, sortScore: 4, alternatives: [
       { label: 'Call Set', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'proposal_call', variant: 'default', quick: true },
       { label: 'To Contract', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_contract', variant: 'default' },
       { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
     ]};
     ```

     **booked past meeting time-sensitivity:**
     ```typescript
     const hoursSinceBookedMeeting = (Date.now() - new Date(opp.next_meeting_at).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60);
     const bookedPriority: ActionPriority = hoursSinceBookedMeeting <= 24 ? 'urgent' : hoursSinceBookedMeeting <= 72 ? 'high' : 'urgent';
     const bookedHint = hoursSinceBookedMeeting <= 24
       ? 'Meeting just happened — mark discovery complete'
       : hoursSinceBookedMeeting <= 72
         ? `Meeting was ${Math.floor(hoursSinceBookedMeeting / 24)}d ago — log outcome now`
         : `Meeting was ${Math.floor(hoursSinceBookedMeeting / 24)}d ago — overdue! Log outcome immediately`;
     const bookedScore = hoursSinceBookedMeeting <= 24 ? 2 : hoursSinceBookedMeeting <= 72 ? 8 : 1;
     ```

     **Orbit resurrect with re-engage options:**
     ```typescript
     return { label: 'Resurrect', ..., alternatives: [
       { label: 'Back to Warm', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'warm', variant: 'default', quick: true },
       { label: 'Book Meeting', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'booked', variant: 'default' },
       { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
     ]};
     ```

     **nurture stage action:**
     ```typescript
     case 'nurture': {
       const daysSinceNurtureContact = (() => {
         const d = opp.last_contacted_at || opp.updated_at;
         return d ? Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(d).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)) : 999;
       })();
       if (daysSinceNurtureContact >= 30) {
         return { label: 'Check In', hint: `${daysSinceNurtureContact}d since last contact — send a periodic check-in`, priority: 'medium', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 65, alternatives: [
           { label: 'Back to Warm', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'warm', variant: 'default', quick: true },
           { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
         ]};
       }
       return { label: 'Nurturing', hint: 'Recently contacted — check back later', priority: 'wait', actionType: 'none', isActionable: false, sortScore: 100, alternatives: [] };
     }
     ```

     **Top 5 urgency cards (final toned-down version):**
     ```typescript
     <Card className={`border-l-4 ${dashboardMetrics.bamfamViolations > 0 ? 'border-l-red-500 bg-red-50' : 'border-l-gray-200 bg-white'}`}>
       <CardContent className="pt-3 pb-3 px-4">
         <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 mb-1">
           <AlertTriangle className={`h-3.5 w-3.5 ${dashboardMetrics.bamfamViolations > 0 ? 'text-red-500' : 'text-gray-400'}`} />
           <p className={`text-[11px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider ${...}`}>BAMFAM</p>
         </div>
         <p className={`text-2xl font-bold leading-none ${...}`}>{dashboardMetrics.bamfamViolations}</p>
         <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-400 mt-1">No future meeting set</p>
       </CardContent>
     </Card>
     ```

   - **DB Migration** — Added `poc_platform` and `poc_handle` columns:
     ```sql
     ALTER TABLE crm_opportunities
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS poc_platform text DEFAULT NULL,
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS poc_handle text DEFAULT NULL;
     ```

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **User feedback: "Can you make it a bit less overwhelming"** — Initial card redesign with solid color fills, shadows, rings was too much. Toned down to border-l accent + light tinted bg.
   - **User feedback: "It still changes in the actions tab when I click all actions/my actions/urgent only"** — My first fix only addressed the phase mini-tabs (All/Outreach/Closing). The real issue was `actionItems` being filtered by `actionFilter` (all/mine/urgent). Fixed by splitting into `allActionItems` (unfiltered) and `actionItems` (filtered), using allActionItems for all badge counts.
   - **replace_all collision** — When trying to update `colSpan={9}`, found 2 matches. Had to use more specific context to uniquely identify the outreach table instance.
   - **Past meeting action blocking** — Identified that "Log Meeting Outcome" could block normal actions for 7 days. Added `lastContactAfterMeeting` check: if `last_contacted_at > meetingTime`, the prompt clears automatically.

5. Problem Solving:
   - Designed a system where action badge counts stay constant while the table rows filter — split unfiltered totals from filtered display lists
   - Solved the proposal_sent/proposal_call combination by keeping both stages but adding "To Contract" skip option
   - Built "Log Meeting Outcome" with smart guards: excludes booked (has own flow), checks lastContactAfterMeeting to auto-clear, 7-day expiry
   - Made "Interested" quick button directly update warm_sub_state via API + optimistic update without needing slide-over

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-26 13:51:23Z)**_

Build passes. The action sort/order filter is now fully implemented:

1. **State + persistence**: `actionSort` reads from `localStorage` on init and saves on change via `useEffect`
2. **Sort dropdown UI**: Added to the section header (right side) with a `DropdownMenu` showing 5 options — Priority, Stage, Temperature, Deal Value, Name (A-Z)
3. **Sorting logic**: Applied in `displayedActions` memo — priority uses the existing sortScore order, stage sorts by pipeline position, temperature/value sort descending, name sorts alphabetically
4. **Per-user**: Stored under `action_sort_${user.id}` in localStorage

---

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-26 13:57:17Z)**_

Build passes cleanly. Here's a summary of all 4 changes:

1. **Non-Urgent "Waiting" tab** — Added a new mini-tab with Clock icon in the actions section. It shows all opportunities that are in a waiting/cooling state (`isActionable: false`) — like "Wait 3d" or "Nurturing". Displays their name, stage, and current next step so you can see a full picture of what's in the pipeline without needing action.

2. **BAMFAM → Booking Needed** — Renamed the first urgency card from "BAMFAM" to "Booking Needed" with a Calendar icon instead of AlertTriangle. Same data, clearer label.

3. **Overall View tab** — Added an "Overall" tab (with LayoutGrid icon) next to Orbit. It shows three collapsible sections — Outreach, Pipeline, and Orbit — all collapsed by default. Click any section header to expand and see the full table for that area. Each section has a colored header (blue/emerald/amber) with the count badge.

4. **Newest/Oldest sort options** — Added "Newest First" and "Oldest First" to the action sort dropdown, sorting by `created_at` date. These are persisted per user alongside the other sort options.

---

Found the pipeline navigation entries in the Sidebar component. Here are the results:

## Pipeline Navigation Entries

The sidebar has **two separate pipeline entries** within the CRM Section:

### 1. Pipeline Tab (lines 282-296)
```tsx
{/* Pipeline tab */}
<Link href="/crm/pipeline" legacyBehavior>
  <Button
    asChild
    variant={pathname.startsWith('/crm/pipeline') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
    className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
    style={pathname.startsWith('/crm/pipeline') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
    title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Pipeline' : undefined}
  >
    <span>
      <TrendingUp className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Pipeline'}
    </span>
  </Button>
</Link>
```

### 2. Sales Pipeline Tab (lines 297-311)
```tsx
{/* Sales Pipeline tab */}
<Link href="/crm/sales-pipeline" legacyBehavior>
  <Button
    asChild
    variant={pathname.startsWith('/crm/sales-pipeline') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
    className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
    style={pathname.startsWith('/crm/sales-pipeline') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
    title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Sales' : undefined}
  >
    <span>
      <Target className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Sales'}
    </span>
  </Button>
</Link>
```

## Key Observations

- Both entries are located in the **CRM Section** (starting at line 274)
- Both links check `pathname.startsWith()` to determine the active state
- The "Pipeline" entry uses `/crm/pipeline` with a TrendingUp icon
- The "Sales Pipeline" entry uses `/crm/sales-pipeline` with a Target icon
- When collapsed, the "Sales" tab displays as "Sales" in the title tooltip
- Both entries follow the same styling pattern with conditional coloring based on active state

    43→      year: 'numeric',
    44→      month: 'long',
    45→      day: 'numeric'

    56→          </li>
    57→        );
    58→      }

    64→        );
    65→      }
    66→      if (line.trim().startsWith('## ')) {

    72→      }

   523→                      className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   524→                      style={pathname.startsWith('/admin/changelog') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   525→                      title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Changelog' : undefined}
   526→                    >
   527→                      <span>
   528→                        <Sparkles className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   529→                        {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Changelog'}
   530→                      </span>
   531→                    </Button>
   532→                  </Link>
   533→                )}
   534→                {/* Archive tab */}
   535→                <Link href="/archive" legacyBehavior>
   536→                  <Button
   537→                    asChild
   538→                    variant={pathname.startsWith('/archive') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   539→                    className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   540→                    style={pathname.startsWith('/archive') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   541→                    title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Archive' : undefined}
   542→                  >
   543→                    <span>
   544→                      <Archive className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   545→                      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Archive'}
   546→                    </span>
   547→                  </Button>

   550→
   551→            </nav>
   552→            {/* Collapse Button at Bottom */}
   553→            <div className="p-4 border-t border-gray-200">
   554→              <div className="flex justify-center">
   555→                <Button
   556→                  variant="ghost"
   557→                  size="sm"
   558→                  onClick={handleSidebarToggle}
   559→                  className="hover:bg-gray-100 w-auto px-2"
   560→                  title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Expand sidebar' : 'Collapse sidebar'}
   561→                >
   562→                  {isSidebarCollapsed ? (
   563→                    <PanelLeftOpen className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-600" />
   564→                  ) : (
   565→                    <PanelLeftClose className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-600" />
   566→                  )}
   567→                </Button>
   568→              </div>
   569→            </div>
   570→          </div>
   571→        </aside>
   572→        {/* Main Content */}
   573→        <main className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6">{children}</main>
   574→      </div>
   575→
   576→      {/* Changelog History Dialog */}
   577→      <Dialog open={isChangelogOpen} onOpenChange={(open) => {
   578→        setIsChangelogOpen(open);
   579→        if (open) setChangelogPage(0);
   580→      }}>
   581→        <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-lg max-h-[80vh]">
   582→          <DialogHeader>
   583→            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   584→              <Sparkles className="h-5 w-5 text-[#3e8692]" />
   585→              <DialogTitle className="text-xl">Changelog</DialogTitle>
   586→            </div>
   587→            <DialogDescription>
   588→              Version history and updates
   589→            </DialogDescription>
   590→          </DialogHeader>
   591→          <ScrollArea className="max-h-[50vh] pr-4">
   592→            <div className="space-y-6">
   593→              {changelogs
   594→                .slice(changelogPage * changelogsPerPage, (changelogPage + 1) * changelogsPerPage)
   595→                .map((changelog, idx) => (
   596→                <div key={changelog.id} className={idx > 0 ? 'border-t pt-6' : ''}>
   597→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
   598→                    <Badge
   599→                      variant="secondary"
   600→                      className="bg-[#3e8692]/10 text-[#3e8692]"
   601→                    >
   602→                      v{changelog.version}
   603→                    </Badge>
   604→                    {changelog.published_at && (
   605→                      <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">
   606→                        {formatChangelogDate(changelog.published_at)}
   607→                      </span>
   608→                    )}
   609→                  </div>
   610→                  <h3 className="font-medium text-gray-900 mb-2">
   611→                    {changelog.title}
   612→                  </h3>
   613→                  <div className="space-y-1">
   614→                    {renderChangelogContent(changelog.content)}
   615→                  </div>
   616→                </div>
   617→              ))}
   618→              {changelogs.length === 0 && (
   619→                <p className="text-gray-500 text-center py-4">
   620→                  No changelogs available yet.
   621→                </p>
   622→              )}
   623→            </div>
   624→          </ScrollArea>
   625→          {changelogs.length > changelogsPerPage && (
   626→            <div className="flex items-center justify-between pt-4 border-t">
   627→              <Button
   628→                variant="outline"
   629→                size="sm"
   630→                onClick={() => setChangelogPage(p => Math.max(0, p - 1))}
   631→                disabled={changelogPage === 0}
   632→              >
   633→                <ChevronLeft className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
   634→                Previous
   635→              </Button>
   636→              <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">
   637→                Page {changelogPage + 1} of {Math.ceil(changelogs.length / changelogsPerPage)}
   638→              </span>
   639→              <Button
   640→                variant="outline"
   641→                size="sm"
   642→                onClick={() => setChangelogPage(p => Math.min(Math.ceil(changelogs.length / changelogsPerPage) - 1, p + 1))}
   643→                disabled={changelogPage >= Math.ceil(changelogs.length / changelogsPerPage) - 1}
   644→              >
   645→                Next
   646→                <ChevronRight className="h-4 w-4 ml-1" />
   647→              </Button>
   648→            </div>
   649→          )}
   650→        </DialogContent>
   651→      </Dialog>
   652→    </div>
   653→  );
   654→}
```
</details></tool-use>

Found the pipeline navigation entries in the Sidebar component. Here are the results:

## Pipeline Navigation Entries

The sidebar has **two separate pipeline entries** within the CRM Section:

### 1. Pipeline Tab (lines 282-296)
```tsx
{/* Pipeline tab */}
<Link href="/crm/pipeline" legacyBehavior>
  <Button
    asChild
    variant={pathname.startsWith('/crm/pipeline') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
    className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
    style={pathname.startsWith('/crm/pipeline') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
    title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Pipeline' : undefined}
  >
    <span>
      <TrendingUp className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Pipeline'}
    </span>
  </Button>
</Link>
```

### 2. Sales Pipeline Tab (lines 297-311)
```tsx
{/* Sales Pipeline tab */}
<Link href="/crm/sales-pipeline" legacyBehavior>
  <Button
    asChild
    variant={pathname.startsWith('/crm/sales-pipeline') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
    className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
    style={pathname.startsWith('/crm/sales-pipeline') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
    title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Sales' : undefined}
  >
    <span>
      <Target className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Sales'}
    </span>
  </Button>
</Link>
```

## Key Observations

- Both entries are located in the **CRM Section** (starting at line 274)
- Both links check `pathname.startsWith()` to determine the active state
- The "Pipeline" entry uses `/crm/pipeline` with a TrendingUp icon
- The "Sales Pipeline" entry uses `/crm/sales-pipeline` with a Target icon
- When collapsed, the "Sales" tab displays as "Sales" in the title tooltip
- Both entries follow the same styling pattern with conditional coloring based on active state

The file path is: `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/components/Sidebar.tsx`
